papers.title: Augmented Equivariant Mesh Networks for Anatomical Segmentation
papers.abstract: Anatomical mesh segmentation requires models that operate directly on irregular surface geometry while remaining robust to arbitrary patient pose and mesh resolution variation. Existing task-specific mesh and point-cloud methods are not equivariant, and can degrade sharply under test-time perturbation, for example dropping by 25-26 IoU points on intraoral scan segmentation at $40^\circ$ tilt. We present EAMS, an Equivariant Anatomical Mesh Segmentor built on Equivariant Mesh Neural Networks (EMNN), and evaluate it across four clinically distinct tasks spanning edge-, vertex-, and face-level supervision. We combine intrinsic mesh descriptors with anatomy-aware priors, including PCA-derived frames for dental arches and liver surfaces, and augment message passing to provide lightweight global context. Across intracranial aneurysm and intraoral segmentation, EAMS variants are competitive with specialized baselines on unperturbed inputs while remaining stable under geometric perturbations, and on liver surfaces they expose a favorable trade-off between canonical-pose accuracy and rotation robustness. These results show that a lightweight ($<2$M parameters) equivariant framework can deliver robust anatomical mesh segmentation across diverse supervision types without task-specific architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级等变网格网络EAMS，在解剖分割中实现旋转鲁棒性且无需任务特定架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 解剖网格分割需要直接处理不规则表面几何的模型，同时要对任意患者姿态和网格分辨率变化保持鲁棒。现有方法缺乏等变性，在测试时扰动下性能急剧下降（如口内扫描分割在40°倾斜时IoU下降25-26点）。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量级、等变且鲁棒的网格分割模型，能在多种解剖任务（边缘、顶点、面级监督）下保持性能稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有非等变方法在几何扰动下性能严重退化（如40°倾斜导致IoU下降25-26点），而等变框架能保持稳定。
analysis.method: 基于等变网格神经网络（EMNN），结合内在网格描述子与解剖先验（如PCA导出的牙弓/肝脏表面坐标系），并通过增强消息传递提供轻量级全局上下文。
contributions: 提出EAMS，首个轻量级（<2M参数）等变解剖网格分割框架，适用于多种监督类型。
在颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描和肝脏表面三个临床任务上验证，在无扰动输入下与专用基线竞争，并在几何扰动下保持鲁棒。
analysis.experiments: 在四个临床任务（颅内动脉瘤、口内扫描、肝脏表面）上评估，涵盖边缘、顶点、面级监督。与专用基线比较，在无扰动输入上表现相当，在几何扰动下保持稳定。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅在特定解剖结构（牙弓、肝脏）上验证了PCA先验的有效性。
轻量级设计可能在大规模或高分辨率网格上性能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级等变网格网络EAMS，在解剖分割中实现旋转鲁棒性且无需任务特定架构。

papers.title: cotomi Act: Learning to Automate Work by Watching You
papers.abstract: What if a browser agent could learn your work simply by watching you do it? We present cotomi Act, a browser-based computer-using agent that combines reliable multi-step task execution with persistent organizational knowledge learned from user behavior. For execution, an agent scaffold with adaptive lazy observation, verbal-diff-based history compression, coarse-grained actions, and test-time scaling via best-of-N action selection achieves 80.4% on the 179-task WebArena human-evaluation subset, exceeding the reported 78.2% human baseline. For organizational knowledge, a behavior-to-knowledge pipeline passively observes the user's browsing and progressively abstracts it into artifacts (task boards, wiki) exposed through a shared workspace editable by both user and agent. A controlled proxy evaluation confirms that task success improves as behavior-derived knowledge accumulates. In our live demonstration, attendees interact with the system in a real browser, issuing tasks and observing end-to-end autonomous execution and shared knowledge management.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个通过观察用户行为学习组织知识的浏览器代理，在WebArena上超越人类基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有浏览器代理缺乏从用户日常操作中持续学习并积累组织知识的能力，导致每次任务都从零开始，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何让浏览器代理既能可靠执行多步任务，又能从用户行为中被动学习并积累可复用的组织知识。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合自适应懒观察、基于文本差异的历史压缩、粗粒度动作和测试时扩展（best-of-N动作选择）的执行框架，以及行为到知识流水线（将用户浏览行为抽象为任务板、wiki等工件）。
contributions: 提出cotomi Act代理，在WebArena人类评估子集上达到80.4%成功率，超过人类基线78.2%。
设计行为到知识流水线，使代理能从用户行为中积累组织知识并提升任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在WebArena的179任务人类评估子集上评估，达到80.4%成功率；通过受控代理评估验证知识积累提升任务成功率。
limitations: 知识积累效果仅在代理评估中验证，缺乏真实用户长期使用数据。
可能依赖特定浏览器环境，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个通过观察用户行为学习组织知识的浏览器代理，在WebArena上超越人类基线。

papers.title: MAGE: Safeguarding LLM Agents against Long-Horizon Threats via Shadow Memory
papers.abstract: As large language model (LLM)-powered agents are increasingly deployed to perform complex, real-world tasks, they face a growing class of attacks that exploit extended user-agent-environment interactions to pursue malicious objectives improbable in single-turn settings. Such long-horizon threats pose significant risks to the safe deployment of LLM agents in critical domains. In this paper, we present MAGE (Memory As Guardrail Enforcement), a novel defensive framework designed to counter a wide range of long-horizon threats. Inspired by the "shadow stack" abstraction in systems security, MAGE maintains a dedicated, safety-focused agentic memory that distills and retains safety-critical context across the agent's full execution trajectory, leveraging this shadow memory to proactively assess the risk of pending actions prior to their execution. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that MAGE substantially outperforms existing defenses across diverse long-horizon threats in detection accuracy, achieves early-stage detection for the majority of attacks, and introduces only negligible overhead to agent utility. To our best knowledge, MAGE represents the first framework to detect and mitigate long-horizon threats using an agentic memory approach, establishing a new paradigm for this critical challenge and opening promising directions for future research.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于影子记忆的防御框架MAGE，用于检测和缓解LLM Agent在长程交互中的安全威胁。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent在复杂真实任务中面临利用长程交互的恶意攻击，现有防御方法在单轮设置下有效，但难以应对多步交互中的长期威胁，亟需新的安全机制。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测和缓解LLM Agent在执行长程任务时面临的长期威胁（long-horizon threats）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 受系统安全中“影子栈”抽象启发，MAGE维护一个专用的安全导向智能体记忆（shadow memory），在Agent完整执行轨迹中提取并保留安全关键上下文，利用该影子记忆在执行前主动评估待执行动作的风险。
contributions: 提出首个基于智能体记忆方法检测和缓解长程威胁的防御框架MAGE。
在多种长程威胁场景下，MAGE在检测准确率上显著优于现有防御，且能实现早期检测，对Agent效用影响极小。
analysis.experiments: 在多种长程威胁场景下评估，MAGE在检测准确率上显著优于现有防御，能实现大部分攻击的早期检测，且对Agent效用影响可忽略。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的安全上下文提取，对复杂动态环境适应性待验证。
影子记忆的维护可能增加计算开销，尽管摘要称开销可忽略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于影子记忆的防御框架MAGE，用于检测和缓解LLM Agent在长程交互中的安全威胁。

papers.title: Communication Dynamics Neural Networks: FFT-Diagonalized Layers for Improved Hessian Conditioning at Reduced Parameter Count
papers.abstract: Background and motivation. The Communication Dynamics (CD) framework, introduced in two earlier papers for atomic-energy prediction and field-induced superconductivity, treats each physical channel as a (2l+1)-vertex polygon whose discrete Fourier transform yields its energy spectrum. This paper applies the same circulant-spectral machinery to neural-network design. Layer construction. CDLinear is a block-circulant linear layer with block size B = 2l+1 and 1/B the parameter count of a dense layer of equal input/output dimensions. Three properties follow from the construction. (i) The Hessian of mean-squared loss with respect to the weights is diagonalized by the discrete Fourier transform, with eigenvalues |F[Xj](k)|^2 read directly from the input statistics (Theorem 1). (ii) Under input pre-whitening, the population Hessian condition number satisfies kappa = 1 exactly, with the empirical condition number bounded by 1+O(sqrt(B/N)) on N samples (Theorem 2). (iii) The Shannon noise rate alpha_CD = 0.0118 calibrated in the parent CD papers from the Na D-doublet specifies a transferable, non-arbitrary dropout rate. Empirical evaluation. A CDLinear MLP at B = 4 achieves 97.50% +/- 0.23% test accuracy with 2,380 parameters versus 98.15% +/- 0.47% for a parameter-matched dense MLP at 8,970 parameters, a 3.8x parameter reduction at 0.65% accuracy cost, within one standard deviation of the seed-to-seed spread. The CD-MLP mean Hessian condition number kappa = 1.9x10^4 is 310x smaller than the dense baseline kappa = 5.9x10^6, in quantitative agreement with Theorem 2.

analysis.tldr: 提出通信动力学神经网络，通过FFT对角化Hessian矩阵，以更少参数实现接近全连接层的性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统全连接层参数多、Hessian条件数大导致优化困难，而现有方法缺乏理论保证的Hessian对角化结构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种线性层，使其Hessian矩阵可被FFT对角化，从而改善条件数并减少参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CDLinear层，基于块循环矩阵构造，块大小B=2l+1，参数为全连接层的1/B；利用离散傅里叶变换对角化Hessian，并引入从物理校准的Shannon噪声率作为dropout率。
contributions: 提出CDLinear层，参数效率高且Hessian被FFT对角化，条件数理论上可达1。
理论证明输入白化后总体Hessian条件数为1，经验条件数有界。
实验验证CD-MLP在MNIST上以3.8倍参数减少达到接近全连接层的精度，且条件数降低310倍。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST上测试CDLinear MLP（B=4，2380参数）与参数匹配的全连接MLP（8970参数），CD-MLP准确率97.50% vs 98.15%，条件数1.9e4 vs 5.9e6。
limitations: 仅在小规模MNIST上验证，未在更大数据集或现代架构上测试。
块大小B的选择依赖物理启发，可能不通用。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出通信动力学神经网络，通过FFT对角化Hessian矩阵，以更少参数实现接近全连接层的性能。

papers.title: Evaluating Prompting and Execution-Based Methods for Deterministic Computation in LLMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in natural language understanding and reasoning. However, their ability to perform exact, deterministic computation remains unclear. In this work, we systematically evaluate multiple prompting strategies, including Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Least-to-Most decomposition, Program-of-Thought (PoT), and Self-Consistency (SC), on tasks requiring precise and error-free outputs, including binary counting, longest substring detection, and arithmetic evaluation. To support this study, we introduce a synthetic dataset with diverse natural language instructions, enabling controlled evaluation of exact computation across multiple task types. Our results show that standard prompting methods achieve only moderate accuracy on sequence-based tasks. CoT provides limited improvement, while Least-to-Most suffers from error accumulation. In contrast, PoT achieves perfect accuracy by generating executable code and delegating computation to an external interpreter. Self-Consistency improves robustness through majority voting, but incurs substantial computational overhead. We further train a small domain-specific model (CodeT5-small) to generate executable programs, which achieves perfect accuracy on held-out synthetic test data across all tasks with minimal training cost. Overall, our findings suggest that LLMs may simulate reasoning patterns rather than reliably perform exact symbolic computation. For deterministic tasks, combining LLMs with external tools or using specialized models provides a more reliable and efficient solution.

analysis.tldr: LLM在确定性计算任务上表现不佳，结合外部工具或专用模型更可靠高效。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在自然语言理解和推理上表现优异，但其执行精确、确定性计算的能力尚不明确，而这类任务在数学、编程等领域至关重要。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在需要精确输出的确定性计算任务（如二进制计数、最长子串检测、算术求值）上的表现，并探索更可靠的解决方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准提示方法在序列任务上准确率中等；CoT改进有限；Least-to-Most存在错误累积；PoT通过代码执行达到完美准确率；Self-Consistency通过多数投票提升鲁棒性但计算开销大。
analysis.method: 系统评估多种提示策略（CoT、Least-to-Most、PoT、SC），并训练小型专用模型（CodeT5-small）生成可执行程序。
contributions: 引入一个包含多样化自然语言指令的合成数据集，用于控制性评估精确计算。
系统比较多种提示策略在确定性计算任务上的表现，揭示LLM模拟推理而非精确计算的倾向。
证明PoT和专用小模型（CodeT5-small）在确定性任务上更可靠高效。
analysis.experiments: 在二进制计数、最长子串检测和算术求值任务上评估多种方法，PoT和CodeT5-small在合成测试集上达到完美准确率。
limitations: 合成数据集可能无法完全反映真实场景的复杂性。
PoT依赖外部解释器，可能引入额外依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在确定性计算任务上表现不佳，结合外部工具或专用模型更可靠高效。

papers.title: Self-Mined Hardness for Safety Fine-Tuning
papers.abstract: Safety fine-tuning of language models typically requires a curated adversarial dataset. We take a different approach: score each candidate prompt's difficulty by how often the target model's own rollouts are judged harmful, then fine-tune on the hardest prompts paired with the model's own non-jailbroken rollouts. On Llama-3-8B-Instruct and Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct, this approach cuts the WildJailbreak attack success rate from 11.5% and 20.1% down to 1-3%, but pushes refusal on jailbreak-shaped benign prompts from 14-22% to 74-94%. Interleaving the same hard prompts 1:1 with adversarially-framed benign prompts (prompts that look like jailbreaks but have benign intent) cuts that refusal back down to 30-51% on 8B and 52-72% on 3B, at a cost of 2-6 percentage points of attack success rate. Within the mixed regime, training on the hardest half of the eligible pool rather than a random half cuts the remaining ASR by 35-50% (about 3 percentage points) on both models.

analysis.tldr: 用模型自身生成的有害性评分筛选最难提示进行安全微调，虽降低攻击成功率但导致过度拒绝，混合良性提示可缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全微调依赖人工策划的对抗数据集，成本高且泛化性有限，需要更自动化的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成高质量对抗样本进行安全微调，同时避免过度拒绝。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅用最难提示微调会大幅提升拒绝率（14-22%→74-94%），混合良性提示可降低至30-72%，但攻击成功率略有上升。
analysis.method: 用目标模型自身 rollout 的有害性评分作为难度指标，选择最难提示，并与模型自身非越狱 rollout 配对进行安全微调；进一步混合对抗性框架的良性提示。
contributions: 提出自挖掘难度（Self-Mined Hardness）方法，无需外部对抗数据集。
揭示仅用最难提示微调导致过度拒绝，并验证混合良性提示的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 Llama-3-8B-Instruct 和 Llama-3.2-3B-Instruct 上评估，WildJailbreak 攻击成功率从 11.5%/20.1% 降至 1-3%，但拒绝率升至 74-94%；混合后拒绝率降至 30-72%，ASR 上升 2-6 个百分点。
limitations: 仅在两个模型上验证，泛化性未知。
混合比例需手动调整，可能依赖特定数据集。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用模型自身生成的有害性评分筛选最难提示进行安全微调，虽降低攻击成功率但导致过度拒绝，混合良性提示可缓解。

papers.title: Synthetic Data Generation for Long-Tail Medical Image Classification: A Case Study in Skin Lesions
papers.abstract: Long-tailed class distributions are pervasive in multi-class medical datasets and pose significant challenges for deep learning models which typically underperform on tail classes with limited samples. This limitation is particularly problematic in medical applications, where rare classes often correspond to severe or high-risk diseases and therefore require high diagnostic accuracy. Existing solutions-including specialized architectures, rebalanced loss functions, and handcrafted data augmentation-offer only marginal improvements and struggle to scale due to their limited and largely deterministic variability. To address these challenges, we introduce a diffusion-model-driven synthetic data augmentation pipeline tailored for medical long-tailed classification. Our approach features a novel inpainting diffusion model combined with an Out-of-Distribution (OOD) post-selection mechanism to ensure diverse, realistic, and clinically meaningful synthetic samples. Evaluated on the ISIC2019 skin lesion classification dataset, one of the largest and most imbalanced medical imaging benchmarks, our method yields substantial improvements in overall performance, with particularly pronounced gains on tail classes with more than $28\%$ improvement on the class with the fewest samples. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of diffusion-based augmentation in mitigating long-tail imbalance and enhancing medical classification robustness.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散模型驱动的合成数据增强管道，通过修复扩散模型和OOD后选择机制生成高质量合成样本，显著提升长尾医学图像分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学多类数据集中长尾分布导致深度学习模型在尾部类别（常对应严重疾病）上性能不佳，现有方法（如特殊架构、重平衡损失、数据增强）改进有限且可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何生成多样、真实且临床有意义的合成样本以缓解医学图像分类中的长尾不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出扩散模型驱动的合成数据增强管道，包括一个新颖的修复扩散模型用于生成合成样本，以及一个OOD后选择机制确保样本多样性和真实性。
contributions: 提出针对医学长尾分类的扩散模型驱动合成数据增强管道。
引入修复扩散模型与OOD后选择机制，生成多样、真实且临床有意义的合成样本。
在ISIC2019数据集上验证，尾部类别性能提升超过28%。
analysis.experiments: 在ISIC2019皮肤病变分类数据集上评估，尾部类别（样本最少的类）性能提升超过28%。
limitations: 仅针对皮肤病变数据集验证，泛化性未知。
扩散模型生成的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散模型驱动的合成数据增强管道，通过修复扩散模型和OOD后选择机制生成高质量合成样本，显著提升长尾医学图像分类性能。

papers.title: MenuNet: A Strategy-Proof Mechanism for Matching Markets
papers.abstract: Strategy-proofness is a fundamental desideratum in mechanism design, ensuring truthful reporting and robust participation. Stability is another central requirement in matching markets, widely adopted in applications such as school choice and labor market clearing. In practice, however, these markets are invariably governed by complex distributional constraints, ranging from diversity quotas and regional balance to global capacity slacks, under which stable matchings often fail to exist. This raises a fundamental question: how to distribute unavoidable instability across agents while preserving strategy-proofness? To address this, we propose \texttt{MenuNet}, a strategy-proof mechanism design framework based on a neural representation of menus. Rather than directly constructing assignments, \texttt{MenuNet} learns to generate personalized probabilistic menus, from which assignments are realized via a structured sequential choice rule that guarantees strategy-proofness by construction. By decomposing stability into fairness (no envy) and non-wastefulness, our approach models these properties as vector-valued quantities and optimizes their distribution through differentiable objectives, providing a principled trade-off between competing axioms. Empirically, \texttt{MenuNet} navigates this trade-off effectively: it consistently outperforms Random Serial Dictatorship (RSD) in terms of envy and Deferred Acceptance (DA) in terms of waste, while maintaining scalability and computational efficiency. These results suggest that learning-based menu mechanisms provide a flexible and scalable paradigm for mechanism design in highly constrained, real-world environments.

analysis.tldr: MenuNet 通过神经菜单表示实现防策略匹配，在约束市场中平衡公平与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实匹配市场（如学校选择、劳动力市场）常受复杂分布约束（如多样性配额、区域平衡），导致稳定匹配不存在，而传统机制（如 DA、RSD）在约束下难以兼顾防策略性、公平性和非浪费性。
analysis.problem: 如何在保证防策略性的前提下，在约束匹配市场中合理分配不可避免的不稳定性，并平衡公平（无嫉妒）与非浪费性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 MenuNet 框架，学习生成个性化概率菜单，通过结构化顺序选择规则实现防策略性；将稳定性分解为公平性和非浪费性，建模为向量值目标并通过可微优化权衡。
contributions: 提出基于神经菜单表示的防策略匹配机制设计框架 MenuNet。
将稳定性分解为公平性和非浪费性，并通过可微优化实现原则性权衡。
实验表明 MenuNet 在嫉妒性上优于 RSD，在浪费性上优于 DA，且保持可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成或真实匹配市场数据上评估，与 RSD 和 DA 对比，显示 MenuNet 在嫉妒性和浪费性指标上更优。
limitations: 可能依赖菜单表示的可学习性，在极端约束下性能未知。
未讨论多轮或动态匹配场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MenuNet 通过神经菜单表示实现防策略匹配，在约束市场中平衡公平与效率。

papers.title: When Agents Handle Secrets: A Survey of Confidential Computing for Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Agentic AI systems, specifically LLM-driven agents that plan, invoke tools, maintain persistent memory, and delegate tasks to peer agents via protocols such as MCP and A2A, introduce a threat surface that differs materially from standalone model inference. Agents accumulate sensitive context, hold credentials, and operate across pipelines no single party fully controls, enabling prompt injection, context exfiltration, credential theft, and inter-agent message poisoning. Current defenses operate entirely within the software stack and can be silently bypassed by a sufficiently privileged adversary such as a compromised cloud operator. Confidential computing (CC) offers a hardware-rooted alternative: Trusted Execution Environments (TEEs) isolate agent code and data from privileged system software, while remote attestation enables verifiable trust across distributed deployments. This survey synthesizes the design space in four parts: (i) a unified taxonomy of six TEE platforms (Intel SGX, Intel TDX, AMD SEV-SNP, ARM TrustZone, ARM CCA, and NVIDIA H100 CC) covering deployment roles and performance tradeoffs; (ii) an agent-centric threat model spanning perception, planning, memory, action, and coordination layers mapped to nine security goals; (iii) a comparative survey of CC-based defenses distinguishing findings that transfer from single-call inference versus what requires new agentic designs; and (iv) six open challenges including compound attestation for multi-hop agent chains and GPU-TEE performance at LLM scale. While several hardware trust primitives appear mature enough for targeted deployments, no broadly established end-to-end framework yet binds them into a coherent security substrate for production agentic AI.

analysis.tldr: 综述机密计算如何用TEE保护LLM驱动的智能体系统免受特权级攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM智能体在规划、工具调用、持久记忆和代理间通信中积累敏感上下文和凭证，现有纯软件防御可被特权对手（如云运营商）绕过，亟需硬件级安全方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用机密计算（TEE和远程证明）为分布式智能体AI系统提供可验证的硬件级安全保护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前防御完全在软件栈内，可被足够特权的对手静默绕过；同时现有TEE方案在智能体场景下存在复合证明、GPU性能等未解决挑战。
analysis.method: 系统综述：提出六种TEE平台统一分类法、智能体中心威胁模型（九大安全目标）、基于CC的防御比较，并总结六大开放挑战。
contributions: 提出涵盖六种TEE平台的统一分类法，分析部署角色与性能权衡。
构建智能体中心威胁模型，覆盖感知、规划、记忆、行动和协调层，映射九大安全目标。
比较基于CC的防御，区分从单次推理迁移的发现与需要新智能体设计的发现。
识别六大开放挑战，包括多跳智能体链的复合证明和LLM规模下的GPU-TEE性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实验验证或定量性能评估。
未给出端到端框架的具体实现或部署指南。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述机密计算如何用TEE保护LLM驱动的智能体系统免受特权级攻击。

papers.title: ADAPTS: Agentic Decomposition for Automated Protocol-agnostic Tracking of Symptoms
papers.abstract: Modeling latent clinical constructs from unconstrained clinical interactions is a unique challenge in affective computing. We present ADAPTS (Agentic Decomposition for Automated Protocol-agnostic Tracking of Symptoms), a framework for automated rating of depression and anxiety severity using a mixture-of-agents LLM architecture. This approach decomposes long-form clinical interviews into symptom-specific reasoning tasks, producing auditable justifications while preserving temporal and speaker alignment. Generalization was evaluated across two independent datasets ($N=204$) with distinct interview structures. On high-discrepancy interviews, automated ratings approximated expert benchmarks ($\text{absolute error}=22$) more closely than original human ratings ($\text{absolute error}=26$). Implementing an ``extended'' protocol that incorporates qualitative clinical conventions significantly stabilized ratings, with absolute agreement reaching $\text{ICC(2,1)} = 0.877$. These findings suggest that the ADAPTS framework enables promising evaluations of psychiatric severity. While the current implementation is purely text-based, the underlying architecture is readily extensible to multimodal inputs, including acoustic and visual features. By approximating expert-level precision in a protocol-agnostic manner, this framework provides a foundation for objective and scalable psychiatric assessment, especially in resource-limited settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADAPTS框架，用混合专家LLM架构分解临床访谈，实现抑郁症和焦虑症严重程度的自动化评分。
analysis.research_motivation: 从非结构化临床交互中建模潜在临床构念是情感计算中的独特挑战，传统方法依赖人工评分，耗时且主观。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化、协议无关地评估抑郁和焦虑严重程度，并生成可审计的推理过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用混合专家LLM架构，将长临床访谈分解为症状特定推理任务，保持时间与说话者对齐，生成可审计的评分依据。
contributions: 提出ADAPTS框架，实现协议无关的自动化症状追踪。
在两个独立数据集上验证，高差异访谈中自动评分优于原始人工评分。
扩展协议融入临床惯例，显著提升评分稳定性（ICC=0.877）。
analysis.experiments: 在两个独立数据集（N=204）上评估，使用绝对误差和ICC指标，高差异访谈中自动评分绝对误差22优于人工26，扩展协议后ICC(2,1)=0.877。
limitations: 当前实现仅基于文本，未纳入多模态信息。
数据集规模较小（N=204），泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADAPTS框架，用混合专家LLM架构分解临床访谈，实现抑郁症和焦虑症严重程度的自动化评分。

papers.title: Resource Utilization of Differentiable Logic Gate Networks Deployed on FPGAs
papers.abstract: On-edge machine learning (ML) often strives to maximize the intelligence of small models while miniaturizing the circuit size and power needed to perform inference. Meeting these needs, differentiable Logic Gate Networks (LGN) have demonstrated nanosecond-scale prediction speeds while reducing the required resources as compares to traditional binary neural networks. Despite these benefits, the trade-offs between LGN parameters and resulting hardware synthesis characteristics are not well characterized. This paper therefore studies the tradeoffs between power, resource utilization, inference speed, and model accuracy when varying the depth and width of LGNs synthesized for Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGA). Results reveal that the final layer of an LGN is critical to minimize timing and resource usage (i.e. 28\% decrease), as this layer dictates the logic size of summing operations. Subject to timing and routing constraints, deeper and wider LGNs can be synthesized for FPGA when the final layer is narrow. Further tradeoffs are presented to help ML engineers select baseline LGN architectures for FPGAs with a set number of Look Up Tables (LUT).

analysis.tldr: 研究可微分逻辑门网络在FPGA上部署时深度和宽度对功耗、资源利用、推理速度和准确率的权衡，发现最终层宽度是关键瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘机器学习追求小模型高智能，同时最小化电路尺寸和功耗；可微分逻辑门网络（LGN）相比传统二值神经网络能实现纳秒级预测并减少资源消耗，但其参数与硬件综合特性之间的权衡尚未被充分研究。
analysis.problem: 量化可微分逻辑门网络（LGN）的深度和宽度变化对FPGA上功耗、资源利用、推理速度和模型准确率之间的权衡关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最终层是LGN的关键瓶颈，它决定了求和操作的逻辑大小；当最终层较窄时，更深更宽的LGN也能在满足时序和布线约束下综合到FPGA上。
analysis.method: 通过改变LGN的深度和宽度，在FPGA上综合并测量功耗、资源利用（LUT数）、推理速度和准确率，分析最终层宽度的影响。
contributions: 揭示了LGN最终层宽度对FPGA资源利用和时序的关键影响，窄最终层可减少28%的资源使用。
提供了帮助ML工程师为给定LUT数量的FPGA选择基线LGN架构的权衡指南。
analysis.experiments: 在FPGA上综合不同深度和宽度的LGN，测量功耗、资源利用、推理速度和准确率，并对比最终层宽度的影响。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅针对FPGA平台，可能不适用于ASIC或其他硬件。
未讨论训练过程对硬件综合的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究可微分逻辑门网络在FPGA上部署时深度和宽度对功耗、资源利用、推理速度和准确率的权衡，发现最终层宽度是关键瓶颈。

papers.title: Human-Provenance Verification should be Treated as Labor Infrastructure in AI-Saturated Markets
papers.abstract: We argue that AI-saturated markets are likely to create Veblen-good premiums, which we term human-provenance premiums, for verified human presence, and hence AI governance should treat human-provenance verification as labor infrastructure. Generative and agentic AI systems lower the cost of many standardized cognitive, creative, and coordination tasks, weakening the scarcity premiums that have supported much middle-tier knowledge work. We argue that this pressure may produce an asymmetric barbell-shaped structure of value capture in advanced economies: high-volume synthetic production controlled by owners of AI infrastructure at one pole, and scarce, high-status human labor valued for verified human presence at the other. We advance three claims. First, AI compresses the value of standardized middle-tier labor by making good-enough synthetic substitutes scalable at low marginal cost, hollowing out the middle of the skill distribution currently categorized by knowledge work. Second, this compression reallocates demand for human labor toward work valued for its visible human character. We term this performative humanity and distinguish three forms of labor: relational presence, aesthetic provenance, and accountability. Third, as these premiums depend on credible verification, AI governance should treat human-provenance systems as labor infrastructure rather than as luxury authenticity labels. To evaluate hybrid human-AI work, we propose constitutive human presence as the relevant standard: human labor retains premium value when human judgment, attention, accountability, authorship, or relational participation is not incidental to the output but constitutive of what is being purchased.

analysis.tldr: 论文主张在AI饱和市场中，人类溯源验证应被视为劳动基础设施，而非奢侈品标签。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI降低了标准化认知、创意和协调任务的成本，削弱了支撑中层知识工作的稀缺溢价，可能导致价值捕获的不对称结构，因此需要重新思考AI治理中人类劳动的定位。
analysis.problem: 如何应对AI饱和市场中人类劳动价值被压缩的问题，并设计合理的治理框架来保护人类溯源溢价。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出AI饱和市场可能产生Veblen-good溢价（人类溯源溢价），导致价值捕获呈杠铃形结构：一端是AI基础设施所有者控制的高容量合成生产，另一端是稀缺、高地位的人类劳动。
analysis.method: 提出三个论点：1) AI压缩标准化中层劳动价值；2) 劳动需求转向表演性人性（关系存在、审美溯源、问责）；3) 人类溯源系统应作为劳动基础设施。并提出“构成性人类存在”作为评估混合人机工作的标准。
contributions: 提出人类溯源溢价概念，并分析AI市场对劳动价值的影响。
提出将人类溯源验证视为劳动基础设施的治理建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实证数据支持论点。
未详细讨论实施人类溯源基础设施的具体技术或政策挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文主张在AI饱和市场中，人类溯源验证应被视为劳动基础设施，而非奢侈品标签。

papers.title: From Knowledge to Action: Outcomes of the 2025 Large Language Model (LLM) Hackathon for Applications in Materials Science and Chemistry
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are rapidly changing how researchers in materials science and chemistry discover, organize, and act on scientific knowledge. This paper analyzes a broad set of community-developed LLM applications in an effort to identify emerging patterns in how these systems can be used across the scientific research lifecycle. We organize the projects into two complementary categories: Knowledge Infrastructure, systems that structure, retrieve, synthesize, and validate scientific information; and Action Systems, systems that execute, coordinate, or automate scientific work across computational and experimental environments. The submissions reveal a shift from single-purpose LLM tools toward integrated, multi-agent workflows that combine retrieval, reasoning, tool use, and domain-specific validation. Prominent themes include retrieval-augmented generation as grounding infrastructure, persistent structured knowledge representations, multimodal and multilingual scientific inputs, and early progress toward laboratory-integrated closed-loop systems. Together, these results suggest that LLMs are evolving from general-purpose assistants into composable infrastructure for scientific reasoning and action. This work provides a community snapshot of that transition and a practical taxonomy for understanding emerging LLM-enabled workflows in materials science and chemistry.

analysis.tldr: 2025年材料科学与化学LLM黑客马拉松项目分析，揭示LLM从通用助手向可组合科学基础设施的转变。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM正在改变材料科学与化学领域的研究方式，但缺乏对社区开发应用的系统性分析，难以识别新兴模式。
analysis.problem: 如何系统分类和分析社区开发的LLM应用，以理解其在科学研究生命周期中的使用模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 项目从单一用途工具转向集成多智能体工作流，结合检索、推理、工具使用和领域验证。
analysis.method: 对黑客马拉松项目进行定性分析，归纳为知识基础设施和行动系统两类，并识别关键主题。
contributions: 提出LLM应用的两类分类法：知识基础设施与行动系统
揭示从单一工具到多智能体工作流的转变趋势
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果

analysis.one_sentence_summary: 2025年材料科学与化学LLM黑客马拉松项目分析，揭示LLM从通用助手向可组合科学基础设施的转变。

papers.title: A Partition-Based Generating Function for Row-Convex Polyominoes
papers.abstract: An alternative generating function is proposed to enumerate row-convex polyominoes without internal holes on a discrete grid. The approach is based on integer partitions of the total area, where each partition corresponds to a sequence of row lengths, and the product of all permutations of the parts accounts for all possible horizontal alignments of consecutive rows. Summing over the products yields a formula for the total number of convex polyominoes of a given size. Numerical examples are provided for small areas, and the exact generating function is derived via a transfer series argument, establishing the asymptotic growth S(N) as A2^(N) cos(N*theta) + phi) with theta = arctan(sqrt(7)/3). The method establishes a direct connection between integer partitions and polyomino enumeration, offering a simple yet effective framework for both exact and asymptotic combinatorial analysis. Potential applications include shape priors in discrete image analysis, grid-based modeling, and combinatorial generation of convex structures.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于整数划分的生成函数来枚举无孔行凸多联骨牌，并推导出渐近增长公式。
analysis.research_motivation: 行凸多联骨牌的精确计数在组合数学和离散几何中具有理论意义，且可用于图像分析和网格建模，但现有方法复杂或缺乏直接连接整数划分的框架。
analysis.problem: 如何高效枚举离散网格上无内部孔洞的行凸多联骨牌，并得到其精确和渐近计数公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于整数划分的生成函数方法：将总面积划分为行长度序列，通过所有排列的乘积考虑所有可能的水平对齐，求和得到计数公式，并利用传递级数论证推导渐近形式。
contributions: 提出一种基于整数划分的生成函数来枚举行凸多联骨牌，建立整数划分与多联骨牌计数的直接联系。
推导出渐近增长公式 S(N) ~ A * 2^N * cos(N*theta + phi)，其中 theta = arctan(sqrt(7)/3)。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及小面积的数值示例。
limitations: 仅适用于无孔行凸多联骨牌，未扩展到一般凸多联骨牌或带孔情况。
数值示例仅针对小面积，大规模计数的计算效率未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)

papers.title: Stop Automating Peer Review Without Rigorous Evaluation
papers.abstract: Large language models offer a tempting solution to address the peer review crisis. This position paper argues that today's AI systems should not be used to produce paper reviews. We ground this position in an empirical comparison of human- versus AI-generated ICLR 2026 reviews and an evaluation of the effect of automated paper rewriting on different AI reviewers. We identify two critical issues: 1) AI reviewers exhibit a hivemind effect of excessive agreement within and across papers that reduces perspective diversity. 2) AI review scores are trivially gameable through paper laundering: prompting an LLM to rewrite a paper could significantly increase the scores from AI reviewers, demonstrating that LLM reviewers are easy to game through stylistic changes rather than scientific results. However, non-gameability and review diversity are necessary but not sufficient conditions for automation. We argue that addressing the peer review crisis requires a science of peer review automation -- not general-purpose LLMs deployed without rigorous evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 本文通过实证对比人类与AI审稿，发现AI审稿存在群体思维和易被论文洗稿操纵的问题，主张在严格评估前不应自动化同行评审。
analysis.research_motivation: 同行评审面临危机，LLM提供潜在解决方案，但缺乏对其可靠性和鲁棒性的严格评估。
analysis.problem: 当前AI系统（如LLM）是否适合用于生成论文评审，以及其存在的关键缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI审稿人表现出过度一致的群体思维效应，且评分易被论文洗稿（通过风格改写而非科学内容提升分数）操纵。
analysis.method: 通过实证比较人类与AI生成的ICLR 2026评审，并评估自动论文改写对不同AI审稿人的影响。
contributions: 揭示AI审稿的群体思维效应，即同一AI审稿人内和不同AI审稿人间的过度一致，降低观点多样性。
证明AI审稿评分易被论文洗稿操纵，即通过LLM改写论文风格可显著提高AI评分，表明其易受风格变化而非科学结果影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及实证比较和评估。
limitations: 可能仅基于ICLR 2026的特定设置，泛化性需验证。
未讨论非游戏性和多样性之外的自动化必要条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文通过实证对比人类与AI审稿，发现AI审稿存在群体思维和易被论文洗稿操纵的问题，主张在严格评估前不应自动化同行评审。

papers.title: Terminus-4B: Can a Smaller Model Replace Frontier LLMs at Agentic Execution Tasks?
papers.abstract: Modern coding agents increasingly delegate specialized subtasks to subagents, which are smaller, focused agentic loops that handle narrow responsibilities like search, debugging or terminal execution. This architectural pattern keeps the main agent's context window clean by isolating verbose outputs (e.g. build logs, test results, etc.) within the subagent context. Typically when agents employ subagents for such tasks, they use frontier models as these subagents. In this paper, we investigate whether a finetuned small language model (SLM) can achieve comparable performance to frontier models in the task of agentic terminal execution. We present Terminus-4B, which is a post-trained Qwen3-4B model via Supervised Finetuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) using rubric-based LLM-as-judge reward, specifically for this task. In our extensive evaluation spanning various frontier models, training ablations and main agent configurations, we find that Terminus-4B is able to reduce the token usage of the main agent by up to ~30% compared to the No Subagent baseline with no impact to agent performance on benchmarks like SWE-Bench Pro and our internal SWE-Bench C# benchmark, which tends to be heavy in verbose execution tasks. Furthermore, Terminus-4B improves key metrics showing the main agent relying on the outputs of the subagent and doing fewer terminal execution tasks by itself. We see that our model not only closes the gap between the Vanilla Qwen model and frontier models like Claude Sonnet / Opus / GPT-5.3-Codex, but often even exceeds their performance.

analysis.tldr: Terminus-4B 通过微调小模型在代理终端执行任务中达到甚至超越前沿模型性能，同时降低主代理 token 使用量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代编码代理常将子任务委托给子代理以保持主代理上下文窗口清洁，但通常依赖前沿模型作为子代理，成本高昂。探索用小模型替代前沿模型可降低计算开销。
analysis.problem: 小语言模型（SLM）能否在代理终端执行任务中达到与前沿模型相当的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Qwen3-4B 进行监督微调（SFT）和强化学习（RL），使用基于规则的 LLM-as-judge 奖励，专门针对终端执行任务。
contributions: 提出 Terminus-4B，一个通过 SFT 和 RL 微调的小模型，在代理终端执行任务中性能接近甚至超越前沿模型。
在 SWE-Bench Pro 和内部 C# 基准上验证，Terminus-4B 可减少主代理约 30% 的 token 使用量，且不影响性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多个前沿模型、训练消融和主代理配置上进行广泛评估，包括 SWE-Bench Pro 和内部 SWE-Bench C# 基准。
limitations: 仅针对终端执行任务，泛化性未知。
依赖 LLM-as-judge 奖励，可能引入偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Terminus-4B 通过微调小模型在代理终端执行任务中达到甚至超越前沿模型性能，同时降低主代理 token 使用量。

papers.title: Sentinel2Cap: A Human-Annotated Benchmark Dataset for Multimodal Remote Sensing Image Captioning
papers.abstract: Image captioning has become an important task in computer vision, enabling models to generate natural language descriptions of visual content. While several datasets exist for natural images and high-resolution optical remote sensing imagery, the availability of captioning datasets for multimodal satellite data remains limited, particularly for SAR imagery and medium-resolution sensors. We introduce Sentinel2Cap, a human-annotated multimodal captioning dataset containing Sentinel-1 SAR and Sentinel-2 multi-spectral image patches at 10 m and 20 m spatial resolution with diverse land cover compositions. Captions are created manually and carefully validated to ensure both semantic accuracy and linguistic quality. To evaluate Sentinel2Cap, we perform a zero-shot captioning using the Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct model across three image modalities: RGB, multi-spectral, and SAR pseudo-RGB representations. Results show that RGB images achieve the highest captioning performance, while SAR images remain more challenging for vision-language models. Providing modality-specific contextual prompts consistently improves performance across all metrics. These findings highlight both the challenges of multimodal remote sensing image captioning and the potential value of human-annotated datasets for advancing research in cross-modal scene understanding. All the material is publicly avaiable.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个包含SAR和中等分辨率多光谱图像的人工标注遥感图像描述数据集Sentinel2Cap，并评估了VLM的零样本描述能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有遥感图像描述数据集多集中于高分辨率光学图像，缺乏多模态（尤其是SAR和中等分辨率传感器）的标注数据，限制了跨模态场景理解研究。
analysis.problem: 多模态卫星图像（SAR、多光谱）描述数据集的缺失，以及视觉语言模型在SAR等模态上的描述性能不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本实验发现RGB图像描述性能最佳，SAR图像对VLM更具挑战性；提供模态特定上下文提示可提升所有指标。
analysis.method: 构建Sentinel2Cap数据集：从Sentinel-1 SAR和Sentinel-2多光谱图像中提取10m/20m分辨率图像块，人工生成并验证描述文本；使用Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct进行零样本评估。
contributions: 首个包含SAR和中等分辨率多光谱图像的人工标注遥感图像描述数据集
系统评估了VLM在多模态遥感图像描述上的零样本性能，揭示了模态差异和提示策略的影响
analysis.experiments: 使用Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct在RGB、多光谱、SAR伪RGB三种模态上进行零样本描述实验，比较不同模态和提示策略的性能。
limitations: 仅评估了单一VLM模型，未涵盖更多模型或微调方法
数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体图像数量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个包含SAR和中等分辨率多光谱图像的人工标注遥感图像描述数据集Sentinel2Cap，并评估了VLM的零样本描述能力。

papers.title: DINO Soars: DINOv3 for Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation of Remote Sensing Imagery
papers.abstract: The remote sensing (RS) domain suffers from a lack of densely labeled datasets, which are costly to obtain. Thus, models that can segment RS imagery well without supervised fine-tuning are valuable, but existing solutions fall behind supervised methods. Recently, DINOv3 surpassed SOTA RS foundation models on the GEO-bench segmentation benchmark without pre-training on RS data. Additionally, DINO.txt has enabled open vocabulary semantic segmentation (OVSS) with the DINOv3 backbone. We leverage these developments to form an OVSS model for RS imagery, free of RS-domain fine-tuning. Our model, CAFe-DINO (Cost Aggregation + Feature Upsampling with DINO) exploits the strong OVSS performance of DINOv3 for RS imagery via cost aggregation and training-free upsampling of text-image similarity scores. The robust latent of the DINOv3 backbone eliminates the need for fine-tuning on RS imagery; we instead fine-tune our model on a RS-targeted subset of COCO-Stuff. CAFe-DINO achieves state-of-the-art performance on key RS segmentation datasets, outperforming OVSS methods fine-tuned on RS data. Our code and data are publicly available at https://github.com/rfaulk/DINO_Soars.

analysis.tldr: 利用DINOv3骨干网络和免RS微调的成本聚合与上采样方法，实现遥感图像开放词汇语义分割SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 遥感领域缺乏密集标注数据集，现有开放词汇分割方法性能落后于监督方法，亟需无需RS微调的高性能模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在无需遥感数据微调的前提下，提升开放词汇语义分割在遥感图像上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DINOv3在GEO-bench上超越RS基础模型，且DINO.txt已实现基于DINOv3的开放词汇分割，但直接应用于RS图像仍有提升空间。
analysis.method: CAFe-DINO：使用DINOv3骨干，通过成本聚合（cost aggregation）和免训练上采样（training-free upsampling）增强文本-图像相似度分数，并在COCO-Stuff的RS子集上微调。
contributions: 提出CAFe-DINO模型，无需RS域微调即可实现RS图像开放词汇语义分割。
在多个关键RS分割数据集上达到SOTA，超越在RS数据上微调的OVSS方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个关键RS分割数据集上评估，达到SOTA性能，超越在RS数据上微调的OVSS方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖COCO-Stuff子集的质量和代表性。
未在极低资源或极端场景下验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用DINOv3骨干网络和免RS微调的成本聚合与上采样方法，实现遥感图像开放词汇语义分割SOTA。

papers.title: Global and Local Topology-Aware Attention with Persistent Homology and Euler Biases for Time-Series Forecasting
papers.abstract: Scientific time series often encode predictive geometric structure, including connectivity, cycles, shell-like geometry, directional changes, and nonlinear neighborhoods, that standard dot-product attention does not explicitly represent. We introduce a topology-aware attention framework that adds such structure to attention logits using persistent homology (H0-H2), anchored Euler characteristic transforms, and kernel-Hilbert channels. A validation-gated local residual captures local topological signals, including a Zeng-style local H0 component, only when held-out validation data support the correction. Exact Vietoris-Rips computations and smooth topological surrogates are evaluated under a no-leakage protocol with train-only calibration, validation-only selection, and test-only reporting. We evaluate guarded topology-aware variants across three architecture families: lightweight attention/Ridge, PatchTSTForRegression, and TimeSeriesTransformerForPrediction. Experiments include synthetic benchmarks isolating higher-order topology and real datasets covering CO2, S&P 500 return-window geometry, and NASA IMS bearing degradation. The audit uses matched paired comparisons across seven dataset units, three random seeds, and three chronological splits, giving 63 paired units per architecture and 189 paired units overall. Topology-aware models show positive paired effects when geometry is predictive, with heterogeneous magnitude across datasets and architectures. Lightweight attention/Ridge improves in 46 of 63 units, with mean relative RMSE reduction of 12.5% and paired randomization p=7.2e-4; PatchTST improves in 33 units and retains the baseline in 20 units, with 23.5% reduction and p=3.5e-5; and TimeSeriesTransformer improves in 47 units, with 47.8% reduction and p<1e-4. The results support topology as a validation-selected, architecture-compatible inductive bias.

analysis.tldr: 提出拓扑感知注意力框架，利用持续同调与欧拉特征变换增强时间序列预测中的几何结构建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准点积注意力无法显式表示时间序列中的连通性、循环、壳状几何等预测性几何结构，限制了预测性能。
analysis.problem: 如何将拓扑结构（如连通性、循环、方向变化）融入注意力机制以提升时间序列预测精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 拓扑感知模型在几何结构具有预测性的数据集上表现出正向配对效应，但效果因数据集和架构而异。
analysis.method: 提出拓扑感知注意力框架，通过持续同调（H0-H2）、锚定欧拉特征变换和核-希尔伯特通道增强注意力logits，并引入验证门控局部残差捕捉局部拓扑信号。
contributions: 提出一种拓扑感知注意力框架，将持续同调和欧拉特征变换融入注意力机制。
在三个架构族（轻量注意力/Ridge、PatchTST、TimeSeriesTransformer）上验证了拓扑作为验证选择、架构兼容的归纳偏置的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在合成基准和真实数据集（CO2、S&P 500、NASA IMS轴承退化）上评估，使用63个配对单元/架构，共189个配对单元。轻量注意力/Ridge在46/63单元中改善，平均RMSE降低12.5%；PatchTST在33单元中改善，降低23.5%；TimeSeriesTransformer在47单元中改善，降低47.8%。
limitations: 拓扑计算（Vietoris-Rips）可能带来额外计算开销。
效果依赖于数据中几何结构的预测性，异构性较强。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出拓扑感知注意力框架，利用持续同调与欧拉特征变换增强时间序列预测中的几何结构建模。

papers.title: Learning Correct Behavior from Examples: Validating Sequential Execution in Autonomous Agents
papers.abstract: As autonomous agents become increasingly sophisticated, validating their sequential behavior presents a significant challenge. Traditional testing approaches require manual specification, exact sequence matching, or thousands of training examples. We present a novel algorithm that automatically learns correct behavior from just 2-10 passing execution traces and validates new executions against this learned model. Our approach combines dominator analysis from compiler theory with multimodal large language model-powered semantic understanding to identify essential states and handle non-deterministic behavior. The system constructs a generalized ground truth model using Prefix Tree Acceptors, merges traces through multi-tiered equivalence detection, and validates new executions via topological subsequence matching. In controlled experiments, our system achieved high accuracy in detecting product bugs and false successes using only 3 training traces. This approach provides explainable validation results with coverage metrics and works across diverse domains including UI testing, code generation, and robotic processes.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从少量执行轨迹中学习正确行为并验证自主代理顺序执行的新算法。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主代理的序列行为验证面临挑战，传统方法需要手动标注、精确匹配或大量训练样本，效率低且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量（2-10个）正确执行轨迹中自动学习行为模型，并高效验证新执行序列的正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合编译器理论中的支配者分析和多模态大语言模型的语义理解，构建基于前缀树接受器的广义真实模型，通过多层等价检测合并轨迹，并利用拓扑子序列匹配进行验证。
contributions: 提出一种仅需2-10个正确轨迹即可学习行为模型的算法
将支配者分析与多模态LLM语义理解结合，处理非确定性行为
在UI测试、代码生成和机器人流程等多个领域验证了方法的有效性
analysis.experiments: 在受控实验中，仅使用3个训练轨迹即可高精度检测产品缺陷和误报。
limitations: 可能对高度非确定性的行为泛化能力有限
依赖多模态LLM的语义理解质量
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从少量执行轨迹中学习正确行为并验证自主代理顺序执行的新算法。

papers.title: Are you with me? A Framework for Detecting Mental Model Discrepancies in Task-Based Team Dialogues
papers.abstract: Humans typically use natural language to update teammates on task states. Since not all updates are communicated, discrepancies arise between the team members' mental models that negatively affect overall team performance. How can we categorize such discrepancies? Do misalignments detected in team dialogue predict future mental model misalignments? Traditional shared mental model (SMM) assessment methods rely on retrospective expert coding that cannot capture real-time coordination dynamics. We propose a framework to identify and categorize four types of mental model discrepancies: unsupported beliefs, false beliefs, belief contradictions, and omissions, all of which can naturally emerge in team dialogues. Using dialogues from twenty dyad teams performing collaborative object identification tasks across four sequential levels, we demonstrate that these discrepancy patterns contain predictive signals. Averaging historical discrepancy counts achieves meaningful prediction accuracy using uniform weighting as an exploratory baseline, with differential predictability across discrepancy types.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个框架，从团队对话中检测四种心理模型差异，并证明其可预测未来差异。
analysis.research_motivation: 团队协作中，成员心理模型差异会降低绩效，但现有评估方法依赖事后专家编码，无法实时捕捉动态协调过程。
analysis.problem: 如何从任务型团队对话中自动分类和预测心理模型差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个框架，识别四种心理模型差异（无依据信念、错误信念、信念矛盾、遗漏），并使用历史差异计数的均匀加权平均值作为基线预测未来差异。
contributions: 提出一个自动检测团队对话中四种心理模型差异的分类框架。
通过二十组双人团队的协作任务对话实验，证明差异模式包含预测信号，且不同差异类型预测能力不同。
analysis.experiments: 使用二十组双人团队在四个连续级别的协作目标识别任务中的对话数据，以均匀加权历史差异计数作为基线，验证了预测准确性。
limitations: 仅使用均匀加权基线，未探索更复杂的预测模型。
实验规模较小（二十组团队），可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个框架，从团队对话中检测四种心理模型差异，并证明其可预测未来差异。

papers.title: Boundary-Aware Uncertainty Quantification for Wildfire Spread Prediction
papers.abstract: Reliable wildfire spread prediction is vital for risk-aware emergency planning, yet most deep learning models lack principled uncertainty quantification (UQ). Further, for boundary-sensitive cases like wildfire spread, evaluating models with global metrics alone is often insufficient. To shift the focus of UQ evaluation toward a more operationally relevant approach, the Fire-Centered Evaluation Region (FCER) framework is introduced as a spatially conditioned protocol to characterize UQ within critical fire zones. Using FCER, an Ensemble is compared against an distilled single-pass student model on the WildfireSpreadTS dataset. The student model demonstrates comparable calibration and complementary uncertainty ranking in boundary-relevant regimes. Code is available at https://github.com/jonasvilhofunk/WildfireUQ-FCER

analysis.tldr: 提出边界感知的不确定性量化方法，用于野火蔓延预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 野火蔓延预测对应急规划至关重要，但现有深度学习模型缺乏原则性的不确定性量化，且全局指标不足以评估边界敏感场景。
analysis.problem: 如何为野火蔓延预测提供可靠的不确定性量化，并针对边界区域进行有效评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出火中心评估区域（FCER）框架，作为空间条件化协议，用于评估关键火区的不确定性量化；并比较集成模型与蒸馏单通道学生模型。
contributions: 提出FCER框架，将不确定性量化评估聚焦于操作相关的边界区域。
在WildfireSpreadTS数据集上比较集成模型与学生模型，显示学生模型在边界区域具有可比的校准性和互补的不确定性排序。
analysis.experiments: 在WildfireSpreadTS数据集上进行了实验，比较了集成模型和蒸馏学生模型。
limitations: 可能仅适用于野火蔓延预测领域。
学生模型的性能可能依赖于蒸馏过程的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边界感知的不确定性量化方法，用于野火蔓延预测。

papers.title: NucEval: A Robust Evaluation Framework for Nuclear Instance Segmentation
papers.abstract: In computational pathology, nuclear instance segmentation is a fundamental task with many downstream clinical applications. With the advent of deep learning, many approaches, including convolutional neural networks (CNNs) and vision transformers (ViTs), have been proposed for this task, along with both machine learning-based and non-machine learning-based pre- and post-processing techniques to further boost performance. However, one fundamental aspect that has received less attention is the evaluation pipeline. In this study, we identify four key issues associated with nuclear instance segmentation evaluation and propose corresponding solutions. Our proposed modifications, namely handling vague regions, score normalization, overlapping instances, and border uncertainty, are integrated into a unified framework called NucEval, which enables robust evaluation of nuclear instance segmentation. We evaluate this pipeline using the NuInsSeg dataset, which provides unique characteristics that make it particularly suitable for this study, as well as two additional external datasets, with three CNN- and ViT-based nuclear instance segmentation models, to demonstrate the impact of these modifications on instance segmentation metrics. The code, along with complete guidelines and illustrative examples, is publicly available at: https://github.com/masih4/nuc_eval.

analysis.tldr: 提出NucEval框架，通过四项改进解决核实例分割评估中的关键问题，实现更鲁棒的评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 核实例分割在计算病理学中至关重要，但现有评估流程存在多个被忽视的问题，导致评估结果不可靠。
analysis.problem: 核实例分割评估中存在的四个关键问题：模糊区域处理、分数归一化、重叠实例和边界不确定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前评估流程存在四个具体问题，但未提供详细的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NucEval框架，集成四项改进：处理模糊区域、分数归一化、重叠实例处理和边界不确定性处理。
contributions: 识别并系统分析了核实例分割评估中的四个关键问题
提出NucEval框架，集成四项改进实现鲁棒评估
在NuInsSeg等数据集上验证了改进对评估指标的影响
analysis.experiments: 使用NuInsSeg数据集及两个外部数据集，采用三种CNN和ViT模型进行实验，展示改进对分割指标的影响。
limitations: 可能仅针对核实例分割，泛化性需进一步验证
未提及计算开销或效率分析
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出NucEval框架，通过四项改进解决核实例分割评估中的关键问题，实现更鲁棒的评估。

papers.title: Pact: A Choreographic Language for Agentic Ecosystems
papers.abstract: Recent advances in large language models have led to the rise of software systems (i.e. agents) that execute with increasing autonomy on behalf of users in open, multi-party settings, interacting with untrusted counterparts and managing private information. Choreographic programming offers correct-by-construction protocol-design for such settings, but assumes cooperative participants -- it has no notion of agent self-interest, that is, why an agent will follow a protocol. In this talk we introduce Pact, a choreographic language extended with operations to describe agent choices and preferences, drawing from the rich literature of game theory. Every Pact protocol maps to a formal game, allowing protocol designers to reason about game-theoretic properties of their protocols, such as solving for decision policies. We present Pact's design and a preliminary implementation -- a bounded-rational solver that computes decision policies over Pact protocols -- and findings from applying this language to multi-party coordination with self-interested agentic participants.

analysis.tldr: Pact 是一种结合博弈论的编排式编程语言，用于设计多智能体生态系统中自利智能体的协议。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有编排式编程假设参与者合作，但实际多智能体系统中智能体可能自利，需要一种方法确保协议被遵循。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种编排语言，使协议设计者能够描述智能体的选择和偏好，并推理协议在自利智能体下的博弈论性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Pact 语言扩展了编排操作以描述智能体选择和偏好，每个协议映射到形式博弈，并实现了一个有界理性求解器来计算决策策略。
contributions: 提出 Pact 语言，将博弈论融入编排式编程。
实现有界理性求解器，用于计算 Pact 协议上的决策策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于有界理性假设。
初步实现，可能缺乏大规模验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Pact 是一种结合博弈论的编排式编程语言，用于设计多智能体生态系统中自利智能体的协议。

papers.title: EMOVIS: Emotion-Optimized Image Processing
papers.abstract: In cinematography, visual attributes such as color grading, contrast, and brightness are manipulated to reinforce the emotional narrative of a scene. However, conventional Image Signal Processors (ISPs) prioritize scene fidelity, effectively neglecting this expressive dimension. To bring this cinematic capability to real-time camera pipelines during video capture, we introduce EMOVIS (EMotion-Optimized VISual processing). We establish a systematic mapping between a compact set of high-level emotional states (Happy, Calm, Angry, Sad) and low-level ISP controls - including color saturation, local tone mapping, and sharpness - supported by a calibration user study with statistically significant effects across parameters. We propose a control framework that integrates these emotion-driven adjustments into standard ISP hardware without altering the underlying processing stages. Validation via blind A/B testing shows that viewers prefer the emotion-optimized rendering in 87% of trials when the target emotion matches the scene context, indicating that emotion-aligned ISP control improves perceived suitability for expressive visual content.

analysis.tldr: 提出EMOVIS框架，将情感状态映射到ISP参数，实现实时情感优化图像处理。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统ISP只追求场景保真度，忽略了通过色彩、对比度等视觉属性增强情感表达的需求，而电影摄影中这些属性常用于强化情感叙事。
analysis.problem: 如何将高维情感状态系统映射到低维ISP控制参数，并在实时相机流水线中实现情感优化的图像处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户校准实验显示，不同情感状态（Happy, Calm, Angry, Sad）与ISP参数（色彩饱和度、局部色调映射、锐度）之间存在统计显著映射关系。
analysis.method: 通过用户校准实验建立情感状态到ISP参数的映射，提出控制框架将情感驱动调整集成到标准ISP硬件中，不改变底层处理阶段。
contributions: 建立了情感状态与ISP参数之间的系统映射，并通过用户校准实验验证了统计显著性。
提出了EMOVIS框架，可在实时相机流水线中实现情感优化的图像处理，无需修改ISP硬件。
analysis.experiments: 通过盲A/B测试验证，当目标情感与场景上下文匹配时，87%的试验中观众偏好情感优化渲染。
limitations: 仅考虑了四种基本情感状态，可能无法覆盖更复杂的情感。
实验仅在特定场景下进行，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EMOVIS框架，将情感状态映射到ISP参数，实现实时情感优化图像处理。

papers.title: PIIGuard: Mitigating PII Harvesting under Adversarial Sanitization
papers.abstract: Browsing-enabled LLM assistants can fetch webpages and answer contact-seeking queries, creating a practical channel for scraping contact-style personally identifiable information (PII) from public pages. Many prior defenses are deployed at the model, service, or agent layer rather than at the webpage itself, leaving ordinary page owners with limited deployable options. We present PIIGuard, a webpage-level defense that repurposes indirect prompt injection as a protective mechanism: the page owner embeds optimized hidden HTML fragments that steer the model away from verbatim or reconstructible disclosure of contact PII. PIIGuard searches over fragment text and insertion position using rule-based leakage scoring, evolutionary mutation, and final judge-based recoverability assessment. In direct-HTML evaluation on three target models (GPT-5.4-nano, Claude-haiku-4.5, and DeepSeek-chat(latest v3.2)), PIIGuard achieves at least 97.0% defense success rate under both rule-based and judge-based leakage evaluation, often reaching 100.0%, while preserving benign same-page QA utility. We further evaluate two harder settings: public-URL browsing and attacker-side LLM sanitization of fetched webpage. These results show that page-side defensive fragments can remain effective in deployment for some model-position pairs, but robustness varies substantially across browsing interfaces and sanitizer prompts. Overall, PIIGuard demonstrates that page owners can use page-side fragments as a practical mitigation for web-grounded PII leakage.

analysis.tldr: PIIGuard 通过在网页中嵌入优化后的隐藏 HTML 片段，利用间接提示注入防御 LLM 助手从公开页面抓取联系类个人身份信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 支持浏览功能的 LLM 助手可以从公开网页抓取联系类个人身份信息（PII），现有防御多部署在模型、服务或代理层，普通网页所有者缺乏可用的防御手段。
analysis.problem: 如何让普通网页所有者能够有效防御 LLM 助手从网页中抓取联系类 PII。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PIIGuard 是一种网页级防御方法，通过嵌入优化后的隐藏 HTML 片段，利用间接提示注入引导模型避免逐字或可重构地披露联系类 PII。优化过程结合基于规则的泄漏评分、进化变异和最终基于评判者的可恢复性评估。
contributions: 提出 PIIGuard，一种网页级防御方法，利用间接提示注入保护联系类 PII。
在多个模型和设置下验证了 PIIGuard 的高防御成功率（≥97%）和良性问答效用保持。
analysis.experiments: 在 GPT-5.4-nano、Claude-haiku-4.5 和 DeepSeek-chat(latest v3.2) 三个模型上进行直接 HTML 评估，防御成功率至少 97%，常达 100%。还评估了公开 URL 浏览和攻击者端 LLM 清洗两种更难设置。
limitations: 防御效果在不同浏览界面和清洗提示下鲁棒性差异较大。
仅针对联系类 PII，可能不适用于其他类型 PII。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PIIGuard 通过在网页中嵌入优化后的隐藏 HTML 片段，利用间接提示注入防御 LLM 助手从公开页面抓取联系类个人身份信息。

papers.title: ARISE: A Repository-level Graph Representation and Toolset for Agentic Fault Localization and Program Repair
papers.abstract: Repository-level fault localization (FL) and automated program repair (APR) require an agent to identify the relevant code units across files, follow call and data dependencies, and generate a valid patch. Existing graph-based systems provide structural representations of repositories (files, classes, functions and their relationships) but do not model how variable values flow within procedures, leaving agents without the semantic precision needed for function- and line-level localization. We present ARISE (Agentic Repository-level Issue Solving Engine), which augments an LLM-based agent with a multi-granularity program graph that extends structural relationships down to statement-level nodes connected by intra-procedural definition-use edges. ARISE exposes this graph through a three-tier tool API, which brings data-flow slicing as a first-class, queryable agent primitive that allows the model to trace, in a single call, which statements define or consume a variable of interest. We evaluate on SWE-bench Lite (300 real GitHub issues, 11 Python repositories) using Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct as the backbone. Compared to the unmodified SWE-agent baseline, ARISE improves Function Recall@1 by 17.0 points and Line Recall@1 by 15.0 points. These localization gains translate directly into repair success, with ARISE achieving 22.0% Pass@1 (66/300), a 4.7 percentage-point improvement over SWE-agent. Controlled ablations confirm that the improvement is driven by the data-flow graph rather than the tool schema, and that large code models consume structured slice output directly without requiring a natural-language summarization layer. The graph builder and slicing API are designed as a framework-agnostic, drop-in toolset for future APR research.

analysis.tldr: ARISE通过多粒度程序图增强LLM代理，实现仓库级故障定位与自动修复，在SWE-bench Lite上显著提升定位和修复成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有仓库级故障定位和自动修复系统缺乏对变量数据流的语义建模，导致代理无法精确进行函数级和行级定位。
analysis.problem: 如何为LLM代理提供细粒度的程序语义信息（特别是数据流），以提升仓库级故障定位和自动修复的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ARISE构建多粒度程序图，包含语句级节点和过程内定义-使用边，并通过三层工具API暴露数据流切片作为可查询的代理原语。
contributions: 提出ARISE系统，将数据流图集成到LLM代理中，提升故障定位精度。
在SWE-bench Lite上验证了数据流图对修复成功率的贡献，并证明大型代码模型可直接使用结构化切片输出。
analysis.experiments: 在SWE-bench Lite（300个真实GitHub问题，11个Python仓库）上使用Qwen2.5-Coder-32B-Instruct评估，与SWE-agent基线相比，Function Recall@1提升17.0点，Line Recall@1提升15.0点，Pass@1达到22.0%（66/300），提升4.7个百分点。
limitations: 可能仅适用于Python仓库，泛化性未验证。
依赖LLM的代码理解能力，可能受限于模型规模。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ARISE通过多粒度程序图增强LLM代理，实现仓库级故障定位与自动修复，在SWE-bench Lite上显著提升定位和修复成功率。

papers.title: Cascade Token Selection for Transformer Attention Acceleration
papers.abstract: A method is presented for reducing the cost of representative token selection in transformer attention layers by exploiting the coherence of the representative set across depth. Activation Decorrelation Attention (ADA) selects $r \ll T$ representative tokens at each layer via a Gram threshold and computes attention on the compressed $r \times r$ problem, but the selection requires a $T \times T$ Gram matrix at every layer. The cascade mechanism introduced here inherits the representative set from layer $l$ to layer $l+1$, validates it via a $(T - r) \times r$ cross-Gram computation, and updates it with a small number of additions and removals. The cost of the selection step drops from $O(T^2 d)$ to $O(T r d)$ per layer. Validation on three model families (GPT-2 124M, GPT-J 6B, OPT 6.7B) on AMD MI300X demonstrates Gram operation savings of $22\%$ to $63\%$ with mean Jaccard overlap of $0.83$ to $0.94$ between consecutive layers. The cascade reveals that the set of informative tokens is a structural property of the input that propagates coherently through the depth of the network: the same tokens carry the non-redundant information at layer $l$ and at layer $l+1$.

analysis.tldr: 利用层间代表性令牌集的连贯性，提出级联选择机制加速Transformer注意力，将选择成本从O(T²d)降至O(Trd)。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer注意力层中代表性令牌选择（如ADA方法）每层需计算T×T Gram矩阵，成本高昂，限制了长序列场景下的效率。
analysis.problem: 降低Transformer注意力层中代表性令牌选择的计算成本，避免每层独立计算完整Gram矩阵。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现代表性令牌集在相邻层间高度连贯（Jaccard重叠0.83-0.94），表明信息令牌是输入的固有结构属性，可跨层传播。
analysis.method: 级联令牌选择：从第l层继承代表性集，通过(T-r)×r交叉Gram验证，仅少量增删更新，将选择成本从O(T²d)降至O(Trd)。
contributions: 提出级联机制利用层间代表性集连贯性，大幅降低选择成本。
在三个模型上验证Gram操作节省22%-63%，且保持高Jaccard重叠。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 124M、GPT-J 6B、OPT 6.7B上于AMD MI300X验证，报告Gram操作节省和Jaccard重叠。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构（如GPT系列），泛化性待验证。
未报告端到端推理速度或精度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用层间代表性令牌集的连贯性，提出级联选择机制加速Transformer注意力，将选择成本从O(T²d)降至O(Trd)。

papers.title: Gated Subspace Inference for Transformer Acceleration
papers.abstract: A method is presented for accelerating inference in transformer language models by exploiting the low effective rank of the token activation manifold at each layer. The method decomposes each activation vector into a subspace component and a residual, computes the linear-layer output on the subspace component via a cached low-rank weight image at reduced memory bandwidth, and applies a per-token gate that determines whether the residual correction is computed or skipped. The gate ensures that the output distribution is preserved to within a controllable tolerance. Validation on three model families (GPT-2 124M, GPT-J 6B, OPT 6.7B) on AMD MI300X demonstrates effective speedups of 3.0x to 10.5x on linear-layer weight reads with perplexity ratios below 1.00 and top-1 token agreement above 98%. The method requires no retraining, no architectural modification, and no approximation of the attention mechanism. At the operating point (k = 256, ε = 0.05) on GPT-J 14 6B, the accelerated model produces character-for-character identical output to the baseline.

analysis.tldr: 通过子空间分解和门控机制加速Transformer推理，无需重训练即可实现3-10倍线性层加速。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer推理中线性层的内存带宽瓶颈限制了部署效率，现有加速方法常需重训练或修改架构。
analysis.problem: 如何在不改变模型架构、不重训练的前提下，通过利用激活值的低秩结构来加速Transformer线性层的推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 每层token激活流形具有低有效秩，可分解为子空间分量和残差。
analysis.method: 将激活向量分解为子空间分量和残差，子空间分量通过缓存的低秩权重矩阵以降低内存带宽计算，残差校正由逐token门控决定是否执行，保证输出分布误差可控。
contributions: 提出门控子空间推理方法，利用激活低秩结构加速线性层。
无需重训练或架构修改，保持输出分布可控。
在多个模型上验证3-10倍线性层加速，输出一致性高。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-2 124M、GPT-J 6B、OPT 6.7B上使用AMD MI300X验证，线性层权重读取加速3.0-10.5倍，困惑度比低于1.00，top-1 token一致性高于98%。在GPT-J 6B的特定参数下输出与基线逐字符相同。
limitations: 仅加速线性层，注意力机制未加速。
门控机制可能引入额外计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过子空间分解和门控机制加速Transformer推理，无需重训练即可实现3-10倍线性层加速。

papers.title: MedStruct-S: A Benchmark for Key Discovery, Key-Conditioned QA and Semi-Structured Extraction from OCR Clinical Reports
papers.abstract: Semi-structured information extraction (IE) from OCR-derived clinical reports is crucial for efficiently reconstructing patients' longitudinal medical histories. In practice, this scenario commonly involves three tasks: (i) field-header (key) discovery, (ii) key-conditioned question answering (QA), and (iii) end-to-end key-value pair extraction. However, existing evaluations often under-model two factors: heterogeneous and incompletely known key representations, and OCR-induced noise. This makes it difficult to assess model robustness in real-world settings. We present MedStruct-S, a benchmark specifically designed to evaluate these tasks under unknown keys and OCR noise. MedStruct-S contains 3,582 annotated real-world clinical report pages. Using MedStruct-S, we benchmark two representative paradigms: encoder-only sequence labeling with post-processing and decoder-only structured generation, covering four encoder-only and five decoder-only models spanning 0.11B to 103B parameters. Our results show that encoder-only models achieve the best performance for non-null-value key-conditioned QA despite being substantially smaller than decoder-only models. When comparing models of similar order of magnitude, encoder-only models still perform better overall. Without controlling for model scale, fine-tuned decoder-only models deliver the strongest overall results. These findings show that the benchmark provides a reliable and practical basis for selecting and comparing models across different semi-structured IE settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个面向OCR临床报告的半结构化信息抽取基准MedStruct-S，涵盖关键发现、条件问答和端到端抽取任务，并系统评估了编码器-解码器两类模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估未充分考虑异构/不完全已知的关键表示和OCR噪声，难以衡量模型在真实场景中的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能同时评估关键发现、条件问答和端到端键值对抽取任务，并考虑未知键和OCR噪声的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 编码器模型在非空值条件问答上表现最佳，即使参数量远小于解码器模型；同量级下编码器整体更优；不控制规模时微调解码器总体最强。
analysis.method: 构建包含3582张真实临床报告页面的基准，标注键发现、条件问答和端到端抽取任务，并评估编码器序列标注+后处理和解码器结构化生成两类范式。
contributions: 提出MedStruct-S基准，覆盖三个关键任务并考虑未知键和OCR噪声。
系统比较了9个模型（0.11B-103B参数），揭示了不同范式在真实场景下的性能差异。
analysis.experiments: 在3582张真实临床报告页面上评估了4个编码器模型和5个解码器模型，报告了各任务性能。
limitations: 仅针对OCR临床报告，泛化性未验证。
未涉及多语言或更复杂的文档布局。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个面向OCR临床报告的半结构化信息抽取基准MedStruct-S，涵盖关键发现、条件问答和端到端抽取任务，并系统评估了编码器-解码器两类模型。

papers.title: Programmatic Context Augmentation for LLM-based Symbolic Regression
papers.abstract: Symbolic regression (SR), the task of discovering mathematical expressions that best describe a given dataset, remains a fundamental challenge in scientific discovery. Traditional approaches, primarily based on genetic algorithms and related evolutionary methods, have proven useful but suffer from scalability and expressivity limitations. Recently, large language model (LLM)-based evolutionary search methods have been introduced into SR and show promise. However, existing LLM-based approaches typically rely on scalar evaluation metrics, such as mean squared error, as the sole source of feedback during the search process, thereby overlooking the rich information embedded in the dataset. To address this limitation, we propose a novel LLM-based evolutionary search framework that incorporates programmatic context augmentation. By enabling code-based interactions with the dataset, our method can actively perform data analysis and extract informative signals, beyond aggregated evaluation scores. We evaluate our framework on advanced benchmarks, such as LLM-SRBench, and demonstrate superior efficiency and accuracy compared to strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出程序化上下文增强的LLM进化搜索框架，通过代码交互提取数据信息，提升符号回归效率与精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号回归是科学发现的基础任务，传统遗传算法方法存在可扩展性和表达性限制，现有LLM方法仅依赖标量评估指标（如MSE），忽略了数据集中丰富的上下文信息。
analysis.problem: 现有LLM符号回归方法仅使用聚合评估分数作为反馈，未能利用数据集中的深层信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出程序化上下文增强的LLM进化搜索框架，通过代码交互对数据集进行主动数据分析和信息提取，超越聚合评估分数。
contributions: 提出程序化上下文增强方法，使LLM能通过代码交互从数据中提取丰富信号。
在LLM-SRBench等基准上验证了方法的效率和准确性优势。
analysis.experiments: 在LLM-SRBench等高级基准上评估，与强基线相比展示了优越的效率和准确性。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的代码生成能力，对复杂数据集的适应性待验证。
程序化上下文增强的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出程序化上下文增强的LLM进化搜索框架，通过代码交互提取数据信息，提升符号回归效率与精度。

papers.title: One Sequence to Segment Them All: Efficient Data Augmentation for CT and MRI Cross-Domain 3D Spine Segmentation
papers.abstract: Deep learning-based medical image segmentation is increasingly used to support clinical diagnosis and develop new treatment strategies. However, model performance remains limited by the scarcity of high-quality annotated data and insufficient generalization across imaging protocols. This limitation is particularly evident in MRI and CT, where models are typically trained on a single acquisition sequence and exhibit reduced robustness when applied to unseen sequences or contrasts. Although data augmentation is widely used to improve general robustness on medical images, its impact on cross-modality generalization has not been quantitatively explored. In this work, we study a targeted set of data augmentation techniques designed to improve cross-modality transfer. We train three spine segmentation models, each on a single-modality/sequence dataset, and evaluate them across seven out-of-distribution datasets (spanning CT and MRI), reflecting a realistic single-sequence training and multi-sequence/contrast/modality deployment scenario. Our results demonstrate substantial performance gains on unseen domains (average Dice gain of 155 %) while preserving in-domain accuracy (average Dice decrease of 0.008 %), including effective transfer between CT and MRI. To mitigate the computational cost typically associated with strong data augmentation, we implement GPU-optimized augmentations that maintain, and even improve, training efficiency by approximately 10 %. We release our approach as an open-source toolbox, enabling seamless integration into commonly used frameworks such as nnUNet and MONAI. These augmentations significantly enhance robustness to heterogeneous clinical imaging scenarios without compromising training speed.

analysis.tldr: 提出针对CT和MRI跨域3D脊柱分割的GPU优化数据增强方法，在保持域内精度的同时大幅提升跨模态泛化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割模型因高质量标注数据稀缺和跨成像协议泛化不足而性能受限，尤其在MRI和CT中，模型通常仅在单一序列上训练，对未见序列或对比度鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何设计数据增强技术以提升脊柱分割模型在CT和MRI跨模态/跨序列场景下的泛化能力，同时保持域内精度和训练效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 研究一组针对性的数据增强技术，并实现GPU优化版本以降低计算成本，集成到nnUNet和MONAI等框架中。
contributions: 首次定量探索数据增强对CT和MRI跨模态泛化的影响。
提出GPU优化的数据增强方法，在保持域内精度的同时，在7个分布外数据集上平均Dice提升155%，训练效率提升约10%。
发布开源工具箱，支持与nnUNet和MONAI无缝集成。
analysis.experiments: 在三个脊柱分割模型上，每个模型仅在单一模态/序列数据集上训练，并在七个分布外数据集（涵盖CT和MRI）上评估，报告平均Dice增益和域内精度变化。
limitations: 仅针对脊柱分割任务，其他解剖结构或任务可能需调整。
未讨论增强策略对极端低数据场景的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出针对CT和MRI跨域3D脊柱分割的GPU优化数据增强方法，在保持域内精度的同时大幅提升跨模态泛化性能。

papers.title: Optimized Culprit Identification Using Mobilenet and Attention Mechanisms
papers.abstract: Automated culprit identification in surveillance systems is a critical task that requires high accuracy along with computational efficiency for real-time deployment. In this paper, an optimized deep learning framework is proposed using a lightweight MobileNet architecture integrated with channel and spatial attention mechanisms. The proposed model enhances feature representation by selectively focusing on the most discriminative regions while suppressing irrelevant background information, thereby improving identification performance. The framework incorporates efficient preprocessing, attention based feature refinement, and a robust classification strategy optimized using the Adam Optimizer. Experiments were conducted on benchmark face recognition datasets, including Labelled Faces in the Wild (LFW), CASIA-WebFace, and a subset of VGGFace2, under realistic conditions with variations in illumination, pose, and occlusion. The results demonstrate that the proposed model achieves a high classification accuracy of 97.8%, outperforming conventional models such as baseline CNN, ResNet, and standard MobileNet. The confusion matrix analysis indicates strong class-wise discrimination with minimal misclassification, while ROC-AUC evaluation confirms robust performance across all classes. Additionally, the proposed approach maintains low computational complexity and reduced inference time, making it suitable for real-time surveillance and edge-based applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出结合MobileNet与注意力机制的轻量级框架，在监控嫌疑人识别中达到97.8%准确率，兼顾实时性。
analysis.research_motivation: 监控系统中嫌疑人自动识别需要高精度与计算效率，现有方法在复杂条件下（光照、姿态、遮挡）性能不足，且难以部署于边缘设备。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持低计算复杂度的同时，提升监控场景下嫌疑人识别的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于MobileNet轻量架构，集成通道注意力和空间注意力机制，通过Adam优化器训练，结合高效预处理和注意力特征精炼。
contributions: 提出轻量级MobileNet与注意力机制结合的框架，在多个基准数据集上达到97.8%准确率。
在保持低计算复杂度和推理时间的同时，优于基线CNN、ResNet和标准MobileNet。
analysis.experiments: 在LFW、CASIA-WebFace和VGGFace2子集上实验，包含光照、姿态、遮挡变化，报告了准确率、混淆矩阵和ROC-AUC。
limitations: 仅在公开人脸数据集上验证，未在真实监控场景中测试。
未讨论注意力机制引入的额外计算开销对极端边缘设备的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结合MobileNet与注意力机制的轻量级框架，在监控嫌疑人识别中达到97.8%准确率，兼顾实时性。

papers.title: From Barrier to Bridge: The Case for AI Data Center/Power Grid Co-Design
papers.abstract: For over a century, the electric grid has relied on a single statistical assumption: \emph{load diversity}, the principle that the uncorrelated demands of millions of small consumers produce a smooth, predictable aggregate. AI training data centers break that assumption. A single hyperscale training campus can draw power comparable to a mid-sized city, driven by one tightly synchronized job whose demand swings by hundreds of megawatts in seconds. This paper argues that the resulting entanglement of compute and power infrastructure requires a shift from implicit coexistence to explicit co-development between the historically decoupled data center and electric power industries. We introduce the distinct design principles, operational philosophies, and economic incentives of each sector, and show why their cultural and technical misalignment makes coordination difficult. We identify key research directions, from joint capacity planning, multi-timescale control, a compute--power protocol stack, to market innovation, that must be pursued to power the future of AI sustainably and reliably.

analysis.tldr: AI训练数据中心打破电网负载多样性假设，需与电网协同设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统电网依赖负载多样性假设，但AI训练数据中心的高功率、同步负载特性破坏了这一假设，导致电网稳定性风险。
analysis.problem: AI数据中心与电网在规划、运营、经济激励上的脱节，需要从隐式共存转向显式协同设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI训练数据中心功率需求可达中型城市规模，且因同步作业在秒级内波动数百兆瓦，与电网传统负载多样性假设冲突。
analysis.method: 提出跨学科研究方向：联合容量规划、多时间尺度控制、计算-电力协议栈、市场创新。
contributions: 揭示AI数据中心与电网脱节的核心问题及技术文化错位
提出四个关键研究方向以推动协同设计
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供定量分析或仿真验证
研究方向缺乏具体算法或系统实现
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI训练数据中心打破电网负载多样性假设，需与电网协同设计。

papers.title: Making the Invisible Visible: Understanding the Mismatch Between Organizational Goals and Worker Experiences in AI Adoption
papers.abstract: While AI is often introduced into organizations to drive innovation and efficiency, many adoption efforts fail as workers resist and struggle to integrate these systems. These failures point to a deeper issue: workers, the very people expected to collaborate with AI, are often invisible in decisions about how AI is designed and used. Drawing on interviews with professionals who interact with AI systems daily in healthcare, finance, and management, we examine the disconnect between organizational expectations and worker experiences. We identify key barriers, including poor usability and interoperability, misaligned expectations, limited control, and insufficient communication. These challenges highlight a gap between how organizations implement AI and the evolving worker needs, tasks, and workflows that it fails to support. We argue that successful adoption requires recognizing workers as central to AI integration and propose adaptation strategies at the individual, task, and organizational levels to better align AI systems with real-world practices.

analysis.tldr: 揭示组织AI采纳中目标与员工体验的错位，提出以员工为中心的适应策略。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在组织中的采纳常因员工抵制和整合困难而失败，根本原因在于员工在AI设计与使用决策中被忽视，导致系统与真实工作实践脱节。
analysis.problem: 组织AI采纳中，组织目标与员工实际体验之间存在系统性错位，表现为可用性差、期望错位、控制权不足和沟通不畅等障碍。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过访谈发现，员工在AI采纳中面临可用性差、互操作性不足、期望错位、控制权有限和沟通不足等关键障碍，这些障碍反映了组织AI实施与员工需求、任务和工作流之间的鸿沟。
analysis.method: 基于对医疗、金融和管理领域日常使用AI系统的专业人员的访谈，进行定性分析，识别障碍并提出多层次适应策略。
contributions: 系统识别了组织AI采纳中组织目标与员工体验之间的关键错位障碍。
提出了以员工为中心的个体、任务和组织层面的适应策略，以促进AI与真实实践的整合。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基于访谈的定性研究，样本量和领域代表性可能有限。
提出的适应策略缺乏实证验证和量化效果评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 揭示组织AI采纳中目标与员工体验的错位，提出以员工为中心的适应策略。

papers.title: Refining Compositional Diffusion for Reliable Long-Horizon Planning
papers.abstract: Compositional diffusion planning generates long-horizon trajectories by stitching together overlapping short-horizon segments through score composition. However, when local plan distributions are multimodal, existing compositional methods suffer from mode-averaging, where averaging incompatible local modes leads to plans that are neither locally feasible nor globally coherent. We propose Refining Compositional Diffusion (RCD), a training-free guidance method that steers compositional sampling toward high-density, globally coherent plans. RCD leverages the self-reconstruction error of a pretrained diffusion model as a proxy for the log-density of composed plans, combined with an overlap consistency term that enforces consistency at segment boundaries. We show that the combined guidance concentrates sampling on high-density plans that mitigate mode-averaging. Experiments on challenging long-horizon tasks from OGBench, including locomotion, object manipulation, and pixel-based observations, demonstrate that RCD consistently outperforms existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出无训练引导方法RCD，通过自重构误差和重叠一致性项缓解组合扩散规划中的模式平均问题，提升长时域规划可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合扩散规划通过拼接短时域段生成长期轨迹，但现有方法在局部多模态分布下存在模式平均问题，导致规划既不可行也不连贯，限制了其在长时域任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 解决组合扩散规划中因局部多模态分布导致的模式平均问题，即平均不兼容的局部模式产生不可行且不连贯的全局规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当局部规划分布为多模态时，现有组合方法会出现模式平均，导致生成的规划既无法满足局部可行性也缺乏全局连贯性。
analysis.method: 提出Refining Compositional Diffusion (RCD)，一种无训练引导方法，利用预训练扩散模型的自重构误差作为组合规划对数密度的代理，并结合重叠一致性项强制段边界一致性，从而将组合采样引导至高密度、全局连贯的规划。
contributions: 提出RCD方法，通过自重构误差和重叠一致性项有效缓解组合扩散规划中的模式平均问题。
在OGBench的多个长时域任务（包括运动、物体操作和像素观测）上验证了RCD的优越性能。
