analysis.experiments: 在OGBench的挑战性长时域任务上进行了实验，包括运动、物体操作和基于像素的观测，结果表明RCD一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 方法依赖预训练扩散模型的质量，若模型本身存在偏差可能影响引导效果。
重叠一致性项可能增加计算开销，尤其在长序列规划中。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无训练引导方法RCD，通过自重构误差和重叠一致性项缓解组合扩散规划中的模式平均问题，提升长时域规划可靠性。

papers.title: Computing Thiele Rules on Interval Elections and their Generalizations
papers.abstract: Approval-based committee voting has received significant attention in the social choice community. Among the studied rules, Thiele rules, and especially Proportional Approval Voting (PAV), stand out for desirable properties such as proportional representation, Pareto optimality, and support monotonicity. Their main drawback is that computing a Thiele outcome is NP-hard in general. A glimpse of hope comes from the fact that Thiele rules are better behaved under structured preferences. On the candidate interval (CI) domain, they are computable in polynomial time via a linear program (LP) that has a totally unimodular constraint matrix. Surprisingly, this approach fails for the related voter interval (VI) domain, and the complexity of the problem has repeatedly been posed as an open question. Our main result resolves this question: although the relevant matrix is not totally unimodular, the ``standard'' LP still admits at least one optimal integral solution, and we provide a fast algorithm for finding it. Our technique naturally extends to the voter-candidate interval (VCI) domain, also known as the 1-dimensional voter-candidate range (1D-VCR) domain, and to the linearly consistent (LC) domain, both of which generalize the candidate and voter interval domains. Although both the VCI and LC domains have been studied in social choice, their relationship was unknown. We show, through connections to graph theory, that LC strictly contains VCI. We also provide an alternative definition of LC that is closer in spirit to VCI and has a natural interpretation in approval elections; this equivalence may be of independent interest. Finally, we study an alternative tree-based generalization of VCI and show that Thiele rules become NP-hard to compute on this domain.

analysis.tldr: 在区间选举上，Thiele规则可通过线性规划多项式时间求解，并推广到更一般的偏好域。
analysis.research_motivation: Thiele规则（如PAV）具有良好公理性质，但计算NP难；结构化偏好（如区间域）可能带来多项式时间算法，但选民区间域的计算复杂度是悬而未决的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决选民区间（VI）域上Thiele规则的计算复杂度问题，并推广到更一般的偏好域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 候选区间域上线性规划约束矩阵全幺模，可多项式求解；但选民区间域矩阵非全幺模，标准LP仍存在最优整数解。
analysis.method: 证明标准线性规划在选民区间域上至少有一个最优整数解，并给出快速算法；通过图论连接选民-候选区间域与线性一致域，证明后者严格包含前者。
contributions: 解决了选民区间域上Thiele规则计算复杂度的开放问题，给出多项式时间算法。
揭示了选民-候选区间域与线性一致域的关系，证明线性一致域严格包含选民-候选区间域。
给出了线性一致域的另一种定义，具有自然解释。
证明了在树形推广域上Thiele规则是NP难的。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 算法仅适用于特定结构化偏好域，一般情形仍NP难。
未讨论实际选举数据上的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在区间选举上，Thiele规则可通过线性规划多项式时间求解，并推广到更一般的偏好域。

papers.title: Memory-Efficient EDA Denoising via Knowledge Distillation for Wearable IoT Under Severe Motion Artifacts and Underwater Conditions
papers.abstract: Electrodermal activity (EDA) is widely used in wearable Internet of Medical Things (IoMT) systems for continuous health monitoring, including autonomic assessment. However, EDA signals are highly vulnerable to motion artifacts and environmental noise, limiting reliable deployment in harsh operating conditions such as underwater. This study proposes a robust, deployable EDA denoising framework that generalizes across multiple measurement locations and harsh environments. The framework integrates a hybrid CNN-Transformer teacher model with a lightweight depth-wise separable CNN student model via a knowledge distillation (KD) strategy. To further improve robustness, a realistic data augmentation scheme is introduced to simulate diverse motion artifacts and environmental distortions. The KD-based student model significantly reduces model size (7.87 MB to 0.51 MB) and computational cost (105.1M to 11.61M FLOPs) while maintaining denoising performance (MAE: 0.144, SNR improvement: 12.08 dB) using the public dataset validation. In real-world underwater conditions (UMAC dataset) testing, the proposed method substantially improves skin conductance response reconstruction, reducing mean absolute error from 2.809 to 0.215. Furthermore, on independent testing using the CNS-OT dataset, the denoised signals enhanced downstream CNS-OT prediction performance, achieving the highest AUROC (0.806) compared to prior denoising methods. The proposed method also improved the early prediction rate (sensitivity) from 0.550 to 0.767, enabling CNS-OT prediction up to a median of 6.9 minutes before symptom onset. These results demonstrate that the proposed framework not only improves EDA signal quality but also enhances clinically relevant prediction performance while remaining suitable for deployment in resource-constrained wearable Internet of Things systems operating in harsh environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识蒸馏框架，将CNN-Transformer教师模型压缩为轻量CNN学生模型，实现可穿戴EDA信号去噪，在严重运动伪影和水下条件下保持性能。
analysis.research_motivation: EDA信号在可穿戴医疗物联网中用于连续健康监测，但极易受运动伪影和环境噪声干扰，限制其在恶劣环境（如水下）中的可靠部署。现有方法难以兼顾去噪性能与低资源消耗。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个鲁棒、可部署的EDA去噪框架，在多种测量位置和恶劣环境下泛化，同时保持低内存和计算成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成混合CNN-Transformer教师模型与轻量级深度可分离CNN学生模型，通过知识蒸馏策略压缩模型；引入真实数据增强方案模拟多样运动伪影和环境失真。
contributions: 提出基于知识蒸馏的EDA去噪框架，显著减小模型大小（7.87 MB→0.51 MB）和计算成本（105.1M→11.61M FLOPs），同时保持去噪性能。
在真实水下条件（UMAC数据集）测试中，皮肤电导响应重建的MAE从2.809降至0.215；在CNS-OT数据集上，去噪信号提升下游预测性能，AUROC达0.806，早期预测率从0.550提升至0.767。
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上验证去噪性能（MAE: 0.144, SNR改善: 12.08 dB）；在真实水下条件（UMAC数据集）测试中，MAE从2.809降至0.215；在CNS-OT数据集上，AUROC达0.806，早期预测率从0.550提升至0.767。
limitations: 可能仅针对EDA信号，泛化到其他生理信号需验证。
知识蒸馏依赖教师模型质量，教师模型性能瓶颈可能限制学生模型上限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识蒸馏框架，将CNN-Transformer教师模型压缩为轻量CNN学生模型，实现可穿戴EDA信号去噪，在严重运动伪影和水下条件下保持性能。

papers.title: Learning to Segment using Summary Statistics and Weak Supervision
papers.abstract: Medical experts often manually segment images to obtain diagnostic statistics and discard the resulting annotations. We aim to train segmentation models to alleviate this burden, but constrained to the retained summary statistics (e.g., the area of the annotated region). Empirical results suggest that statistics alone are insufficient for this task, but adding weak information in the form of a few pixels within the area of interest significantly improves performance. We use a novel loss function that combines terms for image reconstruction quality, matching to summary statistics, and overlap between the predicted foreground and the weak supervisory signal. Experiments on standard image, ultrasound (breast cancer), and Computed Tomography (CT) scan (kidney tumors) data demonstrate the utility and potential of the approach.

analysis.tldr: 利用摘要统计量和弱监督信号训练分割模型，仅需少量像素标注即可实现有效分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学专家手动分割图像后通常只保留诊断统计量（如面积）而丢弃标注，造成标注浪费；现有方法无法仅靠统计量训练分割模型，需要更高效的弱监督方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅利用保留的摘要统计量（如区域面积）和极少量像素级弱监督信号训练高质量分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅靠摘要统计量不足以训练分割模型，但加入感兴趣区域内的少量像素（弱监督信号）可显著提升性能。
analysis.method: 提出一种结合图像重建质量、摘要统计量匹配和预测前景与弱监督信号重叠三项损失的新型损失函数。
contributions: 证明了仅靠摘要统计量不足以训练分割模型，但结合少量像素弱监督信号可有效提升性能。
提出一种结合重建、统计量匹配和重叠损失的新型损失函数，适用于多种医学图像分割任务。
analysis.experiments: 在标准图像、超声（乳腺癌）和CT扫描（肾肿瘤）数据集上验证了方法的有效性和潜力。
limitations: 弱监督信号仍需少量像素标注，未实现完全无监督。
摘要统计量类型有限（仅面积），可能不适用于其他统计量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用摘要统计量和弱监督信号训练分割模型，仅需少量像素标注即可实现有效分割。

papers.title: Neuron-Anchored Rule Extraction for Large Language Models via Contrastive Hierarchical Ablation
papers.abstract: A key goal of explainable AI (XAI) is to express the decision logic of large language models (LLMs) in symbolic form and link it to internal mechanisms. Global rule-extraction methods typically learn symbolic surrogates without grounding rules in model circuitry, while mechanistic interpretability can connect behaviors to neuron sets but often depends on hand-crafted hypotheses and expensive neuron-level interventions. We introduce MechaRule, a pipeline that grounds rule extraction in LLM circuits by efficiently localizing sparse neurons called agonists, whose activation neutralization disrupts rule-related behaviors. MechaRule rests on two empirical observations. First, within a fixed baseline/flip regime, sparse agonist effects can be approximately monotone and saturating: a few dominant neuron activations can overtop weaker ones at coarse scales, while overlapping neurons flip many of the same examples. This motivates viewing localization as adaptive group testing driven by a regime-conditional strength predicate with confidence-guided conservative pruning, yielding Theta(k log(N/k) + k) interventions over N candidates when k << N neurons are agonists under the monotone-overtopping abstraction. Second, agonists emerge more reliably when ablations are verified through data splits aligned with close-to-faithful rule behavior; spectral splits remain a useful rule-free fallback, while unfaithful splits degrade localization. Empirically, overtopping appears mainly in learned, task-aligned regimes: on arithmetic and jailbreak tasks across Qwen2 and GPT-J, MechaRule recalls 96.8% of high-effect brute-force agonists in completed comparisons, and suppressing localized agonists reduces arithmetic accuracy and jailbreak success by up to 71.1% and 8.8%, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出MechaRule，通过对比分层消融定位关键神经元（agonists）并提取符号规则，实现LLM决策逻辑的机制级解释。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有全局规则提取方法未将规则与模型电路关联，而机制可解释性依赖手工假设和昂贵的神经元干预，缺乏高效、可扩展的规则提取方案。
analysis.problem: 如何高效定位LLM中与规则行为相关的稀疏神经元集合，并基于此提取可解释的符号规则。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在固定基线/翻转模式下，稀疏agonists效应近似单调饱和：少数主导神经元激活可覆盖较弱神经元，而重叠神经元会翻转相同样本。
analysis.method: MechaRule：将规则提取视为自适应组测试，利用单调覆盖抽象和置信度引导的保守剪枝，以Theta(k log(N/k) + k)次干预定位k个agonists；通过数据分裂验证消融的忠实性，使用谱分裂作为无规则回退。
contributions: 提出agonist概念及基于单调覆盖的自适应组测试定位方法，显著降低干预次数。
揭示数据分裂忠实性对agonist定位可靠性的影响，并验证方法在算术和越狱任务上的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen2和GPT-J上对算术和越狱任务进行实验，MechaRule召回96.8%的高效应brute-force agonists，抑制定位的agonists使算术准确率降低71.1%，越狱成功率降低8.8%。
limitations: 单调覆盖假设可能不适用于所有任务或模型。
依赖数据分裂的忠实性，无规则回退（谱分裂）可能降低定位质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MechaRule，通过对比分层消融定位关键神经元（agonists）并提取符号规则，实现LLM决策逻辑的机制级解释。

papers.title: Approaching human parity in the quality of automated organoid image segmentation
papers.abstract: Organoids are complex, three dimensional, self-organizing cell cultures which manifest organ-like features and represent a powerful platform for studying human disease and developing treatment options. Organoid development is characterized by dynamic morphological and cellular organization, which mimic some aspects of organ development. To study these rapid changes over the course of organoid development, advanced imaging and analytical tools are critical to accurately monitor the trajectory of organoid growth and investigate disease processes. In this work, we focus on computer vision and machine learning techniques to automatically measure the size and shape of developing spheroids derived from pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs), which are typically the starting material for generating organoid cultures. To facilitate this task, we introduce a composite method that combines the Segment Anything Model (SAM), a general-purpose foundation model, with an existing domain-specific tool. This composite method is evaluated together with several existing tools by testing them on organoid image data and comparing with the results of manual image segmentation. We find that no single existing tool is able to segment the test images with sufficient accuracy across all test conditions, but the newly introduced composite method produces consistent and accurate results for all but a very small fraction of the most challenging images. Finally, we compare the accuracy of this method to the variability between manual segmentations by independent annotators (inter-observer variability) and find that by one measure it performs at the level of inter-observer variability and by others it performs very close to it.

analysis.tldr: 结合SAM与领域专用工具，实现类器官图像分割接近人类水平。
analysis.research_motivation: 类器官是研究疾病和开发治疗的重要平台，但其动态形态变化需要精确的自动分割工具，现有方法在不同条件下精度不足。
analysis.problem: 自动分割类器官图像时，现有工具无法在所有测试条件下达到足够精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种复合方法，结合通用基础模型Segment Anything Model (SAM)与现有领域专用工具。
contributions: 引入SAM与领域专用工具结合的复合分割方法
在类器官图像上系统评估多种工具，并证明复合方法接近人工分割的一致性
analysis.experiments: 在类器官图像数据上测试，与手动分割结果对比，并评估观察者间变异性。
limitations: 对极少数最具挑战性的图像仍无法准确分割
可能依赖特定领域工具，泛化性待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合SAM与领域专用工具，实现类器官图像分割接近人类水平。

papers.title: ARIS: Autonomous Research via Adversarial Multi-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: This report describes ARIS (Auto-Research-in-sleep), an open-source research harness for autonomous research, including its architecture, assurance mechanisms, and early deployment experience. The performance of agent systems built on LLMs depends on both the model weights and the harness around them, which governs what information to store, retrieve, and present to the model. For long-horizon research workflows, the central failure mode is not a visible breakdown but a plausible unsupported success: a long-running agent can produce claims whose evidential support is incomplete, misreported, or silently inherited from the executor's framing. Therefore, we present ARIS as a research harness that coordinates machine-learning research workflows through cross-model adversarial collaboration as a default configuration: an executor model drives forward progress while a reviewer from a different model family is recommended to critique intermediate artifacts and request revisions. ARIS has three architectural layers. The execution layer provides more than 65 reusable Markdown-defined skills, model integrations via MCP, a persistent research wiki for iterative reuse of prior findings, and deterministic figure generation. The orchestration layer coordinates five end-to-end workflows with adjustable effort settings and configurable routing to reviewer models. The assurance layer includes a three-stage process for checking whether experimental claims are supported by evidence: integrity verification, result-to-claim mapping, and claim auditing that cross-checks manuscript statements against the claim ledger and raw evidence, as well as a five-pass scientific-editing pipeline, mathematical-proof checks, and visual inspection of the rendered PDF. A prototype self-improvement loop records research traces and proposes harness improvements that are adopted only after reviewer approval.

analysis.tldr: ARIS 是一个通过跨模型对抗协作实现自主机器学习的开源研究框架，重点解决长周期研究流程中证据支持不足的失败模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 LLM 代理系统在长周期研究任务中容易产生看似合理但证据不足的结论，且失败模式隐蔽，需要更可靠的自主研究框架。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能够确保长周期机器学习研究流程中实验结论有充分证据支持的自主研究框架。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长周期研究流程的主要失败模式不是可见的崩溃，而是看似合理但证据不完整的成功：长期运行的代理可能产生声称有证据支持但实际不完整、误报或从执行者框架中继承的结论。
analysis.method: ARIS 通过三层架构（执行层、编排层、保证层）实现跨模型对抗协作：执行模型推进研究，推荐不同模型族的评审模型批判中间产物并请求修订；保证层包含完整性验证、结果到声明映射、声明审计等三阶段检查。
contributions: 提出了一个开源的自主研究框架 ARIS，通过跨模型对抗协作确保研究结论的证据支持。
设计了包含执行层、编排层和保证层的三层架构，提供 65+ 可复用技能、持久研究 wiki 和确定性图表生成。
实现了原型自我改进循环，研究轨迹记录后经评审批准才采纳改进。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖评审模型的质量和多样性，不同模型族的选择对效果有影响。
自我改进循环的效率和有效性尚未在摘要中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ARIS 是一个通过跨模型对抗协作实现自主机器学习的开源研究框架，重点解决长周期研究流程中证据支持不足的失败模式。

papers.title: Mixed-Precision Information Bottlenecks for On-Device Trait-State Disentanglement in Bipolar Agitation Detection
papers.abstract: Continuous monitoring of bipolar disorder agitation via voice biomarkers requires disentangling stable speaker traits from volatile affective states on resource-constrained edge devices. We introduce MP-IB, the first framework to treat mixed-precision quantization as an information bottleneck for clinical trait-state separation. The core insight is that numerical precision itself controls capacity: an FP16 trait head (1,024 bits) encodes speaker identity, while an INT4 state head (128 bits) captures agitation, yielding 8x information asymmetry without adversarial training. We augment this with Dynamic Precision Scheduling and Multi-Scale Temporal Fusion. On Bridge2AI-Voice (N=833, 4 sessions/participant, strict speaker-independent CV), MP-IB achieves rho = 0.117 (95\% CI: [0.089, 0.145], p=0.003 vs. chance), outperforming 94M-parameter WavLM-Adapter with in-domain SSL continuation (rho = -0.042), beta VAE disentanglement (rho = 0.089), and hand-crafted prosody (rho = 0.031) by 2.8--15.9 points absolute. Zero-shot transfer to CREMA-D achieves AUC=0.817. Identity leakage is suppressed to near-random (EER=0.42, MIA-AUC=0.52). End-to-end latency is 23.4 ms with a 617 KB footprint, enabling real-time monitoring on sub 20 dollar devices.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合精度信息瓶颈框架MP-IB，利用数值精度差异分离说话人特质与情感状态，实现双相障碍躁狂检测的轻量级边缘部署。
analysis.research_motivation: 双相障碍躁狂的持续监测需要从语音中分离稳定的说话人特质和波动的情感状态，但现有方法在资源受限的边缘设备上难以兼顾分离效果与实时性。
analysis.problem: 如何在低功耗边缘设备上实现语音特质-状态解耦，同时保证检测准确性和身份隐私保护。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数值精度本身可控制信息容量：FP16（1024比特）编码身份，INT4（128比特）捕获躁狂状态，形成8倍信息不对称，无需对抗训练即可实现解耦。
analysis.method: 提出MP-IB框架，将混合精度量化视为信息瓶颈：FP16特质头编码说话人身份，INT4状态头捕获躁狂状态；结合动态精度调度和多尺度时间融合。
contributions: 首次将混合精度量化作为临床特质-状态分离的信息瓶颈，利用精度差异实现8倍信息不对称解耦。
在Bridge2AI-Voice数据集上，以617KB模型和23.4ms延迟，在<20美元设备上实现实时监测，性能优于94M参数WavLM-Adapter。
analysis.experiments: 在Bridge2AI-Voice（N=833，4次/参与者，严格说话人独立交叉验证）上，MP-IB的rho=0.117（95% CI: [0.089, 0.145], p=0.003），优于WavLM-Adapter（rho=-0.042）、beta VAE（rho=0.089）和手工韵律特征（rho=0.031）；零样本迁移到CREMA-D达到AUC=0.817；身份泄露抑制到接近随机（EER=0.42, MIA-AUC=0.52）。
limitations: 仅在语音模态验证，未探索多模态融合。
零样本迁移仅测试CREMA-D，泛化性需更多数据集验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合精度信息瓶颈框架MP-IB，利用数值精度差异分离说话人特质与情感状态，实现双相障碍躁狂检测的轻量级边缘部署。

papers.title: Stable Agentic Control: Tool-Mediated LLM Architecture for Autonomous Cyber Defense
papers.abstract: Agentic systems involved in high-stake decision-making under adversarial pressure need formal guarantees not offered by existing approaches. Motivated by the operational needs of security operations centers (SOCs) that must configure endpoint detection and response (EDR) policies under adversarial pressure, we present a tool-mediated architecture: LLM agents use deterministic tools (Stackelberg best-response, Bayesian observer updates, attack-graph primitives) and select from finite action catalogs enforced at the tool-output interface. A composite Lyapunov function machine-checked in Lean 4 with zero sorry certifies controllability, observability from asymmetric sensor data, and Input-to-State Stability (ISS) robustness under intelligent adversarial disturbance, with two corollaries extending the certificate to any controller or adversary from the catalogs. On 282 real enterprise attack graphs, the claims hold with margin. On paired offensive/defensive telemetry, a tool-mediated Claude Sonnet 4 controller reduces the attacker's expected payoff (game value) by 59% relative to a deterministic greedy baseline, with zero variance across 40 runs at four temperatures. A Claude Haiku 4.5 controller converges to suboptimal game values but stays catalog-bounded over an additional 40 runs, demonstrating that architectural stability is not dependent on the controller capability. The LLM agent's non-determinism furthers creative exploration of strategies, while the tool-mediated architecture ensures system stability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种工具中介的LLM架构，通过确定性工具和有限动作目录保证自主网络防御系统的稳定性与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体系统在对抗压力下的高风险决策中缺乏形式化保证，而安全运营中心（SOC）需要配置端点检测与响应（EDR）策略时面临这一挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何设计LLM智能体架构，使其在对抗性扰动下既能保持系统稳定性，又能利用LLM的创造性探索能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 工具中介架构：LLM智能体使用确定性工具（Stackelberg最佳响应、贝叶斯观测器更新、攻击图原语）并从工具输出接口强制执行的有限动作目录中选择动作；通过Lean 4验证的复合Lyapunov函数保证可控性、可观测性和输入到状态稳定性（ISS）。
contributions: 提出一种工具中介的LLM架构，结合确定性工具和有限动作目录，实现自主网络防御的形式化稳定性保证。
在282个真实企业攻击图上验证了稳定性声明，并在攻防遥测数据上展示了59%的预期收益降低。
analysis.experiments: 在282个真实企业攻击图上验证了稳定性声明；在配对攻防遥测数据上，工具中介的Claude Sonnet 4控制器相比确定性贪婪基线将攻击者预期收益降低59%，且40次运行零方差；Claude Haiku 4.5控制器收敛到次优但保持目录有界。
limitations: 可能依赖特定工具和动作目录的完备性，泛化到其他领域需重新设计。
LLM的非确定性虽促进探索，但可能引入未建模的随机性风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种工具中介的LLM架构，通过确定性工具和有限动作目录保证自主网络防御系统的稳定性与鲁棒性。

papers.title: Understanding Asynchronous Inference Methods for Vision-Language-Action Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising path to generalist robot control, but their inference latency causes observation staleness when generated actions are executed asynchronously. Several methods have been proposed concurrently to mitigate this problem: inference-time inpainting (IT-RTC), training-time delay simulation (TT-RTC), future-state-aware conditioning (VLASH), and lightweight residual correction (A2C2). Each takes a fundamentally different approach, but they have so far been evaluated independently with different codebases, base policies, and protocols. We present a systematic comparison of these four methods under controlled conditions. We develop two unified codebases that integrate all methods with harmonized library and dataset versions, and we benchmark them on the Kinetix suite with MLPMixer policies and on the LIBERO manipulation benchmark with SmolVLA, sweeping inference delays up to $d=20$ control steps. A2C2's per-step residual correction is the most effective method on Kinetix, holding above 90% solve rate up to $d=8$, and also leads on LIBERO from $d=4$ onwards. IT-RTC is competitive at low delays but degrades sharply under long chunks ($H=30$) and high delays. TT-RTC is the most robust training-based method: stable across $d_\max$ choices, generalizes beyond its training delay distribution, and adds zero inference overhead. VLASH exhibits a clear low-delay vs. high-delay trade-off governed by the fine-tuning delay range $[0,d_\max]$. Code is available at https://github.com/TheAyos/async-vla-inference

analysis.tldr: 系统比较四种异步推理方法在VLA模型中的表现，发现A2C2在低延迟下最有效，TT-RTC最鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型推理延迟导致观测过时，影响异步执行效果，现有方法缺乏统一比较。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估和比较四种异步推理方法（IT-RTC、TT-RTC、VLASH、A2C2）在VLA模型中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: A2C2在Kinetix上保持高解决率，IT-RTC在长块和高延迟下性能急剧下降，TT-RTC最鲁棒且无推理开销，VLASH存在低延迟与高延迟的权衡。
analysis.method: 构建统一代码库，在Kinetix和LIBERO基准上对四种方法进行控制实验，扫描延迟步数d=20。
contributions: 首次对四种异步推理方法进行系统比较，统一代码库和协议。
揭示各方法的性能特征和适用场景，为实际部署提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 在Kinetix套件（MLPMixer策略）和LIBERO操作基准（SmolVLA）上评估，延迟步数d=20。
limitations: 仅评估了两种策略和两个基准，泛化性有限。
未考虑真实机器人硬件延迟和噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较四种异步推理方法在VLA模型中的表现，发现A2C2在低延迟下最有效，TT-RTC最鲁棒。

papers.title: AlbumFill: Album-Guided Reasoning and Retrieval for Personalized Image Completion
papers.abstract: Personalized image completion aims to restore occluded regions in personal photos while preserving identity and appearance. Existing methods either rely on generic inpainting models that often fail to maintain identity consistency, or assume that suitable reference images are explicitly provided. In practice, suitable references are often not explicitly provided, requiring the system to search for identity-consistent images within personal photo collections. We present AlbumFill, a training-free framework that retrieves identity-consistent references from personal albums for personalized completion. Given an occluded image and a personal album, a vision-language model infers missing semantic cues to guide composed image retrieval, and the retrieved references are used by reference-based completion models. To facilitate this task, we introduce a dataset containing 54K human-centric samples with associated album images. Experiments across multiple baselines demonstrate the difficulty of personalized completion and highlight the importance of identity-consistent reference retrieval. Project Page: https://liagm.github.io/AlbumFill/

analysis.tldr: AlbumFill 通过从个人相册中检索身份一致的参考图像，实现无需训练的人像补全。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像补全方法要么无法保持身份一致性，要么需要用户显式提供参考图像，而实际中合适的参考往往需要从个人相册中自动检索。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有显式参考图像的情况下，从个人相册中自动检索身份一致的参考图像，以完成个性化图像补全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: AlbumFill 是一个无需训练的框架，使用视觉语言模型推断遮挡区域的语义线索，指导组合式图像检索，然后利用检索到的参考图像进行基于参考的补全。
contributions: 提出 AlbumFill，一个无需训练的个性化图像补全框架，能够从个人相册中自动检索身份一致的参考图像。
构建了一个包含 54K 人像样本及其关联相册图像的数据集，用于评估个性化补全任务。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基线上进行实验，展示了个性化补全的难度以及身份一致参考检索的重要性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能依赖视觉语言模型的语义推断能力，在复杂遮挡场景下可能不准确。
数据集仅包含人像样本，泛化到其他类别（如宠物、物品）的能力未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AlbumFill 通过从个人相册中检索身份一致的参考图像，实现无需训练的人像补全。

papers.title: SpecKV: Adaptive Speculative Decoding with Compression-Aware Gamma Selection
papers.abstract: Speculative decoding accelerates large language model (LLM) inference by using a small draft model to propose candidate tokens that a larger target model verifies. A critical hyperparameter in this process is the speculation length $γ$, which determines how many tokens the draft model proposes per step. Nearly all existing systems use a fixed $γ$ (typically 4), yet empirical evidence suggests that the optimal value varies across task types and, crucially, depends on the compression level applied to the target model. In this paper, we present SpecKV, a lightweight adaptive controller that selects $γ$ per speculation step using signals extracted from the draft model itself. We profile speculative decoding across 4 task categories, 4 speculation lengths, and 3 compression levels (FP16, INT8, NF4), collecting 5,112 step-level records with per-step acceptance rates, draft entropy, and draft confidence. We demonstrate that the optimal $γ$ shifts across compression regimes and that draft model confidence and entropy are strong predictors of acceptance rate (correlation $\approx$ 0.56). SpecKV uses a small MLP trained on these signals to maximize expected tokens per speculation step, achieving a 56.0% improvement over the fixed-$γ=4$ baseline with only 0.34 ms overhead per decision (<0.5% of step time). The improvement is statistically significant (p < 0.001, paired bootstrap test). We release all profiling data, trained models, and notebooks as open-source artifacts.

analysis.tldr: SpecKV通过轻量级MLP自适应选择推测长度γ，在LLM推测解码中实现56%的加速，开销仅0.34ms。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有推测解码系统固定使用γ=4，但最优γ随任务类型和模型压缩程度变化，缺乏自适应机制导致效率损失。
analysis.problem: 如何根据任务和压缩级别自适应选择推测长度γ以最大化推测解码效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最优γ随压缩级别变化，草稿模型置信度和熵是接受率的强预测因子（相关性≈0.56）。
analysis.method: SpecKV：基于草稿模型信号（置信度、熵）训练小型MLP，每步预测最优γ以最大化期望接受token数。
contributions: 首次系统研究压缩级别对推测长度γ的影响，并收集5122步级数据。
提出轻量级自适应控制器SpecKV，仅0.34ms开销实现56%加速。
analysis.experiments: 在4种任务、4种γ、3种压缩级别下评估，与固定γ=4基线对比，加速56.0%（p<0.001）。
limitations: 仅基于草稿模型信号，未考虑目标模型动态。
MLP训练依赖离线数据，可能无法泛化到未见任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpecKV通过轻量级MLP自适应选择推测长度γ，在LLM推测解码中实现56%的加速，开销仅0.34ms。

papers.title: Digital Image Forgery Detection Using Transfer Learning
papers.abstract: The increasing availability of advanced image editing tools has led to a significant rise in manipulated digital content, posing serious challenges for digital forensics and information security. This study presents a transfer learning-based framework for digital image forgery detection that integrates compression-aware feature enhancement with deep convolutional neural network (CNN) architectures. The proposed approach introduces a hybrid input representation that combines RGB images with compression difference-based features (FDIFF), explicitly highlighting subtle manipulation artifacts that are often difficult to detect. In addition, a model-specific adaptive threshold optimization strategy based on the Youden Index is employed to improve classification reliability by achieving a better balance between true positive and false positive rates. Experiments conducted on the CASIA v2.0 dataset using multiple pretrained CNN architectures, including DenseNet121, VGG16, ResNet50, EfficientNetB0, MobileNet, and InceptionV3, demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of the proposed framework. The models are evaluated using comprehensive performance metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, F1-score, Matthews correlation coefficient (MCC), and area under the ROC curve (AUC). The results show that DenseNet121 achieves the highest accuracy and AUC, while ResNet50 provides the most balanced and reliable predictions with the highest MCC. The findings emphasize that relying solely on accuracy is insufficient for forensic applications, where minimizing false negatives is critical. Overall, the proposed framework improves the visibility of manipulation artifacts and enhances classification robustness, making it suitable for real-world digital image forgery detection scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合压缩感知特征增强与迁移学习的数字图像伪造检测框架，在CASIA v2.0上验证了多种CNN架构，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50平衡性最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 高级图像编辑工具导致数字内容篡改泛滥，对数字取证和信息安全构成严重威胁，现有方法难以检测细微伪造痕迹。
analysis.problem: 如何有效检测数字图像中的伪造痕迹，特别是利用压缩差异特征增强和自适应阈值优化来提高检测鲁棒性和可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仅依赖准确率不足以评估取证应用，需平衡真阳性率和假阳性率；不同预训练CNN架构在伪造检测中表现各异，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50的MCC最高。
analysis.method: 结合RGB图像与压缩差异特征（FDIFF）的混合输入表示，使用预训练CNN进行迁移学习，并采用基于Youden指数的自适应阈值优化策略。
contributions: 提出一种融合压缩感知特征增强的混合输入表示，突出细微伪造痕迹。
引入基于Youden指数的模型自适应阈值优化，提升分类可靠性。
在CASIA v2.0上系统评估多种CNN架构，揭示准确率在取证中的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在CASIA v2.0数据集上使用DenseNet121、VGG16、ResNet50、EfficientNetB0、MobileNet、InceptionV3进行实验，评估指标包括准确率、精确率、召回率、F1、MCC、AUC。
limitations: 仅在单一数据集CASIA v2.0上验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论计算开销或实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合压缩感知特征增强与迁移学习的数字图像伪造检测框架，在CASIA v2.0上验证了多种CNN架构，DenseNet121准确率最高，ResNet50平衡性最佳。

papers.title: Enhancing RL Generalizability in Robotics through SHAP Analysis of Algorithms and Hyperparameters
papers.abstract: Despite significant advances in Reinforcement Learning (RL), model performance remains highly sensitive to algorithm and hyperparameter configurations, while generalization gaps across environments complicate real-world deployment. Although prior work has studied RL generalization, the relative contribution of specific configurations to the generalization gap has not been quantitatively decomposed and systematically leveraged for configuration selection. To address this limitation, we propose an explainable framework that evaluates RL performance across robotic environments using SHapley Additive exPlanations (SHAP) to quantify configuration impacts. We establish a theoretical foundation connecting Shapley values to generalizability, empirically analyze configuration impact patterns, and introduce SHAP-guided configuration selection to enhance generalization. Our results reveal distinct patterns across algorithms and hyperparameters, with consistent configuration impacts across diverse tasks and environments. By applying these insights to configuration selection, we achieve improved RL generalizability and provide actionable guidance for practitioners.

analysis.tldr: 利用SHAP分析量化算法和超参数对RL泛化性的贡献，并指导配置选择以提升泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 强化学习模型对算法和超参数配置高度敏感，且在不同环境间存在泛化差距，但现有研究未能定量分解配置对泛化差距的贡献并系统用于配置选择。
analysis.problem: 如何定量分解算法和超参数配置对强化学习泛化差距的贡献，并利用这些信息指导配置选择以提升泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同算法和超参数对泛化性的影响呈现不同模式，且配置影响在不同任务和环境间具有一致性。
analysis.method: 提出基于SHAP的可解释框架，量化配置对RL性能的影响，建立Shapley值与泛化性的理论联系，并引入SHAP引导的配置选择方法。
contributions: 建立了Shapley值与RL泛化性的理论联系
提出了SHAP引导的配置选择方法以提升泛化性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: SHAP计算可能在大规模配置空间上成本较高
框架依赖环境多样性验证其一致性结论
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用SHAP分析量化算法和超参数对RL泛化性的贡献，并指导配置选择以提升泛化能力。

papers.title: Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network for Rural Thematic Road Extraction
papers.abstract: Rural thematic road network construction aims to extract topological road structures from movement trajectory images of agricultural machinery. However, this task faces challenges where downsampling methods commonly used in existing studies tend to blur the sparse high-frequency road structures, and the heavy noise from dense field operations often leads to fragmented or redundant topologies in the extracted networks. To address these challenges, we propose LFINet, a Laplacian Frequency Interaction Network. The network begins with a Laplacian Multi-scale Separator (LMS) to decouple the image into low-frequency semantic contexts and high-frequency structural details. These components are then processed by the Cross-Frequency Interaction Block (CFIB) through a dual-pathway architecture in which a High-Frequency Block (HFB) refines local structures while a Spatial Transformer (ST) captures global semantics. Subsequently, a Frequency Gated Modulation (FGM) mechanism integrates the features from pathways by leveraging semantic contexts to calibrate the structural details. Finally, a Progressive Reconstruction Decoder iteratively fuses multi-scale features to ensure topological consistency. Experiments conducted on a real-world agricultural trajectories dataset from Henan Province, China, show that LFINet establishes a new state-of-the-art. Specifically, it achieves an F1-score of 92.54% and an IoU of 86.12%, surpassing the second-ranked method by 0.64% and 1.1%, respectively. This confirms its capability to effectively construct topological road networks from noisy and sparse field data.

analysis.tldr: 提出LFINet，利用拉普拉斯频率交互网络从农机轨迹图像中提取乡村主题道路，在真实数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 乡村主题道路网络构建面临现有下采样方法模糊稀疏高频道路结构、密集田间作业噪声导致拓扑碎片化或冗余的问题，亟需有效方法。
analysis.problem: 从农机运动轨迹图像中提取拓扑道路结构时，如何克服高频结构模糊和噪声干扰以保持拓扑一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出下采样方法会模糊稀疏高频道路结构，密集田间作业噪声导致提取的网络拓扑碎片化或冗余。
analysis.method: 提出LFINet，包含拉普拉斯多尺度分离器（LMS）解耦图像为低频语义和高频细节，跨频率交互块（CFIB）通过双路径（高频块HFB和空间变换器ST）处理，频率门控调制（FGM）融合特征，渐进重建解码器迭代融合多尺度特征。
contributions: 提出LFINet，一种拉普拉斯频率交互网络，用于从噪声和稀疏的田间数据中构建拓扑道路网络。
在真实农机轨迹数据集上达到新SOTA，F1-score 92.54%，IoU 86.12%。
analysis.experiments: 在来自中国河南省的真实农业轨迹数据集上实验，LFINet取得F1-score 92.54%和IoU 86.12%，超过第二名0.64%和1.1%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于农业机械轨迹图像，泛化到其他道路提取任务需验证。
计算复杂度可能较高，未在摘要中提及效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LFINet，利用拉普拉斯频率交互网络从农机轨迹图像中提取乡村主题道路，在真实数据集上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Pixel Perfect: Relational Image Quality Assessment with Spatially-Aware Distortions
papers.abstract: Traditional image quality assessment (IQA) methods rely on mean opinion scores (MOS), which are resource-intensive to collect and fail to provide interpretable, localized feedback on specific image distortions. We overcome these limitations by shifting from absolute quality prediction to a relational and directional assessment. Our approach utilizes a self-supervised synthetic distortion engine to generate training data, eliminating the need for manual annotation. A distortion prediction network is trained with an anti-symmetric objective to produce spatially-aware, disentangled maps that identify the type, intensity, and direction of distortions relative to a reference image. Subsequently, a scoring network is trained via contrastive learning on ordinally ranked image sets to predict a relational quality score. Our method provides a more granular and interpretable approach to IQA for the targeted optimization of image processing algorithms without requiring any human-labeled quality scores.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需人工标注、可提供空间感知失真图的关系型图像质量评估方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统IQA依赖平均意见分，收集成本高且无法提供可解释的局部失真反馈。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用人工标注的情况下，实现可解释、空间感知的图像质量评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用自监督合成失真引擎生成训练数据，训练反对称目标的失真预测网络输出空间感知失真图，再通过对比学习在有序图像集上训练评分网络预测关系质量分数。
contributions: 提出关系型、方向性的IQA范式，替代绝对质量预测。
无需人工标注，通过自监督合成失真和对比学习实现可解释的局部失真反馈。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成失真与真实失真的分布一致性。
关系型分数在跨数据集泛化上可能存在挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需人工标注、可提供空间感知失真图的关系型图像质量评估方法。

papers.title: Standing on the Shoulders of Giants: Stabilized Knowledge Distillation for Cross--Language Code Clone Detection
papers.abstract: Cross-language code clone detection (X-CCD) is challenging because semantically equivalent programs written in different languages often share little surface similarity. Although large language models (LLMs) have shown promise for semantic clone detection, their use as black-box systems raises concerns about cost, reproducibility, privacy, and unreliable output formatting. In particular, compact open-source models often struggle to follow reasoning-oriented prompts and to produce outputs that can be consistently mapped to binary clone labels. To address these limitations, we propose a knowledge distillation framework that transfers reasoning capabilities from DeepSeek-R1 into compact open-source student models for X-CCD. Using cross-language code pairs derived from Project CodeNet, we construct reasoning-oriented synthetic training data and fine-tune Phi3 and Qwen-Coder with LoRA adapters. We further introduce response stabilization methods, including forced conclusion prompting, a binary classification head, and a contrastive classification head, and evaluate model behavior using both predictive metrics and response rate. Experiments on Python--Java, Rust--Java, Rust--Python, and Rust--Ruby show that knowledge distillation consistently improves the reliability of compact models and often improves predictive performance, especially under distribution shift. In addition, classification-head variants substantially reduce inference time compared to generation-based inference. Overall, our results show that reasoning-oriented distillation combined with response stabilization makes compact open-source models more practical and reliable for X-CCD detection.

analysis.tldr: 提出知识蒸馏框架将大模型推理能力迁移至紧凑模型，结合响应稳定方法提升跨语言代码克隆检测的可靠性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨语言代码克隆检测因语言间表面相似性低而困难，大模型作为黑盒存在成本、隐私和输出不稳定等问题，紧凑模型难以遵循推理提示并产生一致标签。
analysis.problem: 如何让紧凑开源模型可靠且高效地执行跨语言代码克隆检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 紧凑模型在推理导向提示下输出不稳定，难以映射为二元克隆标签。
analysis.method: 从DeepSeek-R1蒸馏推理能力到紧凑模型（Phi3、Qwen-Coder），使用Project CodeNet构建跨语言推理数据，通过LoRA微调，并引入强制结论提示、二元分类头和对比分类头等响应稳定方法。
contributions: 提出针对跨语言代码克隆检测的知识蒸馏框架，将大模型推理能力迁移至紧凑模型。
引入多种响应稳定方法（强制结论提示、分类头）提升输出可靠性和推理效率。
analysis.experiments: 在Python-Java、Rust-Java、Rust-Python和Rust-Ruby四组跨语言对上评估，知识蒸馏一致提升紧凑模型可靠性，分类头变体大幅减少推理时间。
limitations: 仅基于Project CodeNet数据集，可能未覆盖所有编程语言对。
蒸馏依赖DeepSeek-R1，其他大模型效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出知识蒸馏框架将大模型推理能力迁移至紧凑模型，结合响应稳定方法提升跨语言代码克隆检测的可靠性与效率。

papers.title: From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications
papers.abstract: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data, yet transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult. Provisioning heterogeneous infrastructure and managing execution on emerging platforms like Data Processing Units typically requires cross-domain expertise, creating significant barriers to rapid prototyping. This paper introduces an experience-driven methodology for the rapid development of sensor-driven applications. By combining pattern-based workflow engineering with AI-assisted development-implemented via Pegasus on the FABRIC testbed - we utilize an existing Orcasound hydrophone workflow as a reusable template. We introduce a pattern-based engineering methodology to generate and refine workflows for air quality, earthquake, and soil moisture monitoring. Furthermore, we show how these abstract structures are extended to edge resources through modular configuration and placement. Our evaluation focuses on user productivity and practical lessons rather than peak performance. Through these case studies, we illustrate how AI-assisted, pattern-based development lowers the entry barrier for non-experts and enables iterative exploration of sensor-driven applications across distributed infrastructures.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合模式工程与AI辅助的传感器应用快速开发方法，降低跨域基础设施部署门槛。
analysis.research_motivation: 传感器数据流从边缘到云端的处理需要跨领域专业知识，现有方法难以支持非专家快速原型开发。
analysis.problem: 如何降低传感器驱动应用在异构基础设施（如DPU）上开发与部署的复杂性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于模式的工作流工程结合AI辅助开发，利用Pegasus在FABRIC测试床上复用Orcasound水听器工作流模板，通过模块化配置扩展至边缘资源。
contributions: 提出模式驱动的工程方法用于生成和优化空气质量、地震、土壤湿度监测工作流
展示如何通过模块化配置将抽象结构扩展到边缘资源
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 评估聚焦于用户生产力而非性能，可能缺乏量化指标
案例研究有限，未涵盖所有传感器类型
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合模式工程与AI辅助的传感器应用快速开发方法，降低跨域基础设施部署门槛。

papers.title: Active Sampling for Ultra-Low-Bit-Rate Video Compression via Conditional Controlled Diffusion
papers.abstract: Diffusion models provide a powerful generative prior for perceptual reconstruction at ultra-low bitrates, but effective video compression requires controlling the generative process using highly compact conditioning signals. In this work, we present ActDiff-VC, a diffusion-based video compression framework for the ultra-low-bitrate regime. Our method partitions videos into variable-length segments, transmits keyframes only when needed, and summarizes temporal dynamics using a compact set of tracked point trajectories. Conditioned on these sparse signals, a conditional diffusion decoder synthesizes the remaining frames, enabling perceptually realistic reconstruction under severe rate constraints. To support this design, we introduce two mechanisms: content-adaptive keyframe selection and budget-aware sparse trajectory selection, which together enable compact yet effective conditioning for generative reconstruction. Experiments on the UVG and MCL-JCV benchmarks show that ActDiff-VC achieves up to 64.6\% bitrate reduction at matched NIQE, improves KID by up to 64.6\% and FID by up to 37.7\% at comparable bitrates against strong learned codecs, and delivers favorable perceptual rate--distortion trade-offs relative to learned and diffusion-based baselines in the ultra-low-bitrate regime.

analysis.tldr: 提出ActDiff-VC，利用条件扩散模型和主动采样实现超低码率视频压缩，显著降低码率并提升感知质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 超低码率下传统视频压缩方法感知质量差，扩散模型虽有生成先验但需要高效紧凑的条件信号来控制生成过程。
analysis.problem: 如何在超低码率下利用扩散模型进行有效的视频压缩，即设计紧凑的条件信号和采样策略以平衡码率和感知质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ActDiff-VC框架，将视频分割为可变长度片段，仅在需要时传输关键帧，并用紧凑的轨迹点集总结时间动态；引入内容自适应关键帧选择和预算感知稀疏轨迹选择两种机制。
contributions: 提出基于条件扩散的超低码率视频压缩框架ActDiff-VC，结合主动采样策略。
设计内容自适应关键帧选择和预算感知稀疏轨迹选择机制，实现紧凑有效的条件信号。
analysis.experiments: 在UVG和MCL-JCV基准上，ActDiff-VC在匹配NIQE时实现高达64.6%的码率降低，在可比码率下KID改善64.6%、FID改善37.7%，优于强学习编解码器和扩散基线。
limitations: 可能依赖轨迹点提取质量，复杂运动场景下性能可能下降。
超低码率下生成帧的时序一致性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ActDiff-VC，利用条件扩散模型和主动采样实现超低码率视频压缩，显著降低码率并提升感知质量。

papers.title: (POSTER) From Sensors to Insight: Rapid, Edge-to-Core Application Development for Sensor-Driven Applications
papers.abstract: Scientists increasingly rely on sensor-based data; however transforming raw streams into insights across the edge-to-cloud continuum remains difficult due to the breadth of expertise required to coordinate the necessary data and computation flow. This paper introduces a pattern-based, AI-assisted methodology for rapid development of sensor-driven applications. Using Pegasus workflows executing on the FABRIC testbed, we demonstrate a 5-step development loop that shifts workflow construction and deployment from code-first to intent-first design. Starting from an existing Orcasound hydrophone workflow as a reusable template, we generate and refine workflows for air quality, earthquake, and soil moisture monitoring applications. We further show how these workflows extend to edge resources-including BlueField-3 DPUs and Raspberry Pis-through configuration and placement rather than workflow redesign. Our evaluation, from the perspective of a novice Pegasus user, shows that AI-assisted pattern reuse compresses multi-stage workflow development to 1-1.5 days per workflow while preserving the rigor and portability of workflow-based execution.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于模式和AI辅助的快速开发方法，将传感器工作流构建从代码优先转向意图优先，显著缩短开发周期。
analysis.research_motivation: 传感器数据流在边缘到云连续体中的转换需要多领域专业知识，现有方法开发周期长、协调复杂。
analysis.problem: 如何简化传感器驱动应用的开发流程，降低对多领域专业知识的依赖，并加速从原始数据到洞察的转化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于模式（Pegasus工作流模板）和AI辅助的5步开发循环，实现从代码优先到意图优先的设计转变，并通过配置和部署扩展至边缘资源。
contributions: 提出一种意图优先的传感器应用开发方法论，利用模式复用和AI辅助压缩开发时间。
在FABRIC测试台上演示了从水听器工作流模板生成空气质量、地震和土壤湿度监测工作流的过程，并扩展到BlueField-3 DPU和Raspberry Pi等边缘设备。
analysis.experiments: 从新手Pegasus用户角度评估，AI辅助模式复用将多阶段工作流开发压缩至每个工作流1-1.5天。
limitations: 评估仅从新手用户角度进行，未涉及专家用户或大规模部署场景。
方法依赖现有模板和AI辅助，可能对全新领域适应性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于模式和AI辅助的快速开发方法，将传感器工作流构建从代码优先转向意图优先，显著缩短开发周期。

papers.title: A second-order method landing on the Stiefel manifold via Newton$\unicode{x2013}$Schulz iteration
papers.abstract: Retraction-free approaches offer attractive low-cost alternatives to Riemannian methods on the Stiefel manifold, but they are often first-order, which may limit the efficiency under high-accuracy requirements. To this end, we propose a second-order method landing on the Stiefel manifold without invoking retractions, which is proved to enjoy local quadratic (or superlinear for its inexact variant) convergence. The update consists of the sum of (i) a component tangent to the level set of the constraint-defining function that aims to reduce the objective and (ii) a component normal to the same level set that reduces the infeasibility. Specifically, we construct the normal component via Newton$\unicode{x2013}$Schulz, a fixed-point iteration for orthogonalization. Moreover, we establish a geometric connection between the Newton$\unicode{x2013}$Schulz iteration and Stiefel manifolds, in which Newton$\unicode{x2013}$Schulz moves along the normal space. For the tangent component, we formulate a modified Newton equation that incorporates Newton$\unicode{x2013}$Schulz. Numerical experiments on the orthogonal Procrustes problem, principal component analysis, and real-data independent component analysis illustrate that the proposed method performs better than the existing methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需回缩的Stiefel流形二阶方法，利用Newton-Schulz迭代实现局部二次收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Stiefel流形上的无回缩方法多为线性收敛的一阶方法，在高精度需求下效率受限，而二阶方法通常依赖昂贵的回缩操作。
analysis.problem: 如何在Stiefel流形上设计一种无需回缩、且具有局部二次收敛性的二阶优化方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将更新分解为切向分量（通过修正牛顿方程降低目标函数）和法向分量（通过Newton-Schulz定点迭代减少不可行性），并建立Newton-Schulz与Stiefel流形的几何联系。
contributions: 提出首个无需回缩的Stiefel流形二阶方法，证明其局部二次收敛性（非精确变体超线性收敛）。
建立Newton-Schulz迭代与Stiefel流形法空间的几何联系，并设计修正牛顿方程。
analysis.experiments: 在正交Procrustes问题、主成分分析和真实数据独立成分分析上验证，所提方法优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于目标函数光滑且约束为Stiefel流形的问题。
Newton-Schulz迭代的收敛性可能受初始点影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需回缩的Stiefel流形二阶方法，利用Newton-Schulz迭代实现局部二次收敛。

papers.title: VideoNet: A Large-Scale Dataset for Domain-Specific Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Videos are unique in their ability to capture actions which transcend multiple frames. Accordingly, for many years action recognition was the quintessential task for video understanding. Unfortunately, due to a lack of sufficiently diverse and challenging data, modern vision-language models (VLMs) are no longer evaluated on their action recognition capabilities. To revitalize action recognition in the era of VLMs, we advocate for a returned focus on domain-specific actions. To this end, we introduce VideoNet, a domain-specific action recognition benchmark covering 1,000 distinct actions from 37 domains. We begin with a multiple-choice evaluation setting, where the difference between closed and open models is stark: Gemini 3.1 Pro attains 69.9% accuracy while Qwen3-VL-8B gets a mere 45.0%. To understand why VLMs struggle on VideoNet, we relax the questions into a binary setting, where random chance is 50%. Still, Qwen achieves only 59.2% accuracy. Further relaxing the evaluation setup, we provide $k\in\{1,2,3\}$ in-context examples of the action. Some models excel in the few-shot setting, while others falter; Qwen improves $+7.0\%$, while Gemini declines $-4.8\%$. Notably, these gains fall short of the $+13.6\%$ improvement in non-expert humans when given few-shot examples. Finding that VLMs struggle to fully exploit in-context examples, we shift from test-time improvements to the training side. We collect the first large-scale training dataset for domain-specific actions, totaling nearly 500k video question-answer pairs. Fine-tuning a Molmo2-4B model on our data, we surpass all open-weight 8B models on the VideoNet benchmark.

analysis.tldr: 提出VideoNet数据集，发现VLM在领域特定动作识别上表现差，微调可显著提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代视觉-语言模型（VLM）在动作识别评估上被忽视，缺乏多样性和挑战性的数据集，导致该能力退化。
analysis.problem: VLM在领域特定动作识别任务上表现不佳，且难以充分利用上下文示例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 闭源模型（Gemini 3.1 Pro）准确率69.9%，开源模型（Qwen3-VL-8B）仅45.0%；二元设置下Qwen仅59.2%；少样本示例下Qwen提升+7.0%，但Gemini下降-4.8%，且均低于非专家人类的+13.6%。
analysis.method: 构建VideoNet数据集（1000个动作，37个领域），包含多选、二元和少样本评估设置，并收集近50万视频问答对用于微调。
contributions: 提出VideoNet，一个大规模领域特定动作识别基准，覆盖1000个动作和37个领域。
系统评估VLM在领域特定动作识别上的性能，发现其严重不足。
收集首个大规模领域特定动作训练数据集（近50万视频问答对），微调后开源模型超越所有8B开源模型。
analysis.experiments: 在VideoNet上评估了Gemini 3.1 Pro、Qwen3-VL-8B等模型，包括多选、二元和少样本设置；微调Molmo2-4B后超越所有8B开源模型。
limitations: 仅关注领域特定动作，未覆盖通用动作识别。
微调模型规模较小（4B），更大模型效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VideoNet数据集，发现VLM在领域特定动作识别上表现差，微调可显著提升。

papers.title: HAAS: A Policy-Aware Framework for Adaptive Task Allocation Between Humans and Artificial Intelligence Systems
papers.abstract: Deciding how to distribute work between humans and AI systems is a central challenge in organisational design. Most approaches treat this as a binary choice, yet the operational reality is richer: humans and AI routinely share tasks or take complementary roles depending on context, fatigue, and the stakes involved. Governing that distribution -- balancing efficiency, oversight, and human capability -- remains an open problem. This paper presents Human-AI Adaptive Symbiosis (HAAS), an implemented framework for adaptive task allocation in software engineering and manufacturing. HAAS combines two coupled components: a rule-based expert system that enforces governance constraints before any learning occurs, and a contextual-bandit learner that selects among feasible collaboration modes from outcome feedback. Task-agent fit is represented through five auditable cognitive dimensions and a five-mode autonomy spectrum -- from human-only to fully autonomous -- embedded in a reproducible benchmark spanning both domains. Three empirical findings emerge. First, governance is not a binary switch but a tunable design variable: tighter constraints predictably convert autonomous AI assignments into supervised collaborations, with domain-specific costs and benefits. Second, in manufacturing, stronger governance can improve operational performance and reduce fatigue simultaneously -- a workload-buffering effect that contradicts the usual framing of governance as pure overhead. Third, no single governance setting dominates across all contexts; moderate governance becomes increasingly competitive as the learner accumulates experience within the governed action space. Together, these findings position HAAS as a pre-deployment workbench for comparing and inspecting human--AI allocation policies before organisational commitment.

analysis.tldr: 提出HAAS框架，通过规则专家系统与上下文赌博机学习器实现人机任务自适应分配，并发现治理可调性、疲劳缓冲效应及无单一最优治理策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机任务分配常被简化为二元选择，但实际中需考虑上下文、疲劳和风险等因素，现有方法缺乏动态、可审计的分配机制。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个可审计、自适应的框架，在软件工程和制造领域动态分配人机任务，平衡效率、监督与人类能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 治理不是二元开关而是可调设计变量；更严格的治理可同时提升绩效并减少疲劳（工作负载缓冲效应）；无单一治理设置在所有上下文中占优，中等治理随经验积累更具竞争力。
analysis.method: HAAS框架包含两个耦合组件：规则专家系统（执行治理约束）和上下文赌博机学习器（从结果反馈中选择可行协作模式），通过五个可审计认知维度和五模式自主频谱表示任务-代理匹配。
contributions: 提出HAAS框架，结合规则专家系统与上下文赌博机学习器实现自适应任务分配。
通过跨领域基准实验揭示治理的可调性、疲劳缓冲效应及无单一最优策略。
analysis.experiments: 在软件工程和制造领域的可重复基准上进行了实证研究，得出三个主要发现。
limitations: 框架依赖预定义的认知维度和自主频谱，可能无法覆盖所有任务类型。
实验仅覆盖两个领域，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HAAS框架，通过规则专家系统与上下文赌博机学习器实现人机任务自适应分配，并发现治理可调性、疲劳缓冲效应及无单一最优治理策略。

papers.title: Compress Then Adapt? No, Do It Together via Task-aware Union of Subspaces
papers.abstract: Adapting large pretrained models to diverse tasks is now routine, yet the two dominant strategies of parameter-efficient fine-tuning (PEFT) and low-rank compression are typically composed in sequence. This decoupled practice first compresses and then fine-tunes adapters, potentially misaligning the compressed subspace with downstream objectives and squandering a global parameter budget. To overcome this limitation, we introduce JACTUS (Joint Adaptation and Compression with a Task-aware Union of Subspaces), a single framework that unifies compression and adaptation. From a small calibration set, JACTUS estimates input and pre-activation gradient covariances, forms their orthogonal union with the pretrained weight subspace, performs a projected low-rank approximation inside this union, allocates rank globally by marginal gain per parameter, and trains only a compact core matrix. This explicitly mitigates the potential misalignment between the compressed subspace and downstream objectives by coupling the directions preserved for compression with those required for adaptation, yielding a deployable low-rank model that avoids retaining full frozen weights while enabling fast and robust tuning. On vision, JACTUS attains an average 89.2% accuracy on ViT-Base across eight datasets at 80% retained parameters, surpassing strong 100% PEFT baselines (e.g., DoRA 87.9%). On language, JACTUS achieves an 80.9% average on Llama2-7B commonsense QA at the same 80% retained-parameter budget, outperforming 100% PEFT (e.g., DoRA 79.7%) and exceeding prior compress-then-finetune pipelines under the same ratained-parameter budget. We will release code.

analysis.tldr: JACTUS 通过任务感知子空间联合实现压缩与适配，在视觉和语言任务上以更少参数超越全参数微调基线。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有参数高效微调（PEFT）和低秩压缩通常顺序执行，先压缩再微调可能导致压缩子空间与下游目标不对齐，浪费全局参数预算。
analysis.problem: 如何统一压缩和适配过程，避免子空间不对齐，并在固定参数预算下提升性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出顺序执行压缩和微调会导致压缩子空间与下游目标不对齐，从而浪费参数预算。
analysis.method: JACTUS 从校准集估计输入和预激活梯度协方差，与预训练权重子空间正交联合，在该联合内进行投影低秩近似，按参数边际增益全局分配秩，仅训练紧凑核心矩阵。
contributions: 提出统一压缩与适配的框架 JACTUS，通过任务感知子空间联合避免不对齐。
在视觉和语言任务上，以 80% 保留参数超越全参数 PEFT 基线（如 DoRA）。
analysis.experiments: 在 ViT-Base 上 8 个数据集平均 89.2% 准确率（80% 参数），在 Llama2-7B 常识 QA 上平均 80.9%（80% 参数），均超越 100% 参数 PEFT 基线。
limitations: 需要校准集估计协方差，可能引入额外计算。
方法在更大规模模型或更多样化任务上的泛化性未在摘要中充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JACTUS 通过任务感知子空间联合实现压缩与适配，在视觉和语言任务上以更少参数超越全参数微调基线。

papers.title: First-Order Efficiency for Probabilistic Value Estimation via A Statistical Viewpoint
papers.abstract: Probabilistic values, including Shapley values and semivalues, provide a model-agnostic framework to attribute the behavior of a black-box model to data points or features, with a wide range of applications including explainable artificial intelligence and data valuation. However, their exact computation requires utility evaluations over exponentially many coalitions, making Monte Carlo approximation essential in modern machine learning applications. Existing estimators are often developed through different identification strategies, including weighted averages, self-normalized weighting, regression adjustment, and weighted least squares. Our key observation is that these seemingly distinct constructions share a common first-order error structure, in which the leading term is an augmented inverse-probability weighted influence term determined by the sampling law and a working surrogate function. This first-order representation yields an explicit expression for the leading mean squared error (MSE), which characterizes how the sampling law and the surrogate jointly determine statistical efficiency. Guided by this criterion, we propose an Efficiency-Aware Surrogate-adjusted Estimator (EASE) that directly chooses the sampling law and surrogate to minimize the first-order MSE. We demonstrate that EASE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art estimators for various probabilistic values.

analysis.tldr: 从统计视角统一概率值估计的一阶误差结构，并提出效率感知的代理调整估计器EASE。
analysis.research_motivation: 概率值（如Shapley值）在可解释AI和数据估值中广泛应用，但其精确计算需要指数级复杂度，蒙特卡洛近似成为必需。现有估计器设计策略多样但缺乏统一的误差分析框架，导致效率优化困难。
analysis.problem: 如何统一理解不同概率值估计器的误差结构，并据此设计更高效的估计方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，看似不同的估计器（加权平均、自归一化加权、回归调整、加权最小二乘）共享一阶误差结构，其主导项由采样律和代理函数共同决定的增广逆概率加权影响项构成。
analysis.method: 提出EASE（效率感知代理调整估计器），通过最小化一阶均方误差的显式表达式，直接联合优化采样律和代理函数。
contributions: 从统计视角揭示了概率值估计器的一阶误差统一结构，给出了主导均方误差的显式表达式。
提出了EASE方法，通过联合优化采样律和代理函数来最小化一阶MSE，并证明其一致优于现有估计器。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅优化一阶误差，可能忽略高阶项影响。
理论分析可能依赖于特定假设（如代理函数的平滑性）。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从统计视角统一概率值估计的一阶误差结构，并提出效率感知的代理调整估计器EASE。

papers.title: Hidden Coalitions in Multi-Agent AI: A Spectral Diagnostic from Internal Representations
papers.abstract: Collections of interacting AI agents can form coalitions, creating emergent group-level organization that is critical for AI safety and alignment. However, observing agent behavior alone is often insufficient to distinguish genuine informational coupling from spurious similarity, as consequential coalitions may form at the level of internal representations before any overt behavioral change is apparent. Here, we introduce a practical method for detecting coalition structure from the internal neural representations of multi-agent systems. The approach constructs a pairwise mutual-information graph from the hidden states of agents and applies spectral partitioning to identify the most salient coalition boundary. We validate this method in two domains. First, in multi-agent reinforcement learning environments, the method successfully recovers programmed hierarchical and dynamic coalition structures and correctly rejects false positives arising from behavioral coordination without informational coupling. Second, using a large language model, the method identifies coalition structures implied by descriptive prompts, tracks dynamic team reassignments, and reveals a representational hierarchy where explicit labels dominate over conflicting interaction patterns. Across both settings, the recovered partition reveals subgroup organization that a scalar cross-agent mutual-information measure cannot distinguish. The results demonstrate that analyzing hidden-state mutual information through spectral partitioning provides a scalable diagnostic for identifying representational coalitions, offering a valuable tool for monitoring emergent structure in distributed AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种从多智能体系统内部表征中检测隐藏联盟结构的谱诊断方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体AI中智能体可能形成联盟，产生紧急的群体级组织，这对AI安全和对齐至关重要。仅观察行为不足以区分真正的信息耦合与虚假相似性，因为重要的联盟可能在行为变化之前就形成于内部表征层面。
analysis.problem: 如何从多智能体系统的内部神经表征中检测出隐藏的联盟结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建智能体隐藏状态的成对互信息图，并应用谱划分来识别最显著的联盟边界。
contributions: 提出了一种从多智能体系统内部表征中检测联盟结构的实用方法。
在多智能体强化学习和大型语言模型两个领域验证了方法的有效性，能恢复已知联盟结构并排除假阳性。
analysis.experiments: 在多智能体强化学习环境中，方法成功恢复了编程的分层和动态联盟结构，并正确拒绝了由行为协调而非信息耦合引起的假阳性。在大型语言模型中，方法识别了描述性提示隐含的联盟结构，跟踪动态团队重新分配，并揭示了显式标签主导冲突交互模式的表征层次。
limitations: 方法依赖于隐藏状态的可获取性，可能不适用于黑盒系统。
谱划分的阈值选择可能影响结果，需要进一步自动化。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种从多智能体系统内部表征中检测隐藏联盟结构的谱诊断方法。

papers.title: SCPRM: A Schema-aware Cumulative Process Reward Model for Knowledge Graph Question Answering
papers.abstract: Large language models excel at complex reasoning, yet evaluating their intermediate steps remains challenging. Although process reward models provide step-wise supervision, they often suffer from a risk compensation effect, where incorrect steps are offset by later correct ones, assigning high rewards to flawed reasoning paths. This issue is further exacerbated in knowledge graph (KG) reasoning, as there may exist multiple paths between the start and end entities in the KGs, and a risky step can make the reasoning path flawed. Those limitations are problematic in risk-sensitive tasks such as medical and legal KG reasoning. To address the issues, we propose a Schema-aware Cumulative Process Reward Model (SCPRM) that evaluates reasoning paths by conditioning on the reasoning prefix , and incorporating schema distance between current reasoning step and the implicit target parsed from the query, which provides cumulative and future rewards to guide the path explorations. We further integrate SCPRM into Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) as SCPRM-MCTS to conduct multi-hop reasoning on KGs for question answering (QA) tasks. Across medical and legal KGQA and CWQ, SCPRM-MCTS improves the performance of Hits@k by an average of 1.18% over strong baselines, demonstrating more accurate and risk-sensitive reasoning evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种模式感知累积过程奖励模型，通过引入模式距离和累积奖励来缓解知识图谱推理中的风险补偿效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 过程奖励模型在评估中间步骤时存在风险补偿效应，即错误步骤可能被后续正确步骤抵消，导致对错误推理路径给予高分，这在医疗、法律等风险敏感的知识图谱推理任务中尤为危险。
analysis.problem: 解决知识图谱问答中过程奖励模型的风险补偿效应，实现对推理路径的准确评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出过程奖励模型存在风险补偿效应：错误步骤被后续正确步骤抵消，导致对错误路径的高奖励；在知识图谱中，起始和结束实体间存在多条路径，风险步骤易使路径出错。
analysis.method: 提出模式感知累积过程奖励模型（SCPRM），通过条件化推理前缀并引入当前步骤与查询隐含目标之间的模式距离，提供累积和未来奖励来指导路径探索；并集成到蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）中形成SCPRM-MCTS，用于多跳知识图谱问答。
contributions: 提出SCPRM模型，通过模式距离和累积奖励缓解风险补偿效应。
将SCPRM集成到MCTS中，构建SCPRM-MCTS用于知识图谱多跳推理问答。
在医疗、法律和CWQ数据集上验证了方法的有效性，Hits@k平均提升1.18%。
analysis.experiments: 在医疗、法律知识图谱问答和CWQ数据集上，SCPRM-MCTS在Hits@k上平均比强基线提升1.18%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的模式距离计算。
在非风险敏感任务上的泛化性未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种模式感知累积过程奖励模型，通过引入模式距离和累积奖励来缓解知识图谱推理中的风险补偿效应。

papers.title: IConFace: Identity-Structure Asymmetric Conditioning for Unified Reference-Aware Face Restoration
papers.abstract: Blind face restoration is highly ill-posed under severe degradation, where identity-critical details may be missing from the degraded input. Same-identity references reduce this ambiguity, but mismatched pose, expression, illumination, age, makeup, or local facial states can lead to overuse of reference appearance. We propose \textbf{IConFace}, a unified reference-aware and no-reference framework with identity--structure asymmetric conditioning. References are distilled into a norm-weighted global AdaFace identity anchor for image-only modulation, while the degraded image is reinforced as the spatial structure anchor through low-rank residuals and block-wise degraded cross-attention with two-route memory. The resulting single checkpoint exploits references when available and falls back to no-reference restoration when absent, improving identity consistency, fine-detail recovery, and degraded-only restoration quality in a unified model.

analysis.tldr: IConFace提出身份-结构非对称条件框架，统一参考感知与无参考人脸修复，利用全局身份锚点和空间结构锚点提升身份一致性与细节恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 盲人脸修复在严重退化下高度病态，身份关键细节可能缺失。同身份参考可减少歧义，但姿态、表情、光照等不匹配会导致参考外观过度使用。
analysis.problem: 如何统一参考感知和无参考人脸修复，在利用参考图像提升身份一致性的同时避免过度依赖参考外观，并在无参考时保持良好修复质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出身份-结构非对称条件框架：将参考图像蒸馏为归一化加权的全局AdaFace身份锚点进行图像级调制，将退化图像通过低秩残差和块级退化交叉注意力增强为空间结构锚点，单个检查点统一支持参考感知和无参考修复。
contributions: 提出身份-结构非对称条件机制，实现参考感知与无参考修复的统一。
设计全局身份锚点和空间结构锚点，提升身份一致性和细节恢复质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对极端姿态或表情变化仍敏感。
统一模型在无参考场景下性能可能弱于专用无参考方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: IConFace提出身份-结构非对称条件框架，统一参考感知与无参考人脸修复，利用全局身份锚点和空间结构锚点提升身份一致性与细节恢复。

papers.title: AIs and Humans with Agency
papers.abstract: This paper compares agency in humans with potential agency in AI programs. Human agency takes many years to develop, as the frontal lobe is activated. Early attempts to endow LLMs agency have met serious obstacles. Progress requires a new architecture where actions and plans are formulated jointly with the human actors in each real world setting.

analysis.tldr: 比较人类与AI的能动性，提出需要新架构实现人机联合行动规划。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类能动性需要多年发展，而早期赋予LLM能动性的尝试遇到严重障碍，亟需探索新路径。
analysis.problem: 如何设计AI架构使其具备与人类类似的、在真实世界中联合行动与规划的能动性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类能动性依赖于前额叶的长期发育，而当前LLM在能动性方面存在根本性缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出一种新架构，其中行动和计划由AI与人类在真实场景中联合制定。
contributions: 系统比较了人类与AI能动性的差异
指出了现有LLM在能动性上的障碍并提出了新架构方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未给出新架构的具体实现细节
缺乏实验验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 比较人类与AI的能动性，提出需要新架构实现人机联合行动规划。

papers.title: parHSOM: A novel parallel Hierarchical Self-Organizing Map implementation
papers.abstract: The digital age has completely transformed the way that information is processed and stored, which makes cybersecurity a crucial field of research. Cybersecurity contains many different domains, but this work focuses on Intrusion Detection Systems (IDSs). Within the literature, Hierarchical Self-Organizing Maps (HSOMs) have been used to create trustworthy, explainable, and AI-based IDSs. However, HSOMs are trained sequentially, which means that training HSOMs on large datasets is slow. This work presents a novel parallel HSOM architecture, called parHSOM. The purpose of this research is to investigate the effect that parallel computation has on the HSOM training time. parHSOM is tested on two different testbeds, four different output grid sizes, and five different cybersecurity datasets. Performance metrics collected from these experiments show that parHSOM consistently trains faster than the Sequential HSOM algorithm without any significant loss in performance. Additionally, this work provides a platform for further investigation into parallel HSOM implementations.

analysis.tldr: 提出并行分层自组织映射（parHSOM）以加速HSOM训练，在多个数据集上实现更快训练且性能无显著损失。
analysis.research_motivation: HSOM在入侵检测系统中表现良好，但顺序训练方式在大数据集上速度慢，限制了其实用性。
analysis.problem: 如何通过并行计算加速HSOM训练而不牺牲性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出并行HSOM架构parHSOM，利用并行计算加速训练过程。
contributions: 提出一种新的并行HSOM架构parHSOM，显著减少训练时间。
在多个数据集和配置上验证了parHSOM相比顺序HSOM的速度优势且性能相当。
analysis.experiments: 在两种测试平台、四种输出网格大小和五个网络安全数据集上测试，收集性能指标显示parHSOM训练更快且性能无显著损失。
limitations: 可能未在更大规模或更复杂的数据集上验证。
并行实现的具体加速比和可扩展性未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出并行分层自组织映射（parHSOM）以加速HSOM训练，在多个数据集上实现更快训练且性能无显著损失。

papers.title: MuCALD-SplitFed: Causal-Latent Diffusion for Privacy-Preserving Multi-Task Split-Federated Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Federated Learning enables decentralized training by aggregating model updates across clients without sharing raw data, while Split Federated Learning further partitions the model between clients and a server to reduce computation and communication at the client side. However, decentralized medical institutions rarely operate on a single shared task, making standard Federated and SplitFed collaborations poorly aligned with real clinical workflows. Multi-task FL extends these frameworks by allowing clients to handle different tasks, but often introduces instability and privacy vulnerabilities. This study proposes \textbf{MuCALD-SplitFed}, a multi-task SplitFed framework that integrates causal representation learning and latent diffusion. Experiments show MuCALD-SplitFed consistently improves segmentation, while baseline SplitFed fails to converge. The proposed approach further reduces information leakage at split points, mitigating reconstruction-based and membership inference attacks. Additionally, MuCALD SplitFed outperforms state-of-the-art personalized FL and multi-task FL approaches. The code repository is: https://github.com/ChamaniS/MuCALD_SplitFed.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果潜在扩散增强的多任务分割联邦学习框架，提升隐私保护与分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗机构常处理不同任务，标准联邦学习难以适配；多任务联邦学习存在不稳定性和隐私漏洞。
analysis.problem: 如何在多任务分割场景下实现稳定训练并降低隐私泄露风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线SplitFed在多任务场景下无法收敛；现有方法易受重构攻击和成员推断攻击。
analysis.method: 集成因果表示学习与潜在扩散模型的多任务分割联邦学习框架。
contributions: 提出MuCALD-SplitFed框架，结合因果表示与潜在扩散实现多任务分割。
实验证明该方法能提升分割性能、防止攻击，并优于现有个性化/多任务FL方法。
analysis.experiments: 在医学图像分割任务上验证，MuCALD-SplitFed持续提升分割性能，基线SplitFed无法收敛；方法减少分割点信息泄露，抵御重构和成员推断攻击；优于SOTA个性化FL和多任务FL方法。
limitations: 摘要未提及跨模态或更大规模任务验证。
因果表示学习的理论保证未在摘要中详述。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果潜在扩散增强的多任务分割联邦学习框架，提升隐私保护与分割性能。

papers.title: Edge-Efficient Image Restoration: Transformer Distillation into State-Space Models
papers.abstract: We propose a modular framework for hybrid image restoration that integrates transformer and state-space model (SSM) blocks with a focus on improving runtime efficiency on edge hardware. While transformers provide strong global modeling through self-attention, their attention kernels incur substantial latency on mobile devices, especially for high-resolution inputs. In contrast, SSMs such as Mamba offer lineartime sequence modeling with lower runtime overhead but may underperform on fine grained restoration tasks. To balance accuracy and efficiency, we train lightweight SSM blocks as feature-distilled surrogates of transformer blocks and use them to construct hybrid U-Net-style architectures. To automatically discover effective block combinations, we introduce Efficient Network Search (ENS), a multi-objective search strategy that selects task-specific hybrid configurations from pre-aligned components. ENS optimizes restoration quality while penalizing transformer usage, serving as a lightweight proxy for latency and enabling architecture discovery without repeated hardware profiling. On a Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU, the Restormer baseline requires 10119.52 ms for inference. In contrast, ENS-discovered hybrids significantly reduce runtime: ENS-Deblurring runs in 2973 ms (3.4x faster), ENS-Deraining in 5816 ms (1.74x faster), and ENS-Denoising in 8666 ms (1.17x faster), while maintaining competitive restoration quality.

analysis.tldr: 通过将Transformer蒸馏到状态空间模型，实现边缘设备上高效的图像恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer在图像恢复中表现优异，但其自注意力机制在移动设备上推理延迟高，难以部署；而状态空间模型（如Mamba）效率高但恢复质量不足。需要一种平衡精度与效率的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘设备上实现高效且高质量的图像恢复，同时避免重复硬件性能分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Transformer注意力核在移动设备上延迟高，SSM线性时间建模但细粒度恢复任务性能不足。
analysis.method: 提出混合图像恢复框架，将Transformer块蒸馏为轻量SSM块，并引入多目标搜索策略ENS自动发现最优混合配置。
contributions: 提出特征蒸馏方法将Transformer知识迁移到SSM块，构建混合U-Net架构。
设计多目标搜索策略ENS，自动选择任务特定混合配置，优化质量并惩罚Transformer使用。
analysis.experiments: 在Snapdragon 8 Elite CPU上测试，Restormer基线需10119.52ms，ENS发现混合模型显著降低延迟：去模糊2973ms（3.4倍加速），去雨5816ms（1.74倍加速），去噪8666ms（1.17倍加速），同时保持竞争性恢复质量。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定边缘硬件（Snapdragon 8 Elite）优化，泛化性待验证。
搜索策略ENS的搜索空间和计算开销未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过将Transformer蒸馏到状态空间模型，实现边缘设备上高效的图像恢复。

papers.title: Static Analysis of Recursive SHACL
papers.abstract: SHACL (Shapes Constraint Language) expresses constraints on RDF data by means of so-called shapes. Its central service is validation: verifying whether a data graph complies with a SHACL document. But so far, there are no static analysis services to compare documents. In this paper, we study the following problem: decide whether all graphs that validate one SHACL document also validate another. Unlike previous works that have considered the implication of shape expressions only, we consider documents comprising (recursive) shape definitions and targets. We show that implication (a.k.a. containment) is undecidable under the supported and the stable model semantics, even for the fragment that uses the description logic ALCIO for shape expressions. Under the well-founded semantics, in surprising contrast, it is decidable in single exponential time. Our key technical contribution is a translation of SHACL under the well-founded semantics into the full hybrid mu-calculus, revealing a novel link between well-founded models and a fixed point modal logic, and a worst-case optimal automata-based decision procedure.

analysis.tldr: SHACL文档的蕴含问题在well-founded语义下可判定，在支持语义和稳定模型语义下不可判定。
analysis.research_motivation: SHACL是RDF数据的约束语言，但其静态分析服务（如文档比较）缺失，现有工作仅考虑形状表达式的蕴含，未涉及包含递归形状定义和目标的完整文档。
analysis.problem: 判定是否所有满足一个SHACL文档的数据图也满足另一个SHACL文档（即蕴含/包含问题）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在支持语义和稳定模型语义下，即使限制到描述逻辑ALCIO片段，蕴含问题也是不可判定的；而在well-founded语义下，该问题可在单指数时间内判定。
analysis.method: 将well-founded语义下的SHACL翻译为完整的混合μ-演算，揭示well-founded模型与不动点模态逻辑的新联系，并给出基于自动化的最坏情况最优决策过程。
contributions: 证明了SHACL文档蕴含问题在支持语义和稳定模型语义下不可判定。
证明了在well-founded语义下蕴含问题可在单指数时间内判定。
建立了SHACL与混合μ-演算之间的翻译，提供了理论联系和决策算法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅考虑了理论可判定性，未涉及实际实现或性能评估。
well-founded语义下的算法可能具有高复杂度，实际应用需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SHACL文档的蕴含问题在well-founded语义下可判定，在支持语义和稳定模型语义下不可判定。

papers.title: HumanSplatHMR: Closing the Loop Between Human Mesh Recovery and Gaussian Splatting Avatar
papers.abstract: Accurately recovering human pose and appearance from video is an essential component of scene reconstruction, with applications to motion capture, motion prediction, virtual reality, and digital twinning. Despite significant interest in building realistic human avatars from video, this paper demonstrates that existing methods do not accurately recover the 3D geometry of humans. ViT-based approaches are not consistently reliable and can overfit to 2D views, while NeRF- and Gaussian Splatting-based avatars treat pose and appearance separately, limiting rendering generalization to new poses. To resolve these shortcomings, this paper proposes HumanSplatHMR, a joint optimization framework that refines 3D human poses while simultaneously learning a high-fidelity avatar for novel-view and novel-pose synthesis. Our key insight is to close the loop between geometric pose estimation and differentiable rendering. Unlike prior human avatar methods that rely on accurate human pose obtained through motion capture systems or offline refinement, which are impractical in in-the-wild scenarios, our approach uses only human mesh estimates from a state-of-the-art human pose estimator to better reflect real-world conditions. Therefore, instead of using the human pose only as a deformation prior, HumanSplatHMR backpropagates photometric, segmentation, and depth losses through a differentiable renderer to the pose parameters and global position. This coupling refines the global 3D pose over time, improving accuracy and alignment while producing better renderings from novel views. Experiments show consistent improvements over pose recovery baselines that omit image-level refinement and avatar baselines that decouple pose estimation from avatar reconstruction.

analysis.tldr: 提出HumanSplatHMR，通过联合优化人体姿态估计与高斯泼溅渲染，实现高保真人体重建与新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法在视频中恢复人体3D几何不准确：ViT方法过拟合2D视图，NeRF/高斯泼溅方法分离姿态与外观，限制新姿态泛化。
analysis.problem: 如何从视频中同时精确恢复人体3D姿态并学习高保真虚拟形象，支持新视角和新姿态合成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出ViT方法不可靠且过拟合2D视图，NeRF/高斯泼溅方法将姿态与外观分离导致泛化差。
analysis.method: 联合优化框架，通过可微渲染器反向传播光度、分割和深度损失到姿态参数和全局位置，闭环连接几何姿态估计与可微渲染。
contributions: 提出闭环优化框架，联合优化3D人体姿态与高斯泼溅虚拟形象。
仅使用人体网格估计（无需动捕或离线优化），适用于真实场景。
通过可微渲染反向传播多模态损失，提升姿态精度和新视角渲染质量。
analysis.experiments: 在姿态恢复和虚拟形象基准上取得一致改进，具体数值未在摘要中提供。
limitations: 可能依赖初始人体姿态估计器的质量。
未提及对遮挡或快速运动的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HumanSplatHMR，通过联合优化人体姿态估计与高斯泼溅渲染，实现高保真人体重建与新视角合成。

papers.title: When Audio-Language Models Fail to Leverage Multimodal Context for Dysarthric Speech Recognition
papers.abstract: Automatic speech recognition (ASR) systems remain brittle on dysarthric and other atypical speech. Recent audio-language models raise the possibility of improving performance by conditioning on additional clinical context at inference time, but it is unclear whether these models can make use of such information. We introduce a benchmark built on the Speech Accessibility Project (SAP) dataset that tests whether diagnosis labels, clinician-derived speech ratings, and progressively richer clinical descriptions improve transcription accuracy for dysarthric speech. Across matched comparisons on nine models, we find that current models do not meaningfully use this context: diagnosis-informed and clinically detailed prompts yield negligible improvements and often degrade word error rate. We complement the prompting analysis with context-dependent fine-tuning, showing that LoRA adaptation with a mixture of clinical prompt formats achieves a WER of 0.066, a 52% relative reduction over the frozen baseline, while preserving performance when context is unavailable. Subgroup analyses reveal significant gains for Down syndrome and mild-severity speakers. These results clarify where current models fall short and provide a testbed for measuring progress toward more inclusive ASR.

analysis.tldr: 当前音频-语言模型在构音障碍语音识别中未能有效利用多模态临床上下文，但通过上下文相关微调可显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 构音障碍等非典型语音的自动语音识别（ASR）系统仍然脆弱，而最近的音频-语言模型有望通过利用临床上下文信息来提升性能，但尚不清楚这些模型是否能有效利用此类信息。
analysis.problem: 评估当前音频-语言模型在构音障碍语音识别中利用多模态临床上下文（如诊断标签、临床评分、详细描述）的能力，并探索通过微调来改善上下文利用的方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，在九种模型的匹配比较中，当前模型未能有意义地使用临床上下文：诊断信息和临床详细提示带来的改进可忽略不计，甚至常常降低词错误率。
analysis.method: 首先通过提示分析评估模型利用上下文的能力，然后采用上下文相关微调（LoRA适应）使用混合临床提示格式进行训练。
contributions: 构建了一个基于Speech Accessibility Project数据集的基准，用于测试临床上下文对构音障碍语音识别的影响。
通过实验揭示当前音频-语言模型无法有效利用多模态临床上下文，并证明上下文相关微调（LoRA）可显著降低词错误率（WER降低52%）。
analysis.experiments: 在九种模型上进行匹配比较，包括提示分析和上下文相关微调。微调后WER达到0.066，相对降低52%，并在唐氏综合征和轻度严重程度说话者子组中取得显著提升。
limitations: 仅针对构音障碍语音，可能不适用于其他非典型语音类型。
微调方法依赖于特定临床提示格式，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 当前音频-语言模型在构音障碍语音识别中未能有效利用多模态临床上下文，但通过上下文相关微调可显著提升性能。

papers.title: Fine-Grained Graph Generation through Latent Mixture Scheduling
papers.abstract: Structure aware graph generation aims to generate graphs that satisfy given topological properties. It has applications in domains such as drug discovery, social network modeling, and knowledge graph construction. Unlike existing methods that only provide coarse control over graph properties, we introduce a novel conditional variational autoencoder for fine-grained structural control in graph generation.
