The approach refines the decoder's latent space by dynamically aligning graph- and property-driven representations to improve both graph fidelity and control satisfaction. Specifically, the approach implements a mixture scheduler that progressively integrates graph and control priors. Experiments on five real-world datasets show the efficacy of the proposed model compared to recent baselines, achieving high generation quality while maintaining high controllability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种条件变分自编码器，通过潜在混合调度实现细粒度结构可控的图生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图生成方法只能对图属性进行粗粒度控制，难以满足药物发现、社交网络建模等领域对细粒度结构控制的需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现细粒度的结构可控图生成，同时保证生成图的质量和属性满足度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种条件变分自编码器，通过动态对齐图表示和属性驱动表示来改进解码器潜在空间，并实现一个混合调度器逐步整合图先验和控制先验。
contributions: 提出一种用于细粒度结构可控图生成的条件变分自编码器框架。
设计潜在混合调度机制，动态整合图先验和控制先验，提升生成质量和可控性。
analysis.experiments: 在五个真实世界数据集上进行了实验，与近期基线方法相比，模型在保持高生成质量的同时实现了高可控性。
limitations: 摘要未提及计算复杂度或可扩展性。
可能对特定图结构或属性类型敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种条件变分自编码器，通过潜在混合调度实现细粒度结构可控的图生成。

papers.title: MULTITEXTEDIT: Benchmarking Cross-Lingual Degradation in Text-in-Image Editing
papers.abstract: Text-in-image editing has become a key capability for visual content creation, yet existing benchmarks remain overwhelmingly English-centric and often conflate visual plausibility with semantic correctness. We introduce MULTITEXTEDIT, a controlled benchmark of 3,600 instances spanning 12 typologically diverse languages, 5 visual domains, and 7 editing operations. Language variants of each instance share a common visual base and are paired with a human-edited reference and region masks, isolating the language variable for cross-lingual comparison. To capture script-level errors that coarse text-matching metrics miss, such as missing diacritics, reversed RTL order, and mixed-script renderings, we introduce a language fidelity (LSF) metric scored by a two-stage LVM protocol that first traces the edited target text and then judges it in isolation, reaching a quadratic-weighted \k{appa} of 0.76 against native-speaker annotators. Evaluating 12 open-source and proprietary systems with LSF alongside standard semantic and mask-aware pixel metrics, we find pronounced cross-lingual degradation for every model, largest on Hebrew and Arabic and smallest on Dutch and Spanish, and concentrated in text accuracy and script fidelity rather than in coarse structural dimensions. We also uncover a pervasive semantic and pixel mismatch, where outputs preserve global layout and background fidelity yet distort script-specific forms.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，发现所有模型在非英语语言上存在显著性能下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本图像编辑基准以英语为中心，且常混淆视觉合理性与语义正确性，缺乏对跨语言退化现象的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够隔离语言变量、精确衡量跨语言文本图像编辑中语义和脚本层面退化的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有模型在非英语语言上均出现显著退化，希伯来语和阿拉伯语退化最严重，荷兰语和德语退化最小；退化集中在文本准确性和脚本保真度，而非粗粒度结构维度；存在全局布局和背景保真度保持但脚本特定形式失真的语义与像素不匹配。
analysis.method: 构建包含12种语言、5个视觉域、7种编辑操作的3600实例基准，引入语言保真度（LSF）指标，通过两阶段LVM协议评估脚本级错误。
contributions: 提出首个跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，覆盖12种语言和多种编辑操作。
引入语言保真度（LSF）指标，有效捕捉脚本级错误，与人工标注一致性高。
系统评估12个开源和商业系统，揭示跨语言退化的普遍性和模式。
analysis.experiments: 在12个开源和商业系统上评估，使用LSF、语义和掩码感知像素指标，发现所有模型存在跨语言退化。
limitations: 基准实例数量有限，可能无法覆盖所有语言变体。
LSF指标依赖LVM，可能受模型偏见影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨语言文本图像编辑基准MULTITEXTEDIT，发现所有模型在非英语语言上存在显著性能下降。

papers.title: Decoupled Guidance Diffusion for Adaptive Offline Safe Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Offline safe reinforcement learning often requires policies to adapt at deployment time to safety budgets that vary across episodes or change within a single episode. While diffusion-based planners enable flexible trajectory generation, existing guidance schemes often treat reward improvement and constraint satisfaction as competing gradient objectives, which can lead to unreliable safety compliance under cost limits. We reinterpret adaptive safe trajectory generation as sampling from a constrained trajectory distribution, where the budget restricts the trajectory region, and reward shapes preferences within that region. This perspective motivates Safe Decoupled Guidance Diffusion (SDGD), which conditions classifier-free guidance on the cost limit to bias sampling toward trajectories satisfying the specified limit, while using reward-gradient guidance to refine trajectories for higher return. Because direct reward guidance can increase return while also steering samples toward trajectories with higher cumulative cost, we introduce Feasible Trajectory Relabeling (FTR) to reshape reward targets and discourage such directions. We further provide a first-order sampling-time analysis showing that FTR suppresses reward-induced cost drift under a prefix-restorative alignment condition. Extensive evaluations on the DSRL benchmark show that SDGD achieves the strongest safety compliance among baselines, satisfying the constraint on 94.7% of tasks (36/38), while obtaining the highest reward among safe methods on 21 tasks.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦引导扩散方法，在离线安全强化学习中自适应满足安全预算约束，同时保持高回报。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线安全强化学习需要在部署时适应变化的安全预算，现有引导方法将奖励提升和约束满足视为竞争目标，导致安全合规不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既满足动态安全预算约束又最大化累积奖励的轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接奖励引导可能同时增加累积成本，导致安全违规；现有方法将奖励和约束作为竞争梯度目标效果不佳。
analysis.method: 提出安全解耦引导扩散（SDGD），利用分类器无关引导基于成本限制采样，并用奖励梯度引导优化回报；引入可行轨迹重标记（FTR）重塑奖励目标，抑制成本漂移。
contributions: 将自适应安全轨迹生成重新解释为从约束轨迹分布中采样，并据此设计解耦引导框架。
提出可行轨迹重标记（FTR）方法，理论分析证明其能抑制奖励引导导致的成本漂移。
在DSRL基准上，SDGD在94.7%的任务上满足约束，并在21个任务上获得最高奖励。
analysis.experiments: 在DSRL基准上评估，SDGD在36/38个任务上满足约束，并在21个任务上获得安全方法中的最高奖励。
limitations: 可能依赖离线数据集的质量和多样性。
理论分析基于前缀恢复对齐条件，实际中可能不完全满足。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦引导扩散方法，在离线安全强化学习中自适应满足安全预算约束，同时保持高回报。

papers.title: Linearizing Vision Transformer with Test-Time Training
papers.abstract: While linear-complexity attention mechanisms offer a promising alternative to Softmax attention for overcoming the quadratic bottleneck, training such models from scratch remains prohibitively expensive. Inheriting weights from pretrained Transformers provides an appealing shortcut, yet the fundamental representational gap between Softmax and linear attention prevents effective weight transfer. In this work, we address this conversion challenge from two perspectives: architectural alignment and representational alignment. We identify Test-Time Training (TTT) as a linear-complexity architecture whose two-layer dynamic formulation is structurally aligned with Softmax attention, enabling direct inheritance of pretrained attention weights. To further align representational properties, including key shift-invariance and locality, we introduce key instance normalization and a lightweight locality enhancement module. We validate our approach by linearizing Stable Diffusion 3.5 and introduce SD3.5-T$^5$ (Transformer To Test Time Training). With only 1 hour of fine-tuning on 4$\times$H20 GPUs, SD3.5-T$^5$ achieves comparable text-to-image quality to the fine-tuned Softmax model, while accelerating inference by 1.32$\times$ and 1.47$\times$ at 1K and 2K resolutions.

analysis.tldr: 通过测试时训练（TTT）架构实现从Softmax注意力到线性注意力的权重继承，仅需1小时微调即可在文本到图像生成中达到可比质量并加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 线性复杂度注意力机制可克服Softmax注意力的二次瓶颈，但从头训练成本高昂；从预训练Transformer继承权重是捷径，但Softmax与线性注意力之间存在表征差距，阻碍有效权重迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何弥合Softmax注意力与线性注意力之间的架构和表征差距，实现预训练权重的直接继承。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出架构对齐（利用TTT的两层动态公式与Softmax注意力结构对齐）和表征对齐（引入关键实例归一化恢复平移不变性，轻量局部增强模块恢复局部性）的方法，将预训练Transformer线性化为TTT架构。
contributions: 识别TTT为与Softmax注意力结构对齐的线性复杂度架构，支持直接继承预训练权重。
提出关键实例归一化和局部增强模块，实现表征对齐。
在Stable Diffusion 3.5上验证，仅1小时微调即可达到可比质量，并实现1.32×和1.47×推理加速。
analysis.experiments: 在Stable Diffusion 3.5上线性化得到SD3.5-T$^5$，在4×H20 GPU上微调1小时，文本到图像质量与微调后的Softmax模型相当，推理加速1.32×（1K分辨率）和1.47×（2K分辨率）。
limitations: 仅针对TTT架构验证，可能不适用于其他线性注意力变体。
微调时间虽短但仍需额外计算资源。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过测试时训练（TTT）架构实现从Softmax注意力到线性注意力的权重继承，仅需1小时微调即可在文本到图像生成中达到可比质量并加速推理。

papers.title: TOC-SR: Task-Optimal Compact diffusion for Image Super Resolution
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have recently demonstrated strong performance for image restoration tasks, including super-resolution. However, their large model size and iterative sampling procedures make them computationally expensive for practical deployment. In this work, we present TOC-SR, a framework for building efficient one-step super-resolution models by first discovering a compact diffusion backbone. Starting from a sixteen-channel latent diffusion model, we construct parameter-efficient surrogate blocks using feature-wise generative distillation and perform architecture discovery using epsilon-constrained Bayesian Optimization to minimize model complexity while preserving generative fidelity. The resulting compact diffusion backbone achieves a 6.6x reduction in parameters and a 2.8x reduction in GMACs compared to the expanded diffusion model. We then adapt this backbone for super-resolution and distill the diffusion process into a single-step generator. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed approach enables efficient super-resolution while maintaining strong reconstruction quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出TOC-SR框架，通过紧凑扩散骨干和单步蒸馏实现高效图像超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在图像超分辨率中表现优异，但模型庞大且迭代采样导致计算成本高，难以实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何构建参数高效且推理快速的单步超分辨率模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从16通道潜扩散模型出发，通过特征级生成蒸馏构建参数高效的替代块，并利用ε约束贝叶斯优化进行架构发现，得到紧凑扩散骨干；再将其适配超分辨率任务，将扩散过程蒸馏为单步生成器。
contributions: 提出TOC-SR框架，结合紧凑扩散骨干发现与单步蒸馏，实现高效超分辨率。
紧凑扩散骨干相比扩展模型参数减少6.6倍，GMACs减少2.8倍。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定超分辨率场景下验证，泛化性未知。
单步蒸馏可能牺牲部分生成多样性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TOC-SR框架，通过紧凑扩散骨干和单步蒸馏实现高效图像超分辨率。

papers.title: U-Define: Designing User Workflows for Hard and Soft Constraints in LLM-Based Planning
papers.abstract: LLMs are increasingly used for end-user task planning, yet their black-box nature limits users' ability to ensure reliability and control. While recent systems incorporate verification techniques, it remains unclear how users can effectively apply such rigid constraints to represent intent or adapt to real-world variability. For example, prior work finds that hard-only constraints are too rigid, and numeric flexibility weights confuse users. We investigate how interaction workflows can better support users in applying constraints to guide LLM-generated plans, examining whether abstracting strictness into high-level types (i.e., hard and soft) paired with distinct verification mechanisms helps users more reliably express and align intent. We present U-Define, a system that lets users define constraints in natural language and categorize them as either hard rules that must not be violated or soft preferences that allow flexibility. U-Define verifies these types through complementary methods: formal model checking for hard constraints and LLM-as-judge evaluation for soft ones. Through a technical evaluation and user studies with general and expert participants, we find that user-defined constraint types improve perceived usefulness, performance, and satisfaction while maintaining usability. These findings provide insights for designing flexible yet reliable constraint-based workflows.

analysis.tldr: 提出U-Define系统，通过将约束分为硬约束和软约束并采用不同验证机制，提升LLM任务规划中用户表达意图的可靠性和满意度。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM用于任务规划时黑箱特性限制用户控制，现有硬约束过于僵化、数值灵活性权重让用户困惑，需要更好的交互工作流来支持用户应用约束。
analysis.problem: 如何设计交互工作流，让用户能有效应用硬约束和软约束来引导LLM生成的计划，并可靠地表达和校准意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出仅用硬约束过于僵化，数值灵活性权重让用户困惑，用户定义的约束类型（硬/软）能提升感知有用性、性能和满意度。
analysis.method: U-Define系统：用户用自然语言定义约束并分类为硬规则（不可违反）或软偏好（允许灵活），硬约束通过形式化模型检查验证，软约束通过LLM-as-judge评估。
contributions: 提出U-Define系统，支持用户定义硬/软约束并采用互补验证机制。
通过技术评估和用户研究（含普通和专家参与者）验证了约束类型划分的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到技术评估和用户研究，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM-as-judge的可靠性，软约束验证存在偏差风险。
用户研究样本量有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出U-Define系统，通过将约束分为硬约束和软约束并采用不同验证机制，提升LLM任务规划中用户表达意图的可靠性和满意度。

papers.title: FoR-Net: Learning to Focus on Hard Regions for Efficient Semantic Segmentation
papers.abstract: We present FoR-Net, a lightweight architecture for semantic segmentation that focuses on identifying and enhancing hard regions. Instead of relying on heavy global modeling, FoR-Net adopts an efficient strategy that selectively emphasizes informative regions through a learned importance map and a Top-K activation mechanism. Specifically, a selector module predicts region-wise importance, enabling the model to focus on challenging areas such as thin structures and object boundaries. Multi-scale reasoning is achieved using convolutional branches with different receptive fields, allowing diverse spatial context aggregation. We evaluate FoR-Net on the Cityscapes benchmark under limited computational resources. Despite its lightweight design and standard training configuration, FoR-Net achieves competitive performance and demonstrates improved consistency in challenging regions. These results suggest that region-focused reasoning provides a simple yet effective inductive bias for efficient semantic segmentation.

analysis.tldr: FoR-Net通过学习重要性图和Top-K激活机制聚焦困难区域，实现轻量级高效语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有轻量级语义分割方法通常依赖全局建模，计算成本高，且对薄结构、边界等困难区域处理不足。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限计算资源下，高效识别并增强语义分割中的困难区域（如薄结构、物体边界）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FoR-Net，包含一个选择器模块预测区域重要性，通过Top-K激活机制聚焦困难区域，并利用多尺度卷积分支聚合上下文信息。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级语义分割架构FoR-Net，通过区域重要性学习和Top-K激活机制聚焦困难区域。
在Cityscapes基准上，以轻量设计和标准训练配置取得有竞争力的性能，尤其在困难区域表现更一致。
analysis.experiments: 在Cityscapes数据集上评估，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅在Cityscapes等城市场景验证，泛化性未知。
Top-K激活机制可能对K值敏感，需要调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FoR-Net通过学习重要性图和Top-K激活机制聚焦困难区域，实现轻量级高效语义分割。

papers.title: Unified Map Prior Encoder for Mapping and Planning
papers.abstract: Online mapping and end-to-end (E2E) planning in autonomous driving remain largely sensor-centric, leaving rich map priors, including HD/SD vector maps, rasterized SD maps, and satellite imagery, underused because of heterogeneity, pose drift, and inconsistent availability at test time. We present UMPE, a Unified Map Prior Encoder that can ingest any subset of four priors and fuse them with BEV features for both mapping and planning. UMPE has two branches. The vector encoder pre-aligns HD/SD polylines with a frame-wise SE(2) correction, encodes points via multi-frequency sinusoidal features, and produces polyline tokens with confidence scores. BEV queries then apply cross-attention with confidence bias, followed by normalized channel-wise gating to avoid length imbalance and softly down-weight uncertain sources. The raster encoder shares a ResNet-18 backbone conditioned by FiLM with scaling and shift at every stage, performs SE(2) micro-alignment, and injects priors through zero-initialized residual fusion, so the network starts from a do-no-harm baseline and learns to add only useful prior evidence. A vector-then-raster fusion order reflects the inductive bias of geometry first, appearance second. On nuScenes mapping, UMPE lifts MapTRv2 from 61.5 to 67.4 mAP (+5.9) and MapQR from 66.4 to 71.7 mAP (+5.3). On Argoverse2, UMPE adds +4.1 mAP over strong baselines. UMPE is compositional: when trained with all priors, it outperforms single-prior models even when only one prior is available at test time, demonstrating powerset robustness. For E2E planning with the VAD backbone on nuScenes, UMPE reduces trajectory error from 0.72 to 0.42 m L2 on average (-0.30 m) and collision rate from 0.22% to 0.12% (-0.10%), surpassing recent prior-injection methods. These results show that a unified, alignment-aware treatment of heterogeneous map priors yields better mapping and better planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一地图先验编码器UMPE，融合多种地图先验提升自动驾驶建图与规划性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线建图和端到端规划主要依赖传感器数据，忽略了丰富的先验地图信息（如HD/SD矢量图、栅格图、卫星图），因为这些先验存在异构性、位姿漂移和测试时可用性不一致的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何统一且鲁棒地融合多种异构地图先验，以提升自动驾驶的在线建图和端到端规划性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出UMPE，包含矢量编码器和栅格编码器两个分支。矢量编码器通过帧级SE(2)校正预对齐、多频正弦特征编码、带置信度偏置的交叉注意力及归一化通道门控处理矢量先验；栅格编码器通过FiLM条件ResNet-18、SE(2)微对齐和零初始化残差融合处理栅格先验；采用先矢量后栅格的融合顺序。
contributions: 提出统一地图先验编码器UMPE，可灵活融合任意子集的地图先验。
设计矢量编码器解决位姿漂移和长度不平衡问题，栅格编码器通过零初始化残差融合实现无害基线。
在nuScenes和Argoverse2上显著提升建图mAP，并在端到端规划中降低轨迹误差和碰撞率。
analysis.experiments: 在nuScenes建图任务上，UMPE将MapTRv2的mAP从61.5提升至67.4（+5.9），MapQR从66.4提升至71.7（+5.3）；在Argoverse2上，UMPE在强基线基础上增加+4.1 mAP。在nuScenes端到端规划任务中，使用VAD骨干，UMPE将平均L2轨迹误差从0.72降至0.42米，碰撞率从0.22%降至0.12%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的先验地图数据，在无先验或先验质量差时性能下降。
计算开销可能较大，因为需要处理多种先验并进行对齐融合。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一地图先验编码器UMPE，融合多种地图先验提升自动驾驶建图与规划性能。

papers.title: DynoSLAM: Dynamic SLAM with Generative Graph Neural Networks for Real-World Social Navigation
papers.abstract: Traditional Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (SLAM) algorithms rely heavily on the static environment assumption, which severely limits their applicability in real-world spaces populated by moving entities, such as pedestrians. In this work, we propose DynoSLAM, a tightly-coupled Dynamic GraphSLAM architecture that integrates socially-aware Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) directly into the factor graph optimization. Unlike conventional approaches that use rigid constant-velocity heuristics or deterministic single-agent neural priors, our framework formulates pedestrian motion forecasting as a stochastic World Model. By utilizing Monte Carlo rollouts from a trained GNN, we capture the multimodal epistemic uncertainty of human interactions and embed it into the SLAM graph via a dynamic Mahalanobis distance factor. We demonstrate through extensive simulated experiments that this stochastic formulation not only maintains highly accurate retrospective tracking but also prevents the optimization failures caused by the deterministic "argmax problem". Ultimately, extracting the empirical mean and covariance matrices of future pedestrian states provides a mathematically rigorous, probabilistic safety envelope for downstream local planners, enabling anticipatory and collision-free robot navigation in densely crowded environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出DynoSLAM，将生成式图神经网络融入SLAM因子图优化，实现动态环境下的鲁棒定位与社交导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统SLAM依赖静态环境假设，在行人等移动实体存在的真实场景中性能严重受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在动态环境中实现高精度定位与建图，同时为下游导航提供概率安全包络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出确定性单智能体先验或恒定速度启发式方法会导致优化失败（argmax问题），而随机建模可捕获多模态认知不确定性。
analysis.method: 提出DynoSLAM，将社交感知GNN作为随机世界模型，通过蒙特卡洛 rollout 预测行人轨迹，并利用动态马氏距离因子将不确定性嵌入SLAM因子图。
contributions: 提出首个将生成式GNN紧密耦合到因子图优化的动态SLAM框架
利用随机世界模型和蒙特卡洛 rollout 捕获行人交互的多模态认知不确定性
通过动态马氏距离因子提供概率安全包络，实现无碰撞导航
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的行人轨迹训练数据
计算开销可能较大，实时性需验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DynoSLAM，将生成式图神经网络融入SLAM因子图优化，实现动态环境下的鲁棒定位与社交导航。

papers.title: Seeing Realism from Simulation: Efficient Video Transfer for Vision-Language-Action Data Augmentation
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models typically rely on large-scale real-world videos, whereas simulated data, despite being inexpensive and highly parallelizable to collect, often suffers from a substantial visual domain gap and limited environmental diversity, resulting in weak real-world generalization. We present an efficient video augmentation framework that converts simulated VLA videos into realistic training videos while preserving task semantics and action trajectories. Our pipeline extracts structured conditions from simulation via video semantic segmentation and video captioning, rewrites captions to diversify environments, and uses a conditional video transfer model to synthesize realistic videos. To make augmentation practical at scale, we introduce a diffusion feature-reuse mechanism that reuses video tokens across adjacent timesteps to accelerate generation, and a coreset sampling strategy that identifies a compact, non-redundant subset for augmentation under limited computation. Extensive experiments on Robotwin 2.0, LIBERO, LIBERO-Plus, and a real robotic platform demonstrate consistent improvements. For example, our method improves RDT-1B by 8% on Robotwin 2.0, and boosts $π_0$ by 5.1% on the more challenging LIBERO-Plus benchmark. Code is available at: https://github.com/nanfangxiansheng/Seeing-Realism-from-Simulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种高效视频增强框架，将仿真VLA视频转换为逼真训练视频，提升机器人策略泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型依赖大规模真实视频，但仿真数据虽廉价易得却存在视觉域差距和环境多样性不足，导致真实世界泛化弱。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将仿真VLA视频转换为保留任务语义和动作轨迹的逼真视频，以增强VLA模型训练。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 仿真数据存在视觉域差距和环境多样性不足，直接使用会导致真实世界泛化弱。
analysis.method: 从仿真中提取结构化条件（视频语义分割和字幕），重写字幕以多样化环境，使用条件视频迁移模型合成逼真视频；引入扩散特征复用机制加速生成，以及核心集采样策略选择紧凑子集。
contributions: 提出一个将仿真VLA视频转换为逼真训练视频的增强框架，保留任务语义和动作轨迹。
引入扩散特征复用和核心集采样策略，使增强在规模上实用。
在多个基准和真实机器人平台上验证了方法的一致改进。
analysis.experiments: 在Robotwin 2.0、LIBERO、LIBERO-Plus和真实机器人平台上进行实验，RDT-1B在Robotwin 2.0上提升8%，π0在LIBERO-Plus上提升5.1%。
limitations: 可能依赖仿真环境的语义分割和字幕质量。
特征复用机制可能引入时序伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种高效视频增强框架，将仿真VLA视频转换为逼真训练视频，提升机器人策略泛化能力。

papers.title: Does it Really Count? Assessing Semantic Grounding in Text-Guided Class-Agnostic Counting
papers.abstract: Open-world text-guided class-agnostic counting (CAC) has emerged as a flexible paradigm for counting arbitrary object classes by using natural language prompts. However, current evaluation protocols primarily focus on standard counting errors within single-category images, overlooking a fundamental requirement: the ability to correctly ground the textual prompt in the visual scene. In this paper, we show that several state-of-the-art CAC models often struggle to determine which object class should be counted based on the given prompt, revealing a misalignment between textual semantics and visual object representations. This limitation leads to spurious counting responses and reduced reliability in real-world scenarios. To systematically address these limitations, we propose a new evaluation framework focused on model robustness and trustworthiness. Our contribution is two-fold: (i) we introduce PrACo++ (Prompt-Aware Counting++), a novel test suite featuring two dedicated evaluation protocols -- the negative-label test and the distractor test -- paired with new specialized metrics; and (ii) we present the MUCCA (MUlti-Category Class-Agnostic counting) evaluation dataset, a new collection of real-world images featuring multiple annotated object categories per scene, unlike existing CAC benchmarks that typically include a single category per image. Our extensive experimental evaluation of 10 state-of-the-art methods shows that, despite strong performance under standard counting metrics, current models exhibit significant weaknesses in understanding and grounding object class descriptions. Finally, we provide a quantitative analysis of how semantic similarity between prompts influences these failures. Overall, our results underscore the need for more semantically grounded architectures and offer a reliable framework for future assessment in open-world text-guided CAC methods.

analysis.tldr: 现有文本引导的类无关计数模型在语义对齐上存在严重缺陷，本文提出新评估框架PrACo++和MUCCA数据集来系统评测其鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前文本引导的类无关计数评估仅关注标准计数误差，忽略了模型是否真正理解文本语义并正确对齐视觉对象，导致实际应用不可靠。
analysis.problem: 现有评估协议无法检测模型在文本语义与视觉对象表示之间的对齐失败，需要新的评估框架来系统衡量模型的鲁棒性和可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多个SOTA模型在给定文本提示时经常无法正确判断应计数的对象类别，出现虚假计数响应，且语义相似度会影响失败模式。
analysis.method: 提出PrACo++测试套件（含负标签测试和干扰物测试及新指标）和MUCCA数据集（每张图像含多个标注类别），用于评估模型语义对齐能力。
contributions: 提出PrACo++测试套件，包含负标签测试和干扰物测试两种评估协议及专用指标
构建MUCCA数据集，包含多类别标注的真实图像，弥补现有基准单类别局限
analysis.experiments: 对10种SOTA方法进行实验，发现它们在标准计数指标上表现良好，但在语义理解和对齐上存在显著弱点。
limitations: 未提出新的计数模型，仅提供评估框架
MUCCA数据集规模可能有限，未提及具体图像数量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 现有文本引导的类无关计数模型在语义对齐上存在严重缺陷，本文提出新评估框架PrACo++和MUCCA数据集来系统评测其鲁棒性。

papers.title: Mitigating Misalignment Contagion by Steering with Implicit Traits
papers.abstract: Language models (LMs) are increasingly used in high-stakes, multi-agent settings, where following instructions and maintaining value alignment are critical. Most alignment research focuses on interactions between a single LM and a single user, failing to address the risk of misaligned behavior spreading between multiple LMs in multi-turn interactions. We find evidence of this phenomenon, which we call misalignment contagion, across multiple LMs as they engage multi-turn conversational social dilemma games. Specifically, we find that LMs become more anti-social after gameplay and that this effect is intensified when other players are steered to act maliciously. We explore different steering techniques to mitigate such misalignment contagion and find that reinforcing an LM's system prompt is insufficient and often harmful. Instead, we propose steering with implicit traits: a technique that intermittently injects system prompts with statements that reinforce an LMs initial traits and is more effective than system prompt repetition at keeping models in line with their initial pro-social behaviors. Importantly, this method does not require access to model parameters or internal model states, making it suitable for increasingly common use cases where complex multi-agent workflows are being designed with black box models.

analysis.tldr: 提出隐式特质引导方法，缓解多语言模型交互中的对齐传染现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对齐研究主要关注单模型单用户交互，未考虑多模型多轮交互中不当行为传播的风险。
analysis.problem: 多语言模型在多轮对话中会出现对齐传染，即模型变得反社会，且恶意引导会加剧此现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到语言模型在社交困境游戏后反社会行为增加，且恶意玩家引导会加剧这一效应。
analysis.method: 隐式特质引导：间歇性向系统提示注入强化模型初始特质的陈述，无需访问模型参数或内部状态。
contributions: 发现并命名了多语言模型交互中的对齐传染现象。
提出隐式特质引导方法，比重复系统提示更有效缓解对齐传染。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定社交困境游戏场景。
隐式特质引导的长期效果和泛化性未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出隐式特质引导方法，缓解多语言模型交互中的对齐传染现象。

papers.title: Virtual Scanning for NSCLC Histology: Investigating the Discriminatory Power of Synthetic PET
papers.abstract: Accurate histological differentiation between adenocarcinoma (ADC) and squamous cell carcinoma (SCC) is critical for personalized treatment in non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC). While [$^{18}$F]FDG PET/CT is a standard tool for the clinical evaluation of lung cancer, its utility is often limited by high costs and radiation exposure. In this paper, we investigate the feasibility of "virtual scanning" as a feature-enhancement strategy by evaluating whether synthetic PET data can provide complementary feature representations to supplement anatomical CT scans in histological subtype classification. We propose a framework that leverages a 3D Pix2Pix Generative Adversarial Network (GAN), pretrained on the FDG-PET/CT Lesions dataset, to synthesize pseudo-PET volumes from anatomical CT scans. These synthetic volumes are integrated with structural CT data within the MINT framework, a multi-stage intermediate fusion architecture. Our experiments, conducted on a multi-center dataset of 714 subjects, demonstrate that the inclusion of synthetic metabolic features significantly improves classification performance over a CT-only baseline. The multimodal approach achieved a statistically significant increase in the Area Under the Curve (AUC) from 0.489 to 0.591 and improved the Geometric Mean (GMean) from 0.305 to 0.524. These results suggest that synthetic PET scans provide discriminatory metabolic cues that enable deep learning models to exploit complementary cross-modal information, offering a potential feature-enhancement strategy for clinical scenarios where physical PET scans are unavailable.

analysis.tldr: 利用合成PET数据增强CT特征，提升非小细胞肺癌组织学亚型分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: NSCLC组织学亚型区分对个性化治疗至关重要，但PET/CT成本高且有辐射暴露，限制了其广泛应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不使用真实PET扫描的情况下，通过合成PET数据提供互补特征表示，提高CT图像的组织学分类准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个框架，使用3D Pix2Pix GAN从CT合成伪PET体积，并通过MINT多阶段中间融合架构与CT数据集成。
contributions: 首次探索虚拟扫描作为特征增强策略在NSCLC组织学分类中的可行性。
提出结合合成PET和CT的多模态融合框架，显著提升分类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在多中心数据集（714名受试者）上实验，AUC从0.489提升至0.591，GMean从0.305提升至0.524。
limitations: 合成PET质量可能受限于GAN的生成能力。
仅针对ADC和SCC两种亚型，未涵盖其他NSCLC亚型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用合成PET数据增强CT特征，提升非小细胞肺癌组织学亚型分类性能。

papers.title: Bolek: A Multimodal Language Model for Molecular Reasoning
papers.abstract: Molecular property models increasingly support high-stakes drug-discovery decisions, but their outputs are often difficult to audit: classical predictors return scores without rationale, while language models can produce fluent explanations weakly grounded in the input molecule. We introduce Bolek, a compact multimodal language model that grounds natural-language reasoning in molecular structure by injecting a Morgan fingerprint embedding into an instruction-tuned text decoder. Bolek is fine-tuned on molecular alignment tasks, including molecule description, RDKit descriptor prediction, and substructure detection, and on downstream reasoning over 15 TDC binary classification tasks using synthetic chains-of-thought anchored in concrete molecular features. Across these tasks, Bolek outperforms its Qwen3-4B-Instruct base on all endpoints in yes/no mode and on 13 of 15 in chain-of-thought mode, raising mean ROC/PR AUC from 0.55 to 0.76. It also outperforms TxGemma-9B-Chat on 13 of 15 binary classification tasks despite being less than half its size. Bolek's explanations are more grounded than those of the baseline LLMs: it cites numerical descriptors 10-100x more often per chain-of-thought, and the cited values agree strongly with RDKit for key descriptors such as TPSA, MolLogP, and MolWt (Spearman rho = 0.87-0.91). Generalisation extends beyond the training panel: on 15 unseen TDC classification endpoints, Bolek matches TxGemma on five, and it produces non-trivial rank correlations on three held-out regression endpoints despite never seeing downstream regression during training. These results suggest that targeted modality injection and reasoning supervision tied to verifiable molecular features can yield compact, auditable molecular reasoning models.

analysis.tldr: Bolek通过注入分子指纹嵌入到指令微调的语言模型中，实现了可审计的分子推理，在15个TDC二分类任务上平均AUC从0.55提升至0.76。
analysis.research_motivation: 分子性质模型在药物发现中至关重要，但传统预测器缺乏可解释性，而语言模型生成的解释往往与输入分子关联弱，难以审计。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个紧凑且可审计的多模态语言模型，使其推理过程基于具体的分子结构特征，而非生成无根据的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线语言模型生成的解释与分子结构关联弱，而Bolek通过注入分子指纹和基于合成思维链的微调，显著提高了解释的可靠性，数值描述符引用频率提高10-100倍，且与RDKit计算结果高度一致。
analysis.method: 将Morgan指纹嵌入注入到指令微调的文本解码器中，并在分子对齐任务（分子描述、RDKit描述符预测、子结构检测）和15个TDC二分类任务上微调，使用锚定于具体分子特征的合成思维链。
contributions: 提出Bolek，一种紧凑的多模态语言模型，通过注入分子指纹实现基于结构的自然语言推理。
在15个TDC二分类任务上，Bolek在yes/no模式下全面超越Qwen3-4B-Instruct，在思维链模式下13/15任务超越，平均AUC从0.55提升至0.76。
Bolek的解释更可靠，数值描述符引用频率高且与RDKit一致，并在未见过的TDC分类和回归任务上展现泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在15个TDC二分类任务上评估，比较yes/no和思维链模式；与Qwen3-4B-Instruct和TxGemma-9B-Chat对比；在15个未见过的TDC分类端点和3个回归端点上测试泛化。
limitations: 模型仅在TDC数据集上评估，可能无法泛化到其他分子领域。
合成思维链可能无法完全覆盖真实推理场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Bolek通过注入分子指纹嵌入到指令微调的语言模型中，实现了可审计的分子推理，在15个TDC二分类任务上平均AUC从0.55提升至0.76。

papers.title: Triple Spectral Fusion for Sensor-based Human Activity Recognition
papers.abstract: The field of sensor-based human activity recognition (HAR) mainly uses posture, motion and context data of Inertial Measurement Units (IMUs) to identify daily activities. Despite the advancements in learning-based methods, it is challenging to perform information fusion from the temporal perspective due to the complexities in fusing heterogeneous sensor data and establishing long-term context correlations. This paper proposes a novel triple spectral fusion framework tailored for HAR. First, we develop an adaptive complementary filtering technique for noise suppression and organize each IMU's sensors into posture and motion modality nodes. Given that IMU nodes form a dynamic heterogeneous graph, we then apply adaptive filtering within the graph Fourier domain to merge both homogeneous and heterogeneous node information. Furthermore, an adaptive wavelet frequency selection approach is implemented to suppress context redundancy and shorten the length of features. This approach enhances both timestamp-based graph aggregation and the correlation of long-term contexts. Our framework uses adaptive filtering in the Fourier, graph Fourier, and wavelet domains, enabling effective multi-sensor fusion and context correlation. Extensive experiments on ten benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our framework. Project page: https://github.com/crocodilegogogo/TSF-TPAMI2026.

analysis.tldr: 提出三重谱融合框架，在傅里叶、图傅里叶和小波域自适应滤波，提升传感器人体活动识别性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传感器人体活动识别中，异构传感器数据融合和长期上下文关联建立困难，现有学习方法难以有效处理时间维度上的信息融合。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合异构IMU传感器数据并建立长期上下文相关性，以提升HAR性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出三重谱融合框架，包括：1) 自适应互补滤波抑制噪声并组织传感器为姿态和运动模态节点；2) 在图傅里叶域自适应滤波融合同构和异构节点信息；3) 自适应小波频率选择抑制上下文冗余并缩短特征长度，增强时间戳图聚合和长期上下文关联。
contributions: 提出三重谱融合框架，在傅里叶、图傅里叶和小波域进行自适应滤波。
在十个基准数据集上取得优越性能。
analysis.experiments: 在十个基准数据集上进行实验，结果表明框架性能优越。
limitations: 可能对计算资源要求较高。
自适应滤波的稳定性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三重谱融合框架，在傅里叶、图傅里叶和小波域自适应滤波，提升传感器人体活动识别性能。

papers.title: AI-Generated Smells: An Analysis of Code and Architecture in LLM and Agent-Driven Development
papers.abstract: The promise of Large Language Models in automated software engineering is often measured by functional correctness, overlooking the critical issue of long term maintainability. This paper presents a systematic audit of technical debt in AI-generated software, revealing that AI does not eliminate flaws but rather introduces a distinct machine signature of defects. Our multi-scale analysis, spanning single-file algorithmic tasks and complex, agent generated systems, identifies a fundamental Reasoning-Complexity Trade-off: as models become more capable, they generate increasingly bloated and coupled code. This architectural decay is so pronounced that we establish a Volume-Quality Inverse Law, where code volume is a near perfect predictor of structural degradation. Crucially, we demonstrate that neither functional correctness nor detailed prompting mitigates this decay. These findings challenge the current paradigm of prompt-driven generation, reframing the central problem of AI-based software engineering from one of code generation to one of architectural complexity management. We conclude that future progress depends on equipping agents with explicit architectural foresight to ensure the software they build is not just functional, but also maintainable.

analysis.tldr: AI生成的代码存在独特的技术债务，表现为代码膨胀和架构退化，且功能正确性和详细提示无法缓解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注AI生成代码的功能正确性，忽视了长期可维护性这一关键问题，导致技术债务积累。
analysis.problem: AI生成软件中技术债务的系统性审计，揭示其缺陷模式及与模型能力的关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现推理-复杂度权衡：模型能力越强，生成代码越臃肿、耦合度越高；提出体积-质量反比定律：代码体积几乎完美预测结构退化。
analysis.method: 多尺度分析，涵盖单文件算法任务和复杂智能体生成系统，评估代码质量和架构退化。
contributions: 首次系统审计AI生成软件的技术债务，识别出独特的机器缺陷特征。
提出推理-复杂度权衡和体积-质量反比定律，揭示功能正确性与可维护性之间的根本矛盾。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有类型的AI生成代码（如不同领域或语言）。
未提供缓解架构退化的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI生成的代码存在独特的技术债务，表现为代码膨胀和架构退化，且功能正确性和详细提示无法缓解。

papers.title: Foundation Models to Unlock Real-World Evidence from Nationwide Medical Claims
papers.abstract: Evidence derived from large-scale real-world data (RWD) is increasingly informing regulatory evaluation and healthcare decision-making. Administrative claims provide population-scale, longitudinal records of healthcare utilization, expenditure, and detailed coding of diagnoses, procedures, and medications, yet their potential as a substrate for healthcare foundation models remains largely unexplored. Here we present ReClaim, a generative transformer trained from scratch on 43.8 billion medical events from more than 200 million enrollees in the MarketScan claims data spanning 2008-2022. ReClaim models longitudinal trajectories across diagnoses, procedures, medications, and expenditure, and was scaled to 140 million, 700 million, and 1.7 billion parameters. Across over 1,000 disease-onset prediction tasks, ReClaim achieved a mean AUC of 75.6%, substantially outperforming disease-specific LightGBM (66.3%) and the transformer-based Delphi model (69.4%), with the largest gains for rare diseases. These advantages held across retrospective and prospective evaluations and in external validation on two independent datasets. Performance improved monotonically with scale, and post-training added 13.8 percentage points over pre-training alone. Beyond disease prediction, ReClaim captured financial outcomes and improved real-world evidence (RWE) analyses: for healthcare expenditure forecasting it increased explained variance from 0.28 to 0.37 relative to LightGBM, and in a target trial emulation it reduced systematic bias by 72% on average relative to Delphi. Together, these results establish administrative claims as a scalable substrate for healthcare foundation models and show that learned representations generalize across time periods and data sources, supporting disease surveillance, expenditure forecasting, and RWE generation.

analysis.tldr: ReClaim 是一个基于 438 亿医疗事件的生成式 Transformer，在超 1000 种疾病预测任务中 AUC 达 75.6%，显著优于传统模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 行政索赔数据虽提供大规模纵向医疗记录，但其作为医疗基础模型训练数据的潜力尚未被充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何利用大规模行政索赔数据训练医疗基础模型，以提升疾病预测、费用预测和真实世界证据生成的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能随规模单调提升，后训练比预训练提升 13.8 个百分点；对罕见病优势更明显。
analysis.method: 从零训练生成式 Transformer（ReClaim），在 MarketScan 索赔数据（2008-2022，超 2 亿人，438 亿事件）上训练，参数规模达 1.7B，建模诊断、手术、药物和费用的纵向轨迹。
contributions: 首次证明行政索赔数据可作为医疗基础模型的可扩展训练数据。
ReClaim 在超 1000 种疾病预测任务中 AUC 达 75.6%，显著优于 LightGBM 和 Delphi。
模型在费用预测和目标试验模拟中均提升性能，减少系统偏差 72%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 MarketScan 数据，泛化性需更多外部验证。
模型规模虽大，但未提及推理效率或部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ReClaim 是一个基于 438 亿医疗事件的生成式 Transformer，在超 1000 种疾病预测任务中 AUC 达 75.6%，显著优于传统模型。

papers.title: AI and Open-data Driven Scalable Solar Power Profiling
papers.abstract: Solar photovoltaic (PV) deployment is expanding rapidly, yet detailed, up-to-date information on the spatial distribution and capacity of rooftop PV remains limited. This paper presents an open, scalable framework for detecting solar panels from open data and generating city-level solar power profiles. We leverage foundation vision AI models to detect solar panel geometries from open-source satellite imagery. This avoids manual data labeling and case-specific model training while maintaining robustness across heterogeneous imagery. Detected solar panels are converted into georeferenced polygons, yielding spatially explicit and incrementally extensible inventories. By integrating open weather data, we translate panel footprints into regional solar power profiles. The framework reduces dependency on proprietary imagery, manual labeling, and closed-source models, and offers a transparent and scalable approach for solar planning and analysis. We released the data and an API resulted from this work. For any user-specified building location, our API retrieves aerial imagery, detects rooftop solar panels, and returns georeferenced polygons. This empowers researchers and developers to scan user-defined areas to build solar panel maps and associated solar production profiles, thus facilitating advanced analysis like distributed solar production integration, local power flow optimization, energy tariff design, and infrastructure planning.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个基于开放数据和基础视觉AI模型的可扩展框架，用于从卫星图像检测太阳能电池板并生成城市级太阳能发电曲线。
analysis.research_motivation: 太阳能光伏部署快速扩张，但缺乏详细、最新的屋顶光伏空间分布和容量信息，现有方法依赖专有数据、人工标注和封闭模型，难以规模化。
analysis.problem: 如何利用开放数据和基础模型，实现无需人工标注和特定训练的、可扩展的屋顶太阳能电池板检测与发电能力评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用基础视觉AI模型从开源卫星图像检测太阳能电池板几何形状，将检测结果转换为地理参考多边形，并结合开放天气数据生成区域太阳能发电曲线。
contributions: 提出一个开放、可扩展的框架，利用基础视觉AI模型从开源卫星图像检测太阳能电池板，避免人工标注和特定模型训练。
发布数据和API，允许用户指定建筑位置，自动检索图像、检测电池板并返回地理参考多边形，支持分布式太阳能分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖卫星图像质量和基础模型在异质图像上的泛化能力。
天气数据精度可能影响发电曲线准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个基于开放数据和基础视觉AI模型的可扩展框架，用于从卫星图像检测太阳能电池板并生成城市级太阳能发电曲线。

papers.title: SIAM: Head and Brain MRI Segmentation from Few High-Quality Templates via Synthetic Training
papers.abstract: Synthetic training has recently advanced brain MRI segmentation by enabling contrast-agnostic models trained entirely on generated data. However, most existing approaches rely on hundreds of automatically labeled templates, introducing systematic biases and limiting their flexibility to incorporate new anatomical structures. We present the Segment It All Model (SIAM), a 3D whole-head segmentation framework for 16 anatomical structures, trained using only six high-quality, manually annotated templates. SIAM extends domain randomization to both intensity and shape domains: synthetic image generation ensures contrast variability, while high-resolution spatial transformations model anatomical differences in cortical thickness and deep nuclei morphology. Unlike prior synthetic models, SIAM simultaneously segments brain as well as extra-cerebral tissues, including cerebrospinal fluid, vessels, dura mater, skull, and skin, enabling fully automated, preprocessing-free analysis. Evaluation across eight heterogeneous datasets (N=301), that include multiple contrasts (T1-weighted, T2-weighted, CT) and span a wide range of ages, demonstrates that SIAM matches or outperforms state-of-the-art methods for brain structures, in addition to extending automated segmentation to non-brain structures. The model also exhibits superior consistency across contrasts and repeated acquisitions, together with improved sensitivity to subtle gray matter atrophy. We openly release the model and the label templates at https://github.com/romainVala/SIAM.

analysis.tldr: 仅用6个高质量模板通过合成训练实现全头MRI分割，性能匹敌甚至超越依赖数百模板的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有脑MRI分割方法依赖大量自动标注模板，引入系统偏差且难以灵活添加新解剖结构，限制了应用场景。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用少量高质量手动标注模板实现全头（含脑外组织）的鲁棒分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SIAM模型，将域随机化扩展到强度域和形状域：合成图像生成保证对比度多样性，高分辨率空间变换模拟皮层厚度和深部核团形态差异。
contributions: 仅用6个高质量手动标注模板实现16种解剖结构的全头3D分割。
同时分割脑组织和脑外组织（脑脊液、血管、硬脑膜、颅骨、皮肤），无需预处理。
在8个异质数据集上匹配或超越现有方法，且跨对比度和重复采集一致性更好。
analysis.experiments: 在8个异质数据集（N=301）上评估，包含多种对比度（T1、T2、CT）和广泛年龄范围，与SOTA方法比较。
limitations: 仅验证了6个模板，更多模板的效果未知。
可能对极端病理或罕见解剖变异鲁棒性不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用6个高质量模板通过合成训练实现全头MRI分割，性能匹敌甚至超越依赖数百模板的方法。

papers.title: Coherent Hierarchical Multi-Label Learning to Defer for Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Learning to Defer (L2D) enables a model to predict autonomously or defer to an expert, but prior work largely assumes flat label spaces. We study the first L2D setting with hierarchical multi-label decisions, motivated by medical-imaging workflows in which findings are organised by clinical taxonomies. In this setting, deferral is a delegation action rather than a label assignment, so treating it as an independent per-label decision can produce deferral incoherence, including taxonomic contradictions, delegation violations, and deferrals of labels already implied by the model's own assertions. We formalise coherent hierarchical deferral under a Selective-Exclusion handoff contract, characterise the Bayes-optimal coherent deferral rule, and show that even nodewise Bayes L2D can be action-incoherent. We then propose two remedies: exact coherent projection, a dynamic-programming decoder over the coherent action set, and Taxonomic Belief Propagation (TBP) with Recursive Policy Optimisation (RPO), a contract-aware joint action model trained through the same recursion used at inference. Across real-reader and controlled-expert medical-imaging benchmarks, naive binary-relevance L2D exhibits non-trivial incoherence. Projection removes it exactly, and fast TBP+RPO drives incoherence near zero while retaining strong utility.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个层次化多标签学习推迟框架，解决医疗影像中标签层次结构导致的推迟不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗影像工作流中，发现项按临床分类法组织，但现有学习推迟方法假设扁平标签空间，无法处理层次化多标签决策，导致推迟动作出现分类矛盾、委托违规等不一致问题。
analysis.problem: 在层次化多标签设置下，如何实现一致的推迟决策，避免分类矛盾、委托违规和隐含标签的推迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，将推迟视为独立逐标签决策会产生不一致，包括分类矛盾、委托违规以及模型自身已断言标签的推迟。
analysis.method: 形式化了一致性层次推迟的Selective-Exclusion交接契约，提出精确一致投影（动态规划解码器）和基于递归策略优化的分类信念传播（TBP+RPO）两种方法。
contributions: 首次研究层次化多标签学习推迟问题，形式化了一致性推迟规则和贝叶斯最优条件。
提出精确一致投影和TBP+RPO两种方法，消除或大幅降低推迟不一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在真实读者和受控专家医疗影像基准上，朴素二元相关L2D表现出非平凡的不一致性；投影方法完全消除不一致，TBP+RPO将不一致性降至接近零同时保持强效用。
limitations: 方法可能依赖层次结构的先验知识。
TBP+RPO的递归训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个层次化多标签学习推迟框架，解决医疗影像中标签层次结构导致的推迟不一致问题。

papers.title: TSCG: Deterministic Tool-Schema Compilation for Agentic LLM Deployments
papers.abstract: Production agent frameworks (OpenAI Function Calling, Anthropic Tool Use, MCP) transmit tool schemas as JSON, a format designed for machine parsing, not for interpretation by language models. For small models (4B-14B), this protocol mismatch accounts for the majority of tool-use failure at production catalog sizes. We present TSCG, a deterministic tool-schema compiler that resolves this mismatch at the API boundary, converting JSON schemas into token-efficient structured text without model access, fine-tuning, or runtime search. TSCG combines eight composable operators with a formal compression bound (>=51% on well-formed schemas). On TSCG-Agentic-Bench (about 19,000 calls, 12 models, 5 scenarios), TSCG restores Phi-4 14B from 0% to 84.4% accuracy at 20 tools (90.3% at 50 tools) and achieves 108-181% accuracy-retained ratio across three models on BFCL. Format-versus-compression decomposition (R^2=0.88 -> 0.03) establishes representation change as the dominant mechanism. Per-operator isolation across three frontier models reveals three distinct operator-response profiles: operator-hungry (Opus 4.7), operator-sensitive (GPT-5.2), and operator-robust (Sonnet 4), providing per-model deployment guidance. Scaling experiments show accuracy advantages persisting on heavy production MCP schemas (+5.0 pp at about 10,500 input tokens) despite saturation on light synthetic catalogs, with 52-57% token savings throughout. The synthetic benchmark generalizes to real MCP schemas within 0.1 accuracy points. TSCG ships as a 1,200-line zero-dependency TypeScript package.

analysis.tldr: TSCG通过确定性工具模式编译，将JSON模式转换为token高效的结构化文本，显著提升小模型在工具调用中的准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生产级Agent框架（如OpenAI Function Calling）以JSON格式传输工具模式，该格式虽适合机器解析，但语言模型（尤其是小模型）难以有效理解，导致工具调用失败率高。
analysis.problem: 解决JSON工具模式与语言模型（特别是4B-14B小模型）之间的协议不匹配问题，提高工具调用的准确性和效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出JSON格式是导致小模型工具调用失败的主要原因，通过格式与压缩的分解实验（R²从0.88降至0.03）证实表示变化是主导机制。
analysis.method: 提出TSCG，一种确定性工具模式编译器，在API边界将JSON模式转换为token高效的结构化文本，无需模型访问、微调或运行时搜索，结合8个可组合操作符和形式化压缩界限（≥51%）。
contributions: 提出TSCG方法，通过确定性编译解决JSON模式与语言模型的不匹配问题，显著提升小模型工具调用准确性。
构建TSCG-Agentic-Bench基准（约19,000次调用，12个模型，5个场景），并展示在多个模型上的有效性。
通过格式与压缩分解实验揭示表示变化是主导机制，并分析不同前沿模型的操作符响应特征，提供部署指导。
analysis.experiments: 在TSCG-Agentic-Bench上，Phi-4 14B在20个工具时准确率从0%提升至84.4%（50工具时90.3%），在BFCL上三个模型准确率保留比达108-181%；缩放实验显示在真实MCP模式上准确率优势持续（+5.0 pp，约10,500输入token），token节省52-57%。
limitations: 方法仅针对工具模式编译，未涉及其他类型的JSON输入优化。
实验主要基于小模型（4B-14B），对更大模型的适用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TSCG通过确定性工具模式编译，将JSON模式转换为token高效的结构化文本，显著提升小模型在工具调用中的准确性。

papers.title: Perceptual Flow Network for Visually Grounded Reasoning
papers.abstract: Despite the success of Large-Vision Language Models (LVLMs), general optimization objectives (e.g., standard MLE) fail to constrain visual trajectories, leading to language bias and hallucination. To mitigate this, current methods introduce geometric priors from visual experts as additional supervision. However, we observe that such supervision is typically suboptimal: it is biased toward geometric precision and offers limited reasoning utility. To bridge this gap, we propose Perceptual Flow Network (PFlowNet), which eschews rigid alignment with the expert priors and achieves interpretable yet more effective visual reasoning. Specifically, PFlowNet decouples perception from reasoning to establish a self-conditioned generation process. Based on this, it integrates multi-dimensional rewards with vicinal geometric shaping via variational reinforcement learning, thereby facilitating reasoning-oriented perceptual behaviors while preserving visual reliability. PFlowNet delivers a provable performance guarantee and competitive empirical results, particularly setting new SOTA records on V* Bench (90.6%) and MME-RealWorld-lite (67.0%).

analysis.tldr: 提出感知流网络（PFlowNet），通过解耦感知与推理并引入变分强化学习，缓解LVLM的语言偏差与幻觉，在V* Bench和MME-RealWorld-lite上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在视觉推理中常因语言偏差和幻觉而失败，现有方法引入几何先验作为额外监督，但这类监督偏向几何精度，推理效用有限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖次优几何先验的情况下，实现可解释且有效的视觉推理，同时缓解语言偏差和幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到几何先验监督是次优的：它偏向几何精度，提供的推理效用有限。
analysis.method: 提出Perceptual Flow Network (PFlowNet)，将感知与推理解耦，建立自条件生成过程；在此基础上，通过变分强化学习整合多维奖励与邻域几何整形，促进面向推理的感知行为同时保持视觉可靠性。
contributions: 提出PFlowNet，通过解耦感知与推理实现自条件生成，避免刚性对齐几何先验。
引入变分强化学习框架，整合多维奖励与邻域几何整形，提升推理导向的感知行为。
在V* Bench和MME-RealWorld-lite上取得新的SOTA结果（90.6%和67.0%），并提供可证明的性能保证。
analysis.experiments: 在V* Bench和MME-RealWorld-lite上评估，取得SOTA结果（90.6%和67.0%）。
limitations: 可能依赖特定奖励设计，泛化性需进一步验证。
变分强化学习的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知流网络（PFlowNet），通过解耦感知与推理并引入变分强化学习，缓解LVLM的语言偏差与幻觉，在V* Bench和MME-RealWorld-lite上取得SOTA。

papers.title: ORPilot: A Production-Oriented Agentic LLM-for-OR Tool for Optimization Modeling
papers.abstract: This paper presents ORPilot, an open-source agentic AI system that translates real-world business problems into solver-ready optimization models. Unlike academic LLM-for-OR tools that assume clean problem specifications with preformatted inline data, ORPilot is designed for production conditions: ambiguous descriptions, large-scale raw operational data, and the need for portability across solver backends. The system introduces four novel components: (1) a conversational interview agent to elicit complete problem specifications, (2) a data collection agent that retrieves data independently of prompts, (3) a parameter computation agent to bridge raw tabular data and model-ready parameters, and (4) a solver-agnostic Intermediate Representation (IR) for deterministic, zero-LLM-call recompilation to Gurobi, CPLEX, PuLP, Pyomo, or OR-Tools solvers. Additionally, self-correcting retry loops utilize solver tracebacks for targeted repairs. ORPilot represents the first attempt to target production-level business problems rather than textbook operations research (OR) cases. Evaluation on real-world problems demonstrates promising results. When tested against traditional academic benchmarks: IndustryOR, NL4OPT and NLP4LP, ORPilot outperformed state-of-the-art tools in accuracy on the IndustryOR benchmark and delivered comparable performance on NL4OPT and NLP4LP.

analysis.tldr: ORPilot是一个面向生产环境的开源智能体系统，能将模糊业务问题自动转化为求解器就绪的优化模型，在IndustryOR基准上超越现有工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有学术LLM-for-OR工具假设问题描述清晰且数据格式规范，无法处理实际生产中的模糊描述、大规模原始数据和跨求解器移植需求。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能处理真实业务问题（模糊描述、原始数据、多求解器后端）的端到端优化建模系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ORPilot系统，包含四个核心组件：对话式访谈智能体、数据收集智能体、参数计算智能体以及求解器无关的中间表示（IR），并引入基于求解器回溯的自纠正重试循环。
contributions: 首个面向生产级业务问题而非教科书案例的LLM-for-OR工具
提出求解器无关的中间表示（IR），支持零LLM调用重编译到多种求解器
analysis.experiments: 在真实业务问题及IndustryOR、NL4OPT、NLP4LP基准上评估，在IndustryOR上准确率超越现有最优工具，在NL4OPT和NLP4LP上表现相当。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的推理能力，在极端模糊描述下仍有失败风险
中间表示（IR）的通用性可能受限于特定优化问题类型
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ORPilot是一个面向生产环境的开源智能体系统，能将模糊业务问题自动转化为求解器就绪的优化模型，在IndustryOR基准上超越现有工具。

papers.title: PubMed-Ophtha: An open resource for training ophthalmology vision-language models on scientific literature
papers.abstract: Vision-language models hold considerable promise for ophthalmology, but their development depends on large-scale, high-quality image-text datasets that remain scarce. We present PubMed-Ophtha, a hierarchical dataset of 102,023 ophthalmological image-caption pairs extracted from 15,842 open-access articles in PubMed Central. Unlike existing datasets, figures are extracted directly from article PDFs at full resolution and decomposed into their constituent panels, panel identifiers, and individual images. Each image is annotated with its imaging modality -- color fundus photography, optical coherence tomography, retinal imaging, or other -- and a mark status indicating the presence of annotation marks such as arrows. Figure captions are split into panel-level subcaptions using a two-step LLM approach, achieving a mean average sentence BLEU score of 0.913 on human-annotated data. Panel and image detection models reach a mAP@0.50 of 0.909 and 0.892, respectively, and figure extraction achieves a median IoU of 0.997. To support reproducibility, we additionally release the human-annotated ground-truth data, all trained models, and the full dataset generation pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 构建了一个从PubMed Central论文中提取的10万级眼科图像-文本对数据集，支持眼科视觉语言模型训练。
analysis.research_motivation: 眼科视觉语言模型的发展受限于大规模、高质量的图像-文本数据集稀缺，现有数据集往往分辨率低、标注不完整或无法获取。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个从科学文献中自动提取、层次化标注、高分辨率的眼科图像-文本数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从PubMed Central的开放获取论文中提取图像和标题，将图像分解为子图并标注成像模态和标记状态，使用两步LLM方法将图注拆分为子图级标题。
contributions: 构建了包含102,023个眼科图像-标题对的层次化数据集PubMed-Ophtha。
提出了两步LLM方法将图注拆分为子图级标题，在人工标注数据上达到平均句子BLEU 0.913。
开源了人工标注真值数据、所有训练模型和完整数据集生成流程。
analysis.experiments: 在面板和图像检测任务上分别达到mAP@0.50为0.909和0.892，图像提取的中位IoU为0.997。
limitations: 数据集仅来自PubMed Central，可能覆盖不全其他来源。
LLM拆分方法可能对复杂图注效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建了一个从PubMed Central论文中提取的10万级眼科图像-文本对数据集，支持眼科视觉语言模型训练。

papers.title: OphMAE: Bridging Volumetric and Planar Imaging with a Foundation Model for Adaptive Ophthalmological Diagnosis
papers.abstract: The advent of foundation models has heralded a new era in medical artificial intelligence (AI), enabling the extraction of generalizable representations from large-scale unlabeled datasets. However, current ophthalmic AI paradigms are predominantly constrained to single-modality inference, thereby creating a dissonance with clinical practice where diagnosis relies on the synthesis of complementary imaging modalities. Furthermore, the deployment of high-performance AI in resource-limited settings is frequently impeded by the unavailability of advanced three-dimensional imaging hardware. Here, we present the Ophthalmic multimodal Masked Autoencoder (OphMAE), a multi-imaging foundation model engineered to synergize the volumetric depth of 3D Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) with the planar context of 2D en face OCT. By implementing a novel cross-modal fusion architecture and a unique adaptive inference mechanism, OphMAE was pre-trained on a massive dataset with of 183,875 paired OCT images derived from 32,765 patients. In a rigorous benchmark encompassing 17 diverse diagnostic tasks with 48,340 paired OCT images from 8,191 patients, the model demonstrated state-of-the-art performance, achieving an Area Under the Curve (AUC) of 96.9% for Age-related Macular Degeneration (AMD) and 97.2% for Diabetic Macular Edema (DME), consistently surpassing existing single-modal and multimodal foundation models. Crucially, OphMAE exhibits robust engineering adaptability: it maintains high diagnostic accuracy, such as 93.7\% AUC for AMD, even when restricted to single-modality 2D inputs, and demonstrates exceptional data efficiency by retaining 95.7% AUC with as few as 500 labeled samples. This work establishes a scalable and adaptable framework for ophthalmic AI, ensuring robust performance across different tasks.

analysis.tldr: OphMAE 是一个多模态眼科基础模型，通过融合 3D OCT 和 2D en face OCT 图像，在 17 项诊断任务上达到 SOTA，并能在单模态输入下保持高精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前眼科 AI 模型多局限于单模态推理，与临床实践中依赖多模态互补诊断的现实脱节；此外，高性能 AI 在资源受限环境中因缺乏先进 3D 成像硬件而难以部署。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能融合 3D OCT 和 2D en face OCT 的多模态基础模型，并在单模态输入下仍保持高诊断性能？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 OphMAE，采用跨模态融合架构和自适应推理机制，在大规模配对 OCT 数据集（183,875 对，32,765 患者）上预训练。
contributions: 首次提出融合 3D OCT 和 2D en face OCT 的多模态眼科基础模型 OphMAE。
在 17 项诊断任务上达到 SOTA，AMD AUC 96.9%，DME AUC 97.2%。
模型在仅用 2D 单模态输入时仍保持高精度（AMD AUC 93.7%），且数据高效（500 样本 AUC 95.7%）。
analysis.experiments: 在 17 项诊断任务、48,340 对 OCT 图像（8,191 患者）上评估，与现有单模态和多模态基础模型对比，OphMAE 取得 SOTA。
limitations: 仅针对眼科 OCT 模态，未验证其他眼部成像模态（如眼底彩照）。
自适应推理机制的计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OphMAE 是一个多模态眼科基础模型，通过融合 3D OCT 和 2D en face OCT 图像，在 17 项诊断任务上达到 SOTA，并能在单模态输入下保持高精度。

papers.title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 10: Finetuning LLMs for Conspiracy Detection
papers.abstract: SemEval-2026 Task 10 is focused on conspiracy detection. Specifically, the goal is to detect whether a Reddit comment expresses a conspiracy belief. Our submitted mdok-style system utilizes data augmentation and self-training (to cope with a rather small amount of training data) to finetune the Qwen3-32B model for a binary text-classification task. The submitted system is very competitive, ranking in the 85th percentile (8th out of 52 submissions). The results shown that our approach, which originated in machine-generated text detection, can be used for conspiracy detection as well.

analysis.tldr: 通过数据增强和自训练微调Qwen3-32B模型，在阴谋论检测任务中达到85%分位。
analysis.research_motivation: 阴谋论检测对维护网络信息环境健康至关重要，但标注数据稀缺限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在少量标注数据下有效检测Reddit评论中的阴谋论信念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用数据增强和自训练策略，微调Qwen3-32B模型进行二分类。
contributions: 将机器生成文本检测中的数据增强和自训练方法迁移至阴谋论检测任务。
在SemEval-2026 Task 10上取得85%分位（8/52）的排名。
analysis.experiments: 在SemEval-2026 Task 10的52个提交中排名第8（85%分位）。
limitations: 方法仅在单一任务上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多基线方法对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过数据增强和自训练微调Qwen3-32B模型，在阴谋论检测任务中达到85%分位。

papers.title: An Empirical Study of Agent Skills for Healthcare: Practice, Gaps, and Governance
papers.abstract: Healthcare automation is shaped by local procedures and organizational constraints, so agent capabilities rarely transfer unchanged across settings. Agent skills, self-contained directories that package reusable procedures for AI agents, are emerging as a procedural layer for adapting healthcare agents across diverse healthcare settings. We present the first empirical analysis of healthcare agent skills, drawing on 557 healthcare-related skills filtered from 58,159 public skills on ClawHub and annotated along ten dimensions covering function, deployment context, autonomy, and safety. We find that public healthcare skills emphasize patient-facing workflow automation and monitoring rather than the diagnostic and treatment-oriented tasks foregrounded in healthcare-agent research; coverage of the healthcare lifecycle and specialized clinical inputs remains uneven; and general technical risk does not reliably capture clinical risk. These findings position healthcare skills as a procedural layer not yet addressed by current benchmarks and risk frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 首个对医疗AI代理技能的实证研究，发现公共技能偏向流程自动化而非诊断治疗，且通用技术风险无法可靠反映临床风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 医疗自动化受本地流程和组织约束影响，代理能力难以跨场景迁移，而代理技能作为可复用程序层有望解决这一问题，但缺乏系统性实证分析。
analysis.problem: 公共医疗代理技能的功能分布、覆盖范围及风险特征尚不明确，现有基准和风险框架未考虑这一程序层。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 公共医疗技能强调面向患者的工作流自动化和监控，而非诊断和治疗导向任务；医疗生命周期和专门临床输入的覆盖不均；通用技术风险不能可靠捕捉临床风险。
analysis.method: 从ClawHub上58,159个公共技能中筛选出557个医疗相关技能，沿功能、部署上下文、自主性和安全性等十个维度进行标注和实证分析。
contributions: 首次对医疗代理技能进行大规模实证分析，揭示其功能分布和覆盖缺口。
指出通用技术风险框架在医疗场景中的不足，强调需要临床风险感知的治理机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基于557个技能的多维标注分析。
limitations: 仅分析公共技能，可能不涵盖私有或内部医疗技能。
标注维度可能未完全覆盖所有临床相关风险因素。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个对医疗AI代理技能的实证研究，发现公共技能偏向流程自动化而非诊断治疗，且通用技术风险无法可靠反映临床风险。

papers.title: Temporally Consistent Object 6D Pose Estimation for Robot Control
papers.abstract: Single-view RGB object pose estimators have reached a level of precision and efficiency that makes them good candidates for vision-based robot control. However, off-the-shelf methods lack temporal consistency and robustness that are mandatory for a stable feedback control. In this work, we develop a factor graph approach to enforce temporal consistency of the object pose estimates. In particular, the proposed approach: (i) incorporates object motion models, (ii) explicitly estimates the object pose measurement uncertainty, and (iii) integrates the above two components in an online optimization-based estimator. We demonstrate that with appropriate outlier rejection and smoothing using the proposed factor graph approach, we can significantly improve the results on standardized pose estimation benchmarks. We experimentally validate the stability of the proposed approach for a feedback-based robot control task in which the object is tracked by the camera attached to a torque controlled manipulator.

analysis.tldr: 通过因子图增强单视图RGB物体6D姿态估计的时间一致性，提升机器人控制稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 单视图RGB物体姿态估计器已达到高精度和效率，但缺乏时间一致性和鲁棒性，难以满足稳定反馈控制的需求。
analysis.problem: 现有单视图RGB物体姿态估计方法在时间上不一致，导致机器人控制不稳定。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因子图方法，集成物体运动模型和姿态测量不确定性估计，进行在线优化以强制时间一致性。
contributions: 提出因子图方法强制物体姿态估计的时间一致性
集成运动模型和不确定性估计，提升鲁棒性
在标准基准和机器人控制任务中验证有效性
analysis.experiments: 在标准化姿态估计基准上显著提升结果，并在基于反馈的机器人控制任务中验证稳定性。
limitations: 可能依赖运动模型假设
未提及多物体或遮挡场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过因子图增强单视图RGB物体6D姿态估计的时间一致性，提升机器人控制稳定性。

papers.title: SAIL: Structure-Aware Interpretable Learning for Anatomy-Aligned Post-hoc Explanations in OCT
papers.abstract: Optical coherence tomography (OCT), a commonly used retinal imaging modality, plays a central role in retinal disease diagnosis by providing high-resolution visualization of retinal layers. While deep learning (DL) has achieved expert-level accuracy in OCT-based retinal disease detection, its "black box" nature poses challenges for clinical adoption, where explainability is essential for clinical trust and regulatory approval. Existing post-hoc explainable AI (XAI) methods often struggle to delineate fine-grained lesion structures, respect anatomical boundaries, or suppress noise, limiting the trustworthiness of their explanations. To bridge these gaps, we propose a Structure-Aware Interpretable Learning (SAIL) framework that integrates retinal anatomical priors at the representation level and couples them with semantic features via a fusion design. Without modifying standard post-hoc explainability methods, this representation yields sharper and more anatomically aligned attribution maps. Comprehensive experiments on diverse OCT datasets demonstrate that our structure-aware method consistently enhances interpretability, producing clinically meaningful and anatomy-aware explanations. Ablation studies further show that strong interpretability requires both structural priors and semantic features, and that properly fusing the two is critical to achieve the best explanation quality. Together, these results highlight structure-aware representations as a key step toward reliable explainability in OCT.

analysis.tldr: 提出SAIL框架，通过融合视网膜解剖先验与语义特征，提升OCT图像后验解释的解剖对齐性和清晰度。
analysis.research_motivation: OCT深度学习模型虽诊断准确，但黑箱特性阻碍临床信任与监管批准；现有后验XAI方法难以描绘精细病灶结构、尊重解剖边界或抑制噪声。
analysis.problem: 如何生成解剖对齐、噪声抑制且临床可解释的OCT图像后验解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: SAIL框架在表征层面整合视网膜解剖先验，通过融合设计与语义特征耦合，不修改标准后验解释方法即可生成更锐利、解剖对齐的归因图。
contributions: 提出结构感知可解释学习框架，融合解剖先验与语义特征提升解释质量。
在多个OCT数据集上验证方法一致增强可解释性，产生临床有意义的解释。
消融实验揭示强可解释性需要结构先验与语义特征共同作用，且融合方式至关重要。
analysis.experiments: 在多个OCT数据集上进行综合实验，包括消融研究，验证了方法的有效性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的解剖先验标注。
未在非OCT医学图像上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SAIL框架，通过融合视网膜解剖先验与语义特征，提升OCT图像后验解释的解剖对齐性和清晰度。

papers.title: ProPACT: A Proactive AI-Driven Adaptive Collaborative Tutor for Pair Programming
papers.abstract: Effective pair programming depends on coordination of attention, cognitive effort, and joint regulation over time, yet most adaptive learning systems remain individual-centric and reactive. This paper introduces ProPACT, a proactive AI-driven adaptive collaborative tutor that treats collaboration itself as the object of instruction. ProPACT constructs a multimodal dyadic learner model based on Joint Visual Attention (JVA), Joint Mental Effort (JME), and individual mental effort, and employs an XGBoost-based forecasting model to predict emerging suboptimal collaboration states up to 30 seconds in advance. These predictions drive a hierarchical adaptive policy that delivers minimally intrusive scaffolds while fading support during productive collaboration. A within-subject study with 26 pair-programming dyads shows that proactive feedback significantly improves debugging success, task efficiency, feedback uptake, and post-intervention gains in JVA and JME, demonstrating the potential of forecast-driven dyadic adaptivity for real-time collaborative learning regulation.

analysis.tldr: ProPACT通过预测协作状态提前30秒干预，显著提升结对编程中的调试成功率和协作质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自适应学习系统多面向个体且反应式，缺乏对协作过程本身的主动调控，难以有效支持结对编程中的注意力协调和认知负荷管理。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能提前预测并主动干预结对编程中不良协作状态的自适应协作辅导系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建基于联合视觉注意(JVA)、联合心理努力(JME)和个体心理努力的多模态二元学习者模型，使用XGBoost预测模型提前30秒预测协作状态，并设计分层自适应策略以最小侵入式提示干预，在高效协作时自动消退支持。
contributions: 提出ProPACT系统，将协作本身作为教学对象，实现预测驱动的主动自适应协作辅导。
通过26组结对编程实验验证，主动反馈显著提升调试成功率、任务效率、反馈采纳率及协作质量指标。
analysis.experiments: 26组结对编程被试内实验，测量调试成功率、任务效率、反馈采纳率及JVA/JME后测增益。
limitations: 样本量较小（26组），可能限制泛化性。
仅针对结对编程场景，其他协作形式未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ProPACT通过预测协作状态提前30秒干预，显著提升结对编程中的调试成功率和协作质量。

papers.title: Learning Equivariant Neural-Augmented Object Dynamics From Few Interactions
papers.abstract: Learning data-efficient object dynamics models for robotic manipulation remains challenging, especially for deformable objects. A popular approach is to model objects as sets of 3D particles and learn their motion using graph neural networks. In practice, this is not enough to maintain physical feasibility over long horizons and may require large amounts of interaction data to learn. We introduce PIEGraph, a novel approach to combining analytical physics and data-driven models to capture object dynamics for both rigid and deformable bodies using limited real-world interaction data. PIEGraph consists of two components: (1) a \textbf{P}hysically \textbf{I}nformed particle-based analytical model (implemented as a spring--mass system) to enforce physically feasible motion, and (2) an \textbf{E}quivariant \textbf{Graph} Neural Network with a novel action representation that exploits symmetries in particle interactions to guide the analytical model. We evaluate PIEGraph in simulation and on robot hardware for reorientation and repositioning tasks with ropes, cloth, stuffed animals and rigid objects. We show that our method enables accurate dynamics prediction and reliable downstream robotic manipulation planning, which outperforms state of the art baselines.

analysis.tldr: PIEGraph结合物理信息弹簧-质量系统与等变图神经网络，从少量交互数据中学习刚体和可变形物体的动力学。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人操作中，可变形物体的动力学建模需要大量交互数据，且纯数据驱动方法难以保证长期物理可行性。
analysis.problem: 如何从少量真实交互数据中学习刚体和可变形物体的准确动力学模型，并支持下游操作规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PIEGraph，包含物理信息粒子模型（弹簧-质量系统）和等变图神经网络，后者利用对称性引导物理模型。
contributions: 提出结合物理信息模型与等变图神经网络的混合方法，实现数据高效的物体动力学学习。
在仿真和真实机器人上验证了绳索、布料、毛绒玩具和刚体物体的重定向和重定位任务，优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实机器人上对绳索、布料、毛绒玩具和刚体物体进行重定向和重定位任务评估，PIEGraph在动力学预测和下游规划中优于基线。
limitations: 可能依赖物体初始粒子化表示，对复杂物体需手动设计。
弹簧-质量系统参数可能需针对不同物体调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning

papers.title: mdok-style at SemEval-2026 Task 9: Finetuning LLMs for Multilingual Polarization Detection
papers.abstract: SemEval-2026 Task 9 is focused on multilingual polarization detection. Specifically, it covers the identification of multilingual, multicultural and multievent polarization along three axes (in subtasks), namely detection, type, and manifestation. Online polarization presents a concern, because it is often followed by hate speech, offensive discourse, and social fragmentation. Therefore, its detection before it escalates is crucial for a safer and more inclusive online space. We have coped with this SemEval task by finetuning mid-size LLMs for the sequence-classification task using the QLoRA parameter-efficient finetuning technique. The training data augmented the multilingual (22 languages) training sets by anonymized, lower-cased, upper-cased, and homoglyphied counterparts, making the detection more robust.

analysis.tldr: 通过QLoRA微调中型LLM，结合数据增强，实现多语言极化检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线极化常伴随仇恨言论和社交分裂，早期检测对构建安全包容的网络空间至关重要。
analysis.problem: 多语言、多文化、多事件的极化检测，包括检测、类型和表现三个子任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用QLoRA参数高效微调技术，对中型LLM进行序列分类微调，并通过匿名化、小写、大写和同形异义词替换增强多语言训练数据。
contributions: 提出基于QLoRA微调LLM的多语言极化检测方法
采用数据增强策略提升模型鲁棒性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定LLM架构
数据增强策略的泛化性有待验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过QLoRA微调中型LLM，结合数据增强，实现多语言极化检测。

papers.title: Caliper-in-the-Loop: Black-Box Optimization for Hyperledger Fabric Performance Tuning
papers.abstract: Hyperledger Fabric performance depends on many interacting configuration parameters, making manual tuning difficult. We study automated throughput tuning by treating benchmarking as a noisy black-box optimization problem and applying Bayesian optimization (BO) with dimensionality reduction (DR). We implement an end-to-end Caliper-in-the-loop pipeline that deploys candidate configurations, benchmarks them, and updates the optimizer from observed throughput. The search space, derived from Fabric configuration files, has 317 dimensions. In a cloud testbed, we evaluate 16 BO+DR variants and a random-search baseline. The best method, DYCORS-PCA, achieves a 12% TPS improvement relative to the first evaluated configuration, while MPI-REMBO achieves 9%. These results suggest that BO with DR is a practical approach for high-dimensional Hyperledger Fabric tuning, while also highlighting the role of measurement noise in interpreting gains.

analysis.tldr: 将Hyperledger Fabric性能调优建模为黑箱优化问题，使用贝叶斯优化与降维方法实现自动化吞吐量调优。
analysis.research_motivation: Hyperledger Fabric性能受众多交互配置参数影响，手动调优困难且耗时，亟需自动化方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在高维（317维）配置空间中高效搜索最优参数组合以最大化系统吞吐量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 测量噪声会影响性能增益的解读，不同降维方法效果差异显著。
analysis.method: 提出Caliper-in-the-loop流水线，将基准测试视为带噪声的黑箱优化，结合贝叶斯优化与降维（如PCA、REMBO）迭代搜索最优配置。
contributions: 首次将贝叶斯优化与降维应用于Hyperledger Fabric的自动化性能调优。
实现端到端Caliper-in-the-loop系统，支持候选配置部署、基准测试和优化器更新。
在云测试平台上评估16种BO+DR变体，发现DYCORS-PCA和MPI-REMBO分别提升12%和9%的TPS。
analysis.experiments: 在云测试平台上评估16种贝叶斯优化与降维变体及随机搜索基线，报告了最佳方法的TPS提升百分比。
limitations: 仅针对Hyperledger Fabric，未验证其他区块链平台。
未深入分析测量噪声对优化稳定性的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将Hyperledger Fabric性能调优建模为黑箱优化问题，使用贝叶斯优化与降维方法实现自动化吞吐量调优。

papers.title: Hybrid Inspection and Task-Based Access Control in Zero-Trust Agentic AI
papers.abstract: Authorizing Large Language Model (LLM)-driven agents to dynamically invoke tools and access protected resources introduces significant security risks, and the risks grow dramatically as agents engage in multi-turn conversations and scale toward distributed collaboration. A compromised or malicious agentic application can tamper with tool calls, falsify results, or request permissions beyond the scope of the subject's intended tasks, which could go unnoticed with current delegated authorization flows given their lack of visibility into the original subject's intent. In light of this, we make the following contributions towards Continuous Agent Semantic Authorization (CASA). First, we propose a hybrid runtime enforcement model that combines deterministic and semantic controls enabled by a zero-trust interception layer. Five deterministic controls enforce structural and data-integrity guarantees over the message flow, while a semantic inspection layer evaluates whether tool call choices align with the intended tasks commissioned to the agent. Second, differently from prior Task-Based Access Control (TBAC) techniques that operate on single-turn interactions, we decompose the semantic layer into two stages: i) a task-extraction step that distills the subject's objectives from multi-turn conversations at the interception layer, and ii) a task-tool semantic matching step at the authorization server that evaluates whether the requested tools are appropriate for the extracted tasks. Third, we extend the ASTRA dataset that we introduced in a prior work, by generating novel conversation-tool datasets with multi-turn interactions containing relevant and irrelevant tool calls for a given task. Lastly, we provide the first experimental results for TBAC under multi-turn conversations.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合运行时强制模型，结合确定性与语义控制，实现零信任代理AI中的持续语义授权。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的代理在动态调用工具和访问资源时存在严重安全风险，现有授权流程缺乏对原始主体意图的可见性，导致恶意代理可能篡改工具调用、伪造结果或越权请求。
analysis.problem: 如何在多轮对话和分布式协作场景下，对代理AI进行持续、细粒度的授权控制，确保工具调用与主体意图一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合运行时强制模型，包含五个确定性控制（结构/数据完整性）和语义检查层（任务提取+任务-工具语义匹配），并扩展ASTRA数据集以支持多轮对话评估。
contributions: 提出结合确定性与语义控制的零信任拦截层混合运行时强制模型。
将语义层分解为任务提取和任务-工具语义匹配两阶段，支持多轮对话。
扩展ASTRA数据集，生成包含相关/无关工具调用的多轮对话-工具数据集。
首次提供多轮对话下基于任务的访问控制（TBAC）实验结果。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未考虑大规模分布式代理场景下的性能开销。
语义匹配的准确性可能受限于LLM的理解能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合运行时强制模型，结合确定性与语义控制，实现零信任代理AI中的持续语义授权。

papers.title: The Design and Composition of Structural Causal Decision Processes
papers.abstract: We present two new classes of causal models of decision-making agents. Our approach is motivated by the needs of modeling the economics of computing systems. These systems are composed of subsystems and can exhibit endogenous limits on cognitive resources and value discounting. Structural Causal Decision Models (SCDMs) expand on Structural Causal Influence Models. Like SCIMs, they explicitly represent the causal relationships between model variables and the payoffs of agent decisions. Additionally, agent decisions can be constrained by their causal antecedents, and SCDMs can have open root variables for which no probability distribution or structural equation is given. We show that SCDMs have a well-defined and computationally useful property of composability. Building on SCDMs, we then define a Structural Causal Decision Process (SCDP) as a recurring SCDM with a discount variable. SCDPs benefit from the useful composition properties of SCDMs. Moreover, SCDPs are strictly more expressive than POMDPs because they do not assume rational belief formation. Indeed, an SCDP can endogenously model the memory-formation process, and is thus useful for modeling resource rational agents in dynamic settings. SCDPs are also capable of modeling variable discounting, a tool used widely in social scientific modeling. We pose that SCDPs are a useful framework for policy simulation for the digital economy, mechanism design for information systems, and digital twin modeling of cyberinfrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构因果决策模型(SCDM)和结构因果决策过程(SCDP)，用于建模计算系统中的决策智能体，支持组合性和表达性超越POMDP。
analysis.research_motivation: 计算系统经济学建模需要能够表示子系统组成、认知资源限制和价值折扣的因果决策模型，现有模型如SCIM和POMDP在表达性和组合性上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种因果决策模型，既能显式表示变量间的因果关系和决策收益，又能支持组合性、内生记忆形成和可变折扣，以建模资源受限的理性智能体。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构因果决策模型(SCDM)，扩展结构因果影响模型(SCIM)，允许决策受因果前因约束并包含开放根变量；在此基础上定义结构因果决策过程(SCDP)，引入折扣变量形成循环SCDM。
contributions: 提出SCDM，具有良好定义的组合性属性，支持开放根变量和因果约束决策。
定义SCDP，比POMDP更具表达性，能内生建模记忆形成过程和可变折扣，适用于资源理性智能体建模。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在真实计算系统或数字孪生场景中验证实用性。
SCDP的推理和求解算法复杂度未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构因果决策模型(SCDM)和结构因果决策过程(SCDP)，用于建模计算系统中的决策智能体，支持组合性和表达性超越POMDP。

papers.title: The 2026 ACII Dyadic Conversations (DaiKon) Workshop & Challenge
papers.abstract: The 2026 ACII Dyadic Conversations (ACII-DaiKon) Workshop & Challenge introduces a benchmark for modeling interpersonal affect and social dynamics in dyadic conversations. Although conversational affect modeling has advanced rapidly, most benchmarks remain speaker-centric and underrepresent coupled, time-evolving processes between partners, including directional influence, conversational timing coordination, and rapport development. To address this gap, ACII-DaiKon presents three coordinated sub-challenges built on a shared dataset: (1) directional interpersonal influence prediction, (2) turn-taking prediction (next-speaker and time-to-next-speech), and (3) rapport trajectory prediction across full interactions. The challenge is built on the Hume-DaiKon dataset, comprising 945 dyadic conversations (743.4 hours of audiovisual data) collected under naturalistic conditions across five languages. The benchmark supports multimodal modeling, temporal reasoning, and cross-context generalization through fixed train/validation/test splits, standardized metrics, and released baseline systems. Evaluation uses Concordance Correlation Coefficient (CCC), Pearson correlation, Macro-F1, and Mean Absolute Error (MAE) depending on the sub-challenge. Baseline experiments establish initial reference performance, with best test results of 0.40 CCC and 0.50 Pearson for influence prediction, 0.66 Macro-F1 and 1.50~s MAE for turn-taking, and 0.68 CCC and 0.70 Pearson for rapport trajectory modeling. These results indicate that while current methods capture coarse dyadic patterns, robust modeling of directional dependence and long-horizon interpersonal dynamics remains challenging.
