The workshop provides a shared platform for rigorous comparison and cross-disciplinary discussion on data validity, evaluation protocols, and culturally aware modeling for dyadic interaction.

analysis.tldr: ACII-DaiKon 挑战赛提出了一个面向双人对话中人际情感与社会动态建模的基准，包含三个子挑战和大型多语言数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对话情感建模基准多以说话者为中心，忽略了对话伙伴间耦合的、随时间演化的过程，如方向性影响、对话时序协调和融洽关系发展。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够全面评估双人对话中人际情感动态（包括方向性影响、话轮转换和融洽关系轨迹）的标准化基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线实验表明，当前方法能捕捉粗粒度的双人模式，但在方向性依赖和长程人际动态的鲁棒建模上仍具挑战性。
analysis.method: 提出三个协调的子挑战：方向性人际影响预测、话轮转换预测（下一说话者和到下一句话的时间）、全交互融洽关系轨迹预测，基于Hume-DaiKon数据集（945个双人对话，743.4小时音视频数据，五种语言），提供固定划分、标准化指标和基线系统。
contributions: 提出了一个面向双人对话中人际情感与社会动态建模的基准，包含三个子挑战。
发布了大规模多语言双人对话数据集Hume-DaiKon（945个对话，743.4小时）。
提供了标准化评估指标和基线系统，为后续研究建立参考。
analysis.experiments: 基线实验在三个子挑战上报告了结果：影响预测最佳CCC 0.40、Pearson 0.50；话轮转换最佳Macro-F1 0.66、MAE 1.50秒；融洽轨迹建模最佳CCC 0.68、Pearson 0.70。
limitations: 基线性能有限，表明方向性依赖和长程动态建模仍困难。
数据集虽多语言，但文化多样性可能仍不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ACII-DaiKon 挑战赛提出了一个面向双人对话中人际情感与社会动态建模的基准，包含三个子挑战和大型多语言数据集。

papers.title: An explainable hypothesis-driven approach to Drug-Induced Liver Injury with HADES
papers.abstract: Drug-induced liver injury (DILI) remains a leading cause of late-stage clinical trial attrition. However, existing computational predictors primarily rely on binary classification, a framing that limits generalization and yields no mechanistic insight to guide translational decisions. We argue that DILI prediction is better posed as an explainable hypothesis-generation problem. To support this shift, we introduce the DILER Benchmark, a dataset that extends beyond binary labels by augmenting a curated set of molecules with mechanistic hepatotoxicity hypotheses derived from biomedical literature. We further present HADES, an agentic system designed to generate transparent and auditable reasoning traces. By combining molecular-level predictions, metabolite decomposition, structural understanding, and toxicity pathway evidence, HADES mechanistically assesses DILI risk. Evaluated on the DILER Benchmark, HADES outperforms existing models in binary classification, achieving a ROC-AUC of 0.68 on the Test Set and 0.59 on the challenging Post-2021 Set, compared with 0.63 and 0.50 for DILI-Predictor, respectively. More importantly, we establish a baseline for mechanistic hypothesis generation, where HADES achieves a Hypothesis Alignment Fuzzy Jaccard Index of 0.16. This result underscores the inherent complexity of the task while highlighting the need for advanced explainable approaches in predictive toxicology.

analysis.tldr: 提出将药物性肝损伤预测重构为可解释假设生成问题，并构建新基准与智能体系统。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有DILI预测模型多为二分类，缺乏泛化能力和机制性洞察，难以指导转化决策。
analysis.problem: 如何将DILI预测从二分类任务转变为可解释的假设生成问题，并提供透明推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建DILER基准数据集（含机制性肝毒性假设），提出HADES智能体系统，结合分子预测、代谢物分解、结构理解和毒性通路证据生成可审计推理。
contributions: 提出将DILI预测重构为可解释假设生成问题的新视角
构建DILER基准数据集，扩展二元标签为机制性假设
开发HADES系统，实现透明可审计的推理轨迹
analysis.experiments: 在DILER基准上评估，HADES在二分类中ROC-AUC达0.68（测试集）和0.59（Post-2021集），优于DILI-Predictor的0.63和0.50；假设对齐模糊Jaccard指数为0.16。
limitations: 假设生成任务复杂度高，基线性能较低（Jaccard指数0.16）
可能依赖文献质量，对未见机制泛化能力有限
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将药物性肝损伤预测重构为可解释假设生成问题，并构建新基准与智能体系统。

papers.title: AnchorD: Metric Grounding of Monocular Depth Using Factor Graphs
papers.abstract: Dense and accurate depth estimation is essential for robotic manipulation, grasping, and navigation, yet currently available depth sensors are prone to errors on transparent, specular, and general non-Lambertian surfaces. To mitigate these errors, large-scale monocular depth estimation approaches provide strong structural priors, but their predictions can be potentially skewed or mis-scaled in metric units, limiting their direct use in robotics. Thus, in this work, we propose a training-free depth grounding framework that anchors monocular depth estimation priors from a depth foundation model in raw sensor depth through factor graph optimization. Our method performs a patch-wise affine alignment, locally grounding monocular predictions in metric real-world depth while preserving fine-grained geometric structure and discontinuities. To facilitate evaluation in challenging real-world conditions, we introduce a benchmark dataset with dense scene-wide ground truth depth in the presence of non-Lambertian objects. Ground truth is obtained via matte reflection spray and multi-camera fusion, overcoming the reliance on object-only CAD-based annotations used in prior datasets. Extensive evaluations across diverse sensors and domains demonstrate consistent improvements in depth performance without any (re-)training. We make our implementation publicly available at https://anchord.cs.uni-freiburg.de.

analysis.tldr: 提出AnchorD，一种无需训练的单目深度度量校准框架，通过因子图优化将深度基础模型的预测与原始传感器深度对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度传感器在透明、镜面等非朗伯表面上误差大，而单目深度估计方法虽提供强结构先验但预测可能尺度偏移，限制了在机器人中的直接使用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练的情况下，将单目深度估计的预测锚定到真实的度量尺度，同时保持精细几何结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AnchorD，一种基于因子图优化的训练无关框架，通过分块仿射对齐将深度基础模型的预测与原始传感器深度进行局部度量校准。
contributions: 提出AnchorD，一种无需训练的单目深度度量校准方法，通过因子图优化实现局部仿射对齐。
引入一个在非朗伯物体存在下具有密集场景级真实深度的新基准数据集。
analysis.experiments: 在多种传感器和领域上进行广泛评估，显示深度性能一致提升，无需任何（重新）训练。
limitations: 可能依赖深度基础模型的质量。
因子图优化的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AnchorD，一种无需训练的单目深度度量校准框架，通过因子图优化将深度基础模型的预测与原始传感器深度对齐。

papers.title: Fuzzy Fingerprinting Encoder Pre-trained Language Models for Emotion Recognition in Conversations: Human Assessment and Validity Study
papers.abstract: In Emotion Recognition in Conversations (ERC), model decisions should align with nuanced human perception and ideally provide insights on the classification process. Standard encoder pre-trained language models (PLMs) are the state-of-the-art at these tasks but offer little insight into why a certain prediction is made. This is especially problematic in imbalanced datasets, where most utterances are labeled as neutral, making these models frequently misclassify minority emotions as the majority neutral class. To tackle this issue, we introduced a novel, interpretable approach to ERC by combining PLMs with Fuzzy Fingerprints (FFPs). FFP provide class-specific prototypes that reflect the characteristic class activation patterns in the PLM's latent space. They are derived by ranking and fuzzifying the activations of the pooled conversational context-dependent embeddings across training instances for each emotion. At inference time, each input utterance is similarly fuzzy fingerprinted and matched to the emotion prototypes using a fuzzy similarity function based on the aggregation of the intersection of the fuzzy sets that define each FFP. Experimental results show that FFP integration reduces overclassification into the neutral class and human evaluation further supports the adequacy of FFP predictions. Our proposed method thus bridges the gap between deep neural inference and human perception, performing at state-of-the-art level while simultaneously offering valuable insights into the classification procedure.

analysis.tldr: 提出模糊指纹编码器，结合预训练语言模型提升对话情感识别的可解释性并减少对中性类别的过度分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准编码器PLMs在对话情感识别中缺乏可解释性，尤其在类别不平衡数据集中常将少数情感误判为中性类别，需要一种既能保持性能又能提供分类洞察的方法。
analysis.problem: 解决对话情感识别中PLMs可解释性不足以及在不平衡数据集上对少数情感类别的误分类问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在类别不平衡数据集中，大多数话语被标记为中性，导致模型频繁将少数情感错误分类为中性类别。
analysis.method: 结合PLMs与模糊指纹（FFPs），通过排序和模糊化对话上下文相关嵌入的激活值生成每个情感类别的原型，推理时使用模糊相似度函数匹配输入话语与原型。
contributions: 提出一种新颖的可解释ERC方法，通过模糊指纹提供类别特定原型，减少对中性类别的过度分类。
通过人类评估验证了FFP预测的充分性，并实现了与SOTA相当的性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到实验结果显示了FFP集成减少了中性类别的过度分类，并进行了人类评估支持预测的充分性，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖特定PLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
模糊指纹的构建和匹配计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出模糊指纹编码器，结合预训练语言模型提升对话情感识别的可解释性并减少对中性类别的过度分类。

papers.title: AcademiClaw: When Students Set Challenges for AI Agents
papers.abstract: Benchmarks within the OpenClaw ecosystem have thus far evaluated exclusively assistant-level tasks, leaving the academic-level capabilities of OpenClaw largely unexamined. We introduce AcademiClaw, a bilingual benchmark of 80 complex, long-horizon tasks sourced directly from university students' real academic workflows -- homework, research projects, competitions, and personal projects -- that they found current AI agents unable to solve effectively. Curated from 230 student-submitted candidates through rigorous expert review, the final task set spans 25+ professional domains, ranging from olympiad-level mathematics and linguistics problems to GPU-intensive reinforcement learning and full-stack system debugging, with 16 tasks requiring CUDA GPU execution. Each task executes in an isolated Docker sandbox and is scored on task completion by multi-dimensional rubrics combining six complementary techniques, with an independent five-category safety audit providing additional behavioral analysis. Experiments on six frontier models show that even the best achieves only a 55\% pass rate. Further analysis uncovers sharp capability boundaries across task domains, divergent behavioral strategies among models, and a disconnect between token consumption and output quality, providing fine-grained diagnostic signals beyond what aggregate metrics reveal. We hope that AcademiClaw and its open-sourced data and code can serve as a useful resource for the OpenClaw community, driving progress toward agents that are more capable and versatile across the full breadth of real-world academic demands. All data and code are available at https://github.com/GAIR-NLP/AcademiClaw.

analysis.tldr: 学生自建80个长周期学术任务基准，评估AI Agent在真实学术场景中的能力边界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有OpenClaw基准仅评估助手级任务，缺乏对AI Agent在真实学术工作流（如作业、研究项目）中复杂、长周期能力的系统评测。
analysis.problem: 构建一个覆盖多领域、长周期、需安全隔离的学术任务基准，以揭示当前AI Agent在真实学术场景中的能力边界和失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型仅55%通过率；不同任务域能力边界差异显著；模型行为策略分化；token消耗与输出质量脱节。
analysis.method: 从230个学生提交候选任务中经专家评审筛选80个任务，覆盖25+专业领域，在隔离Docker沙箱中执行，采用多维评分（六种技术组合）和独立五类安全审计。
contributions: 提出AcademiClaw基准，包含80个来自学生真实学术工作流的复杂长周期任务。
通过六种前沿模型实验揭示当前AI Agent在学术任务中的能力边界和细粒度诊断信号。
analysis.experiments: 在六个前沿模型上测试，最佳模型通过率仅55%，并分析了任务域能力边界、行为策略差异及token消耗与质量脱钩。
limitations: 任务数量有限（80个），可能无法覆盖所有学术场景。
评分依赖人工设计的评分标准，可能存在主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 学生自建80个长周期学术任务基准，评估AI Agent在真实学术场景中的能力边界。

papers.title: Biological Spatial Priors Regularize Foundation Model Representations for Cross-Site MSI Generalization in Colorectal Cancer
papers.abstract: Predicting microsatellite instability (MSI) status from routine hematoxylin and eosin (H&E) whole slide images (WSIs) offers a practical alternative to molecular testing, but models trained at one institution tend to generalize poorly to slides acquired at a different site. Foundation model representations, despite their generality, still encode site-specific texture alongside the conserved biological morphology underlying MSI. We investigate whether tile-level spatial priors derived from known MSI histology can guide these representations toward more site-invariant features. We introduce a biologically motivated spatial prior based on peripheral distance encoding, reflecting the Crohn's-like peripheral lymphocytic reaction at the tumor invasive margin, and evaluate a secondary local immune neighborhood encoding reflecting the lymphocyte-to-tumor ratio in each tile's immediate spatial neighborhood. Both priors are injected into a TransMIL aggregator before self-attention, allowing the transformer to integrate spatial biological context with UNI2-h or Virchow2 features across all attention layers. We evaluate six foundation model and MIL aggregator combinations as a reference, then assess the effect of each spatial prior. Training on TCGA-COAD (137 slides) and evaluating externally on TCGA-READ (50 slides) without retraining, peripheral distance encoding achieves MSI AUC 0.959 +/- 0.012 on COAD and MSS specificity 1.000 on READ, compared to 0.957 and 0.939 for the strongest reference configuration. Local immune neighborhood encoding achieves comparable internal AUC but lower cross-site specificity, suggesting margin proximity encodes a more site-invariant biological signal than local immune density. Results suggest biologically grounded spatial priors act as regularizers that reduce reliance on site-specific imaging patterns.

analysis.tldr: 引入生物空间先验（外周距离编码）可提升基础模型在结直肠癌MSI跨站点泛化中的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: MSI状态预测模型在不同医疗站点间泛化能力差，基础模型表示仍编码站点特异性纹理，需要引导模型关注跨站点不变的生物学形态。
analysis.problem: 如何利用已知MSI组织学的空间先验，使基础模型表示对站点变化更鲁棒。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基础模型表示虽通用，但仍包含站点特异性纹理；外周距离编码比局部免疫密度编码提供更站点不变的生物学信号。
analysis.method: 提出两种生物空间先验：外周距离编码（反映肿瘤侵袭边缘的克罗恩样淋巴细胞反应）和局部免疫邻域编码（反映每个图块的淋巴细胞-肿瘤比率），注入TransMIL聚合器的自注意力前，与UNI2-h或Virchow2特征结合。
contributions: 提出基于外周距离的生物空间先验，有效提升跨站点MSI预测泛化能力。
系统评估六种基础模型与MIL聚合器组合，并证明空间先验作为正则化器减少对站点特异性模式的依赖。
analysis.experiments: 在TCGA-COAD（137张切片）训练，TCGA-READ（50张切片）外部评估，外周距离编码在COAD上AUC 0.959，READ上MSS特异性1.000。
limitations: 仅评估了两个数据集，更多站点验证未进行。
先验设计依赖已知MSI组织学知识，可能不适用于其他癌症类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 引入生物空间先验（外周距离编码）可提升基础模型在结直肠癌MSI跨站点泛化中的表现。

papers.title: Deciphering Shortcut Learning from an Evolutionary Game Theory Perspective
papers.abstract: Shortcut learning causes deep learning models to rely on non-essential features within the data. However, its formation in deep neural network training still lacks theoretical understanding. In this paper, we provide a formal definition of core and shortcut features and employ evolutionary game theory to analyze the origins of shortcut bias by modeling data samples as players and their corresponding neural tangent features as strategies, assuming the existence of core and shortcut subnetworks. We find that gradient descent (GD) and stochastic gradient descent (SGD) lead to two distinct stochastically stable states, each corresponding to a different strategy. The former primarily optimizes the shortcut subnetwork, while the latter primarily optimizes the core subnetwork. We investigate the influence of these strategies on shortcut bias through a continuous stochastic differential equation, and reveal the impact of data noise and optimization noise on the formation of shortcut bias. In brief, our work employs evolutionary game theory to characterize the dynamics of shortcut bias formation and provides a theoretical view on its mitigation.

analysis.tldr: 从演化博弈论视角分析捷径学习，发现GD和SGD导致不同的稳定状态，分别偏向捷径子网络和核心子网络。
analysis.research_motivation: 捷径学习导致模型依赖非本质特征，但其形成机制缺乏理论理解，需要从理论层面揭示其成因。
analysis.problem: 解释深度神经网络训练中捷径偏差的形成原因和动态过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明GD和SGD导致不同的随机稳定状态，分别对应捷径子网络和核心子网络的优化。
analysis.method: 利用演化博弈论，将数据样本视为玩家，神经正切特征视为策略，假设存在核心和捷径子网络，通过随机微分方程分析梯度下降和随机梯度下降对捷径偏差的影响。
contributions: 形式化定义了核心特征和捷径特征，并引入演化博弈论分析捷径偏差的起源。
揭示了GD和SGD导致不同的随机稳定状态，分别偏向捷径子网络和核心子网络，并分析了数据噪声和优化噪声的影响。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于特定假设（如子网络存在性），可能不适用于所有网络结构。
未在真实数据集上验证理论预测。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从演化博弈论视角分析捷径学习，发现GD和SGD导致不同的稳定状态，分别偏向捷径子网络和核心子网络。

papers.title: Human Activity Recognition Method for Moderate Violence Detection
papers.abstract: Physical violence in public spaces is a significant public health concern, with minor incidents such as pushing often serving as precursors to more severe escalations. This research develops an automated system for the real-time detection of moderate physical violence, specifically pushing, in surveillance camera footage. The proposed solution integrates state-of-the-art computer vision models, utilizing YOLO11 and YOLO11-Pose for human detection and skeletal keypoint extraction. By calculating body inclination and joint angles between shoulders and hips, a Random Forest classifier was trained to distinguish between normal behavior and aggressive physical contact. The system's performance was evaluated through three progressive case studies representing increasing levels of difficulty. In controlled environments with frontal views, the model achieved a precision of 0.98. In the most challenging scenario, featuring high-altitude, steep-angle recordings from real-world surveillance infrastructure, the system maintained a precision of 0.72 despite significant perspective distortion and visual noise. These results demonstrate the feasibility of using skeletal analysis for early violence intervention in urban security contexts.

analysis.tldr: 利用YOLO11-Pose提取骨骼关键点，结合随机森林分类器检测监控视频中的推搡暴力行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 公共场所的肢体暴力（如推搡）是严重公共健康问题，且常升级为更严重暴力，现有监控系统缺乏对中等暴力程度的实时自动检测能力。
analysis.problem: 在监控视频中实时、准确地检测中等程度的物理暴力（推搡行为）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用YOLO11和YOLO11-Pose进行人体检测和骨骼关键点提取，计算身体倾斜角度和肩髋关节角度，训练随机森林分类器区分正常行为与攻击性身体接触。
contributions: 提出一种结合YOLO11-Pose和随机森林的实时推搡检测系统。
在三个难度递增的场景（包括真实监控视角）下验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个渐进式案例研究中评估，受控正面视角下精确率0.98，最具挑战的真实监控高角度场景下精确率0.72。
limitations: 仅针对推搡这一种暴力类型，未覆盖其他暴力形式。
在极端视角和噪声下精确率下降明显。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用YOLO11-Pose提取骨骼关键点，结合随机森林分类器检测监控视频中的推搡暴力行为。

papers.title: Mamoda2.5: Enhancing Unified Multimodal Model with DiT-MoE
papers.abstract: We present Mamoda2.5, a unified AR-Diffusion framework that seamlessly integrates multimodal understanding and generation within a single architecture. To efficiently enhance the model's generation capability, we equip the Diffusion Transformer backbone with a fine-grained Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) design (128 experts, Top-8 routing), yielding a 25B-parameter model that activates only 3B parameters, significantly reducing training costs while scaling up the model capacity. Mamoda2.5 achieves top-tier generation performance on VBench 2.0 and sets a new record in video editing quality, surpassing evaluated open-source models and matching the performance of current top-tier proprietary models, including the Kling O1 on OpenVE-Bench. Furthermore, we introduce a joint few-step distillation and reinforcement learning framework that compresses the 30-step editing model into a 4-step model and greatly accelerates model inference. Compared to open-source baselines, Mamoda2.5 achieves up to $95.9\times$ faster video editing inference. In real-world applications, Mamoda2.5 has been successfully deployed for content moderation and creative restoration tasks in advertising scenarios, achieving a 98% success rate in internal advertising video editing scenario.

analysis.tldr: Mamoda2.5 通过 DiT-MoE 架构实现统一多模态理解与生成，在视频编辑上达到顶级性能并大幅加速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型在生成能力上受限，且训练和推理成本高，难以兼顾性能与效率。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个高效且强大的统一多模态模型，同时提升生成质量和推理速度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用 AR-Diffusion 统一框架，在 Diffusion Transformer 中引入细粒度 MoE（128专家，Top-8路由），模型总参数量25B但激活仅3B；并提出联合少步蒸馏与强化学习框架，将30步编辑模型压缩为4步。
contributions: 提出 Mamoda2.5，一个统一 AR-Diffusion 多模态模型，结合 DiT-MoE 实现高效生成。
引入联合蒸馏与强化学习框架，实现 95.9 倍视频编辑推理加速。
analysis.experiments: 在 VBench 2.0 上达到顶级生成性能，在 OpenVE-Bench 上视频编辑质量超越开源模型并匹配顶级闭源模型（如 Kling O1），内部广告视频编辑场景成功率达98%。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在理解任务上的具体表现。
仅报告了视频编辑的加速比，未详细说明其他任务的效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Mamoda2.5 通过 DiT-MoE 架构实现统一多模态理解与生成，在视频编辑上达到顶级性能并大幅加速推理。

papers.title: Trustworthy AI Suffers from Invariance Conflicts and Causality is The Solution
papers.abstract: As artificial intelligence (AI), including machine learning (ML) models and foundation models (FMs), is increasingly deployed in high-stakes domains, ensuring their trustworthiness has become a central challenge. However, the core trustworthy AI objectives, such as fairness, robustness, privacy, and explainability, are hard to achieve simultaneously, especially while preserving utility. This position paper argues that causality is necessary to understand and balance trade-offs in performance and multiple objectives of trustworthy AI. We ground our arguments in re-interpreting trustworthy AI trade-offs as incompatible invariance requirements under different changes to the data-generating process. We then illustrate that causality provides a unifying framework for understanding how trade-offs in trustworthy AI arise, and how they can be softened or resolved through selective invariance. This perspective applies to both classical ML models and large-scale FMs. Our paper discusses how causal assumptions may be applied explicitly or implicitly in modern large-scale systems. Finally, we outline open challenges and opportunities for using causality to build more trustworthy AI.

analysis.tldr: 本文主张因果性是解决可信AI中公平性、鲁棒性、隐私和可解释性之间冲突的关键。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI在关键领域的部署，确保其可信度成为核心挑战，但公平性、鲁棒性、隐私和可解释性等目标难以同时实现，且常与性能冲突。
analysis.problem: 如何理解和平衡可信AI中多个目标之间的权衡，特别是解决由不变性冲突引起的矛盾。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 可信AI目标之间的权衡可被重新解释为数据生成过程不同变化下的不相容不变性要求。
analysis.method: 提出因果性作为统一框架，通过选择性不变性来理解和缓解可信AI中的权衡。
contributions: 将可信AI的权衡重新解释为不变性冲突，并论证因果性是其解决方案。
讨论了因果假设在经典ML和大规模基础模型中的显式或隐式应用，并指出了开放挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为立场论文，缺乏实证验证。
因果性在实践中的具体实现和可扩展性未详细讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文主张因果性是解决可信AI中公平性、鲁棒性、隐私和可解释性之间冲突的关键。

papers.title: ViewSAM: Learning View-aware Cross-modal Semantics for Weakly Supervised Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking
papers.abstract: Cross-view Referring Multi-Object Tracking (CRMOT) aims to track multiple objects specified by natural language across multiple camera views, with globally consistent identities. Despite recent progress, existing methods rely heavily on costly frame-level spatial annotations and cross-view identity supervision. To reduce such reliance, we explore CRMOT under weak supervision by leveraging the capabilities of foundation models. However, our empirical study shows that directly applying foundation models such as SAM2 and SAM3, even with task-specific modifications, fails to accurately understand referring expressions and maintain consistent identities across views. Yet, they remain effective at producing reliable object tracklets that can serve as pseudo supervision. We therefore repurpose foundation models as pseudo-label generators and propose a two-stage framework for weakly supervised CRMOT, using only object category labels as coarse-grained supervision. In the first stage, we design an Affinity-guided Cross-view Re-prompting strategy to refine and associate SAM3-generated tracklets across cameras, producing reliable cross-view pseudo labels for subsequent training. In the second stage, we introduce ViewSAM, a CRMOT model built upon SAM2 that explicitly models view-aware cross-modal semantics. By formulating view-induced variations as learnable conditions, ViewSAM bridges the gap between view-variant visual observations and view-invariant textual expressions, enabling robust cross-view referring tracking with only approximately 10% additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ViewSAM achieves SOTA performance under weak supervision and remains competitive with fully supervised methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出ViewSAM，利用基础模型生成伪标签，实现弱监督跨视角指代多目标跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CRMOT方法依赖昂贵的帧级空间标注和跨视角身份监督，成本高且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 在仅使用目标类别标签作为粗粒度监督的弱监督设置下，实现跨视角指代多目标跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接应用SAM2/SAM3等基础模型无法准确理解指代表达并保持跨视角身份一致性，但能生成可靠的目标轨迹片段作为伪监督。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段用亲和力引导的跨视角重提示策略精炼并关联SAM3生成的轨迹，产生跨视角伪标签；第二阶段构建ViewSAM模型，显式建模视角感知的跨模态语义，将视角引起的差异作为可学习条件。
contributions: 首次探索弱监督CRMOT，仅使用目标类别标签作为监督信号。
提出两阶段框架，利用基础模型生成伪标签，并设计亲和力引导的跨视角重提示策略。
提出ViewSAM模型，通过可学习条件建模视角感知的跨模态语义，仅增加约10%参数实现鲁棒跟踪。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖基础模型生成的轨迹质量，可能受限于基础模型性能。
仅使用类别标签，可能无法处理细粒度指代表达。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ViewSAM，利用基础模型生成伪标签，实现弱监督跨视角指代多目标跟踪。

papers.title: AutoFocus: Uncertainty-Aware Active Visual Search for GUI Grounding
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have enabled autonomous GUI agents that translate natural language instructions into executable screen coordinates. However, grounding performance degrades in high-resolution interfaces, where dense layouts and small interactive elements expose a resolution gap between modern displays and model input constraints. Existing zoom-in strategies rely on fixed anchors, heuristic grids, or reinforcement learning, lacking a principled mechanism to adaptively determine where refinement is needed and how much spatial uncertainty should be explored. We propose AutoFocus, a training-free, uncertainty-aware active visual search framework for GUI grounding. Our key insight is that token-level perplexity in coordinate generation naturally reflects spatial uncertainty. Rather than committing to a single prediction, AutoFocus samples multiple coordinate hypotheses and converts their axial perplexities into an anisotropic gaussian spatial probability field, explicitly modeling directional uncertainty. Based on this field, we generate global and local region proposals and introduce Shape-Aware Zooming to balance tight localization with contextual preservation. A visual prompt-based aggregation step then selects the most consistent prediction via structured comparison. Extensive experiments on ScreenSpot-Pro and ScreenSpot-V2 demonstrate consistent improvements across both general-purpose and GUI-specialized VLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出AutoFocus，一种无需训练、基于不确定性的主动视觉搜索框架，通过token级困惑度建模空间不确定性，实现GUI元素精准定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在GUI定位中因高分辨率界面和密集布局导致性能下降，而现有缩放策略缺乏自适应确定细化区域和探索空间不确定性的机制。
analysis.problem: 如何自适应地确定GUI定位中需要细化的区域并建模空间不确定性，以提升高分辨率界面下的元素定位精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到坐标生成中的token级困惑度能自然反映空间不确定性，且多假设采样可揭示方向性不确定性。
analysis.method: 无需训练的主动视觉搜索框架：采样多个坐标假设，将轴向困惑度转换为各向异性高斯空间概率场，生成全局和局部区域提议，结合形状感知缩放平衡定位与上下文，最后通过视觉提示聚合选择最一致预测。
contributions: 提出基于token级困惑度的空间不确定性建模方法，无需额外训练。
设计形状感知缩放策略，平衡紧致定位与上下文保留。
在ScreenSpot-Pro和ScreenSpot-V2上验证了跨通用和GUI专用VLM的持续改进。
analysis.experiments: 在ScreenSpot-Pro和ScreenSpot-V2基准上进行了实验，涵盖通用和GUI专用VLM，显示一致改进。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM的困惑度质量，对低质量模型效果有限。
多假设采样增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AutoFocus，一种无需训练、基于不确定性的主动视觉搜索框架，通过token级困惑度建模空间不确定性，实现GUI元素精准定位。

papers.title: Rethinking Low-Light Image Enhancement: A Log-Domain Intensity--Chromaticity Decoupling Perspective
papers.abstract: Explicit reconstruction constraints derived from the decoupled representation are further imposed to suppress abnormal channel amplification and chromatic noise. Experiments on LOLv2-Real, MIT-Adobe FiveK, and LSRW show that the proposed method achieves competitive or superior quantitative and visual performance, reaching 29.71 dB PSNR and 0.89 SSIM on LOLv2-Real. DarkFace experiments further indicate improved downstream face detection under low-light conditions. Code and pretrained models are available at: https://github.com/mubaisam/ICD.

analysis.tldr: 提出对数域亮度-色度解耦的低光图像增强方法，在多个基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有低光图像增强方法常因耦合表示导致通道放大异常和色度噪声，影响视觉质量。
analysis.problem: 如何通过解耦亮度与色度表示来抑制异常通道放大和色度噪声，提升低光图像增强效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出对数域亮度-色度解耦框架，并施加显式重构约束以抑制异常通道放大和色度噪声。
contributions: 提出对数域亮度-色度解耦视角用于低光图像增强
设计显式重构约束抑制异常通道放大和色度噪声
analysis.experiments: 在LOLv2-Real、MIT-Adobe FiveK、LSRW上达到竞争或更优性能，LOLv2-Real上PSNR 29.71 dB、SSIM 0.89；DarkFace实验表明提升下游人脸检测性能。
limitations: 可能对极端低光场景泛化能力有限
计算复杂度未在摘要中提及
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出对数域亮度-色度解耦的低光图像增强方法，在多个基准上达到SOTA。

papers.title: Retrieving Any Relevant Moments: Benchmark and Models for Generalized Moment Retrieval
papers.abstract: Video Moment Retrieval (VMR) aims to localize temporal segments in videos that correspond to a natural language query, but typically assumes only a single matching moment for each query. This assumption does not always hold in real-world scenarios, where queries may correspond to multiple or no moments. Thus, we formulate Generalized Moment Retrieval (GMR), a unified setting that requires retrieving the complete set of relevant moments or predicting an empty set. To enable systematic study of GMR, we introduce Soccer-GMR, a large-scale benchmark built on challenging soccer videos that reflect general GMR scenarios, with realistic negative and positive queries. The benchmark is constructed via a duration-flexible semi-automated pipeline with human verification, enabling scalable data generation while maintaining high annotation quality. We further design a unified evaluation protocol with complementary metrics tailored for null-set rejection, positive-query localization, and end-to-end GMR performance. Finally, we establish strong baselines across two modeling paradigms: a lightweight plug-and-play GMR adapter for discriminative VMR models, and a GMR-tailored GRPO reward for fine-tuning multimodal large language models (MLLMs). Extensive experiments show consistent gains across all metrics and expose key limitations of current methods, positioning GMR as a more realistic and challenging benchmark for video-language understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出广义时刻检索（GMR）任务，构建大规模足球视频基准 Soccer-GMR，并设计适配器与 GRPO 奖励两种建模范式。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频时刻检索（VMR）假设每个查询仅对应一个匹配时刻，但真实场景中查询可能对应多个或零个时刻，现有方法无法处理这种不确定性。
analysis.problem: 解决广义时刻检索（GMR）问题，即检索查询对应的完整相关时刻集或预测空集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 GMR 统一设定，构建 Soccer-GMR 基准（含半自动标注流水线），设计统一评估协议，并建立两种基线：轻量级 GMR 适配器（用于判别式 VMR 模型）和 GMR 定制的 GRPO 奖励（用于微调多模态大语言模型）。
contributions: 形式化广义时刻检索（GMR）任务，统一处理多匹配、单匹配和无匹配场景。
构建大规模 Soccer-GMR 基准，通过半自动流水线生成高质量标注。
设计统一评估协议，包含空集拒绝、正查询定位和端到端 GMR 指标。
提出两种建模范式：GMR 适配器和 GMR 定制的 GRPO 奖励，实验显示一致提升并暴露现有方法局限。
analysis.experiments: 在 Soccer-GMR 基准上进行实验，使用多种指标评估，结果显示一致增益并暴露当前方法的关键局限。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 基准仅基于足球视频，领域泛化性未验证。
半自动流水线可能仍存在标注噪声。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出广义时刻检索（GMR）任务，构建大规模足球视频基准 Soccer-GMR，并设计适配器与 GRPO 奖励两种建模范式。

papers.title: SCGNN: Semantic Consistency enhanced Graph Neural Network Guided by Granular-ball Computing
papers.abstract: Capturing semantic consistency among nodes is crucial for effective graph representation learning. Existing approaches typically rely on $k$-nearest neighbors ($k$NN) or other node-level full search algorithms (FSA) to mine semantic relationships via exhaustive pairwise similarity computation, which suffer from high computational complexity and rigid neighbor selection, limiting scalability and introducing noisy connections. In this paper, we propose the Semantic Consistency enhanced Graph Neural Network (SCGNN), a novel plug-and-play framework that leverages granular-ball computing (GBC) to efficiently capture semantic consistency in a scalable manner. Unlike node-level FSA methods, SCGNN models group-level semantic structure by adaptively partitioning nodes into granular balls, significantly reducing computational cost while improving robustness to noise. To effectively utilize the discovered group-level semantic consistency, we design a dual enhancement strategy. Specifically, (1) a structure enhancement module constructs an anchor-based graph structure, where each anchor is a virtual node representing the group-level semantic carried by a granular ball, then injecting group-level semantic information into the graph structure; and (2) a supervision enhancement module performs label consistency checking (LCC) by combining GBC predictions with model-generated pseudo-labels, thereby producing more reliable supervision signals. SCGNN is compatible with various GNN backbones. During the forward propagation of SCGNN, the vanilla graph and the augment graph are jointly encoded, and their predictions are fused; during the backpropagation, the supervision enhancement module provides enhanced supervision signals to guide parameter updates.

analysis.tldr: SCGNN利用粒球计算高效捕获节点语义一致性，通过结构增强和监督增强双策略提升图神经网络性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖kNN或全搜索算法挖掘语义关系，计算复杂度高且邻居选择刚性，限制了可扩展性并引入噪声连接。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且鲁棒地捕获图节点间的语义一致性，同时降低计算开销并提升表示质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SCGNN框架，利用粒球计算自适应划分节点为粒球，建模组级语义结构；设计双增强策略：结构增强模块构建基于锚点的图结构注入组级语义，监督增强模块通过标签一致性检查生成更可靠的监督信号。
contributions: 提出基于粒球计算的语义一致性增强图神经网络框架，降低计算复杂度并提升噪声鲁棒性。
设计结构增强和监督增强双策略，有效利用组级语义信息提升图表示学习性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 粒球划分的粒度选择可能影响性能，需要自适应机制。
双增强策略可能增加模型复杂度，训练时间可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SCGNN利用粒球计算高效捕获节点语义一致性，通过结构增强和监督增强双策略提升图神经网络性能。

papers.title: Global-Local Feature Decoding with Adapter-Guided SAMv2 for Salient Object Detection
papers.abstract: Salient Object Detection (SOD) remains an essential yet underexplored task in the era of large-scale vision models. Although foundation models like SAM exhibit strong generalization, their potential for SOD is not fully realized, and training or fully fine-tuning them is computationally expensive and prone to overfitting under limited data. To overcome these challenges, we introduce GLASSNet, a Global-Local feature decoding framework that uses SAMv2 as a frozen encoder paired with a lightweight, spatially aware convolutional adapter-reducing learnable encoder parameters by over 97%. To enhance saliency quality, GLASSNet employs a dual-decoder architecture: one decoder captures global, long-range semantics with an expanded receptive field, while the other captures fine local details such as edges and textures. Fusing these complementary cues yields saliency maps that combine global coherence with local precision, producing accurate final masks. Extensive experiments on standard SOD and camouflaged object detection benchmarks show that GLASSNet surpasses state-of-the-art methods, demonstrating the power of frozen foundation models combined with targeted adaptation and global-local decoding.

analysis.tldr: 提出GLASSNet，利用冻结的SAMv2编码器与轻量适配器，通过全局-局部双解码器融合实现显著目标检测，参数减少97%以上且性能超越SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模视觉模型（如SAM）在显著目标检测（SOD）中潜力未充分挖掘，且全微调计算成本高、易过拟合，亟需高效适配方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在冻结基础模型的前提下，以极低参数量实现高质量的显著目标检测，同时兼顾全局语义与局部细节。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GLASSNet：冻结SAMv2编码器+轻量空间感知卷积适配器（减少97%可学习参数）；双解码器架构——全局解码器捕获长程语义，局部解码器提取边缘纹理细节，融合生成显著图。
contributions: 提出GLASSNet，首个利用冻结SAMv2与轻量适配器实现SOD的框架，可学习参数减少97%以上。
设计全局-局部双解码器架构，有效融合全局语义与局部细节，提升显著图质量。
在标准SOD和伪装目标检测基准上超越现有方法，验证冻结基础模型+定向适配的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在标准SOD和伪装目标检测基准上进行实验，结果表明GLASSNet超越现有最先进方法。
limitations: 可能依赖SAMv2的预训练质量，对未见过的极端场景泛化性未知。
双解码器融合策略可能增加推理计算量，未在摘要中讨论效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GLASSNet，利用冻结的SAMv2编码器与轻量适配器，通过全局-局部双解码器融合实现显著目标检测，参数减少97%以上且性能超越SOTA。

papers.title: Validation of an AI-based end-to-end model for prostate pathology using long-term archived routine samples
papers.abstract: Artificial intelligence (AI) is becoming a clinical tool for prostate pathology, but generalization across variations in sample preparation and preservation over prolonged time periods remains poorly understood. We evaluated GleasonAI, an end-to-end attention-based multiple instance learning model, on an independent validation cohort comprising 10,366 biopsy cores from 1,028 patients across 14 Swedish regions, using archival diagnostic specimens from the ProMort cohorts collected between 1998-2015. The model achieved an overall quadratic-weighted kappa of 0.86 for core-level ISUP grading, comparable to several experienced pathologists and consistent across geographic regions. Notably, performance remained stable across the 17-year collection period, demonstrating robustness to time-related variation in archival material, a property not consistently observed with foundation model-based approaches, with exploratory analysis demonstrating a significant prognostic gradient across AI-assigned grade groups for prostate cancer-specific mortality. These findings support the generalizability of the AI grading model and demonstrate the potential of pathology archives as a large-scale resource for AI development, validation, and retrospective prognostic research.

analysis.tldr: 基于注意力机制的多实例学习模型GleasonAI在长期存档的前列腺病理样本上实现了稳定的ISUP分级，性能不受样本保存时间影响。
analysis.research_motivation: AI在前列腺病理中逐渐应用，但样本制备和保存的长期变化对模型泛化性的影响尚不明确，需要验证模型在真实世界长期存档样本上的鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 评估AI模型GleasonAI在跨越17年、多中心、大规模存档前列腺活检样本上的分级性能及时间鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型性能在17年收集期内保持稳定，而基于基础模型的方法未观察到这种鲁棒性；AI分配的等级组与前列腺癌特异性死亡率存在显著预后梯度。
analysis.method: 采用端到端注意力多实例学习模型GleasonAI，对活检核心进行ISUP分级。
contributions: 在包含10,366个活检核心的大规模独立验证集上验证了GleasonAI的泛化性，性能与经验丰富的病理学家相当。
首次证明AI分级模型对长期存档样本的时间相关变异具有鲁棒性，并展示了病理档案作为AI开发与验证资源的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在来自14个瑞典地区、1998-2015年收集的10,366个活检核心上评估，核心级ISUP分级的二次加权kappa为0.86，性能跨地区一致，且随时间稳定。
limitations: 仅基于瑞典人群，可能限制在其他人群的泛化性。
未与其他AI模型（如基础模型）进行直接比较，仅提及探索性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于注意力机制的多实例学习模型GleasonAI在长期存档的前列腺病理样本上实现了稳定的ISUP分级，性能不受样本保存时间影响。

papers.title: Dependency Parsing Across the Resource Spectrum: Evaluating Architectures on High and Low-Resource Languages
papers.abstract: Transformer-based models achieve state-of-the-art dependency parsing for high-resource languages, yet their advantage over simpler architectures in low-resource settings remains poorly understood. We evaluate four parsers -- the Biaffine LSTM, Stack-Pointer Network, AfroXLMR-large, and RemBERT -- across ten typologically diverse languages, with a focus on low-resource African languages. We find that the Biaffine LSTM consistently outperforms transformer models in low-resource regimes, with transformers recovering their advantage as training data increases. The crossover falls within a resource range typical of treebanks for under-resourced languages. Morphological complexity (measured via MATTR) emerges as a significant secondary predictor of transformers' relative disadvantage after controlling for corpus size. These results indicate that the Biaffine LSTM may be better suited for syntactic tool development in low-resource regimes until sufficient annotated data is available to leverage the representational capacity of pre-trained transformers.

analysis.tldr: 低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM 在依存句法分析中优于 Transformer，形态复杂度是次要预测因素。
analysis.research_motivation: Transformer 模型在高资源语言上表现优异，但在低资源场景下的优势尚不明确，而低资源语言（尤其是非洲语言）的句法分析工具开发需求迫切。
analysis.problem: 评估不同架构（LSTM vs Transformer）在低资源与高资源语言上的依存句法分析性能差异，并探究影响性能的关键因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Biaffine LSTM 在低资源场景下持续优于 Transformer，Transformer 的优势随数据量增加而恢复；形态复杂度（MATTR）是次要预测因素。
analysis.method: 在十种语言上对比四种解析器（Biaffine LSTM、Stack-Pointer Network、AfroXLMR-large、RemBERT），重点分析低资源非洲语言。
contributions: 系统评估了不同架构在低资源与高资源语言上的依存句法分析性能，发现 Biaffine LSTM 在低资源场景下更优。
揭示了形态复杂度作为 Transformer 相对劣势的次要预测因素。
analysis.experiments: 在十种语言（包括低资源非洲语言）上进行了实验，使用标准树库，并分析了资源量与形态复杂度的影响。
limitations: 仅评估了四种特定架构，可能不涵盖所有相关模型。
形态复杂度度量仅使用 MATTR，可能未完全捕捉形态特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 低资源场景下，Biaffine LSTM 在依存句法分析中优于 Transformer，形态复杂度是次要预测因素。

papers.title: Rethinking the Need for Source Models: Source-Free Domain Adaptation from Scratch Guided by a Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: Source-Free Domain Adaptation (SFDA) adapts source models to target domains without accessing source data, addressing privacy and transmission issues. However, existing methods still initialize from a source pre-trained model and thus are not truly source-free. Recent works have introduced Vision-Language (ViL) models to guide the adaptation process, in these methods, we observe that for the same target domain, different source models yield minimal variation in final results, indicating the source model itself has limited impact. Motivated by this, we propose ViL-Only Domain Adaptation (VODA) , a stricter setting that eliminates all dependencies on source domain, relying solely on a randomly initialized model, a ViL model, and unlabeled target data. We analyze the adaptation dynamics of VODA and introduce Two-Stage Denoised-Region Distillation (TS-DRD) , a two-stage framework that first warms up the model with ViL guidance, then seek a Denoised-Region inherent in both the ViL and adapting model, yielding cleaner supervision for distillation. Experiments on Office-Home, VisDA, and DomainNet-126 show that under VODA, TS-DRD achieves competitive or superior performance to existing SFDA methods that still use source models, demonstrating its effectiveness and the potential of the VODA setting.

analysis.tldr: 提出VODA设置，完全消除源域依赖，仅用ViL模型和未标注目标数据实现域适应，TS-DRD方法在多个基准上达到或超越传统SFDA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有源自由域适应（SFDA）方法仍需源预训练模型初始化，并非真正无源，且ViL引导下源模型影响有限，因此探索完全消除源域依赖的域适应方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖任何源域数据或预训练模型的情况下，仅利用视觉-语言（ViL）模型和未标注目标数据实现有效的域适应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到在ViL引导的SFDA中，同一目标域下不同源模型导致最终结果差异极小，表明源模型本身影响有限。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段去噪区域蒸馏（TS-DRD）：第一阶段用ViL引导预热模型；第二阶段寻找ViL和适应模型共有的去噪区域，提供更干净的蒸馏监督。
contributions: 提出VODA设置，完全消除源域依赖，仅依赖随机初始化模型、ViL模型和未标注目标数据。
提出TS-DRD框架，通过两阶段去噪区域蒸馏实现有效适应。
在Office-Home、VisDA和DomainNet-126上，VODA+TS-DRD达到或超越使用源模型的SFDA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在Office-Home、VisDA和DomainNet-126三个基准上评估，与现有SFDA方法对比，VODA+TS-DRD取得竞争性或更优性能。
limitations: 依赖ViL模型的质量和泛化能力。
两阶段蒸馏可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VODA设置，完全消除源域依赖，仅用ViL模型和未标注目标数据实现域适应，TS-DRD方法在多个基准上达到或超越传统SFDA。

papers.title: Counterfactual Reasoning in Automated Planning
papers.abstract: Automated planning traditionally assumes that all aspects of a planning task (initial state, goals, and available actions) are fully specified in advance, an approach well-suited to domains with fixed rules and deterministic execution. However, real-world planning often requires flexibility, allowing for deviations from the original task parameters in response to unforeseen circumstances or to improve outcomes. This paper surveys existing works on counterfactual reasoning in automated planning, categorizing them by what elements are changed, when the reasoning is triggered, and why and how these changes are made. We conclude by discussing key findings and outlining open research questions to guide future work in this area.

analysis.tldr: 综述反事实推理在自动规划中的应用，按改变元素、触发时机、原因和方式分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统自动规划假设任务参数完全预定义，但现实世界需要灵活应对意外情况或改进结果，反事实推理为此提供可能。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理和分类自动规划中的反事实推理方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对现有反事实推理在自动规划中的工作进行分类综述，分类维度包括改变的元素、推理触发时机、改变的原因和方式。
contributions: 提出了一个分类框架，按改变元素、触发时机、原因和方式对反事实推理方法进行归类。
总结了关键发现并指出了未来研究方向。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或进行实证验证。
分类可能无法覆盖所有边缘情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述反事实推理在自动规划中的应用，按改变元素、触发时机、原因和方式分类。

papers.title: CoRAL: Contact-Rich Adaptive LLM-based Control for Robotic Manipulation
papers.abstract: While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision-Language Models (VLMs) demonstrate remarkable capabilities in high-level reasoning and semantic understanding, applying them directly to contact-rich manipulation remains a challenge due to their lack of explicit physical grounding and inability to perform adaptive control. To bridge this gap, we propose CoRAL (Contact-Rich Adaptive LLM-based control), a modular framework that enables zero-shot planning by decoupling high-level reasoning from low-level control. Unlike black-box policies, CoRAL uses LLMs not as direct controllers, but as cost designers that synthesize context-aware objective functions for a sampling-based motion planner (MPPI). To address the ambiguity of physical parameters in visual data, we introduce a neuro-symbolic adaptation loop: a VLM provides semantic priors for environmental dynamics, such as mass and friction estimates, which are then explicitly refined in real time via online system identification, while the LLM iteratively modulates the cost-function structure to correct strategic errors based on interaction feedback. Furthermore, a retrieval-based memory unit allows the system to reuse successful strategies across recurrent tasks. This hierarchical architecture ensures real-time control stability by decoupling high-level semantic reasoning from reactive execution, effectively bridging the gap between slow LLM inference and dynamic contact requirements. We validate CoRAL on both simulation and real-world hardware across challenging and novel tasks, such as flipping objects against walls by leveraging extrinsic contacts. Experiments demonstrate that CoRAL outperforms state-of-the-art VLA and foundation-model-based planner baselines by boosting success rates over 50% on average in unseen contact-rich scenarios, effectively handling sim-to-real gaps through its adaptive physical understanding.

analysis.tldr: CoRAL通过LLM作为成本设计器与神经符号自适应循环，实现零样本接触丰富操作规划。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM/VLM缺乏物理基础和自适应控制能力，难以直接应用于接触丰富的机器人操作任务。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM/VLM实现接触丰富操作中的零样本规划与自适应控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 模块化框架，LLM作为成本设计器为MPPI生成目标函数，VLM提供物理参数先验，通过在线系统辨识实时修正，LLM根据交互反馈迭代调整成本结构，并引入检索记忆单元复用成功策略。
contributions: 提出CoRAL框架，将LLM作为成本设计器而非直接控制器，实现零样本接触丰富操作规划。
引入神经符号自适应循环，结合VLM语义先验与在线系统辨识，实现物理参数实时修正。
在仿真和真实硬件上验证，平均成功率提升超过50%。
analysis.experiments: 在仿真和真实硬件上，针对翻转物体等接触丰富任务进行验证，与SOTA VLA和基础模型规划器对比，成功率平均提升超50%。
limitations: 依赖LLM/VLM的推理速度，可能影响实时性。
物理参数估计的准确性可能受视觉数据质量影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: CoRAL通过LLM作为成本设计器与神经符号自适应循环，实现零样本接触丰富操作规划。

papers.title: Foundation-Model-Based Agents in Industrial Automation: Purposes, Capabilities, and Open Challenges
papers.abstract: Foundation models, particularly large language models, are increasingly integrated into agent architectures for industrial tasks such as decision support, process monitoring, and engineering automation. Yet evidence on their purposes, capabilities, and limitations remains fragmented across domains. This work examines how mature foundation-model-based agent systems are in industrial contexts, how their functional profile differs from conventional agent systems, and which limitations persist. A systematic literature survey following the PRISMA 2020 guideline is presented, screening 2,341 publications and synthesising a corpus of 88 publications through a structured coding scheme. The results show that reported systems are predominantly at prototype and early validation stages (75.0% at TRL 4-6), with deployment-oriented evidence remaining rare (9.1%). Operational goals are most frequently positioned in user assistance, monitoring, and process optimisation, while conventional production-control purposes such as planning and scheduling are less prominent. Compared with an established baseline for industrial agent systems, the capability profile reveals substantial gains in human interaction (+37%) and dealing with uncertainty (+35%), but a pronounced deficit in negotiation (-39%). The most widely reported limitations concern lack of generalization, hallucination and output instability, data scarcity, and inference latency. A working definition of foundation-model-based industrial agents is also proposed, bridging conventional agent theory, automation-engineering standards, and the foundation-model paradigm.

analysis.tldr: 系统综述了基于基础模型的工业自动化Agent的现状，发现多数处于原型阶段，能力提升集中在人机交互和不确定性处理，但存在泛化不足、幻觉、数据稀缺和延迟等挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础模型（尤其是LLM）越来越多地集成到工业自动化Agent中，但关于其目的、能力和局限性的证据分散且缺乏系统梳理，亟需全面综述以指导未来研究。
analysis.problem: 系统评估基于基础模型的工业Agent系统的成熟度、功能特性（与传统Agent对比）以及持续存在的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：75%的系统处于TRL 4-6（原型/早期验证），仅9.1%有部署证据；能力上人机交互提升37%、不确定性处理提升35%，但协商能力下降39%；主要局限包括泛化不足、幻觉、数据稀缺和推理延迟。
analysis.method: 遵循PRISMA 2020指南的系统文献综述，筛选2341篇出版物，通过结构化编码方案综合88篇文献。
contributions: 首次系统综述基于基础模型的工业Agent，覆盖目的、能力和开放挑战。
提出基础模型工业Agent的工作定义，桥接传统Agent理论、自动化工程标准和基础模型范式。
量化了能力分布（人机交互+37%，协商-39%）和成熟度分布（75% TRL 4-6，9.1%部署）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但综述基于88篇文献的编码分析。
limitations: 综述可能受限于已发表文献的覆盖范围，未包含未发表或工业内部报告。
能力对比基线（传统工业Agent系统）可能不完全代表最新进展。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统综述了基于基础模型的工业自动化Agent的现状，发现多数处于原型阶段，能力提升集中在人机交互和不确定性处理，但存在泛化不足、幻觉、数据稀缺和延迟等挑战。

papers.title: Universal Smoothness via Bernstein Polynomials: A Constructive Approximation Approach for Activation Functions
papers.abstract: The efficacy of deep neural networks is heavily reliant on the design of non-linear activation functions, yet existing approaches often struggle to balance optimization stability with computational efficiency. While piecewise linear functions offer inference speed, they suffer from optimization instability due to non-differentiability at the origin, whereas smooth counterparts typically incur significant computational overhead through their reliance on transcendental operations. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a general smoothing framework based on constructive approximation theory and introduces the Bernstein Linear Unit (BerLU). This novel activation function utilizes Bernstein polynomials to construct a differentiable quadratic transition region that effectively eliminates singularities while maintaining a piecewise linear structure. Theoretical analysis demonstrates that the proposed method guarantees strictly continuous differentiability and a non-expansive Lipschitz constant of one, which ensures stable gradient propagation and prevents the gradient explosion problems common in deep architectures. Comprehensive empirical evaluations across representative Vision Transformer and Convolutional Neural Network architectures confirm that this approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard image classification benchmarks while delivering superior computational and memory efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Bernstein多项式的通用平滑框架，设计出兼具可微性与计算效率的激活函数BerLU。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有激活函数难以同时兼顾优化稳定性与计算效率：分段线性函数在原点不可导导致优化不稳定，而平滑函数依赖超越运算带来高计算开销。
analysis.problem: 设计一种既能保证严格连续可微性、又能维持分段线性结构的高效激活函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于构造性逼近理论，利用Bernstein多项式构造可微的二次过渡区域，消除奇点同时保持分段线性结构。
contributions: 提出基于Bernstein多项式的通用平滑框架，可系统性地将非光滑激活函数转化为光滑版本。
设计BerLU激活函数，具有严格连续可微性和非扩张Lipschitz常数1，防止梯度爆炸。
在Vision Transformer和CNN架构上验证，BerLU在图像分类基准上优于现有方法，且计算和内存效率更高。
analysis.experiments: 在代表性Vision Transformer和卷积神经网络架构上，对标准图像分类基准进行综合评估，结果表明该方法一致优于最先进基线，并具有更优的计算和内存效率。
limitations: 可能仅在图像分类任务上验证，未涉及其他模态或复杂任务。
Bernstein多项式阶数选择可能影响性能，需进一步调参。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Bernstein多项式的通用平滑框架，设计出兼具可微性与计算效率的激活函数BerLU。

papers.title: Representation learning from OCT images
papers.abstract: Optical Coherence Tomography (OCT) has become one of the most used imaging modality in ophthalmology. It provides high-resolution, non-invasive visualization of retinal microarchitecture. The automated analysis of OCT images through representation learning has emerged as a central research frontier. This has mainly been driven by the clinical need to process large acquisition volumes. The objective is to reduce the reliance on expert annotation, and improve diagnostic consistency across devices and populations. This survey provides a comprehensive and structured review of representation learning methods for retinal OCT image analysis. It covers the period from early deep learning approaches to the most recent developments in foundation models and vision-language systems. We organize the literature along a principled taxonomy of learning paradigms, encompassing supervised learning with CNN-based and transformer-based architectures, self-supervised and semi-supervised methods, generative approaches, as well as 3D volumetric modeling, multimodal representation learning, and large-scale pretrained foundation models. For each paradigm, we analyze the core methodological contributions, identify persistent limitations, and trace the connections between successive approaches. We further provide a structured overview of publicly available OCT datasets, discuss evaluation protocol considerations, and present a unified problem formulation that situates each learning paradigm within a common mathematical framework. Building on this analysis, we identify and discuss the most pressing open research directions emerging in the literature. This includes volumetric foundation model pretraining, uncertainty-aware representation learning, federated and privacy-preserving training, fairness and bias mitigation, concept-based interpretability,...

analysis.tldr: 综述了OCT图像表征学习的方法、数据集和开放挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: OCT已成为眼科主要成像方式，但自动化分析依赖专家标注，且跨设备、人群的诊断一致性不足，临床需要处理大量数据，因此表征学习成为研究前沿。
analysis.problem: 如何系统梳理和总结OCT图像表征学习的方法、数据集、评估协议及开放挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出存在标注依赖、跨设备一致性差、隐私和公平性等瓶颈。
analysis.method: 基于学习范式的分类法，涵盖监督学习（CNN/Transformer）、自监督/半监督、生成方法、3D体积建模、多模态表征和基础模型，并统一数学框架。
contributions: 提供了OCT图像表征学习的结构化综述，覆盖从早期深度学习到基础模型和视觉-语言系统。
识别了持续存在的局限性和开放研究方向，如体积基础模型预训练、不确定性感知、联邦学习、公平性等。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 作为综述，未提出新方法或实验验证。
可能未涵盖所有最新工作，尤其是2025年后。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述了OCT图像表征学习的方法、数据集和开放挑战。

papers.title: StableMind: Source-Free Cross-Subject fMRI Decoding with Regularized Adaptation
papers.abstract: Existing cross-subject fMRI decoding methods typically train a model on multiple scanned subjects and then adapt it to a new subject using substantial paired fMRI-image data. However, in realistic scenarios, new-subject fMRI data are often limited due to costly data acquisition, and raw data from previous subjects may be inaccessible, leading existing methods to suffer performance degradation during new-subject adaptation. In this paper, we identify that this degradation stems from two key issues: brain-side instability caused by large subject differences in fMRI responses, and image-side supervision unreliability caused by fine-grained visual details that are not reliably supported by limited fMRI signals. To address these challenges, we propose StableMind, a regularized adaptation framework designed to improve brain-side representation stability and image-side supervision reliability. (1) To stabilize brain representations, StableMind reuses ridge projections from the pretrained model as adaptation priors to constrain limited-data new-subject adaptation, and applies Fourier-based feature-level brain augmentation to improve robustness to individual variability. (2) To improve image supervision reliability, StableMind introduces difficulty-aware image blur for brain-image alignment, reducing the influence of fine-grained visual details that are weakly supported by limited fMRI signals while preserving stable visual structure. Experiments on the Natural Scenes Dataset under a unified 1-hour adaptation protocol demonstrate that StableMind achieves 84.02% image retrieval accuracy and 81.66% brain retrieval accuracy averaged over four subjects, surpassing the state-of-the-art method by 5.71% brain retrieval accuracy with fewer trainable adaptation parameters. Our code is available at https://github.com/lingeringlight/StableMind.

analysis.tldr: 提出StableMind框架，通过正则化适应和图像模糊提升跨被试fMRI解码性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨被试fMRI解码中，新被试数据有限且原始数据不可访问，导致现有方法性能下降。
analysis.problem: 解决源域数据不可用且目标域数据有限时的跨被试fMRI解码性能退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能退化源于脑侧表示不稳定（被试间差异大）和图像侧监督不可靠（有限fMRI信号无法支持细粒度视觉细节）。
analysis.method: StableMind框架：1) 复用预训练模型的岭投影作为适应先验，并采用傅里叶特征级脑增强；2) 引入难度感知图像模糊，减少弱支持的细粒度细节影响。
contributions: 提出StableMind框架，解决源域数据不可用时的跨被试fMRI解码问题
设计岭投影先验和傅里叶脑增强稳定脑表示
引入难度感知图像模糊提升图像监督可靠性
analysis.experiments: 在Natural Scenes Dataset上采用统一1小时适应协议，图像检索准确率84.02%，脑检索准确率81.66%，超过SOTA 5.71%且参数更少。
limitations: 仅验证于单一数据集（Natural Scenes Dataset）
图像模糊可能丢失部分有效视觉信息
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出StableMind框架，通过正则化适应和图像模糊提升跨被试fMRI解码性能。

papers.title: Beyond State Machines: Executing Network Procedures with Agentic Tool-Calling Sequences
papers.abstract: Agentic AI will be an essential enabling technology for designing future mobile communication systems, which could provide flexible and customized services, automate complex network operations, and drive autonomous decision-making across the network. This work studies how Large Language Model (LLM)-based network AI agents can be utilized to execute network procedures expressed as sequences of tool invocations. We investigate four approaches, which differ in how the agent obtains the procedure and in how execution is distributed between the agent and the underlying tools. We evaluated the latency and execution correctness across these approaches using a User Equipment (UE) IP allocation procedure as a case study. Furthermore, we conduct a stress test to examine how many sequential procedural steps an LLM agent can reliably execute before failure. Our results show that approaches relying on iterative agent-side reasoning incur higher latency and are more prone to execution errors, while approaches where the procedure is encapsulated within a single tool, which internally orchestrates the required steps by invoking other tools, reduce latency by limiting repeated reasoning. The stress-test results further show that the model with advanced tool-calling capability maintains reliable execution over longer procedures than the other evaluated models; however, all models exhibit reliability degradation as procedure length increases, revealing clear execution limits in multi-step tool-based workflows. To systematically analyze failures in procedure execution, we introduce a procedure-specific error taxonomy that categorizes deviations in multi-step procedural execution.

analysis.tldr: 研究LLM网络AI代理通过工具调用序列执行网络流程的四种方法，发现封装式工具调用延迟更低、更可靠，并揭示了多步工具工作流的执行极限。
analysis.research_motivation: 未来移动通信系统需要灵活、自动化的网络操作，而基于LLM的AI代理有望实现自主决策，但如何高效可靠地执行多步网络流程尚待研究。
analysis.problem: 如何利用LLM代理通过工具调用序列执行网络流程，并比较不同执行方式的延迟和正确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 迭代式代理推理延迟高且易出错；封装式工具调用通过限制重复推理降低延迟；所有模型在流程长度增加时可靠性下降，存在执行极限。
analysis.method: 提出四种方法：代理获取流程并执行工具调用的不同方式（从完全代理推理到流程封装在单一工具内），并以UE IP分配流程为案例评估。
contributions: 系统比较了四种基于LLM代理执行网络流程的方法，揭示了延迟和正确性的权衡。
引入了一种流程特定的错误分类法，用于分析多步工具执行中的失败模式。
通过压力测试量化了LLM代理在长流程中的可靠性退化。
analysis.experiments: 以UE IP分配流程为案例，测量延迟和执行正确性，并进行压力测试评估多步流程的可靠性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅以单一流程（UE IP分配）为案例，泛化性有限。
未讨论不同LLM模型规模或训练数据的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 研究LLM网络AI代理通过工具调用序列执行网络流程的四种方法，发现封装式工具调用延迟更低、更可靠，并揭示了多步工具工作流的执行极限。

papers.title: Stylistic Attribute Control in Latent Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models have revolutionized image synthesis and editing, but precise control over stylistic attributes remains a challenge, often causing unintended content modifications. We propose an approach for fine-grained parametric control of stylistic attributes in latent diffusion models by learning disentangled editing directions from synthetic datasets. We use guidance composition to close the domain gap between stylistically finetuned and foundation models, preserving the original image semantics while applying stylistic adjustments. To ensure consistent edits, we introduce a training regularization loss and enhance DDIM inversion with optimized null-conditional embeddings for real image editing. We validate our approach by learning from stylistically filtered synthetic datasets varying a range of stylistic attributes, including outlines, local contrast, watercolorization effects, and geometric patterns. Our evaluations demonstrate that compared to current text-based editing techniques, our method offers well-integrated, more precise and continuously adjustable stylistic modifications.

analysis.tldr: 通过解耦编辑方向和引导组合，在潜扩散模型中实现精细且连续可调的风格属性控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在图像合成和编辑中表现出色，但精确控制风格属性（如轮廓、局部对比度等）仍具挑战，现有方法常导致意外的内容修改。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持原始图像语义的前提下，对潜扩散模型中的风格属性进行细粒度、可连续调节的参数化控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前基于文本的编辑技术难以实现精确且连续可调的风格修改，且风格微调模型与基础模型之间存在域差距。
analysis.method: 从合成数据集中学习解耦的编辑方向，利用引导组合（guidance composition）弥合风格微调模型与基础模型之间的域差距，引入训练正则化损失，并通过优化空条件嵌入增强DDIM反演以支持真实图像编辑。
contributions: 提出一种从合成数据集学习解耦编辑方向的方法，实现风格属性的细粒度参数化控制。
引入引导组合策略，在保持原始语义的同时应用风格调整，并设计训练正则化损失和优化的DDIM反演以提升编辑一致性。
analysis.experiments: 在多种风格属性（轮廓、局部对比度、水彩化效果、几何图案）上验证，与当前基于文本的编辑技术相比，该方法提供更精确、连续可调的风格修改。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖合成数据集，可能无法完全覆盖真实世界的风格多样性。
引导组合和反演优化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过解耦编辑方向和引导组合，在潜扩散模型中实现精细且连续可调的风格属性控制。

papers.title: Hyp2Former: Hierarchy-Aware Hyperbolic Embeddings for Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation
papers.abstract: Recognizing unknown objects is crucial for safety-critical applications such as autonomous driving and robotics. Open-Set Panoptic Segmentation (OPS) aims to segment known thing and stuff classes while identifying valid unknown objects as separate instances. Prior OPS approaches largely treat known categories as a flat label set, ignoring the semantic hierarchy that provides valuable structural priors for distinguishing unknown objects from in-distribution classes. In this work, we propose Hyp2Former, an end-to-end framework for OPS that does not require explicit modeling of unknowns during training, and instead learns hierarchical semantic similarities continuously in hyperbolic space. By explicitly encoding hierarchical relationships among known categories, the model learns a structured embedding space that captures multiple levels of semantic abstraction. As a result, unknown objects that cannot be confidently classified as known categories still remain in close proximity to higher-level concepts (e.g., an unknown animal remains closer to "animal" or "object" than to unrelated concepts such as "electronics" or "stuff") and can therefore be reliably detected, even if their fine-grained category was not represented during training. Empirical evaluations across multiple public datasets such as MS COCO, Cityscapes, and Lost&Found demonstrate that Hyp2Former outperforms existing methods on OPS, achieving the best balance between unknown object discovery and in-distribution robustness.

analysis.tldr: Hyp2Former利用双曲空间中的层次语义嵌入，在不显式建模未知类的情况下提升开放集全景分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 开放集全景分割（OPS）需要同时分割已知类别并识别未知物体，现有方法将已知类别视为扁平标签集，忽略了语义层次结构提供的先验信息，导致未知物体检测困难。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显式建模未知类的情况下，利用已知类别的语义层次结构来提升开放集全景分割中未知物体的检测能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Hyp2Former，一种端到端框架，在双曲空间中学习已知类别的层次语义相似性，通过显式编码层次关系构建结构化嵌入空间，使未知物体靠近高层概念（如“动物”）从而被可靠检测。
contributions: 首次将双曲空间层次嵌入引入开放集全景分割任务。
提出无需显式未知类建模的端到端框架，在多个数据集上取得最佳平衡。
analysis.experiments: 在MS COCO、Cityscapes和Lost&Found数据集上评估，Hyp2Former在未知物体发现和分布内鲁棒性之间取得最佳平衡。
limitations: 可能依赖已知类别的层次结构质量。
双曲空间计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Hyp2Former利用双曲空间中的层次语义嵌入，在不显式建模未知类的情况下提升开放集全景分割性能。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Spatial And Zero-Shot Angular Super-Resolution by Spatial-Angular Implicit Representation For Rotating-View SNR-Efficient Diffusion MRI
papers.abstract: Rotating-view thick-slice acquisition is highly SNR-efficient for mesoscale diffusion MRI (dMRI) but requires numerous rotating views to satisfy Nyquist sampling, resulting in long scan time. We propose a self-supervised Spatial-Angular Implicit Neural Representation (SA-INR) that reconstructs high-resolution dMRI from a single view per diffusion direction, representing a massive acceleration. Our model, an MLP conditioned on a b=0 structural prior and the b-direction via FiLM, is trained end-to-end on the anisotropic input. The framework not only accurately reconstructs the trained b-directions (spatial SR) but also learns a continuous q-space representation, enabling high-fidelity "zero-shot" synthesis of unseen b-directions (angular SR). On simulated data, our method achieved high fidelity for both trained (34.82 dB) and unseen (33.08 dB) directions. Most importantly, the synthesized angular data also improved the quantitative accuracy of downstream DTI model fitting. Our SA-INR framework breaks the classical sampling limits, paving the way for fast, quantitative high-resolution dMRI.

analysis.tldr: 提出自监督空间-角度隐式神经表示，从单视角扩散方向重建高分辨率dMRI，实现空间和零样本角度超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 旋转视图厚层采集在介观扩散MRI中具有高SNR效率，但需要大量旋转视图满足奈奎斯特采样，导致扫描时间长。
analysis.problem: 如何从单视角每扩散方向重建高分辨率dMRI，同时实现空间和角度超分辨率，以加速扫描。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SA-INR，一种以b=0结构先验和扩散方向为条件的MLP，通过FiLM调制，在单视角各向异性输入上端到端训练，学习连续q空间表示。
contributions: 提出自监督空间-角度隐式神经表示，实现从单视角重建高分辨率dMRI。
实现零样本角度超分辨率，合成未见扩散方向的高保真数据。
在模拟数据上验证了空间和角度超分辨率的高保真度，并改善下游DTI模型拟合的定量精度。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟数据上，训练方向PSNR为34.82 dB，未见方向PSNR为33.08 dB，且合成角度数据改善了DTI模型拟合的定量精度。
limitations: 仅在模拟数据上验证，真实数据效果未知。
零样本角度超分辨率可能对噪声敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自监督空间-角度隐式神经表示，从单视角扩散方向重建高分辨率dMRI，实现空间和零样本角度超分辨率。

papers.title: On Training Large Language Models for Long-Horizon Tasks: An Empirical Study of Horizon Length
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have shown promise as interactive agents that solve tasks through extended sequences of environment interactions. While prior work has primarily focused on system-level optimizations or algorithmic improvements, the role of task horizon length in shaping training dynamics remains poorly understood. In this work, we present a systematic empirical study that examines horizon length through controlled task constructions. Specifically, we construct controlled tasks in which agents face identical decision rules and reasoning structures, but differ only in the length of action sequences required for successful completion. Our results reveal that increasing horizon length alone constitutes a training bottleneck, inducing severe training instability driven by exploration difficulties and credit assignment challenges. We demonstrate that horizon reduction is a key principle to address this limitation, stabilizing training and achieving better performance in long-horizon tasks. Moreover, we find that horizon reduction is related to stronger generalization across horizon lengths: models trained under reduced horizons generalize more effectively to longer-horizon variants at inference time, a phenomenon we refer to as horizon generalization.

analysis.tldr: 任务地平线长度是LLM训练瓶颈，缩短地平线可提升训练稳定性与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注系统优化或算法改进，但任务地平线长度对LLM训练动态的影响尚不明确，理解这一因素有助于设计更高效的训练策略。
analysis.problem: 探究任务地平线长度如何影响LLM在长程任务中的训练稳定性与泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 增加地平线长度会引发训练不稳定，主要源于探索困难和信用分配挑战；缩短地平线可稳定训练并提升长程任务性能，且模型在缩短地平线训练后能泛化到更长地平线任务。
analysis.method: 通过控制任务构造，保持决策规则和推理结构相同，仅改变动作序列长度，系统研究地平线长度的影响。
contributions: 揭示地平线长度本身是LLM长程任务训练的关键瓶颈，导致训练不稳定。
提出地平线缩减原则，并发现其能带来地平线泛化现象。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 实验基于控制任务，可能无法完全反映真实复杂场景。
未探讨地平线缩减的最佳策略或自动缩减方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 任务地平线长度是LLM训练瓶颈，缩短地平线可提升训练稳定性与泛化能力。

papers.title: Automated In-the-Wild Data Collection for Continual AI Generated Image Detection
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative Artificial Intelligence (AI) has introduced significant challenges for reliable AI-generated image detection. Existing detectors often suffer from performance degradation under distribution shifts and when encountering newly emerging generative models. In this work, we propose a data-centric continual adaptation framework for updating detectors in evolving environments. We show that both in-the-wild data and generator-driven data are essential for adapting detectors. We introduce an automated, weakly supervised pipeline for constructing in-the-wild datasets through fact-check article retrieval. Additionally, we demonstrate that incorporating even a small amount of generator-driven data during training enables effective adaptation to newly emerging models, while combining it with in-the-wild data within a continual learning framework enables robust adaptation and mitigates catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments on two state-of-the-art detectors show significant improvements of +9.14% and +8% in average accuracy, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出数据为中心的持续适应框架，通过自动化野外数据收集和生成器数据结合，提升AI生成图像检测器对新模型的适应能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI生成图像检测器在分布偏移和新生成模型出现时性能下降，需要持续更新以适应演化环境。
analysis.problem: 如何自动化收集野外数据并有效结合生成器数据，使检测器在持续学习框架下适应新模型并缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 野外数据和生成器数据对检测器适应都至关重要；少量生成器数据即可有效适应新模型，结合两者可缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.method: 提出数据为中心的持续适应框架，包括自动化弱监督管道（通过事实核查文章检索构建野外数据集）和结合生成器数据的持续学习训练。
contributions: 提出自动化弱监督管道用于构建野外AI生成图像数据集
证明生成器数据与野外数据结合在持续学习中的有效性，显著提升检测器对新模型的适应能力
analysis.experiments: 在两个最先进的检测器上进行实验，平均准确率分别提升9.14%和8%。
limitations: 依赖事实核查文章检索，可能覆盖不全
生成器数据量虽小但需人工或自动获取，可能引入偏差
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出数据为中心的持续适应框架，通过自动化野外数据收集和生成器数据结合，提升AI生成图像检测器对新模型的适应能力。

papers.title: Low-Latency Embedded Driver Monitoring System with a Multi-Task Neural Network
papers.abstract: Road traffic accidents remain a significant global concern, with the majority attributed to human factors such as driver distraction and fatigue. This study proposes a camera-based approach to derive useful indicators to assess driver attentiveness and alertness. The proposed pipeline jointly satisfies the stringent real-time requirements imposed by the critical application and minimizes the computational requirements to allow for deployment on a tight computational budget. To this end, we develop a lightweight multi-task neural network that predicts multiple indicators for the face region in a single forward pass. The developed model is integrated into a complete execution workflow to produce a real-time estimate of attentiveness, fatigue, and engagement in distracting activities.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级多任务神经网络，在嵌入式设备上实现低延迟驾驶员监控。
analysis.research_motivation: 道路交通事故主要由驾驶员分心和疲劳等人为因素导致，现有方法难以在低计算资源下满足实时性要求。
analysis.problem: 如何在计算资源受限的嵌入式平台上，同时实现驾驶员注意力、疲劳和分心活动的实时检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计轻量级多任务神经网络，单次前向传播同时预测面部区域的多个指标，并集成到完整执行流程中。
contributions: 提出一种低延迟、低计算需求的嵌入式驾驶员监控系统。
开发轻量级多任务网络，实现单次推理预测多个注意力相关指标。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在真实驾驶场景中充分验证。
多任务学习可能面临任务间冲突。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级多任务神经网络，在嵌入式设备上实现低延迟驾驶员监控。

papers.title: TemPose-TF-ASF: Two-Stage Bidirectional Stroke Context Fusion for Badminton Stroke Classification
papers.abstract: Accurate badminton stroke prediction is crucial for fine-grained sports analysis and tactical decision support. However, existing methods struggle to model rich temporal context. This paper introduces TemPose-TF-ASF (Adjacent-Stroke Fusion), a context-aware extension of TemPose. It enhances stroke recognition by incorporating stroke-type information from both preceding and subsequent strokes. A two-stage training and inference strategy is adopted. Preliminary predictions from the baseline model are reused as estimated temporal context. These predictions guide the joint optimization of the ASF module and the classifier. By explicitly modeling bidirectional temporal stroke dependencies, the proposed method can be seamlessly integrated into existing state-of-the-art models. Experiments on a large-scale badminton match dataset show consistent improvements over the baseline and its variants in terms of Accuracy and Macro-F1. Moreover, integrating ASF into other advanced methods yields notable performance gains. These results demonstrate strong transferability and generalization capability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种双向相邻击球上下文融合方法，提升羽毛球击球分类的时序建模能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有羽毛球击球预测方法难以建模丰富的时序上下文，影响细粒度运动分析和战术决策支持。
analysis.problem: 如何利用前后击球的类型信息增强当前击球的识别准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TemPose-TF-ASF，采用两阶段训练推理策略：先由基线模型生成初步预测作为估计的时序上下文，再联合优化相邻击球融合模块和分类器，显式建模双向时序依赖。
contributions: 提出一种可无缝集成到现有SOTA模型中的双向相邻击球上下文融合方法。
在大型羽毛球比赛数据集上验证了该方法在准确率和Macro-F1上的持续提升，并展示了良好的迁移性和泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在大规模羽毛球比赛数据集上进行实验，与基线及其变体对比，准确率和Macro-F1均有提升；集成到其他先进方法中也获得显著性能增益。
limitations: 可能依赖初步预测的质量，若基线预测不准则融合效果受限。
仅针对羽毛球击球分类，未验证在其他运动或序列分类任务上的有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种双向相邻击球上下文融合方法，提升羽毛球击球分类的时序建模能力。

papers.title: Recurrent Deep Reinforcement Learning for Chemotherapy Control under Partial Observability
papers.abstract: Chemotherapy dose optimization can be formulated as a dynamic treatment regime, requiring sequential decisions under uncertainty that must balance tumor suppression against toxicity. However, most reinforcement learning approaches assume full observability of the patient state, a condition rarely met in clinical practice. We investigate whether memory-augmented policies can improve chemotherapy control under partial observability. To this end, we employ a recurrent TD3-based approach with separate LSTM actor-critic networks and evaluate it on the AhnChemoEnv benchmark from DTR-Bench, considering both off-policy and on-policy recurrent architectures against feed-forward TD3 and Soft Actor-Critic. Pharmacokinetic and pharmacodynamic variability are held fixed to isolate hidden-state uncertainty and observation noise and to avoid confounding effects from inter-patient variability. Across ten random seeds, recurrence yields modest benefit under full observability but substantially stronger and more stable performance under partial observability, with more consistent tumor suppression and improved normal-cell preservation. These findings indicate that memory-based policies are particularly beneficial when clinically relevant state information is incomplete or noisy.

analysis.tldr: 使用循环TD3算法在部分可观测条件下优化化疗剂量控制，显著优于前馈方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 化疗剂量优化需在不确定性下平衡肿瘤抑制与毒性，但临床实践中患者状态常部分可观测，现有强化学习方法大多假设完全可观测，不切实际。
analysis.problem: 如何在部分可观测条件下有效进行化疗剂量控制，提升肿瘤抑制效果并保护正常细胞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在完全可观测下循环策略收益有限，但在部分可观测下循环策略显著提升性能，肿瘤抑制更一致，正常细胞保存更好。
analysis.method: 采用基于循环TD3的方法，使用独立的LSTM演员-评论家网络，在AhnChemoEnv基准上评估，对比前馈TD3和SAC。
contributions: 首次在化疗控制中系统评估循环策略在部分可观测下的优势
通过固定药代动力学变异性隔离隐藏状态不确定性和观测噪声的影响
analysis.experiments: 在AhnChemoEnv基准上使用10个随机种子进行实验，比较离策略和在线策略循环架构与前馈方法。
limitations: 仅在一个基准环境上评估，泛化性未知
未考虑患者间变异性，可能低估实际临床复杂性
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 使用循环TD3算法在部分可观测条件下优化化疗剂量控制，显著优于前馈方法。

papers.title: Double Rectified Linear Unit-based Modular Semantics for Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Framework
papers.abstract: Quantitative Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (QBAFs) provide an alternative approach to computing argument acceptability in Bipolar Argumentation Frameworks (BAFs). Each argument is assigned an initial strength, which is then updated to a final strength by considering the influence of both its attackers and supporters. Over the years, several semantics have been proposed to compute argument acceptability in QBAFs, yet they often yield divergent or counterintuitive results, even for simple acyclic cases. We introduce novel gradual semantics for QBAFs that address these limitations, producing results that align more closely with intuitive expectations, while satisfying established rationality postulates from the literature. Furthermore, we study its convergence behavior, proving that it converges not only for acyclic QBAFs but also for broader classes of cyclic frameworks.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于双修正线性单元的模块化语义，用于定量双极论证框架中的论证可接受性计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有QBAF语义在简单无环案例中常产生发散或反直觉的结果，需要更符合直觉且满足理性公设的语义。
analysis.problem: 解决QBAF中论证可接受性计算语义结果不一致、反直觉的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有语义即使对于简单无环案例也常产生发散或反直觉的结果。
analysis.method: 提出基于双修正线性单元（Double ReLU）的模块化语义，通过模块化组合攻击者和支持者的影响来更新论证强度。
contributions: 提出一种新的QBAF语义，结果更符合直觉且满足已有理性公设。
证明该语义在无环及更广类别的循环框架中均收敛。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的QBAF结构。
未讨论实际应用中的计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于双修正线性单元的模块化语义，用于定量双极论证框架中的论证可接受性计算。

papers.title: Advanced Tumor Segmentation in PET/CT Imaging: A Training Strategy Study with nnU-Net for AutoPET III
papers.abstract: Tumor segmentation in whole-body PET/CT imaging is crucial for precise disease evaluation and treatment planning. However, it remains challenging due to variability in lesion size, contrast, and anatomical distribution. Relying on manual segmentation makes the process time-consuming and prone to intra- and inter-observer variability. This work presents a whole-body tumor segmentation method developed for the AutoPET III challenge, where the goal is to build models that generalize across tracers and multi-center data. We employ the nnU-Net framework with a ResNet-based encoder as our baseline and systematically investigate the impact of training strategies, including intensity normalization, batch dice optimization, and data augmentation using CraveMix. Our experiments show that these strategies significantly influence model performance, particularly in reducing false positives and improving robustness to lesion variability. The best-performing configuration achieves a Dice score of up to 0.80 on the preliminary test phase, and our method ranked third in the AutoPET III challenge. The code is publicly available here.

analysis.tldr: 基于nnU-Net框架，通过系统研究训练策略（强度归一化、批量Dice优化、CraveMix数据增强）提升PET/CT肿瘤分割性能，在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名。
analysis.research_motivation: 全身PET/CT肿瘤分割对精准诊疗至关重要，但病灶大小、对比度和解剖分布差异大，手动分割耗时且存在观察者间变异，现有方法泛化性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何通过训练策略优化提升nnU-Net在跨示踪剂、多中心PET/CT数据上的肿瘤分割性能，特别是减少假阳性并增强对病灶变异性的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出强度归一化、批量Dice优化和CraveMix数据增强等训练策略显著影响模型性能，尤其在减少假阳性和提升鲁棒性方面。
analysis.method: 采用基于ResNet编码器的nnU-Net框架，系统研究强度归一化、批量Dice优化和CraveMix数据增强三种训练策略的影响。
contributions: 系统评估了多种训练策略对PET/CT肿瘤分割的影响，并确定了最佳配置。
在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名，Dice分数达0.80，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在AutoPET III挑战赛的初步测试阶段进行实验，最佳配置Dice分数达0.80，排名第三。摘要未提供详细实验设置。
limitations: 仅基于nnU-Net框架，未探索其他架构或更复杂的模型。
Dice分数0.80仍有提升空间，可能对极小或低对比度病灶分割效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于nnU-Net框架，通过系统研究训练策略（强度归一化、批量Dice优化、CraveMix数据增强）提升PET/CT肿瘤分割性能，在AutoPET III挑战赛中获得第三名。

papers.title: Strategy-Aware Optimization Modeling with Reasoning LLMs
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate syntactically valid optimization programs, yet often struggle to reliably choose an effective modeling strategy, leading to incorrect formulations and inefficient solver behavior. We propose SAGE, a strategy-aware framework that makes Modeling Strategy explicit in both data construction and post-training.
