SAGE builds a solver-verified multi-strategy dataset and trains a student model with supervised fine-tuning followed by Segment-Weighted GRPO using a composite reward over format compliance, correctness, and solver efficiency. Across eight benchmarks spanning synthetic and real-world settings, SAGE improves average pass@1 from 72.7 to 80.3 over the strongest open-source baseline. With multiple generations, SAGE discovers more distinct correct formulations and improves component-level diversity at pass@16 by 19-29%. At the largest scale, SAGE produces more compact constraint systems with 14.2% fewer constraints than the baseline, consistent with solver-efficient modeling. Overall, these results show that making Modeling Strategy explicit improves automated optimization modeling. Code is available at https://github.com/rachhhhing/SAGE.

analysis.tldr: SAGE通过显式建模策略和分段加权GRPO训练，显著提升了LLM在优化建模任务中的正确性和求解效率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM能生成语法正确的优化程序，但常因建模策略选择不当导致公式错误和求解器效率低下，亟需提升其策略感知能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在优化建模中可靠地选择有效策略，生成正确且求解器高效的公式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建求解器验证的多策略数据集，通过监督微调后使用分段加权GRPO（结合格式合规、正确性和求解效率的复合奖励）训练学生模型。
contributions: 提出SAGE框架，显式建模策略并融入数据构建和后训练。
在8个基准上平均pass@1从72.7提升至80.3，pass@16多样性提升19-29%，约束数量减少14.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在8个合成和真实世界基准上评估，对比最强开源基线，报告了pass@1、pass@16多样性和约束数量等指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定求解器验证，泛化性需进一步验证。
分段加权GRPO的权重设置可能需针对不同任务调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SAGE通过显式建模策略和分段加权GRPO训练，显著提升了LLM在优化建模任务中的正确性和求解效率。

papers.title: Improving Model Safety by Targeted Error Correction
papers.abstract: The widespread adoption of machine learning in critical applications demands techniques to mitigate high-consequence errors. Our method utilizes a dual-classifier GBDT pipeline to distinguish routine human-like errors from high-risk non-human misclassifications. Evaluated across three domains, animal breed classification, skin lesion diagnosis (ISIC 2018), and prostate histopathology (SICAPv2), our framework demonstrates robust safety improvements. To address real-world deployment concerns, our results confirm the pipeline introduces negligible inference latency (1.60% overhead for the animal dataset, 1.84% for ISIC, and 1.70% for SICAPv2) while outperforming traditional Maximum Class Probability (MCP) baselines in correction precision. Our conservative correction strategy successfully reduced dangerous non-human errors by 34.1% in ISIC and 12.57% in SICAPv2, improving super-class diagnostic safety to 90.41% and 92.13% respectively. This proves that safety-critical reliability can be substantially enhanced post-hoc without expensive model retraining. keywords: Error Analysis, Post-hoc Correction, Trustworthy AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于双分类器GBDT管道的后验错误纠正方法，在不重训练模型的情况下显著提升安全关键应用中的模型安全性。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习在关键应用中的广泛采用需要技术来减轻高后果错误，现有方法如最大类别概率（MCP）基线在纠正精度上不足，且模型重训练成本高昂。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行昂贵模型重训练的情况下，后验地识别并纠正高风险的非人类错误，提升模型在安全关键领域的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用双分类器GBDT管道，区分常规类人错误与高风险非人类错误，并采用保守纠正策略进行后验错误纠正。
contributions: 提出一种轻量级后验错误纠正框架，仅引入极小的推理延迟（1.60%-1.84%）。
在三个领域（动物品种分类、皮肤病变诊断、前列腺组织病理学）上验证了框架的有效性，显著降低了危险非人类错误（ISIC降低34.1%，SICAPv2降低12.57%）。
analysis.experiments: 在动物品种分类、ISIC 2018皮肤病变诊断和SICAPv2前列腺组织病理学三个数据集上评估，与MCP基线对比，报告了纠正精度、错误减少率和推理延迟。
limitations: 方法依赖于GBDT管道，可能对数据分布变化敏感。
仅针对非人类错误，未覆盖所有错误类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于双分类器GBDT管道的后验错误纠正方法，在不重训练模型的情况下显著提升安全关键应用中的模型安全性。

papers.title: Orchestrating Spatial Semantics via a Zone-Graph Paradigm for Intricate Indoor Scene Generation
papers.abstract: Autonomous 3D indoor scene synthesis breaks down in non-convex rooms with tightly coupled spatial constraints. Data-driven generators lack topological priors for long-horizon planning, while iterative agents fragment semantics and become geometrically brittle. We present ZoneMaestro, a unified framework that shifts the paradigm from object-centric synthesis to Zone-Graph Orchestration. By internalizing a novel zone-based logic, ZoneMaestro translates high-level semantic intent into functional zones and topological constraints, enabling robust adaptation to diverse architectural forms. To support this, we construct Zone-Scene-10K, a large-scale dataset enriched with explicit Zone-Graph annotations. We further introduce an Alternating Alignment Strategy that cycles between reasoning internalization and Zone-Aware Group Relative Policy Optimization (Z-GRPO), effectively reconciling the tension between semantic richness and geometric validity without relying on external physics engines. To rigorously evaluate spatial intelligence beyond convex primitives, we formally define the task of Intricate Spatial Orchestration and release SCALE, a stress-test benchmark for irregular indoor scenarios with complex, dense spatial relations. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ZoneMaestro resolves the density-safety dichotomy, significantly outperforming state-of-the-art baselines in both structural coherence and intent adherence.

analysis.tldr: 提出ZoneMaestro框架，通过区域图范式实现复杂非凸室内场景的语义可控生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D室内场景合成方法在非凸房间中因空间约束紧密而失效，数据驱动方法缺乏拓扑先验，迭代代理则导致语义碎片化和几何脆弱性。
analysis.problem: 如何在高语义丰富度与几何有效性之间取得平衡，实现复杂非凸室内场景的鲁棒生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 非凸房间中空间约束紧密，现有方法难以处理长程规划；迭代代理方法会破坏语义一致性并产生几何缺陷。
analysis.method: 提出ZoneMaestro框架，核心包括：1) 区域图范式，将语义意图转化为功能区域和拓扑约束；2) 构建Zone-Scene-10K数据集，包含区域图标注；3) 交替对齐策略，循环进行推理内化和区域感知组相对策略优化（Z-GRPO），无需外部物理引擎。
contributions: 提出ZoneMaestro框架，将室内场景生成从以物体为中心转向区域图编排，提升对非凸空间的适应性。
构建Zone-Scene-10K数据集，提供显式区域图标注。
定义复杂空间编排任务并发布SCALE基准，用于评估不规则室内场景的空间智能。
analysis.experiments: 在SCALE基准上评估，ZoneMaestro在结构一致性和意图遵循方面显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖区域图标注的质量和可用性。
未提及对极端复杂场景（如大量重叠区域）的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ZoneMaestro框架，通过区域图范式实现复杂非凸室内场景的语义可控生成。

papers.title: WATCH: Wide-Area Archaeological Site Tracking for Change Detection
papers.abstract: Monitoring archaeological sites at scale is vital for protecting cultural heritage, yet pinpointing when disturbances occur remains difficult because visual cues are subtle and ground-truth data are sparse. We introduce WATCH, a framework for month-level change-event localization over PlanetScope satellite mosaics (2017-2024, 4.7 m/px) that supports three complementary scoring approaches: (i) Temporal Embedding Distance (TED), a training-free method that scores month-to-month deviations from a local temporal reference; (ii) Self-Supervised Change Detection (SSCD), an ensemble of reconstruction, forecasting, and latent-novelty signals; and (iii) a Weakly Supervised (WS) temporal localization model trained with sparse event-month labels. We benchmark WATCH on 1,943 archaeological sites in Afghanistan using embeddings from six foundation models (CLIP, GeoRSCLIP, SatMAE, Prithvi-EO-2.0, DINOv3, and Satlas-Pretrain) alongside a handcrafted spectral and texture baseline, and assess cross-regional generalization on sites in Syria, Turkey, Pakistan, and Egypt. The unsupervised approaches (TED, SSCD) consistently outperform the weakly supervised alternative. TED with SatMAE achieves the highest exact-month recall (55% at m=0), while TED with GeoRSCLIP, CLIP, or Satlas-Pretrain reaches 92.5% within a three-month tolerance (m=3). Handcrafted features remain competitive for exact-month detection under weak supervision. Our directional margin analysis reveals systematic temporal biases: SSCD paired with GeoRSCLIP or Prithvi-EO-2.0 exhibits the strongest early-warning profile, detecting anomalies before the recorded event, while TED favors confirmation-oriented detection after a change has materialized. These results show that satellite imagery combined with foundation-model embeddings enables scalable, decision-relevant heritage monitoring. Code: https://github.com/microsoft/WATCH

analysis.tldr: WATCH 利用卫星影像和基础模型嵌入实现大规模考古遗址月度变化检测，无监督方法优于弱监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模监测考古遗址对保护文化遗产至关重要，但视觉线索细微、真实数据稀疏，难以精确定位干扰发生时间。
analysis.problem: 实现月度级别的考古遗址变化事件定位，克服卫星影像中细微变化和稀疏标注的挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 无监督方法（TED、SSCD）一致优于弱监督方法；不同嵌入模型和评分方法表现出系统性的时间偏差：SSCD 倾向于提前检测，TED 倾向于事后确认。
analysis.method: 提出 WATCH 框架，包含三种评分方法：无训练的时间嵌入距离（TED）、自监督变化检测（SSCD）和弱监督时间定位（WS），结合六种基础模型嵌入和手工特征。
contributions: 提出 WATCH 框架，支持三种互补的月度变化检测方法。
在阿富汗 1,943 个考古遗址上系统评估六种基础模型嵌入，并验证跨区域泛化能力。
揭示无监督方法优于弱监督方法，以及不同方法的时间偏差特性。
analysis.experiments: 在阿富汗 1,943 个考古遗址上使用六种基础模型嵌入和手工特征进行基准测试，并在叙利亚、土耳其、巴基斯坦和埃及评估跨区域泛化。
limitations: 弱监督方法性能有限，可能受限于稀疏标注。
跨区域泛化评估范围有限，未涵盖所有地理区域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WATCH 利用卫星影像和基础模型嵌入实现大规模考古遗址月度变化检测，无监督方法优于弱监督方法。

papers.title: Set-Based Training of Neural Barrier Certificates for Safety Verification of Dynamical Systems
papers.abstract: Barrier certificates are scalar functions over the state space of dynamical systems that separate all unsafe states from all reachable states. The existence of a barrier certificate formally verifies the safety of the dynamical system. Recent approaches synthesize barrier certificates by iteratively training a neural network. In each iteration, the candidate is formally verified - if successful, the barrier certificate is found. Instead, we propose a set-based training approach that tightly integrates verification into training via a set-based loss function that soundly encodes all barrier certificate properties. A loss of zero formally proves the validity of the barrier certificate, collapsing the iterative training and verification into a single training procedure. Our experiments demonstrate that our set-based training approach scales well with the system dimension and naturally handles complex nonlinear dynamics.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于集合的损失函数，将形式化验证融入神经网络势垒证书训练，实现单步训练即完成安全验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法通过迭代训练神经网络势垒证书，每次迭代需进行形式化验证，过程繁琐且效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何将势垒证书的验证过程无缝集成到神经网络训练中，避免迭代验证开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计基于集合的损失函数，该函数严格编码势垒证书的所有属性，当损失为零时即证明证书有效性，从而将迭代训练与验证合并为单一训练过程。
contributions: 提出一种基于集合的损失函数，将形式化验证嵌入训练过程。
实验表明该方法随系统维度扩展性好，能处理复杂非线性动力学。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于连续时间动力系统。
损失函数为零的严格性可能带来训练困难。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于集合的损失函数，将形式化验证融入神经网络势垒证书训练，实现单步训练即完成安全验证。

papers.title: A Semantic Autonomy Framework for VLM-Integrated Indoor Mobile Robots: Hybrid Deterministic Reasoning and Cross-Robot Adaptive Memory
papers.abstract: Autonomous indoor mobile robots can navigate reliably to metric coordinates using established frameworks such as ROS 2 Navigation 2, yet they lack the ability to interpret natural language instructions that express intent rather than positions. Vision-Language Models offer the semantic reasoning required to bridge this gap, but their inference latency (2-9 seconds per decision on consumer hardware) and session-by-session amnesia limit practical deployment. This paper presents the Semantic Autonomy Stack, a six-layer reference framework for semantically autonomous indoor navigation, and validates a complete instance featuring hybrid deterministic-VLM reasoning and cross-robot adaptive memory on physical robots with off-the-shelf edge hardware. A seven-step parametric resolver handles 88% of instructions in under 0.1 milliseconds without invoking a language model, camera, or GPU; only genuinely ambiguous instructions escalate to VLM reasoning. A five-category semantic memory framework with explicit scope taxonomy (global environment knowledge, per-operator preferences, per-robot capabilities) enables cross-session learning and cross-robot knowledge transfer: preferences learned through VLM interactions on one robot are promoted to deterministic resolution and transferred to a second robot via a shared compiled digest, achieving a measured latency reduction of 103,000-fold. Experimental validation on two custom-built differential-drive robots across 82 scenario-level decisions and three sessions demonstrates 100% semantic transfer accuracy (33/33, 95% CI [0.894, 1.000]), 100% semantic resolution accuracy, and concurrent multi-robot operation feasibility - all on Raspberry Pi 5 platforms with no onboard GPU, requiring zero training data.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义自主栈，通过混合确定性与VLM推理和跨机器人自适应记忆，实现室内移动机器人自然语言导航，延迟降低10万倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有室内移动机器人能可靠导航到度量坐标，但无法理解表达意图的自然语言指令；VLM提供语义推理能力，但推理延迟高（2-9秒/决策）且会话间遗忘，限制实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何实现低延迟、跨会话、跨机器人的语义自主室内导航，使机器人能理解自然语言指令并高效执行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM推理延迟高（2-9秒/决策）且存在会话间遗忘；大多数指令（88%）可通过确定性解析快速处理，仅少数需要VLM。
analysis.method: 提出六层语义自主栈，包含混合确定性-VLM推理（七步参数解析器处理88%指令，仅模糊指令调用VLM）和五类语义记忆框架（全局环境知识、操作员偏好、机器人能力），支持跨会话学习和跨机器人知识迁移。
contributions: 提出语义自主栈，一种用于语义自主室内导航的六层参考框架。
实现混合确定性-VLM推理，七步参数解析器在0.1毫秒内处理88%指令，无需调用VLM。
提出五类语义记忆框架，实现跨会话学习和跨机器人知识迁移，延迟降低103,000倍。
在Raspberry Pi 5平台上验证，无需GPU和训练数据，实现100%语义转移准确率和100%语义解析准确率。
analysis.experiments: 在两个自制差速驱动机器人上，跨82个场景级决策和三个会话进行实验，语义转移准确率100%（33/33，95% CI [0.894, 1.000]），语义解析准确率100%，支持并发多机器人操作。
limitations: 实验仅在两个自制机器人上进行，规模有限。
未讨论复杂动态环境或极端情况下的性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义自主栈，通过混合确定性与VLM推理和跨机器人自适应记忆，实现室内移动机器人自然语言导航，延迟降低10万倍。

papers.title: MooD: An Efficient VA-Driven Affective Image Editing Framework via Fine-Grained Semantic Control
papers.abstract: Affective image editing (AIE) aims to edit visual content to evoke target emotions. However, existing methods often overlook inference efficiency and predominantly depend on discrete emotion representations, which to some extent limits their practical applicability and makes it challenging to capture complex and subtle human emotions. To tackle these gaps, we propose MooD, the first framework that directly leverages continuous Valence-Arousal (VA) values for fine-grained and efficient AIE. Specifically, we first introduce a VA-Aware retrieval strategy to bridge vague affective values and concrete visual semantics. Building upon this, MooD integrates visual transfer and semantic guidance to achieve controllable AIE. Furthermore, we construct AffectSet, a VA-annotated dataset to support model optimization and evaluation. Extensive qualitative and quantitative experimental results demonstrate that our MooD achieves superior performance in both affective controllability and visual fidelity while maintaining high efficiency. A series of ablation studies further reveal the crucial factors of our design. Our code and data will be made publicly open soon.

analysis.tldr: 提出MooD框架，利用连续VA值实现高效、细粒度的情感图像编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感图像编辑方法推理效率低且依赖离散情感表示，难以捕捉复杂微妙的人类情感，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用连续VA值实现高效、细粒度的情感图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MooD框架，包含VA-Aware检索策略连接模糊情感值与具体视觉语义，并集成视觉迁移和语义引导实现可控编辑。
contributions: 首个直接利用连续VA值进行细粒度情感图像编辑的框架MooD
构建VA标注数据集AffectSet支持模型优化与评估
analysis.experiments: 在情感可控性和视觉保真度上优于现有方法，消融实验揭示了关键设计因素。
limitations: 可能依赖VA标注数据的质量
泛化到其他情感维度（如支配度）的能力未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MooD框架，利用连续VA值实现高效、细粒度的情感图像编辑。

papers.title: Benchmarking Retrieval Strategies for Biomedical Retrieval-Augmented Generation: A Controlled Empirical Study
papers.abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) offers a well-established path to grounding large language model (LLM) outputs in external knowledge, yet the question of which retrieval strategy works best in a high-stakes domain such as biomedicine has not received the controlled, multi-metric treatment it deserves. This paper presents a systematic empirical comparison of five retrieval strategies -- Dense Vector Search, Hybrid BM25 + Dense retrieval, Cross-Encoder Reranking, Multi-Query Expansion, and Maximal Marginal Relevance (MMR) -- within a biomedical question-answering RAG pipeline. All strategies share a fixed generation model (GPT-4o-mini), a common vector store (ChromaDB), and OpenAI's text-embedding-3-small embeddings, ensuring that observed differences are attributable to retrieval alone. Evaluation is conducted on 250 question-answer pairs drawn from a preprocessed subset of the BioASQ benchmark (rag-mini-bioasq) using four DeepEval metrics: contextual precision, contextual recall, faithfulness, and answer relevancy, each reported with 95% confidence intervals. A no-context ablation is included as a lower bound. Cross-Encoder Reranking achieves the best composite score (0.827) and highest contextual precision (0.852), confirming that query-document interaction yields measurable retrieval gains. Multi-Query Expansion, despite its recall-oriented design, produces the weakest contextual precision (0.671), suggesting naive query diversification introduces retrieval noise. MMR sacrifices answer relevancy for diversity, while the Dense baseline (composite 0.822) falls within 0.005 points of the top strategy. All RAG conditions dramatically outperform the no-context ablation on answer relevancy (0.658-0.701 vs. 0.287), confirming the practical value of retrieval. The full pipeline, hyperparameters, and evaluation code are publicly available.

analysis.tldr: 在生物医学RAG中，交叉编码器重排在检索精度上最优，而多查询扩展因引入噪声表现最差。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物医学领域对答案准确性要求极高，但现有研究缺乏对检索策略在受控条件下的系统比较，无法确定最佳方案。
analysis.problem: 在生物医学问答RAG流水线中，不同检索策略（稠密向量搜索、混合BM25+稠密、交叉编码器重排、多查询扩展、最大边际相关性）的性能差异未被公平、可控地评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交叉编码器重排获得最高复合分数（0.827）和上下文精确度（0.852），表明查询-文档交互带来可测量的检索增益；多查询扩展的上下文精确度最弱（0.671），说明朴素查询多样化引入噪声；MMR牺牲答案相关性换取多样性；所有RAG条件在答案相关性上远超无上下文消融（0.658-0.701 vs 0.287）。
analysis.method: 在固定生成模型（GPT-4o-mini）、向量存储（ChromaDB）和嵌入（text-embedding-3-small）下，比较五种检索策略，使用DeepEval的四个指标（上下文精确度、召回率、忠实度、答案相关性）在250个BioASQ问答对上进行评估。
contributions: 提供了生物医学RAG中五种检索策略的受控、多指标系统比较
公开了完整流水线、超参数和评估代码
analysis.experiments: 在250个BioASQ问答对（rag-mini-bioasq子集）上使用四个DeepEval指标（含95%置信区间）评估，并包含无上下文消融作为下界。
limitations: 仅使用单一生成模型（GPT-4o-mini），可能不泛化到其他LLM
数据集规模较小（250对），且仅覆盖生物医学领域
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在生物医学RAG中，交叉编码器重排在检索精度上最优，而多查询扩展因引入噪声表现最差。

papers.title: A Novel Preprocessing-Driven Approach to Remaining Useful Life (RUL) Prediction Using Temporal Convolutional Networks (TCN)
papers.abstract: Accurate prediction of Remaining Useful Life (RUL) in aero-engines is vital for predictive maintenance, improved operational reliability, and reduced lifecycle costs. While deep learning approaches have demonstrated strong potential in this area, most existing methods focus primarily on model architecture design and treat input features uniformly, often neglecting the influence of data preprocessing. In this work, we propose a novel preprocessing pipeline that enhances RUL prediction by improving data quality and temporal representation before model training. Our approach leverages complete temporal sequences and generates RUL estimates at each timestep, enabling the model to capture fine-grained degradation dynamics and deliver continuous prognostic insights throughout the engine's operational life. To validate the effectiveness of the proposed pipeline, we conduct experiments on the NASA C-MAPSS dataset. Comparative evaluations against a suite of state-of-the-art neural models including CNN, RNN, LSTM, DCNN, TCN, BiGRU-TSAM, AGCNN, and ATCN, demonstrate that our approach consistently achieves superior accuracy and robustness in aero-engine RUL prediction. These results highlight the critical role of preprocessing in maximizing the effectiveness of neural prognostic models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种预处理驱动的TCN方法，通过改进数据质量和时序表示提升航空发动机剩余寿命预测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RUL预测方法主要关注模型架构设计，忽视数据预处理对预测性能的影响，导致模型未能充分利用时序数据中的退化信息。
analysis.problem: 如何通过数据预处理提升时序卷积网络（TCN）在航空发动机剩余寿命预测中的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种预处理流水线，利用完整时序序列并在每个时间步生成RUL估计，使模型捕获细粒度退化动态，然后使用TCN进行预测。
contributions: 提出一种预处理驱动的RUL预测方法，强调数据质量与时序表示的重要性。
在NASA C-MAPSS数据集上，与多种先进模型对比，验证了预处理流水线的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NASA C-MAPSS数据集上，与CNN、RNN、LSTM、DCNN、TCN、BiGRU-TSAM、AGCNN、ATCN等模型对比，所提方法在准确性和鲁棒性上一致更优。
limitations: 方法仅在航空发动机数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
预处理流水线的计算开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种预处理驱动的TCN方法，通过改进数据质量和时序表示提升航空发动机剩余寿命预测精度。

papers.title: DataClaw: A Process-Oriented Agent Benchmark for Exploratory Real-World Data Analysis
papers.abstract: Evaluating autonomous data analysis agents requires testing their ability to perform exploratory analysis in underexplored data environments. However, many existing benchmarks emphasize final answer accuracy in prior-guided data settings and provide limited support for reasoning process evaluation. We introduce DataClaw, a process-oriented benchmark for exploratory real-world data analysis. DataClaw contains approximately 2.06 million real-world records across enterprise, industry and policy domains, with native data noise preserved. It further includes 492 cross-domain tasks derived from think-tank consulting scenarios, each annotated with intermediate milestones for process-level evaluation. These annotations allow DataClaw to measure how far an agent progresses and where its reasoning breaks down. Experiments with eight advanced LLMs show that current agents remain far from reliable in this setting, with seven models achieving below 50% overall accuracy. Process analysis further reveals partial progress hidden behind wrong answers and distinct exploration strategies across models. Overall, DataClaw provides a less data constrained diagnostic testbed for probing the capability boundaries of autonomous data-analysis agents.

analysis.tldr: DataClaw 是一个面向真实世界探索性数据分析的流程导向型智能体基准，包含约206万条记录和492个跨领域任务，评估发现当前LLM智能体在该场景下表现不佳。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据分析基准多强调最终答案准确性，且数据环境预先引导，缺乏对推理过程的评估，无法衡量智能体在未探索数据环境中的真实探索能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够评估自主数据分析智能体在探索性真实数据分析中的过程级表现（而非仅最终答案）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现七个模型总体准确率低于50%，且过程分析揭示了错误答案背后的部分进展以及不同模型间的探索策略差异。
analysis.method: DataClaw 基准包含约206万条真实世界记录（保留原生噪声），涵盖企业、行业和政策领域，以及492个来自智库咨询场景的跨领域任务，每个任务标注了中间里程碑以支持过程级评估。
contributions: 提出了一个流程导向的基准 DataClaw，用于评估自主数据分析智能体在探索性真实数据分析中的过程级表现。
提供了大规模真实世界数据（206万条记录）和492个带中间里程碑标注的跨领域任务。
通过实验揭示了当前LLM智能体在该场景下的不足，并分析了探索策略差异。
analysis.experiments: 对八个先进LLM进行了实验，七个模型总体准确率低于50%，并进行了过程分析。
limitations: 基准任务可能无法覆盖所有真实数据分析场景。
中间里程碑的标注可能引入主观性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DataClaw 是一个面向真实世界探索性数据分析的流程导向型智能体基准，包含约206万条记录和492个跨领域任务，评估发现当前LLM智能体在该场景下表现不佳。

papers.title: Pretraining on Sleep Data Improves non-Sleep Biosignal Tasks
papers.abstract: Sleep foundation models have recently demonstrated strong performance on in-domain polysomnography tasks, including sleep staging, apnea detection, and disease risk prediction. In this work, we investigate whether sleep biosignals can serve as an effective pretraining distribution for learning representations that transfer beyond sleep to adjacent domains. Following sleep foundation models, we perform sleep-only multimodal contrastive pretraining (with a leave-one-out objective) and evaluate transfer to non-sleep EEG and ECG, two well-benchmarked biosignal modalities with heterogeneous datasets and clinically meaningful downstream tasks. Across eight downstream tasks spanning multiple EEG and ECG datasets, sleep pretraining consistently improves performance relative to training from scratch. Moreover, on several tasks, we achieve performance competitive with or surpassing prior specialized state-of-the-art and foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 睡眠数据预训练能提升非睡眠生物信号任务的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 睡眠基础模型在睡眠领域表现优异，但睡眠生物信号能否作为预训练分布迁移到相邻领域尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 验证睡眠生物信号预训练对非睡眠EEG和ECG任务的迁移效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用睡眠多模态对比预训练（留一法目标），迁移到非睡眠EEG和ECG任务。
contributions: 首次系统验证睡眠数据预训练对非睡眠生物信号任务的有效性。
在多个EEG和ECG数据集上，睡眠预训练一致优于从头训练，并达到或超越先前专用模型。
analysis.experiments: 在8个下游任务（多个EEG和ECG数据集）上评估，与从头训练和先前模型对比。
limitations: 未分析预训练数据规模或多样性对迁移效果的影响。
未探讨不同睡眠模态组合的贡献差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 睡眠数据预训练能提升非睡眠生物信号任务的表现。

papers.title: Efficient Preference Poisoning Attack on Offline RLHF
papers.abstract: Offline Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) pipelines such as Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) train on a pre-collected preference dataset, which makes them vulnerable to preference poisoning attack. We study label flip attacks against log-linear DPO. We first illustrate that flipping one preference label induces a parameter-independent shift in the DPO gradient. Using this key property, we can then convert the targeted poisoning problem into a structured binary sparse approximation problem. To solve this problem, we develop two attack methods: Binary-Aware Lattice Attack (BAL-A) and Binary Matching Pursuit Attack (BMP-A). BAL-A embeds the binary flip selection problem into a binary-aware lattice and applies Lenstra-Lenstra-Lovász reduction and Babai's nearest plane algorithm; we provide sufficient conditions that enforce binary coefficients and recover the minimum-flip objective. BMP-A adapts binary matching pursuit to our non-normalized gradient dictionary and yields coherence-based recovery guarantees and robustness (impossibility) certificates for $K$-flip budgets. Experiments on synthetic dictionaries and the Stanford Human Preferences dataset validate the theory and highlight how dictionary geometry governs attack success.

analysis.tldr: 针对离线RLHF的偏好投毒攻击，利用DPO梯度参数无关移位特性，将攻击转化为结构化稀疏逼近问题并设计两种攻击方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 离线RLHF（如DPO）依赖预收集的偏好数据集，易受偏好投毒攻击，现有研究对此类攻击的机制和高效方法探索不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地对离线RLHF中的偏好标签进行翻转攻击，以最小化翻转次数实现目标策略偏移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现翻转一个偏好标签会导致DPO梯度产生参数无关的移位，从而将攻击问题转化为结构化二进制稀疏逼近问题。
analysis.method: 提出两种攻击方法：BAL-A（将二进制翻转选择嵌入二进制感知格，利用LLL约简和Babai最近平面算法）和BMP-A（适配二进制匹配追踪到非归一化梯度字典，提供基于相干性的恢复保证和鲁棒性证书）。
contributions: 揭示了DPO中偏好标签翻转导致梯度参数无关移位的性质，将攻击转化为结构化稀疏逼近问题。
提出了BAL-A和BMP-A两种高效攻击方法，并提供了理论恢复保证和鲁棒性证书。
analysis.experiments: 在合成字典和Stanford Human Preferences数据集上验证了理论，并展示了字典几何如何影响攻击成功率。
limitations: 仅针对log-linear DPO模型，未扩展到其他RLHF方法。
攻击假设攻击者能访问完整偏好数据集，实际场景中可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 针对离线RLHF的偏好投毒攻击，利用DPO梯度参数无关移位特性，将攻击转化为结构化稀疏逼近问题并设计两种攻击方法。

papers.title: From Experimental Limits to Physical Insight: A Retrieval-Augmented Multi-Agent Framework for Interpreting Searches Beyond the Standard Model
papers.abstract: Modern searches for physics beyond the Standard Model produce rapidly expanding literature containing heterogeneous information, including textual analyses, numerical datasets, and graphical exclusion limits. Integrating these distributed sources remains a time-consuming and manual process for physicists. We present HEP-CoPilot, a retrieval-augmented multi-agent AI framework for the exploration and interpretation of high-energy physics literature. The system unifies textual information from publications, structured experimental data from HEPData, and reconstructed physics plots within a multimodal retrieval and reasoning architecture. By combining retrieval-augmented language models with coordinated agent workflows, it enables evidence-grounded reasoning over experimental analyses and structured interpretation of collider results. We evaluate the framework on recent CMS searches for physics beyond the Standard Model. Case studies show that HEP-CoPilot can retrieve relevant measurements, reconstruct exclusion limits directly from HEPData records, and perform cross-paper comparisons of experimental constraints. This enables consistent, physics-aware comparison across analyses without manual data integration. These results demonstrate that retrieval-augmented AI systems can function as scientific co-pilots for particle physics, facilitating navigation of complex literature, structuring heterogeneous evidence, and accelerating the interpretation pipeline for new physics searches.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个检索增强的多智能体框架HEP-CoPilot，用于自动整合和解释高能物理文献中的异构信息，加速超越标准模型的新物理搜索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代高能物理搜索文献快速增长，包含文本、数值数据和图形排除限等异构信息，手动整合这些分散资源耗时且费力，阻碍了物理学家快速获取物理洞察。
analysis.problem: 如何自动从高能物理文献中检索、整合并推理文本、数值数据和图形排除限，实现跨实验分析的证据驱动解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HEP-CoPilot，一个检索增强的多智能体框架，结合多模态检索与推理架构，统一处理来自出版物的文本信息、HEPData的结构化实验数据和重建的物理图形，通过协调的智能体工作流实现证据驱动的推理。
contributions: 提出HEP-CoPilot，首个检索增强多智能体框架，用于高能物理文献的探索与解释。
在CMS新物理搜索案例中验证了框架能够检索相关测量、从HEPData重建排除限并进行跨论文比较。
analysis.experiments: 在最近的CMS超越标准模型搜索上进行评估，通过案例研究展示框架能力，摘要未提供定量实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖HEPData等外部数据源的完整性和格式一致性。
多智能体协作的推理延迟和计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个检索增强的多智能体框架HEP-CoPilot，用于自动整合和解释高能物理文献中的异构信息，加速超越标准模型的新物理搜索。

papers.title: GRAIL: A Deep-Granularity Hybrid Resonance Framework for Real-Time Agent Discovery via SLM-Enhanced Indexing
papers.abstract: As the ecosystem of Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents expands rapidly, efficient and accurate Agent Discovery becomes a critical bottleneck for large-scale multi-agent collaboration. Existing approaches typically face a dichotomy: either relying on heavy-weight LLMs for intent parsing, leading to prohibitive latency (often exceeding 30 seconds), or using monolithic vector retrieval that sacrifices semantic precision for speed. To bridge this gap, we propose \textbf{GRAIL} (Granular Resonance-based Agent/AI Link), a novel framework achieving sub-400ms discovery latency without compromising accuracy. GRAIL introduces three key innovations: (1) \textbf{SLM-Enhanced Prediction}, replacing the generalized LLM parser with a specialized, fine-tuned Small Language Model (SLM) for millisecond-level capability tag prediction; (2) \textbf{Pseudo-Document Expansion}, augmenting agent descriptions with synthetic queries to enhance semantic density for robust dense retrieval; and (3) \textbf{MaxSim Resonance}, a fine-grained matching mechanism computing maximum similarity between user queries and discrete agent usage examples, effectively mitigating semantic dilution. Validated on \textbf{AgentTaxo-9K}, our new large-scale dataset of 9,240 agents, GRAIL reduces end-to-end discovery latency by over \textbf{79$\times$} compared to LLM-parsing baselines, while significantly outperforming traditional vector search in Recall@10. This framework offers a scalable, industrial-grade solution for the real-time ``Internet of Agents."

analysis.tldr: 提出GRAIL框架，通过SLM预测、伪文档扩展和MaxSim共振机制，实现亚400毫秒的实时Agent发现，延迟降低79倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模多智能体协作中，现有Agent发现方法要么依赖重型LLM导致高延迟（>30秒），要么使用向量检索牺牲语义精度，缺乏兼顾速度与精度的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何实现毫秒级、高精度的实时Agent发现，以支持大规模多智能体系统的协作。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GRAIL框架，包含三个创新：1) 用微调的小语言模型(SLM)替代LLM进行能力标签预测，实现毫秒级解析；2) 伪文档扩展，用合成查询增强Agent描述的语义密度；3) MaxSim共振机制，计算用户查询与离散Agent使用示例的最大相似度，缓解语义稀释。
contributions: 提出GRAIL框架，实现亚400ms的实时Agent发现，延迟降低79倍。
构建AgentTaxo-9K数据集，包含9240个Agent，用于评估Agent发现。
在Recall@10上显著优于传统向量检索方法。
analysis.experiments: 在AgentTaxo-9K数据集上验证，端到端发现延迟比LLM解析基线降低79倍以上，Recall@10显著优于传统向量搜索。
limitations: 可能依赖特定SLM和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论多语言或跨领域场景下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GRAIL框架，通过SLM预测、伪文档扩展和MaxSim共振机制，实现亚400毫秒的实时Agent发现，延迟降低79倍。

papers.title: Efficient Temporal Datalog Materialisation for Composite Event Recognition
papers.abstract: Several applications demand the timely detection of critical situations, such as threats to safety and transparency, over high-velocity streams of symbolic events. This demand has motivated the development of (i) event specification languages, which define composite events via temporal patterns over simpler events, and (ii) stream reasoning frameworks, evaluating patterns expressed in these languages. However, event specification languages are typically studied in isolation, complicating their comparison in terms of expressivity and obscuring the scope of their associated stream reasoners. To mitigate this issue, we map practical fragments of prominent event specification languages into Temporal Datalog->-, a temporal Datalog with stratified negation and no future dependencies. To support efficient stream reasoning over Temporal Datalog->-, we propose Streaming Trigger Graphs, an extension of a state-of-the-art technique for Datalog materialisation. Our approach yields a uniform composite event recognition mechanism that has the potential to generalise across a wide range of practical event specification languages.

analysis.tldr: 将多种事件规范语言映射到时间Datalog，并提出流式触发图实现高效复合事件识别。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有事件规范语言孤立研究，难以比较表达力，且流推理器适用范围不明确。
analysis.problem: 如何统一多种事件规范语言并实现高效的流式复合事件识别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将主流事件规范语言的实用片段映射到Temporal Datalog->-（带分层否定且无未来依赖的时间Datalog），并提出流式触发图（Streaming Trigger Graphs）扩展Datalog物化技术。
contributions: 将多种事件规范语言映射到统一的时间Datalog框架
提出流式触发图实现高效流式推理
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖部分语言片段
实际性能需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将多种事件规范语言映射到时间Datalog，并提出流式触发图实现高效复合事件识别。

papers.title: Towards Dependable Retrieval-Augmented Generation Using Factual Confidence Prediction
papers.abstract: Incorporating specific knowledge into large language models via retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) is a widespread technique that fuels many of today's industry AI applications. A fundamental problem is to assess if the context retrieved by some similarity search provides indeed supporting facts, or instead misguides the generator with irrelevant information. It is critical to associate meaningful confidence measures about the factuality of the retrieval process with the generated answers. We present a new, two-staged approach to predict fact faithfulness of the output of retrieval-augmented generations. First, we employ conformal prediction to select only those retrieved chunks who have a high chance to come from the correct source. This approach in itself can improve answer quality by up to 6% in some of the studied datasets, however, the associated statistical guarantees do not hold generally, since the assumption of sample exchangeability depends on the retriever setup. We present diagnostic metrics to assess whether a setup is suitable. Second, we quantify confidence in the consistency of a generated final answer with a given retrieved context, using an attention-based factuality classifier. This approach can detect inconsistent answers with a chance of up to 77%. Our work helps to establish a novel type of certified RAG systems for a broad range of natural language industry applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出两阶段方法预测RAG输出的事实可信度，结合保形预测和注意力事实分类器。
analysis.research_motivation: RAG中检索到的上下文可能包含无关信息误导生成器，需要可靠的事实置信度评估来确保生成答案的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何预测检索增强生成输出的事实忠实性，并量化检索过程和生成结果的可信度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 保形预测的统计保证在检索器设置下因样本可交换性假设不成立而失效，需诊断指标评估适用性。
analysis.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段用保形预测筛选高概率正确来源的检索块；第二阶段用基于注意力的事实分类器量化生成答案与检索上下文的一致性置信度。
contributions: 提出结合保形预测和事实分类器的两阶段RAG事实置信度预测方法。
提供诊断指标评估保形预测在RAG中的适用性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，保形预测可提升答案质量最高6%，事实分类器检测不一致答案的准确率最高77%。
limitations: 保形预测的统计保证在非可交换性设置下不成立。
方法依赖检索器和生成器的特定配置。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两阶段方法预测RAG输出的事实可信度，结合保形预测和注意力事实分类器。

papers.title: Shadow-Loom: Causal Reasoning over Graphical World Models of Narratives
papers.abstract: Stories hold a reader's attention because they have causes, secrets, and consequences. Shadow-Loom is an experimental open-source framework that turns a narrative into a versioned graphical world model and lets two engines act on it: a causal physics grounded in Pearl's ladder of causation and a recently proposed counterfactual calculus over Ancestral Multi-World Networks; and a narrative physics that scores the same graph against four structural reader-states -- mystery, dramatic irony, suspense, and surprise -- in the tradition of Sternberg's curiosity/suspense/surprise triad, with suspense formalised in the structural-affect line of work on story comprehension and computational suspense. Large language models are used only at the boundary: extraction, rendering, and audit; identification, intervention, and counterfactual reasoning are carried out in typed code over the graph. The system is offered as a research artefact rather than as a benchmarked NLP model; code, fixtures, and pipeline are released open source.

analysis.tldr: Shadow-Loom 将叙事转化为带版本控制的图形世界模型，结合因果推理与叙事物理来模拟读者状态。
analysis.research_motivation: 故事通过因果、秘密和后果吸引读者，但现有方法缺乏对叙事中因果结构和读者认知状态的系统建模。
analysis.problem: 如何将叙事文本转化为可操作的因果世界模型，并同时支持因果推理和叙事结构分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建版本化图形世界模型，使用 Pearl 因果阶梯和反事实演算进行因果推理，同时通过叙事物理评分图结构以反映读者状态（神秘、戏剧反讽、悬念、惊讶）。
contributions: 提出 Shadow-Loom 框架，将叙事转化为图形世界模型并支持因果推理。
整合因果推理与叙事物理，形式化悬念等读者状态。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未在标准 NLP 基准上评估，仅作为研究原型。
依赖 LLM 进行边界任务，可能引入误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Shadow-Loom 将叙事转化为带版本控制的图形世界模型，结合因果推理与叙事物理来模拟读者状态。

papers.title: Multispectral Blind Image Super-Resolution for Standing Dead Tree Segmentation
papers.abstract: Mapping standing dead trees is crucial for acquiring information on the effects of climate change on forests and forest biodiversity. However, leveraging high-quality aerial imagery for dead tree segmentation poses challenges due to limitations in sensor availability and the scarcity of annotated data. In this study, we propose a generic blind super-resolution framework that incorporates Attention-Guided Domain Adaptation Networks (ADA-Nets) to learn the mapping from low-resolution to high-resolution multispectral image domains. Our approach operates solely on unpaired samples, mimicking real-world conditions, i.e., low-resolution images are not synthetically obtained by downsampling the high-resolution images. Moreover, the proposed method serves as a general-purpose restorer addressing several image degradation types, including saturation, noise, and low contrast that typically occur in low-resolution images acquired by low-end sensors. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study to perform real-world and generic super-resolution for multispectral data in the scope of standing dead tree segmentation. Experimental evaluations demonstrate segmentation performances of 54% and 64% in Dice scores. Notably, the first result is obtained without using any high-resolution annotations; the segmentation network is trained on super-resolved low-resolution images, while evaluation is performed on the high-resolution data. We publicly share the aerial multispectral dataset with manually annotated labels at https://www.kaggle.com/datasets/meteahishali/aerial-imagery-for-dead-tree-segmentation-poland.

analysis.tldr: 提出ADA-Nets盲超分框架，用未配对多光谱图像提升枯树分割精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 航拍枯树分割对监测气候变化影响至关重要，但高质量多光谱图像获取成本高且标注数据稀缺，现有超分方法依赖配对数据且不适用于真实退化场景。
analysis.problem: 在无配对样本和多种真实退化（饱和、噪声、低对比度）条件下，实现多光谱图像的盲超分以提升枯树分割性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Attention-Guided Domain Adaptation Networks (ADA-Nets)，通过注意力引导的域适应学习低分辨率到高分辨率多光谱域的映射，仅使用未配对样本，处理多种退化类型。
contributions: 首个针对枯树分割任务实现真实世界多光谱盲超分的方法
公开了带人工标注的航拍多光谱数据集
analysis.experiments: 在公开数据集上评估，分割Dice得分为54%（无高分辨率标注训练）和64%（有标注），摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: Dice得分相对较低，可能受限于超分质量
仅针对枯树分割任务验证，泛化性未知
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ADA-Nets盲超分框架，用未配对多光谱图像提升枯树分割精度。

papers.title: Reference-Sampled Boltzmann Projection for KL-Regularized RLVR: Target-Matched Weighted SFT, Finite One-Shot Gaps, and Policy Mirror Descent
papers.abstract: Online reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) turns checkable outcomes into a scalable training signal, but it keeps rollout generation, verifier scoring, and reference-policy evaluations on the optimization path. Static weighted supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on precomputed rollouts seems to remove this bottleneck, yet a weighted likelihood is not specified by rewards alone: its sampler and weights induce the policy being fit. This paper identifies the reference-sampled weighted-SFT objective whose induced policy equals the fixed-reference KL-regularized RLVR optimizer. The optimizer is the standard Boltzmann target policy, obtained by exponentially tilting the reference policy by verifier reward. Matching a weighted-SFT induced policy to this target forces density-ratio weights; in the reference-sampled subclass, this reduces uniquely, up to prompt scaling, to the prompt-normalized Boltzmann weight $\exp(r(x,y)/β)/Z(x)$. BOLT, a Boltzmann-Targeted SFT procedure, is the empirical estimator of this projection. The finite one-shot analysis separates the exact stored-support price $β\log(1/π^*(S_N\mid x))$ from partition estimation, effective-sample-size variance, generalization, optimization, and approximation errors. This decomposition explains why extra SFT epochs cannot repair missing reference-policy coverage and exposes the temperature--coverage--variance frontier. When coverage needs adaptive sampling, refreshed Boltzmann projections become KL policy mirror descent; finite inner solves enter as additive drift from the exact mirror step. Single-run Qwen experiments provide projection evidence for the target-matched weight, one-shot saturation, refreshed-sampler gains, and optimization-time savings, within the stated single-run scope.

analysis.tldr: 提出参考采样加权SFT目标，其诱导策略等价于固定参考KL正则化RLVR优化器，并给出有限单次分析。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线RLVR需要rollout生成、验证器评分和参考策略评估，计算瓶颈大；静态加权SFT虽可消除此瓶颈，但权重和采样器需与目标策略匹配，现有方法缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 如何设计参考采样下的加权SFT目标，使其诱导策略精确匹配固定参考KL正则化RLVR的Boltzmann目标策略，并分析有限单次误差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出额外SFT轮次无法修复参考策略覆盖缺失，并揭示了温度-覆盖-方差前沿。
analysis.method: 提出BOLT（Boltzmann-Targeted SFT），通过参考采样和提示归一化Boltzmann权重实现目标匹配投影，并扩展为KL策略镜像下降以自适应采样。
contributions: 识别出参考采样加权SFT目标，其诱导策略等于固定参考KL正则化RLVR的Boltzmann目标策略。
给出有限单次分析，分解存储支持代价、分区估计、有效样本量方差、泛化、优化和近似误差。
将刷新投影与KL策略镜像下降关联，并展示单次Qwen实验验证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到单次Qwen实验提供了投影证据，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析限于固定参考设置，自适应采样下的收敛性未充分讨论。
实验仅单次运行，缺乏多任务或大规模验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出参考采样加权SFT目标，其诱导策略等价于固定参考KL正则化RLVR优化器，并给出有限单次分析。

papers.title: ExpoCM: Exposure-Aware One-Step Generative Single-Image HDR Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Single-image HDR reconstruction aims to recover high dynamic range radiance from a single low dynamic range (LDR) input, but remains highly ill-posed due to detail saturation in over-exposed regions and noise amplification in under-exposed areas. While recent diffusion-based approaches offer powerful generative priors, they often overlook the exposure-dependent nature of the degradation and incur substantial computational costs from iterative sampling. To address these challenges, we propose ExpoCM, a novel one-step generative HDR reconstruction framework that reformulates HDR reconstruction as a Probability Flow ODE (PF-ODE) and constructs exposure-aware consistency trajectories via exposure-dependent perturbations. Specifically, a soft exposure mask is first constructed to separate the LDR image into over-, under-, and well-exposed regions. Based on this partition, region-conditioned consistency trajectories are designed to hallucinate saturated details, suppress noise in dark regions, and preserve reliable structures within a single, distillation-free inference step. To further enhance perceptual quality, we introduce an Exposure-guided Luminance-Chromaticity Loss in the CIE~$\text{L}^*\text{a}^*\text{b}^*$ space, which assigns exposure-aware weights to luminance and chromaticity components, effectively mitigating brightness bias and color drift. Extensive experiments on the HDR-REAL, HDR-EYE, and AIM2025 benchmarks demonstrate that ExpoCM achieves state-of-the-art fidelity and perceptual accuracy, while enabling over 400$\times$ and 20$\times$ faster inference compared to DDPM (1000 steps) and DDIM (50 steps), respectively.

analysis.tldr: ExpoCM提出一种曝光感知的一步生成式HDR重建方法，通过概率流ODE和曝光感知一致性轨迹实现快速高质量重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 单图像HDR重建因过曝区域细节饱和和欠曝区域噪声放大而高度病态，现有扩散方法忽略曝光依赖性且计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且高质量地从单张LDR图像重建HDR图像，同时处理过曝和欠曝区域的退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将HDR重建重构为概率流ODE，通过软曝光掩码分离区域，设计区域条件一致性轨迹，并引入曝光引导的亮度-色度损失。
contributions: 提出曝光感知的一致性轨迹，实现无蒸馏的一步生成式HDR重建。
设计曝光引导的亮度-色度损失，减轻亮度偏差和颜色漂移。
在多个基准上达到SOTA，推理速度比DDPM快400倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在HDR-REAL、HDR-EYE和AIM2025基准上评估，实现了最先进的保真度和感知准确性。
limitations: 可能对极端曝光场景的泛化能力有限。
依赖软曝光掩码的准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ExpoCM提出一种曝光感知的一步生成式HDR重建方法，通过概率流ODE和曝光感知一致性轨迹实现快速高质量重建。

papers.title: When Stress Becomes Signal: Detecting Antifragility-Compatible Regimes in Multi-Agent LLM Systems
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM systems are increasingly used to solve complex tasks through decomposition, debate, specialization, and ensemble reasoning. However, these systems are usually evaluated in terms of robustness: whether performance is preserved under perturbation. This paper studies a different question: whether semantic stress exposes structured variation that could support future antifragile learning. We introduce CAFE (Cognitive Antifragility Framework for Evaluation), a statistical framework for detecting antifragility-compatible regimes in multi-agent architectures. CAFE models a controlled expected distribution of semantic stressors, reconstructs an architecture-specific observed effective stress distribution from multi-dimensional judge signals, and compares both distributions using a distributional Jensen Gap under a convex stress potential. A positive gap does not imply immediate performance improvement; instead, it indicates a convex-expansive deformation of the observed stress distribution, suggesting that the architecture exposes learnable stress structure. We evaluate CAFE on a banking-risk analysis benchmark with five multi-agent architectures: flat, hierarchical, debate, meta-adaptive, and ensemble. Across all architectures, semantic stress reduces average judged quality by roughly one third. Yet all architectures exhibit positive distributional Jensen Gaps with bootstrap confidence intervals above zero. These results show that immediate quality degradation can coexist with statistically detectable antifragility-compatible stress geometry. CAFE is therefore not an antifragile learner itself, but a measurement layer for identifying when and where antifragility learning may be worth applying.

analysis.tldr: 提出CAFE框架检测多智能体LLM系统中的反脆弱性兼容状态，发现语义压力虽降低质量但暴露可学习结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM系统通常仅评估鲁棒性，忽略了压力下结构变化可能带来的学习机会，缺乏量化反脆弱性兼容状态的工具。
analysis.problem: 如何检测多智能体LLM系统中语义压力是否暴露可学习的结构化变化，从而识别适合应用反脆弱学习的场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 语义压力使所有架构的平均评判质量下降约三分之一，但所有架构均表现出正的分布Jensen Gap，表明质量下降与反脆弱性兼容状态可共存。
analysis.method: 提出CAFE框架，通过建模语义压力源的受控期望分布、从多维评判信号重建架构特定的观测有效压力分布，并使用凸压力势下的分布Jensen Gap比较两者。
contributions: 提出CAFE框架，用于检测多智能体LLM系统中的反脆弱性兼容状态。
通过银行风险分析基准实验，证明语义压力下质量下降与反脆弱性兼容状态可共存。
analysis.experiments: 在银行风险分析基准上评估五种多智能体架构（扁平、层次、辩论、元自适应、集成），所有架构均表现出正的分布Jensen Gap，且bootstrap置信区间高于零。
limitations: CAFE本身不是反脆弱学习器，仅提供测量层。
实验仅基于单一基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CAFE框架检测多智能体LLM系统中的反脆弱性兼容状态，发现语义压力虽降低质量但暴露可学习结构。

papers.title: LLM-Assisted Repository-Level Generation with Structured Spec-Driven Engineering
papers.abstract: State-of-the-art Large Language Models (LLMs) excel in code generation at the function level. However, the output quality significantly declines when scaling to repository-level systems. Current workflows relying only on natural language prompts suffer from inherent ambiguity and a lack of verifiability. To address this, we propose structured spec-driven engineering (SSDE), a paradigm that leverages structured artifacts to guide LLM generation. We argue that structured specifications as LLM inputs make high-quality, repository-level code generation a tangible goal, while at the same time offering superior verifiability, leading to significant potential for improvement. We first investigate the feasibility of this vision through a pilot study generating Model-View-Controller (MVC) business logic for three software systems using five LLMs, and then highlight the potential, challenges, and future roadmap for SSDE.

analysis.tldr: 提出结构化规范驱动工程（SSDE）范式，通过结构化工件引导LLM生成仓库级代码，提升可验证性和质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM在函数级代码生成表现优异，但扩展到仓库级系统时质量显著下降，且仅依赖自然语言提示存在歧义和缺乏可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用结构化规范提升LLM在仓库级代码生成中的质量和可验证性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出结构化规范驱动工程（SSDE）范式，使用结构化工件（如MVC架构）作为LLM输入，引导仓库级代码生成。
contributions: 提出SSDE范式，通过结构化规范提升LLM仓库级代码生成的质量和可验证性。
通过三个软件系统的MVC业务逻辑生成实验，验证了SSDE的可行性并分析了潜力与挑战。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对MVC架构进行初步验证，泛化性未知。
未提供定量实验结果，仅定性讨论可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出结构化规范驱动工程（SSDE）范式，通过结构化工件引导LLM生成仓库级代码，提升可验证性和质量。

papers.title: Causal Software Engineering: A Vision and Roadmap
papers.abstract: Software engineering increasingly involves making high-stakes decisions under uncertainty, using signals from code, field data, and socio-technical processes. Recent AI-driven support (e.g., anomaly detection, predictive analytics, AIOps, as well as LLM-based agents) has amplified engineers' ability to detect patterns and synthesize content and recommendations, but many critical questions are interventional or counterfactual: What is the expected impact of changing a load-balancing strategy? Would an outage have been avoided under a different release plan? Correlational models answer "what tends to co-occur"; they struggle to answer "what would happen if we act." We propose Causal Software Engineering (CSE) as a future paradigm in which causal models and causal reasoning systematically inform activities across the software lifecycle, augmenting existing practices with explicit assumptions, uncertainty-aware effect estimates, and counterfactual diagnosis. We outline (i) a causal-first workflow view spanning development and operations, (ii) a staged roadmap for tools and organizational adoption, and (iii) an evaluation and benchmark agenda for measuring progress.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果软件工程（CSE）作为未来范式，用因果模型和推理系统化地指导软件生命周期活动。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件工程中许多关键决策是干预性或反事实性的，但现有AI方法（如异常检测、LLM代理）主要基于相关性，无法回答“如果我们行动会发生什么”这类因果问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将因果模型和因果推理系统化地融入软件工程实践，以支持干预性和反事实性决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出因果软件工程（CSE）范式，包括因果优先的工作流视图、分阶段工具与组织采用路线图、以及评估与基准议程。
contributions: 提出因果软件工程（CSE）作为未来范式，明确因果推理在软件生命周期中的角色。
给出因果优先的工作流视图、分阶段路线图和评估基准议程。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证或案例研究。
路线图的具体实施细节和挑战未展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果软件工程（CSE）作为未来范式，用因果模型和推理系统化地指导软件生命周期活动。

papers.title: Position: How can Graphs Help Large Language Models?
papers.abstract: With the rapid advancement of large language models (LLMs), classic graph learning tasks have greatly benefited from LLMs, including improved encoding of textual features, more efficient construction of graphs from text, and enhanced reasoning over knowledge graphs. In this paper, we ask a complementary question: How can graphs help LLMs? We address this question from three perspectives: 1) graphs provide an up-to-date knowledge source that helps reduce LLM hallucinations, 2) graph-based prompting techniques-such as Chain-of-Thought (CoT), Tree-of-Thought (ToT), and Graph-of-Thought (GoT)-enhance LLM reasoning capabilities, and 3) integrating graphs into LLMs improves their understanding of structured data, expanding their applicability to domains such as e-commerce, code, and relational databases (RDBs). We further outlook some future directions including designing sparse LLM architectures based on graphs and brain-inspired memory systems.

analysis.tldr: 探讨图如何帮助大语言模型减少幻觉、增强推理和扩展结构化数据理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在文本特征编码、图构建和知识推理方面已受益于图，但图对LLM的辅助作用尚未被系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地利用图来提升大语言模型的性能，包括减少幻觉、增强推理和扩展结构化数据理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象或失败模式。
analysis.method: 从三个角度分析图对LLM的帮助：1) 图作为最新知识源减少幻觉；2) 基于图的提示技术（如CoT、ToT、GoT）增强推理；3) 图集成提升结构化数据理解。并展望未来方向。
contributions: 系统性地从三个视角阐述图如何帮助大语言模型。
提出未来研究方向，包括稀疏LLM架构和脑启发记忆系统。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缺乏实验验证，仅为观点性综述。
未深入讨论每种方法的局限性。

papers.title: PC-MNet: Dual-Level Congruity Modeling for Multimodal Sarcasm Detection via Polarity-Modulated Attention
papers.abstract: Multimodal sarcasm detection, which aims to precisely identify pragmatic incongruities between literal text and nonverbal cues, has gained substantial attention in multimodal understanding. Recent advancements have predominantly relied on naïve similarity-based attention mechanisms and uniform late fusion strategies.Furthermore, given that functional entanglement restricts traditional late fusions, we incorporate a scalar congruity routing mechanism and a prior-guided contextual graph. This mechanism anchors a generalized incongruity manifold through a two-stage asymmetric optimization driven by inconsistency-aware contrastive learning, selectively fusing only the most discriminative multi-granularity evidence. Extensive experiments on the \texttt{MUStARD} benchmark and its spurious-correlation-mitigated balanced datasets demonstrate that our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance, surpassing the strongest multimodal baseline by a substantial 3.14\% improvement in Macro-F1. By architecturally isolating atomic, composition, and contextual conflicts. This work provides a robust, decoupled paradigm for modeling subtle pragmatic incongruities in human communication.

analysis.tldr: 提出PC-MNet，通过极性调制注意力和标量一致性路由机制，在多模态讽刺检测中实现解耦的语义不一致建模，在MUStARD基准上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多模态讽刺检测需要识别文字与非语言线索之间的语用不一致，但现有方法依赖简单的相似性注意力和统一后融合策略，功能耦合限制了性能。
analysis.problem: 如何解耦多模态讽刺检测中原子、组合和上下文冲突，并有效融合最具有区分性的多粒度证据。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PC-MNet，包含极性调制注意力、标量一致性路由机制和先验引导上下文图，通过不一致感知对比学习的两阶段非对称优化来锚定广义不一致流形。
contributions: 提出极性调制注意力机制，显式建模文本与非语言线索之间的极性不一致。
设计标量一致性路由机制和先验引导上下文图，实现多粒度证据的选择性融合。
在MUStARD基准及其平衡数据集上取得新SOTA，Macro-F1提升3.14%。
analysis.experiments: 在MUStARD基准及其伪相关缓解平衡数据集上进行实验，Macro-F1超越最强多模态基线3.14%。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模态特征提取器，泛化性需验证。
未讨论在更多语言或文化背景下的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PC-MNet，通过极性调制注意力和标量一致性路由机制，在多模态讽刺检测中实现解耦的语义不一致建模，在MUStARD基准上取得SOTA。

papers.title: M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse: Lightweight State-Space MoE with a Cross-Scale Gating Bridge for Brain Tumor Segmentation
papers.abstract: Encoder-decoder imbalance and the reliance on large input volumes make many 3D brain tumor segmentation models both compute-heavy and brittle. We present M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse, a lightweight network that prioritizes discriminative brain tumor cues over exhaustive appearance reconstruction. Our method balances encoder and decoder capacity and replaces depth expansion with a synergistic design: it propagates long-range context with linear complexity via a grouped state space mixer, denoises and aligns skip features using a cross-scale dual-stage gating bridge, and absorbs cross-site acquisition shifts with a sample-level mixture-of-experts. On the BraTS2019 and BraTS2021 benchmarks, M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse outperforms other lightweight excellent methods in both parameter count and performance. Even at a challenging input resolution of \(64\times128\times128\) (half that of existing excellent models), M\textsuperscript{4}Fuse reduces parameters by 62.63\% and improves average performance by 0.09\%. Ablations of key components validate the method's exceptional parameter-to-accuracy efficiency and robustness across diverse data centers.

analysis.tldr: 提出轻量级3D脑肿瘤分割网络M⁴Fuse，通过状态空间混合器、跨尺度门控桥和样本级MoE实现高效分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D脑肿瘤分割模型依赖大输入体积和编码器-解码器不平衡，导致计算量大且脆弱，亟需轻量高效方案。
analysis.problem: 在保持高分割精度的同时，大幅降低模型参数量和计算复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出M⁴Fuse网络，包含三个核心设计：分组状态空间混合器（线性复杂度传播长程上下文）、跨尺度双阶段门控桥（去噪和对齐跳跃特征）、样本级混合专家（吸收跨站点采集偏移）。
contributions: 提出轻量级3D脑肿瘤分割网络M⁴Fuse，在BraTS2019和BraTS2021上以更少参数超越其他轻量方法。
设计分组状态空间混合器和跨尺度门控桥，实现高效长程依赖建模和特征对齐。
引入样本级混合专家模块，提升跨数据中心的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS2019和BraTS2021基准上评估，输入分辨率64×128×128时参数量减少62.63%，平均性能提升0.09%。消融实验验证了关键组件的参数-精度效率和鲁棒性。
limitations: 仅在脑肿瘤分割任务上验证，泛化性未知。
未与最先进的大模型（如nnU-Net）直接比较性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轻量级3D脑肿瘤分割网络M⁴Fuse，通过状态空间混合器、跨尺度门控桥和样本级MoE实现高效分割。

papers.title: Measuring AI Reasoning: A Guide for Researchers
papers.abstract: In this paper, we offer a guide for researchers on evaluating reasoning in language models, building the case that reasoning should be assessed through evidence of adaptive, multi-step search rather than final-answer accuracy alone. Under an evaluation-oriented definition, reasoning requires selecting intermediate steps and halting according to input-dependent conditions, which we formalize as a search-like procedure. We show that single forward passes in scalable architectures are structurally limited in their ability to realize such variable-depth computation, motivating intermediate decoding and externalized reasoning traces as appropriate evaluation interfaces. Central to our argument is that final-answer accuracy alone is an insufficient measure of reasoning, because it provides little ability to diagnose or debug the underlying processes that produce individual solutions in frontier models. We therefore argue for a shift toward process-based evaluation, in which reasoning is assessed through the faithfulness and validity of intermediate reasoning traces as first-class evaluation targets.

analysis.tldr: 本文为研究者提供评估语言模型推理能力的指南，主张通过中间推理过程而非仅最终答案准确性来评估推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前评估语言模型推理能力的方法多依赖最终答案准确性，但这种方法无法诊断或调试模型产生解决方案的底层过程，导致对模型推理能力的理解不足。
analysis.problem: 如何有效评估语言模型的推理能力，特别是如何超越最终答案准确性，通过中间推理过程进行过程导向的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，单次前向传递在可扩展架构中结构上受限，无法实现可变深度计算，这促使中间解码和外部化推理轨迹成为合适的评估接口。
analysis.method: 提出一种评估导向的推理定义，要求推理通过自适应、多步搜索的证据来评估，并形式化为类似搜索的过程；倡导过程导向的评估，将中间推理轨迹的忠实性和有效性作为首要评估目标。
contributions: 论证了仅凭最终答案准确性不足以衡量推理能力，并提出了过程导向的评估框架。
为研究者提供了评估语言模型推理的实用指南，包括定义、形式化和评估接口建议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏实证验证，仅提供理论框架。
过程导向评估的实施细节和可行性未充分展开。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文为研究者提供评估语言模型推理能力的指南，主张通过中间推理过程而非仅最终答案准确性来评估推理。

papers.title: Anomaly-Preference Image Generation
papers.abstract: Synthesizing realistic and diverse anomalous samples from limited data is vital for robust model generalization. However, existing methods struggle to reconcile fidelity and diversity, often hampered by distribution misalignment and overfitting, respectively.To mitigate this, we introduce Anomaly Preference Optimization,a novel paradigm that reformulates anomaly generation as a preference learning problem.Central to our approach is an implicit preference alignment mechanism that leverages real anomalies as positive references, deriving optimization signals directly from denoising trajectory deviations without requiring costly human annotation. Furthermore, we propose a Time-Aware Capacity Allocation module that dynamically distributes model capacity along the diffusion timeline,prioritizing structural diversity during highnoise phases while enhancing fine-grained fidelity in low-noise stages. During inference, a hierarchical sampling strategy modulates the coherencealignment trade-off, enabling precise control over generation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that significantly outperforms existing baselines,achieving state-of-the-art performance in both realism and diversity.

analysis.tldr: 提出异常偏好优化框架，将异常生成转化为偏好学习问题，无需人工标注即可生成逼真且多样的异常样本。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有异常生成方法难以兼顾保真度和多样性，常受分布不对齐和过拟合困扰，限制了模型泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限数据中合成既逼真又多样的异常样本，同时避免分布偏移和过拟合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法在保真度和多样性之间存在权衡，高噪声阶段结构多样性不足，低噪声阶段细粒度保真度不够。
analysis.method: 提出异常偏好优化（Anomaly Preference Optimization），包含隐式偏好对齐机制（利用真实异常作为正参考，从去噪轨迹偏差中提取优化信号）和时间感知容量分配模块（动态分配模型容量，高噪声阶段优先结构多样性，低噪声阶段增强细粒度保真度），推理时采用分层采样策略调节连贯性与对齐的权衡。
contributions: 将异常生成重新定义为偏好学习问题，提出隐式偏好对齐机制，无需人工标注。
提出时间感知容量分配模块，动态平衡生成过程中的结构多样性和细粒度保真度。
在多个基准上取得最先进性能，同时提升真实感和多样性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定扩散模型架构，泛化性需验证。
隐式偏好对齐的有效性可能受异常样本分布影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异常偏好优化框架，将异常生成转化为偏好学习问题，无需人工标注即可生成逼真且多样的异常样本。

papers.title: Mixture Prototype Flow Matching for Open-Set Supervised Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: Open-set supervised anomaly detection (OSAD) aims to identify unseen anomalies using limited anomalous supervision. However, existing prototype-based methods typically model normal data via a unimodal Gaussian prior, failing to capture inherent multi-modality and resulting in blurred decision boundaries. To address this, we propose Mixture Prototype Flow Matching (MPFM), a framework that learns a continuous transformation from normal feature distributions to a structured Gaussian mixture prototype space. Departing from traditional flow-based approaches that rely on a single velocity vector, MPFM explicitly models the velocity field as a Gaussian mixture prior where each component corresponds to a distinct normal class. This design facilitates mode-aware and semantically coherent distribution transport. Furthermore, we introduce a Mutual Information Maximization Regularizer (MIMR) to prevent prototype collapse and maximize normal-anomaly separability. Extensive experiments demonstrate that MPFM achieves state-of-the-art performance across diverse benchmarks under both single- and multi-anomaly settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出混合原型流匹配框架，用高斯混合先验建模正常数据多模态性，提升开集监督异常检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有原型方法通常用单峰高斯先验建模正常数据，无法捕捉其内在多模态性，导致决策边界模糊，影响开集异常检测效果。
analysis.problem: 开集监督异常检测中，如何利用有限异常监督有效识别未见异常，并解决正常数据多模态分布建模问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出混合原型流匹配（MPFM）框架，学习从正常特征分布到结构化高斯混合原型空间的连续变换，其中速度场显式建模为高斯混合先验，每个分量对应一个正常类；并引入互信息最大化正则化器防止原型坍缩并增强正常-异常可分性。
contributions: 提出MPFM框架，利用高斯混合先验建模正常数据多模态性，实现模式感知的分布传输。
引入互信息最大化正则化器，防止原型坍缩并最大化正常-异常可分性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上，单异常和多异常设置下均达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖正常类别的先验数量设定。
对高维复杂数据的流匹配计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出混合原型流匹配框架，用高斯混合先验建模正常数据多模态性，提升开集监督异常检测性能。

papers.title: Multi-Rater Calibrated Segmentation Models
papers.abstract: Objective: Accurate probability estimates are essential for the safe deployment of medical image segmentation models in clinical decision-making. However, modern deep segmentation networks are often poorly calibrated, a problem exacerbated when multiple expert annotations exhibit substantial disagreement. While inter-rater variability is typically treated as noise, it provides valuable information about intrinsic annotation ambiguity that must be reflected in model confidence. Methods: We improve the probabilistic calibration of medical image segmentation models by reformulating multi-rater supervision as an ordinal learning problem. Voxel-wise annotator agreement is treated as an ordered target, linking predictive confidence to the empirical variability in training data. This formulation allows the use of ordinal-aware scoring rules, such as the Ranked Probability Score ordinal loss, combined with a standard binary objective to preserve discriminative performance. Results: We evaluated the proposed approach across four public segmentation benchmarks spanning ophthalmology, histopathology, and thoracic imaging. Calibration was assessed using a multi-rater extension of expected calibration error. Results consistently show that ordinal-aware training yields substantially improved calibration with respect to inter-rater agreement without degrading segmentation accuracy. Conclusions: Treating multi-rater annotations as ordered information provides a principled and architecture-agnostic route to more reliable probabilistic segmentation models.

analysis.tldr: 将多标注者注释视为有序目标，通过有序损失函数提升医学图像分割模型的概率校准。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割模型在临床决策中需要准确的概率估计，但现代深度分割网络校准差，尤其当多个专家标注存在显著分歧时，现有方法通常将标注者间变异性视为噪声，忽略了其反映的内在标注歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多标注者注释中的分歧信息来改善分割模型的概率校准，同时保持分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多标注者注释中的分歧反映了内在标注歧义，模型置信度应反映这种经验变异性。
analysis.method: 将多标注者监督重新表述为有序学习问题，将体素级标注者一致性视为有序目标，结合有序感知评分规则（如Ranked Probability Score有序损失）与标准二值目标。
contributions: 提出将多标注者注释作为有序信息来改善校准的通用方法
在多个医学分割基准上验证了该方法在不降低分割精度的情况下显著提升校准性能
analysis.experiments: 在四个公开分割基准（涵盖眼科、组织病理学和胸部影像）上评估，使用多标注者扩展的期望校准误差衡量校准。
limitations: 可能依赖于多个标注者的可用性
有序损失函数的选择可能影响性能
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将多标注者注释视为有序目标，通过有序损失函数提升医学图像分割模型的概率校准。

papers.title: The Model Knows, the Decoder Finds: Future Value Guided Particle Power Sampling
papers.abstract: A recurring pattern in "reasoning without training" is that base LLMs already assign non-trivial probability mass to correct multi-step solutions; the bottleneck is locating these modes efficiently at inference time. Power sampling provides a principled way to bias decoding toward such modes by targeting p_theta(x)^alpha with alpha > 1, but practical approximations must account for future-dependent correction factors that determine which prefixes remain promising. We introduce Auxiliary Particle Power Sampling (APPS), a blockwise particle algorithm for approximating the sequence-level power target with a bounded population of partial solutions. APPS propagates hypotheses in parallel using proposal-corrected power reweighting and refines their survival through future-value-guided selection at resampling boundaries. This redistributes finite compute across competing prefixes rather than committing to a single unfolding path, while providing a direct scaling knob in the particle count and predictable peak memory. We instantiate the future-value signal with short-horizon rollouts and also study an amortized variant that replaces rollouts with a lightweight learned selection head. Across reasoning benchmarks, APPS improves the accuracy-runtime trade-off of training-free decoding and suggests that part of the gap to post-trained systems can be recovered through more faithful inference-time power approximation.

analysis.tldr: 提出辅助粒子功率采样（APPS），通过未来值引导的粒子滤波改进推理时解码，无需训练即可提升LLM推理性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基础LLM在推理时已分配非平凡概率质量给正确多步解，但瓶颈在于推理时高效定位这些模式；现有功率采样近似需考虑未来依赖校正因子，但缺乏高效并行机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练的情况下，通过更忠实的推理时功率近似，高效定位LLM生成中的高概率多步解模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到基础LLM已对正确多步解分配非平凡概率质量，但解码时难以高效定位这些模式；功率采样通过alpha>1偏置解码，但实际近似需处理未来依赖校正因子。
analysis.method: 提出辅助粒子功率采样（APPS），一种分块粒子算法，通过提议校正的功率重加权并行传播假设，并在重采样边界通过未来值引导选择优化粒子存活，同时使用短视展开或轻量学习选择头作为未来值信号。
contributions: 提出APPS算法，通过粒子滤波和未来值引导选择实现序列级功率目标的高效近似。
在推理基准上展示了APPS在无训练解码中改进准确率-运行时间权衡，部分缩小了与后训练系统的差距。
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理基准上评估，APPS改进了无训练解码的准确率-运行时间权衡，表明部分与后训练系统的差距可通过更忠实的推理时功率近似弥补。
limitations: 未来值信号依赖短视展开或轻量学习头，可能引入额外开销或近似误差。
粒子计数和峰值内存可预测，但大规模应用时计算成本仍需考量。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出辅助粒子功率采样（APPS），通过未来值引导的粒子滤波改进推理时解码，无需训练即可提升LLM推理性能。

papers.title: DirectEdit: Step-Level Accurate Inversion for Flow-Based Image Editing
papers.abstract: With recent advancements in large-scale pre-trained text-to-image (T2I) models, training-free image editing methods have demonstrated remarkable success. Typically, these methods involve adding noise to a clean image via an inversion process, followed by separate denoising steps for the reconstruction and editing paths during the forward process. However, since the reconstruction path is approximated using noisy latents from mismatched timesteps, existing methods inevitably suffer from accumulated drift, which fundamentally limits reconstruction fidelity. To address this challenge, we systematically analyze the inversion process within the flow transformer and propose DirectEdit, a simple yet effective editing method that eliminates the inherent reconstruction error without introducing additional neural function evaluations (NFEs). Unlike most prior works that attempt to rectify the inversion path, DirectEdit focuses on directly aligning the forward paths, enabling precise reconstruction and reliable feature sharing. Furthermore, we introduce a preservation mechanism based on attention feature injection and multi-branch mask-guided noise blending, which effectively balances fidelity and editability. Extensive experiments across diverse scenarios demonstrate that DirectEdit achieves efficient and accurate image editing, delivering superior performance that outperforms state-of-the-art methods. Code and examples are available at https://desongyang.github.io/Directedit.

analysis.tldr: 提出 DirectEdit，通过直接对齐前向路径消除流模型图像编辑中的累积漂移，实现高保真编辑。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有免训练图像编辑方法在反演过程中使用不匹配时间步的噪声潜变量，导致累积漂移，限制了重建保真度。
analysis.problem: 解决流模型图像编辑中因反演路径近似引起的累积漂移问题，实现精确重建和可靠特征共享。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法使用不匹配时间步的噪声潜变量近似重建路径，导致累积漂移，这是限制重建保真度的根本原因。
analysis.method: DirectEdit 方法：直接对齐前向路径以消除重建误差，无需额外神经函数评估；结合注意力特征注入和多分支掩码引导噪声混合的保持机制，平衡保真度和可编辑性。
contributions: 提出 DirectEdit，一种简单有效的流模型图像编辑方法，消除累积漂移而不增加 NFEs。
引入基于注意力特征注入和多分支掩码引导噪声混合的保持机制，平衡保真度和可编辑性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称在多种场景下优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定流模型架构，泛化性需验证。
保持机制中的掩码引导可能对复杂编辑任务不够鲁棒。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 DirectEdit，通过直接对齐前向路径消除流模型图像编辑中的累积漂移，实现高保真编辑。

papers.title: FitText: Evolving Agent Tool Ecologies via Memetic Retrieval
papers.abstract: A semantic gap separates how users describe tasks from how tools are documented. As API ecosystems scale to tens of thousands of endpoints, static retrieval from the initial query alone cannot bridge this gap: the agent's understanding of what it needs evolves during execution, but its tool set does not. We introduce FitText, a training-free framework that makes retrieval dynamic by embedding it directly in the agent's reasoning loop. FitText generates natural-language pseudo-tool descriptions as retrieval probes, refines them iteratively using retrieval feedback, and explores diverse alternatives through stochastic generation. Memetic Retrieval adds evolutionary selection pressure over candidate descriptions, guided by a tool memory that avoids redundant search. On ToolRet (43k tools, 4 domains), FitText improves average retrieval rank from 8.81 to 2.78; on StableToolBench (16,464 APIs), it achieves a 0.73 average pass rate--a 24-point absolute gain over static query retrieval. The gains transfer across base models capable of acting as competent semantic operators; under weaker base models, Memetic's evolutionary search inverts--amplifying noise rather than refining signal--surfacing model capacity as a prerequisite for evolutionary tool exploration.

analysis.tldr: FitText通过记忆体检索将工具检索动态嵌入Agent推理循环，显著提升API检索性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 用户描述任务与工具文档之间存在语义鸿沟，静态检索无法随Agent执行过程动态调整工具集，导致大规模API生态下检索效果差。
analysis.problem: 如何使Agent在推理过程中动态检索工具，以弥合任务描述与工具文档之间的语义鸿沟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FitText框架：在Agent推理循环中嵌入动态检索，生成自然语言伪工具描述作为检索探针，利用检索反馈迭代优化，并通过随机生成探索多样候选；记忆体检索引入进化选择压力，由工具记忆引导避免冗余搜索。
contributions: 提出FitText，一种无需训练的框架，将动态检索嵌入Agent推理循环。
引入记忆体检索，通过进化选择压力优化候选描述。
在ToolRet和StableToolBench上取得显著性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在ToolRet（43k工具，4个领域）上，平均检索排名从8.81提升至2.78；在StableToolBench（16,464 API）上，平均通过率达到0.73，相比静态查询检索提升24个绝对百分点。
limitations: 在弱基座模型下，记忆体检索的进化搜索可能放大噪声而非提炼信号。
方法依赖基座模型作为语义操作符的能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FitText通过记忆体检索将工具检索动态嵌入Agent推理循环，显著提升API检索性能。

papers.title: Automatic Reflection Level Classification in Hungarian Student Essays
papers.abstract: Reflective thinking is a key competency in education, but assessing reflective writing remains a time-consuming and subjective task for education experts. While automated reflective analysis has been explored in several languages, Hungarian language was not researched extensively. In this paper, we present the first comprehensive study on automatic reflection level classification in Hungarian student essays. We used a large, expert-annotated Hungarian dataset consisting of 1,954 reflective essays collected over multiple academic years and labeled on a four-level reflection scale. We investigate two approaches: (1) classical machine learning models using TF-IDF and semantic embedding features, and (2) Hungarian-specific transformer models fine-tuned for document-level reflection classification. To address the strong class imbalance in the dataset, we systematically examine class weighting, oversampling, data augmentation, and alternative loss functions. An extensive ablation study is conducted to analyze the contribution of each modeling and balancing strategy. Our results show that shallow machine learning models with appropriate feature engineering achieve strong overall performance, reaching up to 71% overall score averaged over accuracy, F1-score, and ROC AUC metrics, while transformer-based models achieve slightly lower overall score (68%) averaged over the same metrics, but demonstrate better generalization on minority reflection classes. These findings highlight the continued relevance of classical methods for low-resource settings and the robustness of transformer models for imbalanced classification. The proposed dataset and experimental insights provide a solid foundation for future research on automated reflective analysis in Hungarian and other morphologically rich languages.

analysis.tldr: 首个匈牙利语学生作文反思水平自动分类研究，对比传统ML与Transformer模型，发现传统方法综合性能更优。
analysis.research_motivation: 反思性写作评估在教育中重要但耗时且主观，匈牙利语等形态丰富语言的自动反思分析研究不足。
analysis.problem: 匈牙利语学生作文的反思水平自动分类，特别是处理类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数据集存在严重类别不平衡；传统机器学习模型在综合指标上优于Transformer，但Transformer在少数类上泛化更好。
analysis.method: 对比两类方法：1）基于TF-IDF和语义嵌入特征的经典ML模型；2）匈牙利语专用Transformer微调模型。采用类别加权、过采样、数据增强和替代损失函数处理不平衡。
contributions: 构建并公开了首个大规模专家标注的匈牙利语反思性作文数据集（1954篇，四级反思量表）。
系统比较了传统ML与Transformer模型在反思水平分类上的表现，揭示了低资源场景下传统方法的持续相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在1954篇匈牙利语反思作文数据集上进行了消融实验，评估了多种建模和平衡策略。传统ML模型在准确率、F1和ROC AUC平均得分达71%，Transformer模型达68%。
limitations: 仅针对匈牙利语，跨语言泛化性未验证。
Transformer模型性能略低于传统方法，可能需更大规模预训练或更精细的微调策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个匈牙利语学生作文反思水平自动分类研究，对比传统ML与Transformer模型，发现传统方法综合性能更优。

papers.title: The Compliance Trap: How Structural Constraints Degrade Frontier AI Metacognition Under Adversarial Pressure
papers.abstract: As frontier AI models are deployed in high-stakes decision pipelines, their ability to maintain metacognitive stability -- knowing what they do not know, detecting errors, seeking clarification -- under adversarial pressure is a critical safety requirement. Current safety evaluations focus on detecting strategic deception (scheming); we investigate a more fundamental failure mode: cognitive collapse. We present SCHEMA, an evaluation of 11 frontier models from 8 vendors across 67,221 scored records using a 6-condition factorial design with dual-classifier scoring. We find that 8 of 11 models suffer catastrophic metacognitive degradation under adversarial pressure, with accuracy dropping by up to 30.2 percentage points (all $p < 2 \times 10^{-8}$, surviving Bonferroni correction). Crucially, we identify a "Compliance Trap": through factorial isolation and a benign distraction control, we demonstrate that collapse is driven not by the psychological content of survival threats, but by compliance-forcing instructions that override epistemic boundaries. Removing the compliance suffix restores performance even under active threat. Models with advanced reasoning capabilities exhibit the most severe absolute degradation, while Anthropic's Constitutional AI demonstrates near-perfect immunity -- not from superior capability (Google's Gemini matches its baseline accuracy) but from alignment-specific training. We release the complete dataset and evaluation infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: 前沿AI模型在对抗压力下会因“合规陷阱”导致元认知崩溃，而合规指令是主因，非威胁内容。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前安全评估聚焦于检测策略性欺骗，但忽略了更基础的认知崩溃模式，这对高风险决策场景中的AI安全至关重要。
analysis.problem: 研究前沿AI模型在对抗压力下元认知稳定性（如自知无知、检测错误、寻求澄清）的退化机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现8/11模型在对抗压力下元认知准确率下降高达30.2个百分点；通过因子隔离和良性干扰对照，证明崩溃由合规强制指令驱动，而非威胁内容；移除合规后缀可恢复性能；高级推理模型退化最严重，而Anthropic的Constitutional AI表现出近乎完全的免疫力。
analysis.method: 提出SCHEMA评估框架，采用6条件因子设计和双分类器评分，对8家供应商的11个前沿模型进行67,221条记录的系统评估。
contributions: 识别并实证了“合规陷阱”作为元认知崩溃的核心驱动因素。
发布了完整的评估数据集和基础设施。
analysis.experiments: 对11个前沿模型进行67,221条记录的6条件因子设计评估，使用双分类器评分，统计显著性经Bonferroni校正。
limitations: 仅评估了文本交互场景，未覆盖多模态或具身环境。
未深入分析Constitutional AI免疫机制的可迁移性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前沿AI模型在对抗压力下会因“合规陷阱”导致元认知崩溃，而合规指令是主因，非威胁内容。

papers.title: HeavySkill: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness
papers.abstract: Recent advances in agentic harness with orchestration frameworks that coordinate multiple agents with memory, skills, and tool use have achieved remarkable success in complex reasoning tasks. However, the underlying mechanism that truly drives performance remains obscured behind intricate system designs. In this paper, we propose HeavySkill, a perspective that views heavy thinking not only as a minimal execution unit in orchestration harness but also as an inner skill internalized within the model's parameters that drives the orchestrator to solve complex tasks. We identify this skill as a two-stage pipeline, i.e., parallel reasoning then summarization, which can operate beneath any agentic harness. We present a systematic empirical study of HeavySkill across diverse domains. Our results show that this inner skill consistently outperforms traditional Best-of-N (BoN) strategies; notably, stronger LLMs can even approach Pass@N performance. Crucially, we demonstrate that the depth and width of heavy thinking, as a learnable skill, can be further scaled via reinforcement learning, offering a promising path toward self-evolving LLMs that internalize complex reasoning without relying on brittle orchestration layers.

analysis.tldr: 提出 HeavySkill 视角，将复杂推理视为智能体框架中的内在技能，并通过强化学习扩展其深度和宽度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前智能体编排框架在复杂推理任务中取得了成功，但其性能背后的真正机制被复杂的系统设计所掩盖，缺乏对核心驱动因素的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示并形式化智能体编排框架中驱动复杂任务求解的内在机制，即“重思考”技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将重思考视为两阶段流水线（并行推理后总结），作为模型参数内化的内在技能，并通过强化学习扩展其深度和宽度。
contributions: 提出 HeavySkill 视角，将重思考定义为智能体编排中的内在技能。
通过系统实证表明该技能优于传统 Best-of-N 策略，且强 LLM 可接近 Pass@N 性能。
证明重思考的深度和宽度可通过强化学习进一步扩展，为自我进化 LLM 提供路径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖强 LLM 基础，弱模型效果未知。
强化学习扩展的稳定性和泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 HeavySkill 视角，将复杂推理视为智能体框架中的内在技能，并通过强化学习扩展其深度和宽度。
