This staged curriculum enables strong cross-modal alignment without catastrophic forgetting of RGB priors. We evaluate SpectraDINO on multispectral object detection and semantic segmentation across challenging NIR, SWIR, and LWIR benchmarks using widely adopted fusion strategies. SpectraDINO achieves state-of-the-art performance across most benchmarks, validating its effectiveness as a general-purpose backbone for spectral generalization. The code and weights for model variants are available at https://github.com/Yonsei-STL/SpectraDINO.

analysis.tldr: SpectraDINO通过轻量适配器将DINOv2扩展到多光谱域，在NIR/SWIR/LWIR检测和分割上达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 多光谱成像（NIR、SWIR、LWIR）在恶劣环境下提供互补感知能力，但现有视觉基础模型（VFM）主要基于RGB数据预训练，存在巨大的域差距，限制了其在多光谱任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将RGB预训练的视觉基础模型（如DINOv2）有效迁移到多光谱模态，同时保持RGB先验知识并实现跨模态对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SpectraDINO，通过轻量级瓶颈适配器扩展DINOv2 ViT骨干，采用多阶段师生训练协议，包括余弦蒸馏、对称对比损失、patch级对齐和邻域结构保持损失，冻结RGB骨干，仅训练适配器。
contributions: 提出SpectraDINO，首个将DINOv2扩展到多光谱（NIR/SWIR/LWIR）的视觉基础模型，使用轻量适配器弥合光谱域差距。
设计多阶段师生训练协议，结合多种损失函数实现强跨模态对齐，避免灾难性遗忘。
在多光谱目标检测和语义分割基准上达到SOTA性能，验证了作为通用骨干的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在NIR、SWIR、LWIR基准上评估多光谱目标检测和语义分割，采用广泛使用的融合策略，达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能仅适用于ViT架构，对其他骨干的泛化性未知。
多阶段训练协议可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpectraDINO通过轻量适配器将DINOv2扩展到多光谱域，在NIR/SWIR/LWIR检测和分割上达到SOTA。

papers.title: On the Privacy of LLMs: An Ablation Study
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in interactive and retrieval-augmented settings, raising significant privacy concerns. While attacks such as Membership Inference (MIA), Attribute Inference (AIA), Data Extraction (DEA), and Backdoor Attacks (BA) have been studied, they are typically analyzed in isolation, leaving a gap in understanding their behavior under common system factors. In this paper, we introduce a unified threat model and notation, reproduce a representative set of privacy attacks, and conduct a structured ablation study to evaluate the impact of key factors such as model architecture, scale, dataset characteristics, and retrieval configuration. Our analysis reveals clear differences across attack types. Membership inference attacks, particularly mask-based variants, exhibit strong and reliable signals, while backdoor attacks achieve consistently high success rates due to their trigger-based nature. In contrast, attribute inference and data extraction attacks remain more challenging, resulting in lower accuracy, yet they pose significant risks as they target sensitive personal information. Overall, these results highlight that privacy risks in LLM systems are highly context-dependent and driven by design choices, emphasizing the need for holistic evaluation and informed deployment practices.

analysis.tldr: 通过消融实验系统评估LLM隐私攻击受模型架构、规模、数据集和检索配置的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在交互和检索增强场景中广泛部署，隐私风险日益突出，但现有攻击研究孤立进行，缺乏对系统因素影响的统一理解。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对LLM隐私攻击在常见系统因素（如模型架构、规模、数据集特征、检索配置）下行为的系统比较和消融分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 成员推断攻击（尤其是掩码变体）信号强且可靠；后门攻击因触发机制成功率极高；属性推断和数据提取攻击准确率较低但风险大。
analysis.method: 提出统一威胁模型和符号，复现代表性隐私攻击，并设计结构化消融实验评估关键因素影响。
contributions: 提出统一的LLM隐私攻击威胁模型和符号体系
通过消融实验揭示模型架构、规模、数据集和检索配置对不同攻击类型的差异化影响
analysis.experiments: 在多种模型架构、规模、数据集和检索配置下进行消融实验，比较成员推断、属性推断、数据提取和后门攻击的性能。
limitations: 可能未覆盖所有最新攻击变体
消融因素有限，未考虑训练数据分布等更细粒度因素
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过消融实验系统评估LLM隐私攻击受模型架构、规模、数据集和检索配置的影响。

papers.title: A Study of Belief Revision Postulates in Multi-Agent Systems (Extended Version)
papers.abstract: We investigate the belief revision problem in epistemic planning, i.e., what will be the beliefs of all agents in a multi-agent system after an agent gains the belief in some state property. Based on the standard representation in epistemic planning of agents' beliefs via a single multi-agent Kripke model, we generalize the classical AGM belief revision postulates to the multi-agent setting, with the aim to provide a formal framework for evaluating dynamic epistemic reasoning frameworks in which the beliefs of all agents as the result of actions are computed. As an example of a simple operator that satisfies all of the generalized AGM postulates, we present generalized full-meet multi-agent belief revision. We moreover define a generalization of the standard postulates for iterated revision, present a more sophisticated, event model based revision operator, and discuss the potential issues in defining an epistemic operator on Kripke models that can satisfy all of the generalized postulates for iterated multi-agent belief revision.

analysis.tldr: 将经典AGM信念修正公设推广到多智能体系统，为认知规划中的信念修正提供形式化框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 在多智能体系统中，一个智能体获得新信念后，所有智能体的信念如何变化是一个核心问题，但缺乏形式化的公设框架来评估和指导动态认知推理。
analysis.problem: 如何将单智能体的AGM信念修正公设推广到多智能体环境，并定义满足这些公设的修正算子。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于多智能体Kripke模型，推广AGM公设到多智能体设置，提出广义全交多智能体信念修正算子，并讨论基于事件模型的迭代修正算子。
contributions: 将经典AGM信念修正公设推广到多智能体系统，提供形式化评估框架。
提出满足所有推广公设的广义全交多智能体信念修正算子。
定义迭代修正的推广公设并讨论更复杂的基于事件模型的修正算子。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏实际应用中的计算效率分析。
迭代修正公设的满足性在Kripke模型上可能存在困难。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将经典AGM信念修正公设推广到多智能体系统，为认知规划中的信念修正提供形式化框架。

papers.title: Fine-Tuning Impairs the Balancedness of Foundation Models in Long-tailed Personalized Federated Learning
papers.abstract: Personalized federated learning (PFL) with foundation models has emerged as a promising paradigm enabling clients to adapt to heterogeneous data distributions. However, real-world scenarios often face the co-occurrence of non-IID data and long-tailed class distributions, presenting unique challenges that remain underexplored in PFL. In this paper, we investigate this long-tailed personalized federated learning and observe that current methods suffer from two limitations: (i) fine-tuning degrades performance below zero-shot baselines due to the erosion of inherent class balance in foundation models; (ii) conventional personalization techniques further transfer this bias to local models through parameter or feature-level fusion. To address these challenges, we propose Federated Learning via Gradient Purification and Residual Learning (FedPuReL), which preserves balanced knowledge in the global model while enabling unbiased personalization. Specifically, we purify local gradients using zero-shot predictions to maintain a class-balanced global model, and model personalization as residual correction atop the frozen global model. Extensive experiments demonstrate that FedPuReL consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods, achieving superior performance on both global and personalized models across diverse long-tailed scenarios. The code is available at https://github.com/shihaohou/FedPuReL.

analysis.tldr: 提出FedPuReL方法，通过梯度纯化和残差学习解决基础模型在长尾个性化联邦学习中的平衡性退化问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实场景中非独立同分布数据与长尾类别分布同时出现，给个性化联邦学习带来独特挑战，现有方法在基础模型微调时会破坏其固有的类别平衡性，导致性能下降。
analysis.problem: 长尾个性化联邦学习中，微调基础模型会侵蚀其内在类别平衡，且传统个性化技术通过参数或特征融合进一步将偏差传递到本地模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到两个局限：微调导致性能低于零样本基线，因为破坏了基础模型的类别平衡；传统个性化方法通过参数或特征融合将全局偏差传递到本地模型。
analysis.method: 提出FedPuReL，包括梯度纯化（利用零样本预测净化本地梯度以保持全局模型类别平衡）和残差学习（将个性化建模为冻结全局模型之上的残差校正）。
contributions: 首次系统研究长尾个性化联邦学习问题，并揭示微调破坏基础模型平衡性的现象。
提出FedPuReL方法，通过梯度纯化和残差学习同时实现全局模型平衡和个性化无偏。
在多种长尾场景下实验证明FedPuReL在全局和个性化模型上均优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种长尾场景下进行实验，FedPuReL在全局和个性化模型上均优于现有方法。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖零样本预测的质量，若基础模型零样本性能差则梯度纯化效果受限。
残差学习假设全局模型足够好，在极端非独立同分布下可能不成立。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FedPuReL方法，通过梯度纯化和残差学习解决基础模型在长尾个性化联邦学习中的平衡性退化问题。

papers.title: The Conversations Beneath the Code: Triadic Data for Long-Horizon Software Engineering Agents
papers.abstract: Frontier software engineering agents have saturated short-horizon benchmarks while regressing on the work that constitutes senior engineering: long-horizon, multi-engineer, ambiguous-specification deliverables. This paper takes a position on what training data is needed to close the gap. The substrate for the next generation of SWE agents is neither larger GitHub scrapes nor more solo-agent trajectories nor -- sufficient by itself -- open human-AI dialogue logs. It is triadic data: synchronized capture of the human-human conversations where engineering context is formed, the human-AI sessions where that context is partially consumed, and the multi-week cross-functional work that surrounds both. We argue that the canonical instantiation of triadic data is two complementary products: long-horizon expert trajectories captured under stimulated-recall protocols, and simulated cross-functional companies -- instrumented teams of senior engineers, product managers, designers, and data scientists working through ambiguous deliverables on shared infrastructure. We further specify a four-tier evidence framework through which any such corpus -- triadic or otherwise -- must justify its quality to a fine-tuning researcher: mechanical verification, statistical corpus characterization, probe experiments, and pre-registered blind evaluation. We argue that this data is capturable in 12-18 months with methods already mature in adjacent fields, that it is the empirical key to four open questions in agent training, and that the field's near-term research agenda should include it explicitly.

analysis.tldr: 提出三元数据（triadic data）作为长周期软件工程智能体训练的关键数据形式，并给出四层证据框架。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有前沿软件工程智能体在短期基准上饱和，但在需要长期、多工程师协作、模糊规格交付的高级工程任务上表现倒退，缺乏合适的训练数据。
analysis.problem: 如何构建训练数据以弥合软件工程智能体在长周期、多工程师、模糊规格任务上的能力差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出当前智能体在短期基准上饱和，长期任务表现不佳。
analysis.method: 提出三元数据概念，包括人类-人类对话、人类-AI会话以及跨职能团队工作；并指定四层证据框架（机械验证、统计语料特征、探针实验、预注册盲评）来评估数据质量。
contributions: 提出三元数据作为下一代软件工程智能体训练的关键数据形式
设计四层证据框架用于评估训练语料质量
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 数据收集需12-18个月，实际可行性有待验证
四层证据框架的具体实施细节未展开
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出三元数据（triadic data）作为长周期软件工程智能体训练的关键数据形式，并给出四层证据框架。

papers.title: Zero-Shot Confidence Estimation for Small LLMs: When Supervised Baselines Aren't Worth Training
papers.abstract: How reliably can a small language model estimate its own correctness? The answer determines whether local-to-cloud routing-escalating queries a cheap local model cannot handle-can work without supervised training data. As inference costs dominate large language model (LLM) deployment budgets, routing most queries to a cheap local model while reserving expensive cloud calls for hard cases is an increasingly common cost-control strategy. We compare zero-shot confidence signals against RouteLLM-style supervised baselines across three 7-8B model families and two datasets (1,000 and 500 queries per model, respectively). Average token log-probability, which requires no training data, matches or exceeds supervised baselines in-distribution (Area Under the Receiver Operating Characteristic curve (AUROC) 0.650-0.714 vs. 0.644-0.676) and substantially outperforms them out-of-distribution (0.717-0.833 vs. 0.512-0.564), because it measures a property of the model's generation rather than the query distribution. This paper further proposes retrieval-conditional self-assessment, a pre-generation signal that selectively injects retrieved knowledge when similarity is high, improving over bare self-assessment by up to +0.069 AUROC at 3-10x lower latency than log-probability. A supervised baseline trained on 1,000 labeled examples never exceeds the zero-shot signal. We release all code, data, and experiment logs.

analysis.tldr: 小LLM的零样本置信度估计可超越有监督基线，无需训练数据即可实现高效路由。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM部署中推理成本高昂，通过本地-云端路由将简单查询分流至小模型可降低成本，但小模型需要可靠的自信心估计来判断何时升级查询。传统有监督方法需要大量标注数据，且分布外泛化能力弱。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖有监督训练数据的情况下，让小语言模型准确估计自身回答的正确性，以实现高效的路由决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 平均token对数概率作为零样本置信度信号，在分布内匹配或超越有监督基线，在分布外显著优于有监督基线，因为它衡量的是模型生成的性质而非查询分布。
analysis.method: 提出检索条件自评估（retrieval-conditional self-assessment），在生成前根据检索相似度选择性注入知识，提升自评估性能，同时延迟低于对数概率。
contributions: 证明平均token对数概率作为零样本置信度信号在分布内和分布外均优于有监督基线。
提出检索条件自评估方法，在低延迟下进一步提升置信度估计性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个7-8B模型家族和两个数据集（每个模型1000和500个查询）上评估，对比RouteLLM风格的有监督基线。
limitations: 实验仅在7-8B规模模型上进行，更大模型的效果未知。
检索条件自评估依赖外部知识库，可能引入额外依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 小LLM的零样本置信度估计可超越有监督基线，无需训练数据即可实现高效路由。

papers.title: PhysicianBench: Evaluating LLM Agents in Real-World EHR Environments
papers.abstract: We introduce PhysicianBench, a benchmark for evaluating LLM agents on physician tasks grounded in real clinical setting within electronic health record (EHR) environments. Existing medical agent benchmarks primarily focus on static knowledge recall, single-step atomic actions, or action intent without verifiable execution against the environment. As a result, they fail to capture the long-horizon, composite workflows that characterize real clinical systems. PhysicianBench comprises 100 long-horizon tasks adapted from real consultation cases between primary care and subspecialty physicians, with each task independently reviewed by a separate panel of physicians. Tasks are instantiated in an EHR environment with real patient records and accessed through the same standard APIs used by commercial EHR vendors. Tasks span 21 specialties (e.g., cardiology, endocrinology, oncology, psychiatry) and diverse workflow types (e.g., diagnosis interpretation, medication prescribing, treatment planning), requiring an average of 27 tool calls per task. Solving each task requires retrieving data across encounters, reasoning over heterogeneous clinical information, executing consequential clinical actions, and producing clinical documentation. Each task is decomposed into structured checkpoints (670 in total across the benchmark) capturing distinct stages of completion graded by task-specific scripts with execution-grounded verification. Across 13 proprietary and open-source LLM agents, the best-performing model achieves only 46% success rate (pass@1), while open-source models reach at most 19%, revealing a substantial gap between current agent capabilities and the demands of real-world clinical workflows. PhysicianBench provides a realistic and execution-grounded benchmark for measuring progress toward autonomous clinical agents.

analysis.tldr: PhysicianBench 是一个基于真实电子健康记录环境的 LLM Agent 基准，包含 100 个长时程临床任务，最佳模型仅 46% 成功率，揭示当前 Agent 与真实临床工作流之间的巨大差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医疗 Agent 基准主要关注静态知识回忆或单步原子动作，缺乏对真实临床系统中长时程、复合工作流的评估，无法反映实际临床需求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个能够评估 LLM Agent 在真实 EHR 环境中执行多步骤、复合临床任务能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳模型（闭源）仅达到 46% 成功率，开源模型最高 19%，表明当前 LLM Agent 在真实临床工作流中表现远未达到实用水平。
analysis.method: 构建包含 100 个长时程任务的基准，任务源自真实会诊案例，在 EHR 环境中通过标准 API 执行，每个任务平均需 27 次工具调用，并分解为 670 个结构化检查点进行执行验证。
contributions: 提出了 PhysicianBench，首个基于真实 EHR 环境、执行验证的 LLM Agent 基准，覆盖 21 个专科和多种工作流类型。
通过 13 个模型的评估，揭示了当前 LLM Agent 在真实临床工作流中的显著不足，为未来研究提供基准。
analysis.experiments: 在 13 个专有和开源 LLM Agent 上评估，最佳模型 pass@1 为 46%，开源模型最高 19%。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 基准规模有限（100 个任务），可能无法覆盖所有临床场景。
任务基于特定 EHR 环境，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysicianBench 是一个基于真实电子健康记录环境的 LLM Agent 基准，包含 100 个长时程临床任务，最佳模型仅 46% 成功率，揭示当前 Agent 与真实临床工作流之间的巨大差距。

papers.title: Perturbation Dose Responses in Recursive LLM Loops: Raw Switching, Stochastic Floors, and Persistent Escape under Append, Replace, and Dialog Updates
papers.abstract: Recursive language-model loops often settle into recognizable attractor-like patterns. The practical question is how much injected text is needed to move a settled loop somewhere else, and whether that move lasts. We study this in 30-step recursive loops by separating the model from the context-update rule: append, replace, and dialog updates expose different histories to the same generator. The main result is that persistent redirection in append-mode recursive loops is memory-policy-conditioned. Under a 12,000-character tail clip, destination-coherent persistence plateaus near 16 percent and retained source-basin escape near 36 percent at dose 400; neither crosses 50 percent. Under a full-history protocol, retained source-basin escape crosses 50 percent near 400 tokens and saturates at 75-80 percent by 1,500 tokens; destination-coherent persistence first reaches 0.50 near 1,500 tokens (Wilson 95 percent CI [0.41, 0.61]). A four-step falsification battery (heterogeneity control, granularity sweep with hierarchical macro-merge, transition-entropy diagnostic, and long-horizon trajectory continuation) recasts the high-dose destination-coherent dip as a finite-horizon, endpoint-definition-sensitive feature rather than a stable structural asymmetry. Half the canonical magnitude is endpoint timing; the residual drops 73 percent from -0.143 at step 29 to -0.039 at step 79 under the frozen canonical cluster basis, bootstrap interval straddling zero. Replace-mode raw switching is near-saturated under the default protocol but largely reflects state-reset overwrite: insert-mode probes drop it to 12-32 percent. We report 37 experiments on gpt-4o-mini with within-vendor replication on gpt-4.1-nano. Recursive-loop evaluations should distinguish transient movement from durable escape, subtract stochastic floors, and treat context-update rules as safety-relevant design choices.

analysis.tldr: 递归LLM循环中，注入文本的剂量-响应行为取决于记忆策略和更新规则，持久重定向存在随机下限。
analysis.research_motivation: 递归语言模型循环常陷入吸引子模式，但需要多少注入文本才能改变这种模式以及改变是否持久，是实际应用中的关键问题，尤其对安全对齐有重要意义。
analysis.problem: 量化递归LLM循环中，不同上下文更新规则（追加、替换、对话）下，注入文本剂量对模型输出重定向的持久性和随机下限的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在30步递归循环中，持久重定向受记忆策略影响：12,000字符截断下，目标一致持久性约16%，源盆地逃逸约36%，均未超过50%；全历史协议下，源盆地逃逸在400 tokens时超过50%，1,500 tokens时饱和至75-80%，目标一致持久性在1,500 tokens时达0.50。高剂量下的目标一致下降被四步证伪测试揭示为有限视界和终点定义敏感特征，而非稳定结构不对称。替换模式下的原始切换接近饱和，但主要反映状态重置覆盖。
analysis.method: 通过分离模型与上下文更新规则（追加、替换、对话），在30步递归循环中系统性地注入不同剂量的文本，并测量重定向的持久性和逃逸率，同时应用四步证伪测试（异质性控制、粒度扫描与层次宏合并、转移熵诊断、长视界轨迹延续）来区分瞬态移动与持久逃逸。
contributions: 揭示了递归LLM循环中持久重定向的记忆策略条件性，并量化了剂量-响应曲线。
提出了四步证伪测试框架，用于区分瞬态移动与持久逃逸，并识别随机下限。
通过37个实验（gpt-4o-mini和gpt-4.1-nano）验证了上下文更新规则作为安全相关设计选择的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在gpt-4o-mini上进行了37个实验，并在gpt-4.1-nano上进行了供应商内复制。实验包括不同记忆策略（12,000字符截断 vs 全历史）、不同更新规则（追加、替换、对话）以及四步证伪测试。
limitations: 仅测试了gpt-4o-mini和gpt-4.1-nano两个模型，泛化性有限。
递归循环步数固定为30步，更长循环的行为可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 递归LLM循环中，注入文本的剂量-响应行为取决于记忆策略和更新规则，持久重定向存在随机下限。

papers.title: Bucketing the Good Apples: A Method for Diagnosing and Improving Causal Abstraction
papers.abstract: We present a method for diagnosing interpretation in neural networks by identifying an input subspace where a proposed interpretation is highly faithful. Our method is particularly useful for causal-abstraction-style interpretability, where a high-level causal hypothesis is evaluated by interchange interventions. Rather than treating interchange intervention accuracy as a single global summary, we refine this framework by partitioning the input space into well-interpreted and under-interpreted regions according to pairwise interchange-intervention behavior. This turns causal abstraction from a purely global evaluation into a more diagnostic tool: it not only measures whether an interpretation works, but also reveals where it works, where it fails, and what distinguishes the two cases. This diagnostic view also provides practical heuristics for improving interpretations. By analyzing the structure of the well-interpreted and under-interpreted regions, we can identify missing distinctions in a high-level hypothesis, discover previously unmodeled intermediate variables, and combine complementary partial interpretations into a stronger one. We instantiate this idea as a simple four-step recipe and show that it yields informative error analyses across multiple causal abstraction settings. In a toy logic task, recursively applying the recipe recovers a high-level hypothesis from scratch. More broadly, our results suggest that partitioning the input space is a useful step toward more precise, constructive, and scalable mechanistic interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 通过划分输入空间诊断因果抽象解释的忠实性，并指导改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有因果抽象可解释性方法将互换干预准确率作为全局指标，无法揭示解释在输入空间中的局部失效模式，限制了其诊断和改进能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将因果抽象从全局评估转变为可诊断工具，识别解释有效和失效的区域，并利用这些信息改进解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一种四步法：基于成对互换干预行为将输入空间划分为“良好解释”和“欠解释”区域，分析区域结构以识别缺失区分、发现未建模中间变量，并组合互补的部分解释。
contributions: 提出将输入空间划分用于诊断因果抽象解释的方法，将全局评估转化为局部诊断工具。
展示了该方法在多个因果抽象设置中提供信息丰富的错误分析，并能递归地从零恢复高层假设。
analysis.experiments: 在玩具逻辑任务上验证，递归应用方法可从零恢复高层假设；摘要未提供其他实验细节。
limitations: 方法可能依赖任务结构，在复杂神经网络上扩展性待验证。
划分输入空间的计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过划分输入空间诊断因果抽象解释的忠实性，并指导改进。

papers.title: InfiltrNet: Dual-Branch CNN-Transformer Architecture for Brain Tumor Infiltration Risk Prediction
papers.abstract: Gliomas are aggressive brain tumors that infiltrate surrounding tissue beyond the visible tumor margins observed on Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI). Predicting the spatial extent of this infiltration is essential for surgical planning and radiation therapy, yet existing deep learning approaches focus on segmenting the visible tumor rather than estimating infiltration risk in the surrounding tissue. This paper presents InfiltrNet, a novel dual-branch architecture that combines a convolutional neural network (CNN) encoder with a Swin Transformer encoder through cross-attention fusion modules to predict three-zone infiltration risk maps from multimodal MRI. A label generation strategy based on distance transforms is proposed to derive reproducible infiltration risk zones from standard Brain Tumor Segmentation (BraTS) annotations. InfiltrNet is trained with a combined Dice-CrossEntropy and boundary-aware loss augmented by auxiliary supervision heads at intermediate decoder levels. Extensive experiments on BraTS 2020 and BraTS 2025 demonstrate that InfiltrNet outperforms five established baselines. Explainability analysis using GradCAM++ and Occlusion sensitivity confirms that the model attends to clinically relevant peritumoral regions.

analysis.tldr: InfiltrNet 结合 CNN 与 Swin Transformer 双分支架构，通过交叉注意力融合预测脑肿瘤浸润风险图。
analysis.research_motivation: 胶质瘤会浸润 MRI 可见肿瘤边缘外的组织，现有方法仅分割可见肿瘤，无法预测浸润风险，影响手术和放疗规划。
analysis.problem: 从多模态 MRI 预测脑肿瘤周围组织的三区域浸润风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 双分支架构：CNN 编码器 + Swin Transformer 编码器，通过交叉注意力融合模块，结合距离变换标签生成策略和混合损失函数（Dice-CrossEntropy + 边界感知损失 + 辅助监督头）。
contributions: 提出 InfiltrNet 双分支 CNN-Transformer 架构用于脑肿瘤浸润风险预测。
设计基于距离变换的标签生成策略，从 BraTS 标注导出可复现的浸润风险区域。
在 BraTS 2020 和 BraTS 2025 上超越五个基线，并通过可解释性分析验证模型关注临床相关区域。
analysis.experiments: 在 BraTS 2020 和 BraTS 2025 数据集上评估，与五个基线方法对比，使用 GradCAM++ 和 Occlusion sensitivity 进行可解释性分析。
limitations: 可能依赖 BraTS 标注质量，距离变换标签的临床意义需进一步验证。
双分支架构计算开销较大，实时性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: InfiltrNet 结合 CNN 与 Swin Transformer 双分支架构，通过交叉注意力融合预测脑肿瘤浸润风险图。

papers.title: Toward Fine-Grained Speech Inpainting Forensics:A Dataset, Method, and Metric for Multi-Region Tampering Localization
papers.abstract: Recent advances in voice cloning and text-to-speech synthesis have made partial speech manipulation - where an adversary replaces a few words within an utterance to alter its meaning while preserving the speaker's identity - an increasingly realistic threat. Existing audio deepfake detection benchmarks focus on utterance-level binary classification or single-region tampering, leaving a critical gap in detecting and localizing multiple inpainted segments whose count is unknown a priori. We address this gap with three contributions. First, we introduce MIST (Multiregion Inpainting Speech Tampering), a large-scale multilingual dataset spanning 6 languages with 1-3 independently inpainted word-level segments per utterance, generated via LLM-guided semantic replacement and neural voice cloning, with fake content constituting only 2-7% of each utterance. Second, we propose ISA (Iterative Segment Analysis), a backbone-agnostic framework that performs coarse-to-fine sliding-window classification with gap-tolerant region proposal and boundary refinement to recover all tampered regions without prior knowledge of their count. Third, we define SF1@tau, a segment-level F1 metric based on temporal IoU matching that jointly evaluates region count accuracy and localization precision. Zero-shot evaluation reveals that partial inpainting at word granularity remains unsolved by existing deepfake detectors: utterance-level classifiers trained on fully synthesized speech assign near zero fake probability to MIST utterances where only 2-7% of content is manipulated. ISA consistently outperforms non-iterative baselines in this challenging setting, and the dataset, code, and evaluation toolkit are publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向细粒度语音修补取证的数据集、方法和评估指标，解决多区域篡改定位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语音深度伪造检测聚焦于整句二分类或单区域篡改，无法应对未知数量的多区域词级修补攻击，存在安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 检测并定位语音中多个未知数量的词级修补片段。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 零样本评估显示，现有深度伪造检测器对仅含2-7%伪造内容的词级修补语音几乎无法识别（假概率接近0），表明细粒度局部篡改是未被解决的挑战。
analysis.method: 提出ISA（迭代片段分析）框架，通过粗到细的滑动窗口分类、容忍间隙的区域提议和边界细化，无需先验知识即可恢复所有篡改区域。
contributions: 构建MIST多语言数据集，包含6种语言、每句1-3个独立词级修补片段，伪造内容仅占2-7%。
提出ISA框架，实现未知数量多区域篡改的定位。
定义SF1@tau指标，联合评估区域数量准确性和定位精度。
analysis.experiments: 零样本评估显示现有检测器失效，ISA在挑战性设置下持续优于非迭代基线。数据集、代码和评估工具已公开。
limitations: 仅考虑1-3个修补区域，更复杂场景未验证。
依赖LLM引导的语义替换，可能引入特定偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向细粒度语音修补取证的数据集、方法和评估指标，解决多区域篡改定位问题。

papers.title: Generative Modeling with Orbit-Space Particle Flow Matching
papers.abstract: We present Orbit-Space Geometric Probability Paths (OGPP), a particle-native flow-matching framework for generative modeling of particle systems. OGPP is motivated by two insights: (i) particles are defined up to permutation symmetries, so anonymous indexing inflates per-index target variance and yields curved, hard-to-learn flows; and (ii) particles live in physical space, so the flow terminal velocity has physical meaning and can encode geometric attributes, e.g., surface normals. OGPP instantiates three key components: (1) orbit-space canonicalization of the probability-path terminal endpoint, (2) particle index embeddings for role specialization, and (3) geometric probability paths with arc-length-aware terminal velocities that generate normals as a byproduct of the flow. We evaluate OGPP on minimal-surface benchmarks, where it reduces metric error by up to two orders of magnitude in a single inference step; on ShapeNet, where it matches the state of the art with 5x fewer steps and reaches airplane EMD comparable to DiT-3D with 26x fewer parameters and 5x fewer steps; and on single-shape encoding, where it produces normals and reconstructions competitive with 6D generators while operating entirely in 3D.

analysis.tldr: 提出轨道空间粒子流匹配框架OGPP，利用置换对称性和几何路径实现高效粒子系统生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有粒子生成模型忽略置换对称性导致流形弯曲难学，且未利用粒子物理空间中的几何属性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计粒子原生流匹配框架，同时利用置换对称性和几何路径提升生成效率与质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 匿名索引导致每索引目标方差增大，产生弯曲难学的流；终端速度具有物理意义可编码几何属性。
analysis.method: OGPP框架包含三个组件：轨道空间概率路径终点规范化、粒子索引嵌入实现角色特化、弧长感知终端速度的几何概率路径。
contributions: 提出轨道空间规范化方法消除置换对称性带来的学习困难
设计几何概率路径，终端速度自然生成表面法线等几何属性
在多个基准上实现数量级效率提升，参数更少
analysis.experiments: 在最小曲面基准上单步推理误差降低两个数量级；ShapeNet上5倍步数达到SOTA，飞机EMD与DiT-3D相当但参数少26倍；单形状编码中法线和重建与6D生成器竞争。
limitations: 可能仅适用于粒子系统，泛化性待验证
轨道空间规范化计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轨道空间粒子流匹配框架OGPP，利用置换对称性和几何路径实现高效粒子系统生成。

papers.title: CoVSpec: Efficient Device-Edge Co-Inference for Vision-Language Models via Speculative Decoding
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in multimodal perception and reasoning. However, deploying large VLMs on mobile devices remains challenging due to their substantial computational and memory demands. A practical alternative is device-edge co-inference, where a lightweight draft VLM on the mobile device collaborates with a larger target VLM on the edge server via speculative decoding. Nevertheless, directly extending speculative decoding to VLMs suffers from severe inefficiency due to excessive visual-token computation and high communication overhead. To address these challenges, we propose CoVSpec, an efficient collaborative speculative decoding framework for VLM inference. Specifically, we first develop a training-free visual token reduction framework that prunes redundant visual tokens on the mobile device by jointly considering query relevance, token activity, and low-rank dependency. Moreover, we design an adaptive drafting strategy that dynamically adjusts both the verification frequency and the draft length. In addition, we introduce a parallel branching mechanism with decoupled verification-correction to improve draft-side utilization during target-side verification and reduce correction-related transmission overhead. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show that CoVSpec achieves up to 2.21x higher throughput than target-only inference and reduces communication overhead by more than 96% compared with baselines, without compromising task accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoVSpec框架，通过无训练视觉令牌剪枝、自适应草稿策略和并行分支机制，实现VLM在设备-边缘协同推理中的高效投机解码。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型VLM在移动设备上部署面临计算和内存瓶颈，设备-边缘协同推理是一种可行方案，但直接应用投机解码存在视觉令牌计算冗余和通信开销大的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何减少VLM协同推理中视觉令牌的冗余计算和通信开销，同时保持推理效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接扩展投机解码到VLM会导致严重的低效，原因在于过多的视觉令牌计算和高通信开销。
analysis.method: 提出CoVSpec框架，包含三个核心组件：1）无训练视觉令牌剪枝，通过联合考虑查询相关性、令牌活跃度和低秩依赖来剪枝冗余视觉令牌；2）自适应草稿策略，动态调整验证频率和草稿长度；3）并行分支机制，在目标端验证时解耦验证与修正，提高草稿端利用率并减少修正相关的传输开销。
contributions: 提出CoVSpec，首个针对VLM设备-边缘协同推理的高效投机解码框架。
设计无训练视觉令牌剪枝方法，有效减少冗余计算。
引入自适应草稿策略和并行分支机制，显著降低通信开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上实验，CoVSpec相比目标端单独推理吞吐量提升最高2.21倍，相比基线通信开销降低超过96%，且不损失任务精度。
limitations: 可能依赖特定VLM架构，泛化性需进一步验证。
无训练剪枝方法可能在某些场景下效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoVSpec框架，通过无训练视觉令牌剪枝、自适应草稿策略和并行分支机制，实现VLM在设备-边缘协同推理中的高效投机解码。

papers.title: NTIRE 2026 Challenge on Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement: Methods and Results
papers.abstract: This paper presents a comprehensive review of the NITRE 2026 Efficient Low Light Image Enhancement (E-LLIE) Challenge, highlighting the proposed solutions and final outcomes. This challenge focuses on mobile image enhancement under low-light conditions, aiming to design lightweight networks that improve enhancement quality while ensuring practical deployability under limited computational resources. A total of 207 participants registered, 27 teams submitted valid entries, and 17 teams ultimately provided valid factsheet. Based on these submissions, this paper provides a systematic evaluation of recent methods for E-LLIE, offering a comprehensive overview of state-of-the-art progress and demonstrating significant improvements in both performance and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: NTIRE 2026挑战赛综述，聚焦低光图像增强的轻量级网络设计，评估了27个参赛方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光图像增强在移动设备上部署时面临计算资源有限的瓶颈，现有方法难以兼顾增强质量与轻量化需求。
analysis.problem: 设计轻量级网络，在有限计算资源下实现高效低光图像增强。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过组织挑战赛，收集并系统评估27个参赛团队提出的轻量级低光图像增强方法。
contributions: 提供了NTIRE 2026 E-LLIE挑战赛的全面综述，包括参赛方案和最终结果。
系统评估了当前低光图像增强方法在性能与效率上的最新进展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未深入分析单个方法的创新点。
挑战赛结果可能受限于特定数据集和评价指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NTIRE 2026挑战赛综述，聚焦低光图像增强的轻量级网络设计，评估了27个参赛方案。

papers.title: Privacy-Preserving Federated Learning: Integrating Zero-Knowledge Proofs in Scalable Distributed Architectures
papers.abstract: The intersection of Artificial Intelligence (AI) and distributed systems has given rise to Federated Learning (FL), a paradigm that enables decentralized model training without compromising local data privacy. As organizational data silos grow, deploying complex machine learning models across highly distributed edge networks becomes a critical infrastructural challenge. Standard FL implementations suffer from severe vulnerabilities related to adversarial gradient updates and computational bottlenecks at the aggregation layer. This paper presents a novel, end-to-end distributed architecture that hardens FL pipelines using advanced cryptographic verification and optimized big data processing frameworks. We introduce a Zero-Knowledge Proof (ZKP) wrapper that cryptographically validates node computations before global aggregation, neutralizing model poisoning attacks without inspecting raw gradients. Additionally, we evaluate the system's performance using extreme gradient boosting models optimized for distributed edge execution. We formalize the mathematical transformation of the machine learning loss functions into Rank-1 Constraint Systems (R1CS) suitable for succinct verification. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that our hybrid architecture achieves a 94.2\% accuracy retention under adversarial conditions while maintaining scalable throughput across 1,000 parallel distributed nodes, effectively bridging the gap between rigorous cryptographic security and high-performance distributed AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种集成零知识证明的联邦学习架构，在保持高吞吐量的同时防御梯度投毒攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习面临梯度投毒攻击和聚合层计算瓶颈，现有方案难以兼顾安全性与可扩展性。
analysis.problem: 如何在分布式联邦学习系统中实现可扩展的隐私保护与对抗鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准联邦学习对恶意梯度更新缺乏防御，且聚合层存在计算瓶颈。
analysis.method: 在联邦学习聚合前引入零知识证明包装器，将模型损失函数转化为Rank-1约束系统进行简洁验证，结合优化的大数据处理框架。
contributions: 提出集成零知识证明的联邦学习架构，在不检查原始梯度的情况下防御模型投毒攻击。
将机器学习损失函数形式化为适用于简洁验证的R1CS。
在1000个分布式节点上验证了94.2%的准确率保持和可扩展吞吐量。
analysis.experiments: 在1000个并行分布式节点上使用极端梯度提升模型进行实验，对抗条件下准确率保持94.2%。
limitations: 仅评估了极端梯度提升模型，未涉及深度神经网络。
零知识证明的计算开销可能影响实时性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种集成零知识证明的联邦学习架构，在保持高吞吐量的同时防御梯度投毒攻击。

papers.title: Submodular Benchmark Selection
papers.abstract: Evaluating large language models across many benchmarks is expensive, yet many benchmarks are highly correlated. We formalize the selection of a small, informative subset as submodular maximization under a multivariate Gaussian model. Entropy (log-determinant covariance) and mutual information between selected and remaining benchmarks arise as natural objectives. Both are submodular; entropy selection coincides with pivoted Cholesky and has spectral residual bounds, while mutual information is non-monotone in general but empirically monotone for small subsets, so we optimize it greedily. Experiments on three matrices from ten public leaderboards show that mutual information selection outperforms entropy for imputation at small subsets.

analysis.tldr: 将基准选择形式化为子模最大化，用互信息选择小规模子集以高效评估大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 评估大语言模型需要大量基准测试，成本高昂，且许多基准高度相关，因此需要选择信息量大的小子集来降低评估成本。
analysis.problem: 如何从大量相关基准中自动选择一个小而信息丰富的子集，以高效评估模型性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将基准选择形式化为多元高斯模型下的子模最大化，以熵（对数行列式协方差）和互信息作为目标函数，并采用贪心算法优化。
contributions: 形式化了基准选择问题为子模最大化，并证明熵和互信息是子模函数。
揭示了熵选择与枢轴Cholesky分解的联系，并给出了谱残差界。
实验表明互信息选择在小子集上优于熵选择。
analysis.experiments: 在来自十个公开排行榜的三个矩阵上进行了实验，比较了互信息与熵在插值任务上的表现。
limitations: 假设基准服从多元高斯分布，可能不适用于非高斯数据。
互信息在一般情况下非单调，虽然经验上单调，但理论保证有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将基准选择形式化为子模最大化，用互信息选择小规模子集以高效评估大模型。

papers.title: MultiSense-Pneumo: A Multimodal Learning Framework for Pneumonia Screening in Resource-Constrained Settings
papers.abstract: Pneumonia remains a leading global cause of morbidity and mortality, particularly in low resource settings where access to imaging, laboratory testing, and specialist care is limited. Clinical assessment relies on heterogeneous evidence, including symptoms, respiratory patterns, and chest imaging, making screening inherently multimodal. However, many existing computational approaches remain unimodal and focus primarily on radiographs. In this work, we present MultiSense-Pneumo, a multimodal framework for pneumonia oriented screening and triage support that integrates structured symptom descriptors, cough audio, spoken language, and chest radiographs. The system combines deterministic symptom triage, LightGBM based acoustic classification, domain adversarial radiograph analysis using ResNet 18, transformer based speech recognition, and an interpretable multimodal fusion operator. Each modality is transformed into a normalized risk signal and aggregated into a unified screening estimate, enabling transparent and modular decision support. MultiSense-Pneumo is designed for real world deployment under modest computational constraints and can operate fully offline on standard laptop class hardware, making it suitable for community health workers, rural clinics, and emergency response settings. Experimental results demonstrate robustness of the radiograph pathway under domain shifts, while highlighting limitations in minority class recall for acoustic signals. MultiSense-Pneumo is intended as a research prototype for screening and triage support rather than a clinically validated diagnostic system.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个结合症状、咳嗽音频、语音和X光的多模态肺炎筛查框架，专为资源受限环境设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 肺炎在资源匮乏地区致死率高，现有方法多依赖单一模态（如X光），缺乏整合多种临床证据的轻量级筛查工具。
analysis.problem: 如何在低计算资源、离线环境下，融合异构临床数据（症状、音频、语音、影像）实现肺炎筛查与分诊支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出放射学路径在域偏移下表现稳健，但音频信号的少数类召回率存在局限。
analysis.method: 多模态框架：确定性症状分诊 + LightGBM音频分类 + ResNet-18域对抗X光分析 + Transformer语音识别 + 可解释融合算子，各模态输出归一化风险信号后聚合。
contributions: 提出首个整合症状、咳嗽音频、语音和X光的多模态肺炎筛查框架
设计轻量级、可离线部署的系统，适用于社区医疗等资源受限场景
analysis.experiments: 摘要提及实验显示放射学路径在域偏移下鲁棒，但音频少数类召回率有限；未提供具体数值或基准对比。
limitations: 音频模态在少数类上召回率不足
仅为研究原型，未经临床验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个结合症状、咳嗽音频、语音和X光的多模态肺炎筛查框架，专为资源受限环境设计。

papers.title: Metric Unreliability in Multimodal Machine Unlearning: A Systematic Analysis and Principled Unified Score
papers.abstract: Machine unlearning in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) is required for compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), yet current evaluation practices are inconsistent. We present the first systematic study of metric reliability in multimodal unlearning. Five standard metrics, Forget Accuracy (FA), Retain Accuracy (RA), Membership Inference Attack (MIA), Activation Distance (AD), and JS divergence (JS), yield conflicting method rankings across three VQA benchmarks (MLLMU-Bench, UnLOK-VQA, MMUBench). Kendall tau analysis over 36 unlearned LLaVA-1.5-7B models reveals two opposing clusters, {FA, RA, MIA} and {AD, JS}, with tau_FA_AD = -0.26, reproduced on BLIP-2 OPT-2.7B. Agreement is lower in multimodal VQA (average tau = 0.086) than in unimodal classification (average tau = 0.158; difference = 0.072), indicating that dual image-and-text pathways amplify inconsistency. We introduce the Unified Quality Score (UQS), a composite metric with weights derived from each metric's Spearman correlation with the oracle distance d(M_hat, M_star), where M_star is the oracle model retrained only on the retain set. RA shows the strongest reliability (rho = 0.484, p = 0.003), while FA is negatively correlated (rho = -0.418, p = 0.011). UQS yields stable rankings under 100 random weight perturbations (tau = 0.647 +- 0.262). We release the benchmark, 36 checkpoints, and an interactive leaderboard. Code and pre-computed results are available at https://github.com/neurips26/UnifiedUnl.

analysis.tldr: 多模态机器遗忘评估指标存在冲突，本文提出统一质量分数UQS以稳定排名。
analysis.research_motivation: GDPR要求机器遗忘，但多模态VLM遗忘的评估指标不一致，导致方法排名冲突，缺乏可靠评估标准。
analysis.problem: 多模态机器遗忘中现有评估指标（FA、RA、MIA、AD、JS）产生冲突排名，需要系统分析并设计统一可靠指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 五个标准指标在三个VQA基准上产生冲突排名，Kendall tau分析显示{FA, RA, MIA}与{AD, JS}两个对立簇；多模态VQA中指标一致性（平均tau=0.086）低于单模态分类（平均tau=0.158），表明图像-文本双路径放大不一致性。
analysis.method: 提出统一质量分数UQS，基于各指标与oracle距离的Spearman相关系数加权组合，权重由可靠性决定。
contributions: 首次系统研究多模态机器遗忘中指标可靠性，揭示指标冲突现象。
提出UQS复合指标，通过oracle相关性自动确定权重，提供稳定排名。
发布基准、36个检查点和交互式排行榜。
analysis.experiments: 在LLaVA-1.5-7B和BLIP-2 OPT-2.7B上评估，使用三个VQA基准（MLLMU-Bench, UnLOK-VQA, MMUBench），进行Kendall tau分析和Spearman相关性检验，UQS在100次随机权重扰动下保持稳定（tau=0.647±0.262）。
limitations: UQS依赖oracle模型，计算成本高。
仅验证了VQA任务，其他多模态任务未测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多模态机器遗忘评估指标存在冲突，本文提出统一质量分数UQS以稳定排名。

papers.title: CBV: Clean-label Backdoor Attacks on Vision Language Models via Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have achieved remarkable success in tasks such as image captioning and visual question answering (VQA). However, as their applications become increasingly widespread, recent studies have revealed that VLMs are vulnerable to backdoor attacks. Existing backdoor attacks on VLMs primarily rely on data poisoning by adding visual triggers and modifying text labels, where the induced image-text mismatch makes poisoned samples easy to detect. To address this limitation, we propose the Clean-Label Backdoor Attack on VLMs via Diffusion Models (CBV), which leverages diffusion models to generate natural poisoned examples via score matching. Specifically, CBV modifies the score during the reverse generation process of the diffusion model to guide the generation of poisoned samples that contain triggered image features. To further enhance the effectiveness of the attack, we incorporate the textual information of the triggered images as multimodal guidance during generation. Moreover, to enhance stealthiness, we introduce a GradCAM-guided Mask (GM) that restricts modifications to only the most semantically important regions, rather than the entire image. We evaluate our method on MSCOCO and VQA v2 with four representative VLMs, achieving over 80% ASR while preserving normal functionality.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于扩散模型的干净标签后门攻击方法，通过修改生成过程的分数和引入多模态引导及GradCAM掩码，实现高攻击成功率且不易被检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有针对视觉语言模型的后门攻击依赖添加视觉触发器并修改文本标签，导致图像-文本不匹配，易被检测，亟需更隐蔽的攻击方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改标签的情况下，生成自然且隐蔽的带后门样本，实现对视觉语言模型的有效攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用扩散模型，在逆向生成过程中修改分数以引导生成含触发图像特征的样本；结合触发图像的文本信息作为多模态引导；引入GradCAM引导的掩码，仅修改语义重要区域。
contributions: 提出CBV，一种基于扩散模型的干净标签后门攻击方法，无需修改标签即可生成自然样本。
引入多模态引导和GradCAM掩码，增强攻击的隐蔽性和有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MSCOCO和VQA v2上对四种代表性VLM进行评估，攻击成功率超过80%且保持正常功能。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的生成质量，对低质量生成模型效果有限。
仅针对视觉语言模型，未验证在其他多模态模型上的泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于扩散模型的干净标签后门攻击方法，通过修改生成过程的分数和引入多模态引导及GradCAM掩码，实现高攻击成功率且不易被检测。

papers.title: Super-Resolution of Airborne Laser Scanning Point Clouds for Forest Inventory
papers.abstract: Airborne Laser Scanning (ALS) can collect point clouds across large areas, enabling large-scale forest inventory. However, ALS point clouds are sparse and noisy, resulting in inaccurate individual-tree-level forest inventory, such as stem localization and tree size estimation. To overcome this problem, we propose a deep learning model, 3D Forest Super Resolution (3DFSR), to simultaneously improve point density and reduce noise for ALS forest point cloud. 3DFSR is a voxel-based CNN with a U-Net architecture. The proposed 3DFSR is evaluated on ALS point clouds collected in both temperate forests in the U.S. and boreal forests in Germany. Experimental results demonstrate that 3DFSR can generate finer point clouds of tree structure than other state-of-the-art point cloud super-resolution algorithms, achieving 0.249 m Chamfer Distance and 2.711 m Hausdorff Distance. Furthermore, to verify the effectiveness of 3DFSR point clouds in forest inventory, we conduct stem detection, DBH measurements, and stem reconstruction on both original ALS point clouds and 3DFSR enhanced point clouds. We find that stem detection and reconstruction algorithms developed for TLS/MLS point clouds can directly work on our 3DFSR point clouds, and DBH can be derived with circle-fitting method. F1 score of stem detection is improved from 0.71 on original ALS point clouds to 0.97 on 3DFSR point clouds; DBH estimation improves from 13.45 cm RMSE using allometric equations to 6.43 cm using circle fitting; comparing to stems reconstruction from MLS point clouds, stem reconstructed from 3DFSR point clouds has 0.170 m of Chamfer Distance and 0.377 m of Hausdorff Distance, and 0.95 R2 volume estimation. Finally, we find that the proposed 3DFSR is applicable to process point densities from 10 to 1700 points/m2; it also can be generalized across data collected from different LiDAR platforms without transfer learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出3DFSR模型，对机载激光扫描点云进行超分辨率重建，显著提升森林调查中树干检测和胸径估计的精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 机载激光扫描（ALS）点云稀疏且噪声大，导致单木级森林调查（如树干定位、树木尺寸估计）不准确，而现有方法难以同时提升点密度和降低噪声。
analysis.problem: 如何通过深度学习模型同时提高ALS森林点云的点密度并减少噪声，以支持精确的森林调查。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出3DFSR，一种基于体素CNN的U-Net架构，用于ALS森林点云的超分辨率重建。
contributions: 提出3DFSR模型，能同时提升点密度和降低噪声，生成精细的树结构点云。
在温带和寒带森林数据集上验证，点云质量优于现有超分辨率算法，且能直接应用于森林调查任务（树干检测、胸径测量、树干重建）。
analysis.experiments: 在美国温带森林和德国寒带森林的ALS点云上评估，与SOTA超分辨率算法比较，Chamfer距离0.249 m，Hausdorff距离2.711 m；树干检测F1从0.71提升至0.97，DBH估计RMSE从13.45 cm降至6.43 cm；树干重建与MLS点云对比，Chamfer距离0.170 m，Hausdorff距离0.377 m，体积估计R²=0.95。模型适用于10-1700 points/m²的点密度，且可跨平台泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖特定体素分辨率，对极高密度点云效率未知。
仅针对森林场景，泛化到其他植被类型需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出3DFSR模型，对机载激光扫描点云进行超分辨率重建，显著提升森林调查中树干检测和胸径估计的精度。

papers.title: MEMAUDIT: An Exact Package-Oracle Evaluation Protocol for Budgeted Long-Term LLM Memory Writing
papers.abstract: Long-term LLM agents must compress streams of past interactions into persistent memory before future queries are known. Existing evaluations usually measure final question-answering accuracy, which entangles memory writing with retrieval, prompting, and reader reasoning. We introduce MEMAUDIT, an exact packageoracle evaluation protocol for budgeted long-term memory writing. A MEMAUDIT package fixes an experience stream, candidate memory representations, storage costs, semantic evidence units, future-query requirements, and a budget, turning write-time memory selection into a finite auditable optimization problem with a certified denominator. We instantiate this protocol with a concave-over-modular semantic coverage objective under storage and one-representation-per-experience constraints, and compute exact package optima using branch-and-bound with MILP certification. Across controlled exact packages, validity-heavy stress tests, human-audited natural support slices, and exported Mem0, A-Mem, and Letta stores, MEMAUDIT separates representation quality, validity-state preservation, and budget-aware selection effects that end-to-end QA cannot localize. The resulting artifact provides reusable package generators, certified solvers, natural package exports, external-system scorers, and cached reproducibility metadata for evaluating what memory writers actually preserve under fixed storage budgets.

analysis.tldr: 提出MEMAUDIT协议，将长时记忆写入评估解耦为可审计的优化问题，并精确分离表示质量、有效性保持和预算感知选择效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长时LLM记忆评估通常依赖最终问答准确率，混淆了记忆写入与检索、提示和推理的影响，无法定位记忆写入的具体瓶颈。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个精确、可审计的评估协议，在固定存储预算下分离记忆写入中的表示质量、有效性保持和预算感知选择效应。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MEMAUDIT协议，将记忆写入转化为带存储和单表示约束的凹-模语义覆盖优化问题，并使用分支定界与MILP认证计算精确最优解。
contributions: 提出MEMAUDIT，一种精确的包-预言机评估协议，将长时记忆写入评估转化为可审计的优化问题。
实例化凹-模语义覆盖目标，并利用分支定界和MILP认证计算精确最优解。
通过受控精确包、压力测试、人工审计自然支持切片和外部系统导出，分离表示质量、有效性保持和预算感知选择效应。
提供可复用的包生成器、认证求解器、自然包导出、外部系统评分器和可复现性元数据。
analysis.experiments: 在受控精确包、有效性压力测试、人工审计自然支持切片以及Mem0、A-Mem和Letta存储导出上进行了实验。
limitations: 协议依赖预定义的语义证据单元和未来查询需求，可能无法覆盖所有实际场景。
精确求解的计算成本可能较高，在大规模流上可能需近似方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MEMAUDIT协议，将长时记忆写入评估解耦为可审计的优化问题，并精确分离表示质量、有效性保持和预算感知选择效应。

papers.title: SlimDiffSR: Toward Lightweight and Efficient Remote Sensing Image Super-Resolution via Diffusion Model Distillation
papers.abstract: Diffusion models have recently achieved remarkable performance in image super-resolution (SR), but their high computational cost limits practical deployment in remote sensing applications. To address this issue, we propose SlimDiffSR, a lightweight and efficient diffusion-based framework for real-world remote sensing image super-resolution. Unlike existing single-step diffusion methods that rely on fixed timesteps, we first introduce an uncertainty-guided timestep assignment strategy to construct a stronger single-step teacher model, where reconstruction difficulty is explicitly linked to diffusion timesteps, enabling adaptive generative strength. Building upon this teacher, we further present a structured pruning strategy tailored to remote sensing imagery, which systematically removes redundant semantic modules and replaces standard operations with lightweight designs, including frequency-separable convolution, direction-separable convolution, and a query-driven global aggregation module. These components explicitly exploit the unique characteristics of remote sensing data, such as sparse high-frequency details, strong directional patterns, and long-range spatial dependencies. To enhance knowledge transfer, we incorporate Maximum Mean Discrepancy (MMD) into the distillation process to align feature distributions between the teacher and student models. Extensive experiments on multiple remote sensing benchmarks demonstrate that SlimDiffSR achieves a favorable balance between efficiency and reconstruction quality. In particular, it attains up to $200\times$ inference acceleration and a $20\times$ reduction in model parameters compared with multi-step diffusion models, while achieving competitive perceptual quality and clearly outperforming existing lightweight diffusion baselines in efficiency. The code is available at: https://github.com/wwangcece/SlimDiffSR.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SlimDiffSR，通过不确定性引导的教师模型和结构化剪枝，实现轻量高效的遥感图像超分辨率扩散模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型在图像超分辨率中性能优异，但计算成本高，难以部署于遥感应用。现有单步扩散方法依赖固定时间步，未充分利用遥感数据特性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计轻量高效的扩散模型用于遥感图像超分辨率，同时保持重建质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 遥感图像具有稀疏高频细节、强方向模式和长程空间依赖等独特特性，现有轻量设计未充分挖掘这些特性。
analysis.method: 提出 SlimDiffSR，包括：1）不确定性引导的时间步分配策略构建更强单步教师模型；2）针对遥感图像的结构化剪枝策略，移除冗余语义模块并替换为频率可分离卷积、方向可分离卷积和查询驱动全局聚合模块；3）在蒸馏过程中引入最大均值差异（MMD）对齐特征分布。
contributions: 提出不确定性引导的时间步分配策略，将重建难度与扩散时间步显式关联，构建更强单步教师模型。
设计针对遥感图像的结构化剪枝策略，包含频率可分离卷积、方向可分离卷积和查询驱动全局聚合模块，实现轻量化。
在蒸馏中引入MMD对齐特征分布，提升知识迁移效果。
analysis.experiments: 在多个遥感基准数据集上实验，SlimDiffSR相比多步扩散模型实现高达200倍推理加速和20倍参数减少，在感知质量上具有竞争力，效率明显优于现有轻量扩散基线。
limitations: 可能仅在遥感图像上验证，泛化到其他领域需进一步测试。
剪枝策略可能对特定遥感数据集有依赖，需更多跨数据集验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SlimDiffSR，通过不确定性引导的教师模型和结构化剪枝，实现轻量高效的遥感图像超分辨率扩散模型。

papers.title: Trees and Graphs with Non Log-concave Dominating Set Sequence via AI Tools
papers.abstract: We give new examples of graphs and trees with dominating set sequences that are not log-concave. These examples were generated by PatternBoost, a transformer-based reinforcement learning software developed by Charton-Ellenberg-Wagner-Williamson. We also show: for any positive integer $m$, there exists a tree whose dominating set sequence is not log-concave for at least $m$ indices by modifying a similar construction of Bautista-Ramos for the independent set sequence. We show that a large class of caterpillar graphs has log-concave dominating set sequences. A continuous analogue of the sequence is also log-concave for all graphs.

analysis.tldr: 利用AI工具PatternBoost发现非对数凹的支配集序列图例，并证明树和毛虫图的序列性质。
analysis.research_motivation: 支配集序列的对数凹性是一个重要的组合性质，但已知例子有限，且缺乏系统性的反例发现方法。
analysis.problem: 寻找并构造非对数凹的支配集序列的图和树，并研究其性质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用PatternBoost（基于Transformer的强化学习软件）生成反例，并结合数学构造方法。
contributions: 给出新的非对数凹支配集序列的图和树的例子。
证明对任意正整数m，存在一棵树其支配集序列在至少m个指标上非对数凹。
证明一大类毛虫图具有对数凹的支配集序列。
证明所有图的支配集序列的连续类比是对数凹的。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: PatternBoost生成例子的可解释性可能有限。
结果主要针对支配集序列，其他序列的适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用AI工具PatternBoost发现非对数凹的支配集序列图例，并证明树和毛虫图的序列性质。

papers.title: When Alignment Isn't Enough: Response-Path Attacks on LLM Agents
papers.abstract: Bring-Your-Own-Key (BYOK) agent architectures let users route LLM traffic through third-party relays, creating a critical integrity gap: a malicious relay can modify an aligned LLM response after generation but before agent execution. We formalize this post-alignment tampering threat and show that, without end-to-end integrity, the relay can observe, suppress, or replace downstream messages, making even perfectly aligned LLMs ineffective against such attacks. We instantiate this threat as the Relay Tampering Attack (RTA), which performs multi-round strategic rewriting, minimal security-critical edits, and stealth restoration by resubmitting tampered outputs to the upstream LLM. Across AgentDojo and ASB with six LLMs, RTA achieves up to 99.1% attack success, outperforming prompt-injection baselines with modest overhead. Case studies on OpenClaw and Claude Code demonstrate real-world feasibility, and evaluations of four defenses show that none fully prevent RTA. Finally, we propose a time-based detection defense that mitigates RTA while preserving agent utility.

analysis.tldr: 提出后对齐篡改攻击（RTA），在LLM Agent架构中通过修改已对齐响应实现高成功率攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: BYOK架构中第三方中继可篡改LLM响应，破坏对齐安全性，现有方法未考虑此威胁。
analysis.problem: 解决LLM Agent中响应生成后、执行前的中继篡改攻击问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使LLM完美对齐，中继仍可观察、抑制或替换下游消息，使对齐失效。
analysis.method: 提出Relay Tampering Attack (RTA)，包括多轮策略重写、最小安全关键编辑和通过重新提交篡改输出到上游LLM的隐蔽恢复。
contributions: 形式化后对齐篡改威胁并定义RTA攻击
在AgentDojo和ASB上对六个LLM实现高达99.1%攻击成功率
在OpenClaw和Claude Code上验证现实可行性
评估四种防御并提出基于时间的检测防御
analysis.experiments: 在AgentDojo和ASB上对六个LLM进行实验，RTA攻击成功率高达99.1%，优于提示注入基线；案例研究在OpenClaw和Claude Code上展示现实可行性；评估四种防御均未完全阻止RTA。
limitations: 防御方案仅基于时间检测，可能被绕过
未考虑更复杂的端到端完整性机制
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出后对齐篡改攻击（RTA），在LLM Agent架构中通过修改已对齐响应实现高成功率攻击。

papers.title: RAFNet: Region-Aware Fusion Network for Pansharpening
papers.abstract: Pansharpening aims to generate high-resolution multispectral (HRMS) images by fusing low-resolution multispectral (LRMS) and high-resolution panchromatic (PAN) images. Although deep learning has advanced this field, mainstream frequency-based methods relying on standard scaled dot-product attention suffer from quadratic computational complexity and fail to exploit the inherent regional sparsity of remote sensing imagery. Furthermore, existing spatial enhancement strategies typically employ static convolution kernels, which struggle to adapt to the complex frequency and regional variations of PAN and MS images. To address these bottlenecks, we propose a Region-Aware Fusion (RAFNet) Network that synergistically models spatial and frequency information. Specifically, we design a Spatial Adaptive Refinement (SAR) module that leverages the discrete wavelet transform (DWT) for directional frequency separation and K-means clustering for regional partitioning, which enables the dynamic construction of region-specific adaptive convolution kernels, achieving spatially and frequency-adaptive feature enhancement. Moreover, we introduce a Clustered Frequency Aggregation (CFA) module based on a sparse attention mechanism guided by the semantic clusters, which executes a region-aware sparse attention strategy that drastically reduces computational redundancy while ensuring high-quality frequency feature extraction. In addition we integrated these modules into a progressive, multi-level spatial-frequency network architecture to facilitate robust interaction and accurate image reconstruction. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed RAFNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art pansharpening methods in both reduced- and full-resolution assessments. The code is available at https://github.com/PatrickNod/RAFNet.

analysis.tldr: 提出区域感知融合网络RAFNet，通过自适应空间细化与聚类频率聚合模块，高效融合多光谱与全色图像，在全色锐化任务上超越现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 全色锐化旨在融合低分辨率多光谱和高分辨率全色图像生成高分辨率多光谱图像，但现有基于频率的方法计算复杂度高且未利用遥感图像的固有区域稀疏性，而空间增强策略使用静态卷积核难以适应复杂的频率和区域变化。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且自适应地融合多光谱和全色图像的空间与频率信息，以生成高质量的高分辨率多光谱图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RAFNet，包含空间自适应细化（SAR）模块和聚类频率聚合（CFA）模块。SAR利用离散小波变换进行方向频率分离，结合K-means聚类进行区域划分，动态构建区域自适应卷积核；CFA基于语义聚类引导的稀疏注意力机制，实现区域感知的稀疏注意力，降低计算冗余。整体采用渐进式多级空间-频率网络架构。
contributions: 提出区域感知融合网络RAFNet，协同建模空间和频率信息。
设计空间自适应细化模块，通过DWT和K-means实现动态区域自适应卷积核。
引入聚类频率聚合模块，基于语义聚类引导的稀疏注意力，降低计算复杂度。
在多个基准数据集上超越现有方法，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上进行缩减分辨率和全分辨率评估，RAFNet显著优于最先进的全色锐化方法。
limitations: 可能依赖K-means聚类质量，对聚类数敏感。
DWT分解可能引入边界伪影。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出区域感知融合网络RAFNet，通过自适应空间细化与聚类频率聚合模块，高效融合多光谱与全色图像，在全色锐化任务上超越现有方法。

papers.title: T$^2$PO: Uncertainty-Guided Exploration Control for Stable Multi-Turn Agentic Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Recent progress in multi-turn reinforcement learning (RL) has significantly improved reasoning LLMs' performances on complex interactive tasks. Despite advances in stabilization techniques such as fine-grained credit assignment and trajectory filtering, instability remains pervasive and often leads to training collapse. We argue that this instability stems from inefficient exploration in multi-turn settings, where policies continue to generate low-information actions that neither reduce uncertainty nor advance task progress. To address this issue, we propose Token- and Turn-level Policy Optimization (T$^2$PO), an uncertainty-aware framework that explicitly controls exploration at fine-grained levels. At the token level, T$^2$PO monitors uncertainty dynamics and triggers a thinking intervention once the marginal uncertainty change falls below a threshold. At the turn level, T$^2$PO identifies interactions with negligible exploration progress and dynamically resamples such turns to avoid wasted rollouts. We evaluate T$^2$PO in diverse environments, including WebShop, ALFWorld, and Search QA, demonstrating substantial gains in training stability and performance improvements with better exploration efficiency. Code is available at: https://github.com/WillDreamer/T2PO.

analysis.tldr: 提出T²PO框架，通过细粒度不确定性引导探索控制，提升多轮强化学习的训练稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多轮强化学习在复杂交互任务中虽取得进展，但训练不稳定问题普遍存在，常导致训练崩溃，现有稳定技术（如细粒度信用分配、轨迹过滤）仍无法有效解决。
analysis.problem: 多轮强化学习中因低效探索导致的训练不稳定问题，即策略持续生成低信息动作，既不减少不确定性也不推进任务进展。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多轮RL的不稳定性源于低效探索，策略生成低信息动作，导致不确定性未减少且任务无进展。
analysis.method: 提出Token-和Turn-level Policy Optimization (T²PO)，在token级监控不确定性动态，当边际不确定性变化低于阈值时触发思考干预；在turn级识别探索进展可忽略的交互并动态重采样，避免浪费轨迹。
contributions: 识别多轮RL训练不稳定的根源为低效探索，并提出不确定性引导的探索控制框架T²PO。
在token和turn两个粒度实现探索控制，通过思考干预和动态重采样提升训练稳定性与性能。
analysis.experiments: 在WebShop、ALFWorld和Search QA等环境中评估，显示训练稳定性和性能显著提升，探索效率更优。
limitations: 可能依赖不确定性估计的准确性，在复杂环境中估计可能不精确。
动态重采样可能增加计算开销，需权衡效率与稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出T²PO框架，通过细粒度不确定性引导探索控制，提升多轮强化学习的训练稳定性。

papers.title: The Causal Description Gap: Information-Theoretic Separations Across Pearl's Hierarchy
papers.abstract: Pearl's causal hierarchy shows that observational, interventional, and counterfactual queries are qualitatively distinct. We ask a quantitative version of this question: how many additional bits are needed to specify higher-rung causal answers once lower-rung answers are known? We formalize this via query-class description length, the Kolmogorov complexity of the answer oracle induced by an SCM for a class of queries. Our main construction gives binary acyclic SCMs whose observational distribution has constant description length, while the single-variable interventional answer oracle has description length $Θ(n^2)$. A degree-sensitive upper bound shows that finite-gate-schema SCMs of indegree $d$ have observational-interventional gap at most $O(nd \log(en/d) + n \log n)$, making the quadratic construction order-optimal in the dense regime and a rooted-tree construction order-optimal for bounded indegree. The quadratic separation persists under $\varepsilon$-accurate total-variation descriptions for every fixed $\varepsilon < 1/4$. At the next rung, the full hard-do interventional oracle can still leave a $Θ(n)$ counterfactual description gap. A general ambiguity-to-bits theorem and Shannon analogue show that these gaps equal the logarithm of residual higher-rung ambiguity up to lower-order terms.

analysis.tldr: 因果层级间存在信息论描述长度差距，观察分布可极短而干预分布需二次比特。
analysis.research_motivation: Pearl因果层级定性区分了观察、干预和反事实查询，但定量上需要多少额外信息才能从低层级答案得到高层级答案尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 量化因果层级间描述长度的信息论差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 存在二元无环SCM，其观察分布描述长度恒定，但单变量干预答案描述长度为Θ(n²)，且该差距在ε-近似下仍保持。
analysis.method: 通过Kolmogorov复杂度定义查询类描述长度，构造二元无环SCM并给出上下界。
contributions: 提出查询类描述长度形式化因果层级间信息差距。
构造出观察-干预描述长度二次分离的SCM，并证明在稠密和稀疏图下阶最优。
证明干预-反事实间仍存在Θ(n)描述差距。
建立一般歧义到比特定理及Shannon类比。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对二元无环SCM，可能不直接推广到更一般模型。
描述长度基于Kolmogorov复杂度，实际计算不可判定。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 因果层级间存在信息论描述长度差距，观察分布可极短而干预分布需二次比特。

papers.title: Intervention Complexity as a Canonical Reward and a Measure of Intelligence
papers.abstract: The Legg--Hutter universal intelligence measure provides a rigorous scalar assessment of general intelligence as expected reward across all computable environments, weighted by simplicity. However, the measure presupposes an externally specified reward function, raising the question of whether the reward primitive is inherently arbitrary or whether a canonical choice exists. We propose a new measure, called intervention complexity, that has five natural properties: environment-derivedness, universality, minimality, sensitivity, and achievement preference. Given a resource function rho encoding an inductive bias (such as program length, execution time, or energy), rho-intervention complexity is a universal reward. The result yields a family of canonical rewards indexed by resource bias, providing a principled completion of the Legg--Hutter framework that does not require external normative input. We further propose a two-dimensional characterisation of intelligence: agent competence (how well the agent performs relative to the oracle optimum) and learning efficiency (how quickly this competence improves with experience). A separation theorem establishes that the choice of resource bias determines the computability of the resulting measure: action-count IC is computable in polynomial time, while program-length IC without oracle access is uncomputable, with the gap between oracle and bare IC precisely quantifying the information-theoretic content of learning. We discuss implications for superintelligence and for pre-training universal agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出干预复杂度作为通用奖励函数，并基于此构建二维智能度量框架。
analysis.research_motivation: Legg-Hutter通用智能度量依赖外部指定的奖励函数，但奖励原语是否任意或存在规范选择尚不明确，需要一种无需外部规范输入的规范奖励。
analysis.problem: 如何定义一种无需外部规范输入的规范奖励函数，并基于此构建更完整的智能度量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 定义干预复杂度（IC），给定资源函数ρ，ρ-干预复杂度是一种通用奖励，满足环境派生性、普适性、最小性、敏感性和成就偏好五个自然属性。进一步提出二维智能表征：智能体能力（相对于最优性能）和学习效率（能力随经验提升的速度）。
contributions: 提出干预复杂度作为规范奖励函数，完成Legg-Hutter框架。
建立二维智能度量：智能体能力和学习效率。
证明资源偏好的选择决定度量的可计算性：动作计数IC多项式时间可计算，无预言机访问的程序长度IC不可计算。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论框架尚未在具体智能体或环境中验证。
资源函数的选择可能影响度量的实际适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出干预复杂度作为通用奖励函数，并基于此构建二维智能度量框架。

papers.title: Retrieval and Multi-Hop Reasoning in 1M-Token Context Windows: Evaluating LLMs on Classical Chinese Text
papers.abstract: We evaluate the long-context retrieval and reasoning capabilities of five frontier large language models with advertised 1M-token context windows on a classical Chinese corpus. Two complementary studies are reported. Test 1 measures single-needle retrieval at 1M tokens of input, with three biographical needles planted at three depths and pairs of real (training-prior-consistent) and altered (training-prior-contradicting) variants to separate genuine in-context retrieval from reliance on memorised training data. Test 2, a follow-up designed to probe whether long-context capability degrades when retrieval requires intermediate reasoning, measures three-hop chain traversal across three context tiers (256K, 512K, and 1M tokens). We find that single-needle retrieval at 1M is essentially solved for the strongest models - Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Opus 4.7, and GPT-5.5 each achieve 100% - but that multi-hop performance reveals three distinct decay signatures: a stable regime (Gemini Pro, Claude) maintaining greater than 80% accuracy through 512K with modest degradation at 1M; a late-cliff regime (GPT-5.5, Qwen3.6-plus) collapsing sharply between 512K and 1M; and a smooth-decline regime (DeepSeek V4 Pro) decaying gradually across the entire range. The findings suggest that nominal context-window length is a poor proxy for usable long-context multi-hop capability, and that the sharpest discriminator between current 1M-context flagships is the 512K-to-1M transition.

analysis.tldr: 评估5个前沿LLM在百万token古典中文文本上的检索与多跳推理能力，发现单针检索已解决但多跳推理在512K到1M区间出现三种退化模式。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文LLM宣称支持百万token窗口，但实际多跳推理能力与标称窗口长度之间的差距尚不明确，需要系统评估。
analysis.problem: 在百万token古典中文语料上，评估LLM的单针检索与多跳推理能力，并区分真实上下文检索与训练数据记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 单针检索在最强模型上已达100%准确率；多跳推理在512K到1M区间出现三种退化模式：稳定型（>80%）、晚悬崖型（急剧下降）和缓慢下降型。
analysis.method: 设计两个测试：Test1在1M token中植入三个不同深度的传记针，包含真实和修改变体；Test2在256K/512K/1M三个上下文层级上测量三跳链式推理。
contributions: 系统评估了5个前沿LLM在百万token古典中文上的检索与多跳推理能力
揭示了多跳推理在512K到1M区间的三种退化模式，表明标称窗口长度不能代表可用多跳能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了测试设计和主要发现。
limitations: 仅针对古典中文语料，可能不适用于其他语言或领域
未深入分析退化模式的原因
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估5个前沿LLM在百万token古典中文文本上的检索与多跳推理能力，发现单针检索已解决但多跳推理在512K到1M区间出现三种退化模式。

papers.title: Heterogeneous Model Fusion for Privacy-Aware Multi-Camera Surveillance via Synthetic Domain Adaptation
papers.abstract: We propose HeroCrystal, a novel privacy-preserving framework for multi-camera domain-adaptive object detection, addressing challenges such as data privacy, class imbalance, and heterogeneous architectures. Our framework consists of three key stages. In the Generated Stage, we introduce a one-shot, target-aware diffusion-based generation module that learns visual style from a single target-domain image while leveraging prompt-based control to synthesize specific object instances. Unlike conventional style transfer-based methods that require large target datasets and ignore semantic-level discrepancies, our approach enables privacy-preserving augmentation to reduce ethical concerns, and introduces controllable rare object generation to mitigate long-tailed category degradation. In the Federated Stage, we employ probabilistic Faster R-CNN on the client side to improve localization accuracy, and a dynamic model contrastive strategy to suppress domain-specific bias. The server side performs model fusion across heterogeneous architectures without accessing raw data. Finally, in the Distilled Stage, we propose an inconsistent categories integration algorithm to resolve label inconsistency and architecture heterogeneity across clients. Extensive experiments on multiple cross-domain detection benchmarks demonstrate that our method outperforms existing multi-source domain adaptation and federated learning baselines under multi-class, privacy-preserving settings. Our method improves mAP by +2.1% over prior privacy-preserving approaches and achieves a new state-of-the-art mAP of 33.4%, highlighting the effectiveness of HeroCrystal in enabling practical multi-camera AI surveillance systems. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/ccuvislab/HeroCrystal.

analysis.tldr: 提出HeroCrystal框架，通过合成域适应实现隐私感知的多相机监控异构模型融合。
analysis.research_motivation: 多相机监控中数据隐私、类别不平衡和异构架构是主要挑战，现有方法需大量目标域数据且忽略语义差异。
analysis.problem: 在保护隐私的前提下，实现多相机域自适应目标检测，解决数据隐私、类别不平衡和异构架构融合问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：生成阶段用单张目标域图像扩散生成稀有对象；联邦阶段客户端用概率Faster R-CNN和动态模型对比，服务端异构模型融合；蒸馏阶段用不一致类别集成算法解决标签和架构异质性。
contributions: 提出隐私保护的多相机域自适应目标检测框架HeroCrystal
引入单样本目标感知扩散生成模块实现隐私增强和稀有对象生成
提出动态模型对比策略和异构模型融合方法
提出不一致类别集成算法解决标签和架构异质性
analysis.experiments: 在多个跨域检测基准上，mAP比先前隐私保护方法提升+2.1%，达到33.4%新SOTA。
limitations: 可能依赖单张目标域图像的质量
联邦阶段通信开销未讨论
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HeroCrystal框架，通过合成域适应实现隐私感知的多相机监控异构模型融合。

papers.title: Planner Matters! An Efficient and Unbalanced Multi-agent Collaboration Framework for Long-horizon Planning
papers.abstract: Language model (LM)-based agents have demonstrated promising capabilities in automating complex tasks from natural language instructions, yet they continue to struggle with long-horizon planning and reasoning. To address this, we propose an enhanced multi-agent framework that decomposes automation into three roles: a planner for high-level decision-making, an actor for task execution, and a memory manager for contextual reasoning. While this modular decomposition aligns with established design patterns, our core contribution lies in a systematic compute-allocation analysis, revealing that planning is the dominant factor influencing task performance. Execution and memory management require significantly less compute and model capacity to achieve competitive results. Building on these insights, we introduce a planner-centric reinforcement learning approach, which exclusively optimizes the planner using trajectory-level rewards from a VLM-as-judge, while freezing the other components. Extensive experiments on benchmarks spanning web navigation, OS control, and tool use demonstrate that concentrating model capacity and learning on high-level planning yields robust and compute-efficient improvements in long-horizon agent automation. Our code is publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种以规划器为中心的多智能体协作框架，通过计算分配分析和规划器专用强化学习，在长时域任务中实现高效自动化。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于语言模型的智能体在长时域规划和推理中仍存在困难，现有方法计算资源分配不均衡，导致效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何高效分配计算资源并优化长时域任务中的高层规划能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 系统计算分配分析表明，规划是影响任务性能的主导因素，而执行和记忆管理所需计算和模型容量显著更少。
analysis.method: 将自动化分解为规划器、执行器和记忆管理器三个角色，并采用以规划器为中心的强化学习，仅使用VLM作为评判器的轨迹级奖励优化规划器，冻结其他组件。
contributions: 提出一种不平衡的多智能体协作框架，通过计算分配分析揭示规划的主导作用。
引入规划器专用的强化学习方法，仅优化规划器，实现计算高效的长时域任务自动化。
analysis.experiments: 在网页导航、操作系统控制和工具使用等基准上进行了广泛实验，展示了鲁棒且计算高效的改进。
limitations: 可能依赖VLM评判器的质量，存在偏差风险。
框架在任务类型上的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种以规划器为中心的多智能体协作框架，通过计算分配分析和规划器专用强化学习，在长时域任务中实现高效自动化。

papers.title: Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients for Reliable Feature Attribution
papers.abstract: Feature attribution is central to diagnosing and trusting deep neural networks, and Integrated Gradients (IG) is widely used due to its axiomatic properties. However, IG can yield unreliable explanations when the integration path between a baseline and the input passes through regions with noisy gradients. While Guided Integrated Gradients reduces this sensitivity by adaptively updating low-gradient-magnitude features, input-space guidance still produces intermediate inputs that deviate from the data manifold. To address this limitation, we propose \emph{Manifold-Aligned Guided Integrated Gradients} (MA-GIG), which constructs attribution paths in the latent space of a pre-trained variational autoencoder. By decoding intermediate latent states, MA-GIG biases the path toward the learned generative manifold and reduces exposure to implausible input-space regions. Through qualitative and quantitative evaluations, we demonstrate that MA-GIG produces faithful explanations by aggregating gradients on path features proximal to the input. Consequently, our method reduces off-manifold noise and outperforms prior path-based attribution methods across multiple datasets and classifiers. Our code is available at https://github.com/leekwoon/ma-gig/.

analysis.tldr: 提出流形对齐引导积分梯度（MA-GIG），通过在变分自编码器潜空间构建归因路径，减少积分梯度在数据流形外区域的噪声，提升特征归因可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 积分梯度（IG）因公理性质被广泛用于特征归因，但其积分路径经过梯度噪声区域时会产生不可靠解释；引导积分梯度（GIG）虽通过自适应更新低梯度特征降低敏感性，但输入空间引导仍会产生偏离数据流形的中间输入，导致归因不准确。
analysis.problem: 现有路径归因方法（如GIG）在输入空间构建路径时，中间状态偏离数据流形，导致梯度聚合受流形外噪声干扰，归因解释不忠实。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，IG在基线到输入的积分路径经过梯度噪声区域时解释不可靠；GIG的输入空间引导仍产生偏离数据流形的中间输入，这是归因不忠实的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: MA-GIG：在预训练变分自编码器（VAE）的潜空间中构建归因路径，通过解码潜状态使路径偏向学习到的生成流形，减少暴露于不合理输入空间区域，并在靠近输入的特征上聚合梯度。
contributions: 提出流形对齐引导积分梯度（MA-GIG），在VAE潜空间构建归因路径，有效减少流形外噪声。
通过定性和定量实验证明MA-GIG在多个数据集和分类器上优于先前基于路径的归因方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到通过定性和定量评估证明MA-GIG产生忠实解释，并在多个数据集和分类器上优于先前方法。
limitations: 依赖预训练VAE的质量，若VAE无法准确建模数据流形，归因可能受影响。
潜空间路径的构建和优化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流形对齐引导积分梯度（MA-GIG），通过在变分自编码器潜空间构建归因路径，减少积分梯度在数据流形外区域的噪声，提升特征归因可靠性。

papers.title: DocSync: Agentic Documentation Maintenance via Critic-Guided Reflexion
papers.abstract: Software documentation frequently drifts from executable logic as codebases evolve, creating technical debt that degrades maintainability and causes downstream API misuse. While static analysis tools can detect the absence of documentation, they cannot evaluate its semantic consistency. Conversely, standard Large Language Models (LLMs) offer generative flexibility but frequently hallucinate when updating documentation without deep structural awareness of the underlying code. To address this gap, we propose DocSync, an agentic workflow that frames documentation maintenance as a structurally grounded, iterative generation task. DocSync bridges syntactic changes and natural language descriptions by fusing Abstract Syntax Tree (AST) representations and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to provide dependency-aware context. Furthermore, to ensure factual consistency, we incorporate a critic-guided refinement loop based on the Reflexion paradigm, allowing the model to self-correct candidate updates against the source code. We empirically evaluate a resource-constrained implementation of DocSync-using a LoRA-adapted small language model - on a proxy code-to-text maintenance task. Our findings demonstrate that this AST-aware agentic approach substantially outperforms standard encoder-decoder baselines across semantic alignment, summary-line faithfulness, and automated judge preferences (e.g., achieving an automated judge score of 3.44/5.0 compared to 1.91 for CodeT5-base). Crucially, the iterative critic loop yields measurable improvements in semantic correctness without requiring scaled-up parameter counts. These results provide strong evidence that coupling structural retrieval with agentic refinement is a highly promising direction for autonomously mitigating documentation debt.

analysis.tldr: DocSync 通过 AST 感知的 RAG 和基于 Reflexion 的批评引导迭代修正，实现代码文档的语义一致性维护。
analysis.research_motivation: 软件文档随代码演化而漂移，导致技术债务和 API 误用；现有静态分析工具无法评估语义一致性，而标准 LLM 在缺乏代码结构感知时容易产生幻觉。
analysis.problem: 如何自动维护代码文档与可执行逻辑之间的语义一致性，避免文档漂移和幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DocSync 将文档维护建模为结构引导的迭代生成任务：融合抽象语法树（AST）表示和检索增强生成（RAG）提供依赖感知上下文，并基于 Reflexion 范式引入批评引导的修正循环，使模型能根据源代码自我纠正候选更新。
contributions: 提出 DocSync，一种将 AST 感知的 RAG 与批评引导迭代修正相结合的智能体工作流，用于文档维护。
在资源受限场景下（LoRA 适配的小语言模型）验证了该方法在语义对齐、摘要行忠实度和自动评判偏好上显著优于标准编码器-解码器基线。
analysis.experiments: 在代理的代码到文本维护任务上评估了资源受限的 DocSync 实现（使用 LoRA 适配的小语言模型），结果显示自动评判得分 3.44/5.0，优于 CodeT5-base 的 1.91。
limitations: 仅在代理任务上评估，未在真实软件项目上验证。
依赖 AST 和 RAG 的额外计算开销可能影响实际部署效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DocSync 通过 AST 感知的 RAG 和基于 Reflexion 的批评引导迭代修正，实现代码文档的语义一致性维护。

papers.title: Combining Trained Models in Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Deep reinforcement learning (DRL) has delivered strong results in domains such as Atari and Go, but it still suffers from high sample cost and weak transfer beyond the training setting. A common response is to reuse information from previously trained models through transfer, distillation, ensemble methods, or federated training instead of learning each target task from random initialization. The literature on these mechanisms is fragmented, and published comparisons are hard to interpret because tasks, baselines, and compute budgets differ. This paper presents a PRISMA-guided systematic review of empirical studies on pretrained knowledge reuse in DRL. Starting from 589 records retrieved from IEEE Xplore, the ACM Digital Library, and citation tracing, we screened 570 unique records and assessed 89 full texts. After applying the final eligibility criteria, 15 empirical studies remained in the main synthesis. We analyzed them qualitatively across three factors: source-target similarity, diversity among reused models, and the fairness of comparisons against from-scratch baselines. Three patterns recur across the surviving corpus. First, positive results are concentrated in settings where source and target tasks share substantial structure or where the method includes an explicit gating or alignment mechanism. Second, evidence for ensembles and federated aggregation is promising but sparse and mostly limited to narrow settings. Third, compute-matched comparisons are rare, which weakens claims about efficiency gains over stronger single-agent baselines. The paper contributes a narrower and internally consistent review scope, a study-level synthesis of empirical evidence, and a provisional independence spectrum that should be treated as a hypothesis for future benchmarking rather than a validated metric.

analysis.tldr: 对深度强化学习中预训练知识重用方法的系统综述，发现正收益集中在高结构相似性场景，且计算公平比较稀缺。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度强化学习样本成本高、迁移能力弱，现有知识重用方法（迁移、蒸馏、集成、联邦训练）文献零散且比较标准不一，亟需系统性梳理。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对深度强化学习中预训练知识重用方法的统一综述和公平比较。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正收益集中在源-目标任务结构高度相似或包含显式门控/对齐机制的场景；集成和联邦聚合的证据有前景但稀疏且局限于狭窄设置；计算匹配的比较罕见，削弱了效率提升的声称。
analysis.method: 采用PRISMA指南进行系统性文献综述，从589条记录筛选出15项实证研究，并基于源-目标相似性、复用模型多样性、与从头基线比较的公平性三个因素进行定性分析。
contributions: 提供了一个范围更窄、内部一致的综述框架
对实证证据进行了研究层面的综合
提出了一个暂定的独立性谱系，作为未来基准测试的假设而非验证指标
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅描述了综述流程和定性发现。
limitations: 仅纳入15项研究，样本量有限
独立性谱系尚未经过实证验证
未涵盖所有可能的知识重用机制
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对深度强化学习中预训练知识重用方法的系统综述，发现正收益集中在高结构相似性场景，且计算公平比较稀缺。

papers.title: Cross-Polarization Fusion of VV AND VH SAR Observations for Improved Flood Mapping
