papers.abstract: Synthetic Aperture Radar (SAR) imagery is widely used for flood monitoring due to its all-weather and day-night imaging capability. However, flood mapping using single-polarization SAR data remains challenging in complex environments where surface and volume scattering coexist. In this paper, we investigate the effectiveness of cross-polarization fusion of VV and VH SAR observations for improved flood mapping. A deep learning-based segmentation framework is employed to jointly exploit complementary information from VV and VH polarizations. To ensure a fair evaluation, three configurations are compared under identical training conditions: VV only, VH only, and fused VV-VH input. Performance is assessed using standard flood mapping metrics, including Intersection over Union (IoU) and F1-score, along with qualitative visual analysis. Experimental results demonstrate that VV-VH fusion consistently outperforms single-polarization models, particularly in vegetated and heterogeneous flood regions, leading to more accurate flood boundary delineation. The findings highlight the importance of cross-polarization SAR fusion for enhancing the reliability of SAR-based flood mapping in disaster monitoring applications.

analysis.tldr: VV和VH极化SAR图像融合可提升复杂环境下的洪水测绘精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 单极化SAR数据在复杂环境（如植被区）中洪水测绘精度不足，而多极化融合潜力尚未充分挖掘。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合VV和VH极化SAR观测以提升洪水测绘的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VV-VH融合在植被和异质洪水区域表现优于单极化模型，边界描绘更精确。
analysis.method: 采用深度学习分割框架联合利用VV和VH极化互补信息，并对比VV-only、VH-only和VV-VH融合三种配置。
contributions: 系统评估了VV-VH极化融合对洪水测绘的提升效果
揭示了融合策略在复杂环境中的优势
analysis.experiments: 使用IoU和F1-score等标准洪水测绘指标进行评估，并辅以定性视觉分析。
limitations: 未提及具体数据集和模型架构细节
可能未考虑其他极化组合或时序信息
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VV和VH极化SAR图像融合可提升复杂环境下的洪水测绘精度。

papers.title: SpecEdit: Training-Free Acceleration for Diffusion based Image Editing via Semantic Locking
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based image editing offers strong semantic controllability, but remains computationally expensive due to iterative high-resolution denoising over all spatial tokens. Dynamic-resolution sampling reduces this cost by performing early steps at reduced resolution. However, existing approaches prioritize upsampling using low-level heuristics such as edge detection or channel variance, which are weakly aligned with editing semantics and may lead to structural inconsistency. Moreover, spatial regions are often upsampled without verifying whether semantic modification is actually required, resulting in redundant high-resolution computation and accumulated errors. Therefore, we propose SpecEdit, a training-free dynamic-resolution framework tailored for diffusion-based image editing. SpecEdit follows a draft-and-verify scheme: a low-resolution draft first estimates the semantic outcome, after which token-level discrepancies are used to identify edit-relevant tokens for high-resolution denoising, while the remaining tokens stay at a coarse resolution. Experiments on Qwen-Image-Edit and FLUX.1-Kontext-dev demonstrate up to 10x and 7x acceleration, while maintaining strong quality. SpecEdit is complementary to step distillation and other acceleration techniques, achieving up to 13x speedup when combined with existing methods. Our code is in supplementary material and will be released on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: SpecEdit 通过语义锁定实现训练免费的扩散图像编辑加速，最高可达 10 倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散图像编辑计算成本高，现有动态分辨率方法使用低级启发式上采样，与编辑语义对齐弱，导致结构不一致和冗余计算。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲编辑质量的前提下，通过语义感知的动态分辨率采样加速扩散图像编辑。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有动态分辨率方法使用边缘检测或通道方差等低级启发式上采样，与编辑语义对齐弱，且未验证空间区域是否需要语义修改，导致冗余计算和累积误差。
analysis.method: 提出 SpecEdit，一种无需训练的动态分辨率框架，采用草稿-验证方案：先低分辨率草稿估计语义结果，然后通过 token 级差异识别编辑相关 token 进行高分辨率去噪，其余 token 保持粗分辨率。
contributions: 提出 SpecEdit，首个针对扩散图像编辑的无需训练动态分辨率加速框架。
通过语义锁定机制，在 Qwen-Image-Edit 和 FLUX.1-Kontext-dev 上实现高达 10 倍和 7 倍加速，且质量保持。
与步蒸馏等技术互补，联合加速可达 13 倍。
analysis.experiments: 在 Qwen-Image-Edit 和 FLUX.1-Kontext-dev 上评估，实现 10 倍和 7 倍加速，与现有方法结合达 13 倍加速，质量保持。
limitations: 可能依赖草稿阶段的质量，若低分辨率草稿不准确可能影响最终结果。
仅适用于扩散图像编辑，对其他生成任务需调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpecEdit 通过语义锁定实现训练免费的扩散图像编辑加速，最高可达 10 倍。

papers.title: On the Optimal Sample Complexity of Offline Multi-Armed Bandits with KL Regularization
papers.abstract: Kullback-Leibler (KL) regularization is widely used in offline decision-making and offers several benefits, motivating recent work on the sample complexity of offline learning with respect to KL-regularized performance metrics. Nevertheless, the exact sample complexity of KL-regularized offline learning remains largely from fully characterized. In this paper, we study this question in the setting of multi-armed bandits (MABs). We provide a sharp analysis of KL-PCB (Zhao et al., 2026), showing that it achieves a sample complexity of $\tilde{O}(ηSAC^{π^*}/ε)$ under large regularization $η= \tilde{O}(ε^{-1})$, and a sample complexity of $\tildeΩ(SAC^{π^*}/ε^2)$ under small regularization $η= \tildeΩ(ε^{-1})$, where $η$ is the regularization parameter, $S$ is the number of contexts, $A$ is the number of arms, $C^{π^*}$ policy coverage coefficient at the optimal policy $π^*$, $ε$ is the desired sub-optimality, and $\tilde{O}$ and $\tildeΩ$ hide all poly-logarithmic factors. We further provide a pair of sharper sample complexity lower bounds, which matches the upper bounds over the entire range of regularization strengths. Overall, our results provide a nearly complete characterization of offline multi-armed bandits with KL regularization.

analysis.tldr: 本文严格刻画了KL正则化离线多臂老虎机的最优样本复杂度，给出了上下界匹配的结果。
analysis.research_motivation: KL正则化在离线决策中广泛应用，但其样本复杂度尚未完全刻画，需要理论分析来指导实践。
analysis.problem: 确定KL正则化离线多臂老虎机学习问题的最优样本复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 对KL-PCB算法进行精细分析，并推导匹配的样本复杂度下界。
contributions: 给出了KL-PCB算法在大正则化和小正则化下的样本复杂度上界。
提供了更紧的样本复杂度下界，与上界在整个正则化强度范围内匹配。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对多臂老虎机设置，未扩展到更一般的离线决策问题。
理论结果依赖于一些假设（如策略覆盖系数），实际中可能难以验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文严格刻画了KL正则化离线多臂老虎机的最优样本复杂度，给出了上下界匹配的结果。

papers.title: FLoRA: Fusion-Latent for Optical Reconstruction and Flood Area Segmentation via Cross-Modal Multi-Task Distillation Network
papers.abstract: Accurate flood water mapping is critical for disaster management, yet current methods struggle to fully exploit the potential of spaceborne imagery. Optical data offers high interpretability but is limited by environmental conditions, whereas SAR provides reliable all-weather coverage with reduced visual interpretability. FLoRA (Fusion Latent for Optical Reconstruction and Area Segmentation) is a cross-modal multi-task framework that jointly reconstructs high-fidelity optical imagery and segments flood water regions from Sentinel 1 SAR by fusing the complementary strengths of optical and SAR data. During training, a lightweight optical teacher (driven by RGB and NDVI priors) provides pyramidal features that guide SAR representations into a fusion latent space via multiscale windowed cross attention and FiLM conditioning, with gated residuals preventing overcorrection. This design enables multi-task learning across two complementary objectives: (a) SAR-to-optical translation for fine-grained RGB reconstruction and (b) flood water region segmentation for hydrologic interpretation. The dual decoders are optimized using Charbonnier SSIM for structural fidelity, edge FFT magnitude losses for spectral realism, and Dice BCE hydrology-aware edge alignment for precise flood water delineation. A feature distillation constraint further aligns fused SAR features with the optical teacher's manifold. Evaluations on SEN1FLOODS11, DEEPFLOOD, and SEN12MS demonstrate that FLoRA surpasses fusion baselines in PSNR, SSIM, and LPIPS, demonstrating that multi-modal fusion within a teacher-guided latent space yields semantically faithful and physically consistent flood-water intelligence from spaceborne observations.

analysis.tldr: FLoRA通过跨模态多任务蒸馏网络融合SAR与光学数据，同时实现高保真光学图像重建和洪水区域分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 洪水灾害管理中，光学数据受环境限制，SAR虽全天候但可解释性差，现有方法未能充分利用两者互补优势。
analysis.problem: 如何从SAR数据中联合重建高质量光学图像并精确分割洪水区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出FLoRA框架，使用轻量光学教师网络提供金字塔特征，通过多尺度窗口交叉注意力和FiLM条件化将SAR表示映射到融合潜在空间，门控残差防止过校正；双解码器分别进行SAR到光学翻译和洪水分割，损失函数包括Charbonnier SSIM、边缘FFT幅度损失和Dice BCE边缘对齐损失，并加入特征蒸馏约束。
contributions: 提出跨模态多任务蒸馏框架FLoRA，联合光学重建与洪水分割。
设计融合潜在空间和教师引导的特征对齐机制。
在多个基准数据集上超越融合基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在SEN1FLOODS11、DEEPFLOOD和SEN12MS数据集上评估，FLoRA在PSNR、SSIM和LPIPS指标上优于融合基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定SAR和光学数据配对，泛化性需验证。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FLoRA通过跨模态多任务蒸馏网络融合SAR与光学数据，同时实现高保真光学图像重建和洪水区域分割。

papers.title: Video Generation with Predictive Latents
papers.abstract: Video Variational Autoencoder (VAE) enables latent video generative modeling by mapping the visual world into compact spatiotemporal latent spaces, improving training efficiency and stability. While existing video VAEs achieve commendable reconstruction quality, continued optimization of reconstruction does not necessarily translate into improved generative performance. How to enhance the diffusability of video latents remains a critical and unresolved challenge. In this work, inspired by principles of predictive world modeling, we investigate the potential of predictive learning to improve the video generative modeling. To this end, we introduce a simple and effective predictive reconstruction objective that unifies predictive learning with video reconstruction. Specifically, we randomly discard future frames and encode only partial past observations, while training the decoder to reconstruct the observed frames and predict future ones simultaneously. This design encourages the latent space to encode temporally predictive structures and build a more coherent understanding of video dynamics, thereby improving generation quality. Our model, termed Predictive Video VAE (PV-VAE), achieves superior performance on video generation, with 52% faster convergence and a 34.42 FVD improvement over the Wan2.2 VAE on UCF101. Furthermore, comprehensive analyses demonstrate that PV-VAE not only exhibits favorable scalability, with generative performance improving alongside VAE training, but also yields consistent gains in downstream video understanding, underscoring a latent space that effectively captures temporal coherence and motion priors.

analysis.tldr: 提出预测性视频VAE（PV-VAE），通过预测未来帧改进视频生成质量，实现52%更快收敛和34.42 FVD提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频VAE优化重建质量但未直接提升生成性能，视频潜变量的可扩散性（diffusability）是关键未解挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何增强视频潜变量的可扩散性，使潜空间编码时间预测结构，从而提升视频生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出持续优化重建损失并不必然转化为更好的生成性能，表明重建与生成之间存在差距。
analysis.method: 提出预测性重建目标：随机丢弃未来帧，仅编码部分过去观测，解码器同时重建观测帧并预测未来帧，统一预测学习与视频重建。
contributions: 提出PV-VAE，通过预测性重建目标增强潜空间的时间预测结构，提升视频生成质量。
在UCF101上实现52%更快收敛和34.42 FVD改进，并展示可扩展性和下游视频理解增益。
analysis.experiments: 在UCF101上评估，与Wan2.2 VAE对比，报告了收敛速度和FVD指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
预测未来帧的丢弃策略可能影响长视频生成。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出预测性视频VAE（PV-VAE），通过预测未来帧改进视频生成质量，实现52%更快收敛和34.42 FVD提升。

papers.title: SPECTRE: Hybrid Ordinary-Parallel Speculative Serving for Resource-Efficient LLM Inference
papers.abstract: LLM serving platforms are increasingly deployed as multi-model cloud systems, where user demand is often long-tailed: a few popular large models receive most requests, while many smaller tail models remain underutilized. We propose \textbf{SPECTRE} (Parallel \textbf{SPEC}ulative Decoding with a Multi-\textbf{T}enant \textbf{RE}mote Drafter), a serving framework that reuses underutilized tail-model services as remote drafters for heavily loaded large-model services through speculative decoding. SPECTRE enables draft generation and target-side verification to run in parallel, and makes such parallelism effective through three techniques: a hybrid ordinary-parallel speculative decoding strategy guided by a threshold derived from throughput analysis, speculative priority scheduling to preserve draft--target overlap under multi-tenant traffic, and draft-side prompt compression to reduce draft latency. We implement SPECTRE in \texttt{SGLang} and evaluate it across multiple draft--target model pairs, reasoning benchmarks, real-world long-context workloads, and a wide range of batch sizes. Results show that SPECTRE consistently improves large-model serving throughput while causing only minor interference to the native workloads of tail-model services. In large-model deployments, including Qwen3-235B-A22B with TP=8, SPECTRE achieves up to \textbf{2.28$\times$ speedup} over autoregressive decoding and up to an additional \textbf{66\% relative improvement} over the strongest speculative decoding baselines. Talk is cheap, we show you the code: https://github.com/sgl-project/sglang/pull/22272.

analysis.tldr: SPECTRE 利用长尾模型中未充分利用的服务作为远程草稿模型，通过并行推测解码提升大模型推理吞吐量。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 服务平台常部署为多模型云系统，用户需求呈长尾分布：少数流行大模型承载大部分请求，而许多较小的尾模型利用率低，造成资源浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用闲置的尾模型计算资源来加速大模型推理，同时最小化对尾模型自身负载的干扰。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SPECTRE 框架，采用混合普通-并行推测解码策略（基于吞吐量分析得出的阈值指导）、推测优先级调度（保持草稿-目标重叠）和草稿端提示压缩，使草稿生成与目标验证并行执行。
contributions: 提出 SPECTRE 框架，利用多租户远程草稿模型实现并行推测解码。
设计混合普通-并行推测解码策略、推测优先级调度和草稿端提示压缩三项技术。
在 SGLang 中实现并开源，实验显示最高 2.28 倍加速，相对最强基线提升 66%。
analysis.experiments: 在多个草稿-目标模型对、推理基准、真实长上下文工作负载和多种批量大小下评估，结果显示 SPECTRE 持续提升大模型服务吞吐量，对尾模型原生负载干扰小。
limitations: 依赖尾模型作为远程草稿，可能不适用于无闲置尾模型的场景。
并行推测解码的收益受网络延迟和草稿模型速度影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SPECTRE 利用长尾模型中未充分利用的服务作为远程草稿模型，通过并行推测解码提升大模型推理吞吐量。

papers.title: From Where Things Are to What They Are For: Benchmarking Spatial-Functional Intelligence in Multimodal LLMs
papers.abstract: Human-level agentic intelligence extends beyond low-level geometric perception, evolving from recognizing where things are to understanding what they are for. While existing benchmarks effectively evaluate the geometric perception capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs), they fall short of probing the higher-order cognitive abilities required for grounded intelligence. To address this gap, we introduce the Spatial-Functional Intelligence Benchmark (SFI-Bench), a video-based benchmark with over 1,500 expert-annotated questions derived from diverse egocentric indoor video scans. SFI-Bench systematically evaluates two complementary dimensions of advanced reasoning: (1) Structured Spatial Reasoning, which requires understanding complex layouts and forming coherent spatial representations, and (2) Functional Reasoning, which involves inferring object affordances and their context-dependent utility. The benchmark includes tasks such as conditional counting, multi-hop relational reasoning, functional pairing, and knowledge-grounded troubleshooting, directly challenging models to integrate perception, memory, and inference. Our experiments reveal that current MLLMs consistently struggle to combine spatial memory with functional reasoning and external knowledge, highlighting a critical bottleneck in achieving grounded intelligence. SFI-Bench therefore provides a diagnostic tool for measuring progress toward more cognitively capable and truly grounded multimodal agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出空间-功能智能基准（SFI-Bench），系统评估多模态大模型在结构化空间推理与功能推理上的高阶认知能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要评估多模态大模型的几何感知能力，缺乏对更高阶认知能力（如理解物体功能与空间关系）的测试，限制了向具身智能的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何系统评估多模态大模型在结构化空间推理和功能推理方面的能力？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现当前多模态大模型难以结合空间记忆、功能推理与外部知识，这是实现具身智能的关键瓶颈。
analysis.method: 构建SFI-Bench基准，包含1500+专家标注问题，基于第一视角室内视频，涵盖条件计数、多跳关系推理、功能配对、知识引导故障排除等任务。
contributions: 提出空间-功能智能基准（SFI-Bench），填补高阶认知能力评估空白。
系统揭示当前多模态大模型在空间-功能推理上的关键瓶颈。
analysis.experiments: 在多个当前多模态大模型上进行实验，结果显示模型在结合空间记忆、功能推理与外部知识方面表现不佳。
limitations: 基准仅基于室内场景，可能不适用于室外或更复杂环境。
未提供模型具体性能数值，难以量化差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出空间-功能智能基准（SFI-Bench），系统评估多模态大模型在结构化空间推理与功能推理上的高阶认知能力。

papers.title: Ultrasound Vision-Language Alignment via Contrastive Learning
papers.abstract: Ultrasound foundation models have achieved strong performance on structured prediction tasks but remain exclusively vision-based, limiting zero-shot and few-shot transfer to novel tasks where task-specific annotation is scarce. We address this gap with EchoCare-CLIP, a CLIP-style dual-encoder contrastive framework that aligns ultrasound images with clinical text in a shared embedding space. We curate a multi-organ corpus of over 16K image-text pairs spanning breast, liver, lung, and thyroid, with over 78% of captions derived from expert-annotated reports, and complement the remainder with a three-tier template-based and LLM-based caption generation pipeline. We evaluate model configurations spanning two text encoder families (CLIP, BioClinicalBERT) and two caption strategies (template-based, LLM-generated) against OpenAI CLIP and BiomedCLIP baselines. Our trained models consistently improve cross-modal alignment over baselines, with the best configuration achieving a paired alignment score of 0.682. However, stronger alignment does not guarantee better downstream performance: CLIP-based variants with partial fine-tuning achieve the strongest zero-shot classification on external held-out datasets (0.709 on BUSI; 0.626 on AULI), while full end-to-end fine-tuning degrades transfer due to overfitting. On linear probing and few-shot adaptation, model rankings are dataset-dependent, reflecting a trade-off between domain adaptation and representational generalizability. We further show that template-based captions match or outperform LLM-generated captions, suggesting lexical diversity is not a proxy for caption quality. Taken together, our results demonstrate that ultrasound vision-language alignment is achievable from public data alone, but robust clinical transfer requires careful balancing of domain adaptation, encoder capacity, and caption supervision quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出EchoCare-CLIP，通过对比学习对齐超声图像与临床文本，发现模板字幕优于LLM生成字幕，且强对齐不保证下游性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有超声基础模型仅基于视觉，缺乏零样本和少样本迁移能力，限制了在标注稀缺的新任务上的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用公开数据实现超声图像与临床文本的跨模态对齐，并平衡领域适应与表征泛化性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 更强的跨模态对齐不一定带来更好的下游性能；全参数微调因过拟合而损害迁移；模板字幕匹配或优于LLM生成字幕，表明词汇多样性不是字幕质量的代理。
analysis.method: 构建CLIP风格的双编码器对比学习框架EchoCare-CLIP，使用超过16K图像-文本对（78%来自专家标注报告），并采用三级模板和LLM生成字幕管线补充数据。
contributions: 提出EchoCare-CLIP，首个将超声图像与临床文本对齐的CLIP风格框架。
构建多器官超声图像-文本数据集，并系统评估不同编码器、字幕策略和微调方式的影响。
analysis.experiments: 在BUSI和AULI外部数据集上评估零样本分类、线性探测和少样本适应，最佳配置零样本分类准确率分别为0.709和0.626。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（16K对），可能限制泛化性。
仅评估了部分器官和任务，临床适用性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EchoCare-CLIP，通过对比学习对齐超声图像与临床文本，发现模板字幕优于LLM生成字幕，且强对齐不保证下游性能。

papers.title: Boundary Mass and the Soft-to-Hard Limit in Mixture-of-Experts
papers.abstract: Softmax-routed mixture-of-experts models approach hard routing as the temperature tends to zero, but this limit is singular near routing ties. This paper studies that singularity at the population level for squared-loss MoE regression. The central object is the \emph{boundary mass}, namely the probability that the top two router scores are separated by only a small margin. Under smoothness and transversality assumptions on the router and input law, we prove coarea/tube estimates showing that this mass is linear in the slab width, with leading constant given by a surface integral over the routing interface in the binary case. These estimates yield quantitative soft-to-hard risk bounds and, under compactness and uniform margin control, $Γ$-convergence of the soft objectives to the hard-routing objective. The main conclusion is that the zero-temperature limit is controlled by a thin geometric layer around routing interfaces, not by the full input space. We then use this geometric core in two more model-dependent directions. In a teacher--student setting, we prove a conditional landscape-transfer principle showing that, when the profiled hard-routing problem has favorable identifiability and curvature and the relevant derivatives transfer at boundary-layer scale, small-temperature soft routing inherits approximate teacher recovery and strict-saddle behavior away from teacher-equivalent partitions. We also give a reduced two-expert Gaussian calculation that illustrates a local symmetry-breaking mechanism aligned with the teacher separator.

analysis.tldr: MoE模型在温度趋零时软路由趋近硬路由，边界质量控制该极限行为。
analysis.research_motivation: 软路由MoE模型在温度趋零时逼近硬路由，但该极限在路由平局附近存在奇异性，理解这一奇异性对于理论分析和实际应用至关重要。
analysis.problem: 量化软路由MoE模型在温度趋零时逼近硬路由的极限行为，特别是路由界面附近的几何层如何控制该极限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但理论分析表明零温极限由路由界面附近的薄几何层控制，而非整个输入空间。
analysis.method: 引入边界质量概念，利用coarea/tube估计证明边界质量与板宽线性关系，并推导软到硬风险界限和Γ-收敛性。
contributions: 提出边界质量概念并证明其线性估计，揭示软到硬极限由路由界面附近几何层控制。
在教师-学生框架下证明条件景观转移原理，表明软路由继承硬路由的近似恢复和严格鞍点行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于光滑性和横截性假设，可能不适用于非光滑或高维复杂场景。
仅针对平方损失MoE回归，其他损失函数或任务需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MoE模型在温度趋零时软路由趋近硬路由，边界质量控制该极限行为。

papers.title: Context-Aware Wireless Token Communication via Joint Token Masking and Detection
papers.abstract: The increasing use of token-based representations in language-driven applications has motivated wireless token communication, where tokens are treated as fundamental units for transmission. However, conventional communication systems overlook dependencies among tokens and allocate transmission resources uniformly, leading to inefficient use of limited wireless resources under channel impairments. In this paper, we propose a context-aware token communication framework that leverages a masked language model (MLM) as a shared contextual model between the transmitter (Tx) and receiver (Rx). At the Rx, we develop a context-aware token detection method that integrates channel likelihoods with MLM-based contextual priors under a Bayesian formulation, enabling robust token inference over noisy channels. At the Tx, we propose a context-aware token masking strategy that selectively omits tokens that can be reliably inferred at the Rx, allowing the available power budget to be concentrated on more informative tokens. These components are jointly designed through a shared MLM, establishing a unified Tx-Rx framework for efficient token transmission and detection. Simulation results demonstrate that the proposed framework significantly improves reconstruction performance compared to conventional and existing token communication schemes, achieving up to 1.77X and 1.63X performance gains on the Europarl corpus and WikiText-103 datasets, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种上下文感知的无线令牌通信框架，通过联合令牌掩码与检测提升传输效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统通信系统忽略令牌间依赖且均匀分配资源，导致无线资源利用低效，亟需上下文感知的通信方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在信道受损条件下实现高效、鲁棒的无线令牌传输与检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用掩码语言模型作为收发端共享上下文模型，接收端采用贝叶斯方法融合信道似然与MLM先验进行令牌检测，发送端基于MLM选择性掩码可推断令牌以集中功率于信息量大的令牌。
contributions: 提出上下文感知令牌检测方法，结合信道似然与MLM先验实现鲁棒推断。
提出上下文感知令牌掩码策略，选择性省略可推断令牌以优化功率分配。
通过共享MLM联合设计收发端，形成统一框架。
analysis.experiments: 在Europarl语料库和WikiText-103数据集上，相比传统方案性能提升分别达1.77倍和1.63倍。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量预训练MLM，泛化性待验证。
未讨论实时性及计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种上下文感知的无线令牌通信框架，通过联合令牌掩码与检测提升传输效率。

papers.title: STABLEVAL: Disagreement-Aware and Stable Evaluation of AI Systems
papers.abstract: Human evaluation remains the primary standard for assessing modern AI systems, yet annotator disagreement, bias, and variability make system rankings fragile under standard majority vote aggregation. Majority vote discards annotator reliability and item-level ambiguity, often yielding unstable comparisons across annotator subsets. We introduce STABLEVAL, a disagreement-aware evaluation framework that models latent item correctness and annotator-specific confusion patterns to produce posterior expected item credit and calibrated agent-level scores. Unlike label-denoising approaches such as Dawid-Skene, STABLEVAL is explicitly designed for stable and uncertainty-aware system evaluation rather than hard label recovery. We formalize ranking stability as a first-class evaluation objective and analyze how aggregation methods preserve or distort underlying annotator behavior. Across controlled synthetic experiments and multiple real-world human-annotated benchmarks, majority vote exhibits increasing score error and ranking instability under annotator heterogeneity and adversarial noise, while STABLEVAL yields more stable and statistically grounded system rankings. These results demonstrate that modeling disagreement is essential for robust and reproducible AI evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出STABLEVAL框架，通过建模标注者分歧和混淆模式，实现比多数投票更稳定的AI系统评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类评估中标注者分歧、偏差和变异性导致多数投票聚合下的系统排名不稳定，现有方法忽略标注者可靠性和项目级歧义。
analysis.problem: 解决多数投票在标注者异质性和对抗噪声下排名不稳定、分数误差大的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多数投票在标注者异质性和对抗噪声下表现出分数误差增大和排名不稳定性。
analysis.method: STABLEVAL框架，建模潜在项目正确性和标注者特定混淆模式，生成后验期望项目信用和校准的智能体级分数，并将排名稳定性作为首要评估目标。
contributions: 提出STABLEVAL，一种分歧感知的评估框架，显式设计用于稳定和不确定性感知的系统评估。
形式化排名稳定性作为首要评估目标，并分析聚合方法如何保持或扭曲标注者行为。
在合成实验和真实基准上证明STABLEVAL比多数投票产生更稳定和统计上更合理的系统排名。
analysis.experiments: 在受控合成实验和多个真实世界人类标注基准上验证，多数投票在标注者异质性和对抗噪声下表现不佳，而STABLEVAL更稳定。
limitations: 可能依赖标注者混淆模式的先验假设。
计算复杂度可能高于简单多数投票。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STABLEVAL框架，通过建模标注者分歧和混淆模式，实现比多数投票更稳定的AI系统评估。

papers.title: Reinforcement Learning Trained Observer Control for Bearings-Only Tracking
papers.abstract: This paper develops a deep reinforcement learning based observer control policy for autonomous bearings-only tracking of a moving target. The observer manoeuvre problem is formulated as a belief Markov decision process, where the belief state is represented by the posterior of a cubature Kalman filter (CKF). The reward function is designed to address two conflicting objectives: minimising the absolute target position estimation error (Euclidean distance) and maintaining CKF estimation consistency (Mahalanobis distance). The reward is formulated as a geometric interpolation between the two objectives on the Pareto front, parametrised by a weighting factor $β\in [0,1]$. The policy is implemented as a deep Q-network (DQN) trained over 50,000 episodes. Performance is evaluated over 5,000 Monte Carlo episodes and compared against two baselines: the perpendicular-to-bearing heuristic and the D-optimal Fisher information maximisation criterion. The results show that the DQN policy at $β= 0.7$ achieves the best trade-off between accuracy and robustness: it matches the information-theoretic baseline on mean tracking accuracy while reducing the worst-case error by nearly a factor of ten, owing to the implicit filter-consistency regularisation provided by the Mahalanobis term in the reward.

analysis.tldr: 用深度强化学习训练观测器控制策略，在纯方位跟踪中平衡精度与鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 纯方位跟踪中观测器机动策略需要同时最小化位置估计误差和保持滤波器一致性，传统启发式或信息论方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个观测器控制策略，在纯方位跟踪中同时优化目标位置估计精度和卡尔曼滤波一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将观测器机动问题建模为信念马尔可夫决策过程，用立方体卡尔曼滤波后验表示信念状态，设计包含欧氏距离和马氏距离的几何插值奖励函数，通过深度Q网络训练策略。
contributions: 提出基于深度强化学习的观测器控制策略，在纯方位跟踪中实现精度与鲁棒性的权衡。
设计几何插值奖励函数，参数化帕累托前沿上的两个冲突目标。
实验表明DQN策略在β=0.7时达到最佳权衡，最差情况误差降低近一个数量级。
analysis.experiments: 在50000个训练片段和5000个蒙特卡洛测试片段上评估，与垂直方位启发式和D-最优Fisher信息最大化基线对比。
limitations: 仅针对纯方位跟踪场景，未推广到其他传感器类型。
依赖CKF后验作为信念状态，可能受滤波器性能影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用深度强化学习训练观测器控制策略，在纯方位跟踪中平衡精度与鲁棒性。

papers.title: The Dynamic Gist-Based Memory Model (DGMM): A Memory-Centric Architecture for Artificial Intelligence
papers.abstract: Contemporary artificial intelligence systems achieve strong performance through large-scale parameterization, retrieval augmentation, and training on extensive static corpora. Despite these advances, they continue to face limitations in persistent memory, temporal grounding, provenance, and interpretability. These challenges are especially pronounced in large language models, where experience is encoded implicitly in fixed parameters, limiting the ability to preserve, inspect, and reinterpret past interactions over time. This paper establishes a memory-centric architectural foundation for artificial intelligence in which experience is represented explicitly and persistently to support temporal grounding, provenance, and interpretability. It proposes an alternative to parameter-centric approaches by treating memory as a first-class, structured substrate for reasoning. We introduce the Dynamic Gist-Based Memory Model (DGMM), an architecture in which experience is represented as an evolving, graph-structured episodic-semantic memory. DGMM encodes experience as interconnected conceptual structures grounded in time, source, and interaction context, and defines selective, cue-conditioned recall as the mechanism for constructing working memory. A formal schema and architectural invariants are provided based on additive memory growth and recall-conditioned interpretation. The results specify properties of DGMM, including episodic persistence, locality of cue-conditioned surprise, and contextual variability without structural modification of stored memory. DGMM provides a coherent architectural theory in which memory is explicit and persistent, supporting evolving interpretation without retraining and enabling interpretable, context-aware, and temporally grounded AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出动态基要记忆模型（DGMM），以显式持久记忆架构替代参数中心方法，支持时间锚定、来源追溯和可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前AI系统（尤其是LLM）依赖大规模参数化、检索增强和静态语料训练，但存在持久记忆缺失、时间锚定不足、来源不可追溯和可解释性差等问题，经验被隐式编码在固定参数中，限制了保存、检查和重新解释历史交互的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种以记忆为中心的架构，使经验被显式、持久地表示，以支持时间锚定、来源追溯和可解释性，并作为推理的一等结构化基质。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出动态基要记忆模型（DGMM），将经验表示为演化的图结构情节-语义记忆，编码为基于时间、来源和交互上下文的概念结构，并通过选择性、线索条件的回忆构建工作记忆，提供形式化模式和架构不变量。
contributions: 提出DGMM架构，将记忆作为一等结构化基质，支持显式持久记忆和演化解释。
提供形式化模式和架构不变量，包括情节持久性、线索条件惊喜的局部性以及无需修改存储记忆的上下文可变性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证。
形式化架构的实现复杂度和效率需进一步评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出动态基要记忆模型（DGMM），以显式持久记忆架构替代参数中心方法，支持时间锚定、来源追溯和可解释性。
